pannatvātpannagāścaiva sarpāścaivāpasarpiṇaḥ।
teṣāṃ vṛthivyāṃ nilayāḥ sūryācandramasoradhaḥ ॥ 1.9.32 ॥
tasya krodhodbhavo yo'sāvagnigarbhassudārūṇaḥ।
sa tu sarpasahotpannānāviveśa viṣātmikān ॥ 1.9.33 ॥
sarpān dṛṣṭvā tataḥ krodhāt krodhātmāno vinirmame।
varṇena kapiśenogrāste bhūtāḥ piśitāśanāḥ ॥ 1.9.34 ॥
bhūtatvātte smṛtā bhūtāḥ piśācāḥ piśitāśanāt।
vayato gāstatastasya gandharvo jajñire tadā ॥ 1.9.35 ॥
dhyāyatītyeṣa dhāturvai yātrārthe paripaṭyate।
pibato jajñire gāstu gaṃdharvāstena te smṛtāḥ ।.36।।
aṣṭāsvetāsu sṛṣṭāsu devayoniṣu sa prabhuḥ।
tataḥ svacchandato'nyāni vayāṃsi vaya so'sṛjat ॥ 1.9.36 ॥
chādyatastāni chandāṃsi vayaso'pi vayāṃsyapi।
śūnyān dṛṣṭvā tu devo vai'sṛjatpakṣigaṇānapi ॥ 1.9.37 ॥
mukhato'jān sasarjjātha vakṣasaścavayo'sṛjat।
gāścaivāthodarādbrahmā pārśvābhyāñca vinirmame ॥ 1.9.38 ॥
padbhyāñcāścān samātaṅgān śarabhān gavayān mṛgān।
uṣṭrānaścatarāṃścaiva tāśvānyāścaiva jātayaḥ ॥ 1.9.39 ॥
oṣadhyaḥ phalamūlāni romatastasya jajñire।
evaṃ paśvoṣadhīḥ sṛṣṭvā nyayuñjatso'dhvare prabhuḥ ॥ 1.9.40 ॥
tasmādādau tu kalpasya tretāyugamukhe tadā।
gaurajaḥ puruṣo meṣo hyaśvo'śvataragarddabhau।
etān grāmyān paśūnāhurāraṇyāṃśca nibodhata ॥ 1.9.41 ॥
śvāpadā dvikhuro hastī vānaraḥ pakṣipañcamāḥ।
undakāḥ paśavaḥ sṛṣṭāḥ saptamāstu sarīsṛpāḥ ॥ 1.9.42 ॥
gāyatraṃ varuṇañcaiva trivṛtsaumyaṃ rathantaram।
agniṣṭomaṃ ca yajñānāṃ nirmame prathamānmukhāt ॥ 1.9.43 ॥
chandāṃsi traiṣṭubhaṅkarma stomaṃ pañcadaśantathā।
bṛhatsāmamathokthañca dakṣiṇātso'sṛjanmukhāt ॥ 1.9.44 ॥
sāmāni jagatī cchandastomaṃ pañcadaśantathā।
vairūpyamatirātrañca paścimādasṛjanmukhāt ॥ 1.9.45 ॥
ekaviṃśamatharvāṇamāptoryāmāṇameva ca।
anuṣṭubhaṃ savairājamuttarādasṛjanmukhāt ॥ 1.9.46 ॥
vidyuto'śanimeghāṃśca rohitendradhanūṃṣi ca।
vayāṃsi ca sasarjjādau kalpasya bhagavān prabhuḥ ॥ 1.9.47 ॥
uccāvacāni bhūtāni gātrebyastasya jajñire।
brahmaṇastu prajāsargaṃ sṛjato hi prajāpateḥ ॥ 1.9.48 ॥
sṛṣṭvā catuṣṭayaṃ pūrvaṃ devāsurapitṝn prajāḥ।
tataḥ sṛjati bhūtāni sthāvarāṇi carāṇi ca ॥ 1.9.49 ॥
yakṣān piśācān gandharvān tathaivāpsarasāṅgaṇān।
narakinnararakṣāṃsi vayaḥ paśumṛgoragān ॥ 1.9.50 ॥
avyayañca vyayaṃ caiva yadidaṃ sthāṇu jaṅgamam।
teṣāṃ ye yāni karmāṇi prāksṛṣṭyāṃ pratipedire।
tānyeva pratipadyante sṛjyamānāḥ punaḥ punaḥ ॥ 1.9.51 ॥
hiṃsrāhiṃsre mṛdukrūre dharmādharmāvṛtānṛte।
tadbhāvitāḥ prapadyante tasmāttattasya rocate ॥ 1.9.52 ॥
mahābhūteṣu nānātvamindriyārtheṣu mūrttiṣu।
viniyogañca bhūtānāṃ dhātaiva vyadadhāt svayam ॥ 1.9.53 ॥
kecit puruṣakārantu prāhuḥ karma ca mānavāḥ।
daivamityapare viprāḥ svabhāvaṃ daivacintakāḥ ॥ 1.9.54 ॥
pauruṣaṃ karma daivañca phalavṛttisvabhāvataḥ।
na caikaṃ na pṛthagbhāvamadhikaṃ na tayorviduḥ।
etadevañca naikañca na cobhe na ca vāpyubhe ॥ 1.9.55 ॥
karmasthān viṣayān brūyuḥ sattvasthāḥ samadarśinaḥ।
nāmarūpañca bhūtānāṃ kṛtānāñca prapañcanam।
vedaśabdhebhya evādau nirmame sa maheśvaraḥ ॥ 1.9.56 ॥
ṛṣīṇāṃ nāmadheyāni yāśca deveṣu dṛṣṭayaḥ।
śarvaryante prasūtānāṃ tānyevāsya dadhāti saḥ ॥ 1.9.57 ॥
yatharttāvṛtuliṅgāni nānārūpāṇi paryaye।
dṛśyante tāni tānyeva tathā bhāvā yugādiṣu ॥ 1.9.58 ॥
evaṃvidhāsu sṛṣṭāsu brahmaṇā'vyaktajanmanā।
śarvaryante pradṛśyante siddhimāśritya mānasīm ॥ 1.9.59 ॥
evaṃbhūtāni sṛṣṭāni carāṇi sthāvarāṇi ca।
yadāsya tāḥ prajāḥ sṛṣṭā na vyavardhanta dhīmataḥ ॥ 1.9.60 ॥
athānyānmānasān putrān sadṛśānātmano'sṛjat।
bhṛguṃ pulastyaṃ pulahaṃ kratumāṅgirasantathā ॥ 1.9.61 ॥
marīciṃ dakṣamatriṃ ca vasiṣṭhaṃ caiva mānasam।
nava brahmāṇa ityete purāṇe niścayaṃ gatāḥ ।
teṣāṃ brahmātmakānāṃ vai sarveṣāṃ brahmavādinām ॥ 1.9.62 ॥
tato'sṛjatpunarbrahmā rudraṃ roṣātmasaṃbhavam।
saṃkalpaṃ caiva dharmaṃ ca pūrveṣāmapi pūrvajaḥ ॥ 1.9.63 ॥
agre sasarjja vai brahmā mānasānātmanaḥ samān।
sanandanaṃ sasanakaṃ vidvāṃsaṃ ca sanātanam ॥ 1.9.64 ॥
sanatkumāraṃ ca vibhuṃ sanakaṃ ca sanandanam।
na te lokeṣu sarjjante nirapekṣāḥ sanātanāḥ ॥ 1.9.65 ॥
sarve te hyāgatajñānā vītarāgā vimatsarāḥ।
teṣvevaṃ nirapekṣyeṣu lokavṛttānukāraṇāt ॥ 1.9.66 ॥
hiraṇyagarbho bhagavān parameṣṭī hyacintayat।
tasya roṣātsamutpannaḥ puruṣo'rkkasamadyutiḥ।
arddhanārīnaravapustejasā jvalanopamaḥ ॥ 1.9.67 ॥
sarvaṃ tejomayaṃ jātamādityasamatejasam।
vibhajātmānamityuktvā tatraivāntaradhīyata ॥ 1.9.68 ॥
evamuktvā dvidhābhūtaḥ pṛthak strī puruṣaḥ pṛthak।
sa caikādaśadhā jajñe arddhamātmānamīśvaraḥ ॥ 1.9.69 ॥
tenoktāste mahātmānaḥ sarva eva mahātmanā।
jagato bahulībhāvamadhikṛtya hitaiṣiṇaḥ ॥ 1.9.70 ॥
lokavṛttāntahetorhi prayatadhvamatandritāḥ।
viśvaṃ viśvasya lokasya sthāpanāya hitāya ca ॥ 1.9.71 ॥
evamuktāstu rurudurdudruvuśca samantataḥ।
rodanāddrāvaṇāccaiva rudrā nāmnetiviśrutāḥ ॥ 1.9.72 ॥
yairhi vyāptamidaṃ sarvaṃ trailokyaṃ sacarācaram।
teṣāmanucarā loke sarvalokaparāyaṇāḥ ॥ 1.9.73 ॥
naikanāgā yutabalā vikrāntāśacava gaṇeśvarāḥ।
tatra yā sā mahābhāgā śaṃkarasyārddhakāyinī ॥ 1.9.74 ॥
prāguktā tu mayā tubhyaṃ strī svayaṃbhormukhodgatā।
kāyārddhaṃ dakṣiṇantasyāḥ śuklaṃ vāmaṃ tathā'sitam ॥ 1.9.75 ॥
ātmānaṃ vibhajasveti soktā devī svayaṃbhuvā।
sā tu proktā dvidhābhūtā śūklā kṛṣṇā ca vai dvijāḥ।
tasyā nāmāni vakṣyāmi śrṛṇudhvaṃ susamāhitāḥ ॥ 1.9.76 ॥
svāhā svadhā mahāvidyā medhā lakṣmīḥ sarasvatī।
aparṇā caikaparṇā ca tathā syādeva pāṭalā ॥ 1.9.77 ॥
umā haimavatī ṣaṣṭī kalyāṇī caiva nāmataḥ।
khyātiḥ prajñā mahābhāgā loke gaurīti viśrutā ॥ 1.9.78 ॥
viśvarūpamathāryāyāḥ pṛthagdehavibhāvanāt।
śrṛṇu saṃkṣepatastasyā yathāvadanupūrvaśaḥ ॥ 1.9.79 ॥
prakṛtirniyatā raudrī durgā bhadrā pramāthinī।
kālarātrirmahāmāyā revatī bhutanāyikā ॥ 1.9.80 ॥
dvāparāntavikāreṣu devyā nāmāni me śrṛṇu।
gautamī kauśikī āryā caṇḍī kātyāyanī satī ॥ 1.9.81 ॥
kumārī yādavī devī varadā kṛṣṇapiṅgalā।
barhirdhvajā śūladharā paramabrahmacāriṇī ॥ 1.9.82 ॥
māhendrī cendrabhaginī vṛṣakanyaikavāsasī।
aparājitā bahubhujā pragalbhā siṃhavāhinī ॥ 1.9.83 ॥
ekānasā daityahanī māyā mahiṣamarddinī।
amoghā vindhyanilayā vikrāntā gaṇanāyikā ॥ 1.9.84 ॥
devīnāmavikārāṇi ityetāni yathākramam।
bhadrakālyāstavoktāni devyā nāmāni tattvataḥ ॥ 1.9.85 ॥
ye paṭhanti narāsteṣāṃ vidyate na parābhavaḥ।
araṇye prāntare vāpi pure vāpi gṛhe'pi vā ॥ 1.9.86 ॥
rakṣāmetāṃ prayuñjīta jale vāpi sthale'pi vā।
vyādhrakumbhīracaurebhyo bhūtasthāne viśeṣataḥ।
ādhiṣvapi ca sarvāsu devyā nāmāni kīrttayet ॥ 1.9.87 ॥
arbhakagrahabhūtaiśca pūtanāmātṛbhiḥ sadā।
abhyarditānāṃ bālānāṃ rakṣāmetāṃ prayojayet ॥ 1.9.88 ॥
mahādevī kule dve tu prajñā śrīśca prakīrttyate।
ābhyāṃ devīsahasrāṇi yairvyāptamakhilaṃ jagat ॥ 1.9.89 ॥
sā'sṛjad vyavasāyantu dharmaṃ bhūtasukhāvaham।
saṅkalpañcaiva kalpādau jajñire'vyaktayonitaḥ ॥ 1.9.90 ॥
mānasaśca rucirnnāma vijñeyo brahmaṇaḥ sutaḥ।
prāṇāt svādasṛjaddakṣañcakṣurbhyāñca marīcikam ॥ 1.9.91 ॥
bhṛgustu hṛdayājjajñe ṛṣiḥ salilajanmanaḥ।
śiraso'ṅgirasañcaiva śrotrādatrintathaiva ca ।।93।
pulastyañca tathodānādvyānācca pulahaṃ punaḥ।
samānajaṃ vasiṣṭhantu apānānnirmame kratum ॥ 1.9.92 ॥
abhimānātmakaṃ bhadraṃ nirmame nīlalohitam।
ityete brahmaṇaḥ putrāḥ prāṇajā dvādaśa smṛtāḥ ॥ 1.9.93 ॥
ityete mānasāḥ putrā vijñeyā brahmaṇaḥ sutāḥ।
bhṛgvādayastu ye sṛṣṭā nā caite brahmavādinaḥ ॥ 1.9.94 ॥
gṛhamedhinaḥ purāṇāste dharmastaiḥ prāk pravārttitaḥ।
dvādaśaite pravarttante saha rudreṇa vaiprajāḥ ॥ 1.9.95 ॥
ṛbhuḥ sanatkumārastu dvāvetāvūrddhvaretasau।
pūrvotpannau purā tebhyaḥ sarveṣāmapi pūrvajau ॥ 1.9.96 ॥
vyatīte prathame kalpe purāṇe lokasādhakau।
vairāje tāvubhau loke tejaḥ saṃkṣipya cāsthitau ॥ 1.9.97 ॥
tāvubhau yogadharmāṇāvāropyātmānamātmani।
prajādharmañca kāmañca varttayetāṃ mahaujasā ॥ 1.9.98 ॥
yathotpannastathaiveha kumāra iti cocyate।
tasmātsanatkumāroyamiti nāmāsya kīrtitam ॥ 1.9.99 ॥
teṣāṃ dvādaśa te vaṃśā divyā devaguṇānvitāḥ।
kriyāvantaḥ prajāvanto maharṣibhiralaṃkṛtāḥ ॥ 1.9.100 ॥
ityeṣa karaṇodbhūto lokān sraṣṭuṃ svayaṃbhuvaḥ।
mahadādiviśeṣānto vikāraḥ prakṛteḥ svayam ॥ 1.9.101 ॥
candrasūryaprabhāloko grahanakṣatramaṇḍitaḥ।
nadībhiśca samudraiśca parvataiśca samāvṛtaḥ ॥ 1.9.102 ॥
puraiśca vividhākāraiḥ prītairjjanapadaistathā।
tasmin brahmavane'vyakte brahmā carati śarvarīm ॥ 1.9.103 ॥
avyaktabījaprabhavastasyaivānugrahotthitaḥ।
buddhiskandhamayaścaiva indriyāṅkurakoṭaraḥ ॥ 1.9.104 ॥
mahābhūtapraśākhaśca viśeṣaiḥ patravāṃstathā।
dharmādharmasupuṣpastu sukhaduḥkhaphalodayaḥ ॥ 1.9.105 ॥
ājīvaḥ sarvabhūtānāmayaṃ vṛkṣaḥ sanātanaḥ।
etadbrahmabalaṃ caiva brahmavṛkṣasya tasya ha ॥ 1.9.106 ॥
avyaktaṃ kāraṇaṃ yattannityaṃ sadasadātmakam।
ityeṣo'nugrahaḥ sargo brahmaṇaḥ prākṛtastu yaḥ ॥ 1.9.107 ॥
mukhyādayastu ṣaṭ‌sargā vaikṛtā buddhipūrvakāḥ।
traikāle samavartanta brahmaṇaste'bhimāninaḥ ॥ 1.9.108 ॥
sargāḥ parasparasyātha kāraṇaṃ te budhaiḥ smṛtāḥ।
divyau suparṇau sayujau saśākhau paṭavidrumau ।।
ekastu yodrumaṃ vetti nānyaḥ sarvātmanastataḥ ॥ 1.9.109 ॥
dyaurmūrddhānaṃ yasya viprāstuvanti khannābhiṃ vai candrasūryau ca netre।
diśaḥ śrotre caraṇau cāsya bhūmiḥ so'cintyātmā sarvabhūta prasūtiḥ ॥ 1.9.110 ॥
vakrādyasya brāhmaṇāḥ saṃprasūtā yadvakṣastaḥ kṣatriyāḥ pūrvabhāge।
vaiśyāśvororyasya padbhayāṃ ca śūdrāḥ sarve varṇā gātrataḥ saṃprasūtāḥ ॥ 1.9.111 ॥
maheśvaraḥ paro'vyaktādaṇḍamavyaktasaṃbhavam।
aṇḍājjajñe punarbrahmā yena lokāḥ kṛtāstvime ॥ 1.9.112 ॥

iti śrīmahāpuraṇe vāyuprokte devādisṛṣṭivarṇanaṃ nāma navamo'dhyāyaḥ ।। 9 ।

## 1.10

।।sūta uvāca।।
evaṃbhūteṣu lokeṣu brahmaṇā lokakartṛṇā।
yadā tā na pravarttante prajāḥ kenāpi hetunā ॥ 1.10.1 ॥
tamomātrāvṛto brahmā tadāprabhṛti duḥkhitaḥ।
tataḥ sa vidadhe buddhimarthaniścayagāminīm ॥ 1.10.2 ॥
athātmani samasrākṣīttamomātrāṃ niyāmikām ।
rājasatvaṃ parājitya varttamānaṃ sa dharmataḥ ॥ 1.10.3 ॥
tapyate tena duḥkhena śokañcakre jagatpatiḥ।
tamaśca vyanudattasmādrajastamasamāvṛṇot ॥ 1.10.4 ॥
tattamaḥ pratinuttaṃ vai mithunaṃ sa vyajāyata।
adharmāccaraṇājjajñe hiṃsā śokādajāyata ॥ 1.10.5 ॥
tatastasmin samudbhūte mithune caraṇātmani।
tataśca bhagavānāsīt prītaścaivamaśiśriyat ॥ 1.10.6 ॥
svāṃ tanuṃ sa tato brahmā tāmapohadabhāsvarām।
dvidhākarotsa taṃ dehamarddhena puruṣo'bhavat ॥ 1.10.7 ॥
arddhena nārī sā tasya śatarūpā vyajāyata।
prākṛtāṃ bhūtadhātrīṃ tāṃ kāmānvai sṛṣṭavān vibhuḥ ॥ 1.10.8 ॥
sā divaṃ vṛthivīñcaiva mahimnā vyāpya dhiṣṭitā।
brahmaṇaḥ sā tanuḥ pūrvā divamāvṛttya tiṣṭhati ॥ 1.10.9 ॥
yā tvarddhāt sṛjate nārī śatarūpā vyajāyata।
sā devī niyutantaptvā tapaḥ paramaduścaram ॥ 1.10.10 ॥
bhartārandīptayaśasaṃ puruṣaṃ pratyapadyata।
sa vai svāyambhuvaḥ pūrvaṃ puruṣo manurucyate ॥ 1.10.11 ॥
tasyaivasaptatiyugaṃ manvantaramihocyate ।
labdhā tu puruṣaḥ patnīṃ śatarūpāmayonijām ॥ 1.10.12 ॥
tayā sa ramate sārddhaṃ tasmātsā ratirucyate।
prathamaḥ saṃprayogaḥ sa kalpādau samavarttata ॥ 1.10.13 ॥
virājamasṛjat brahmā so'bhavat puruṣo virāṭ ।
samrāṇmānasarūpāttu vai rājastu manuḥ smṛtaḥ ॥ 1.10.14 ॥
sa vairājaḥ prajāsargaḥ sa sarge puruṣo manuḥ।
vairājātpuruṣādvīrācchatarūpā vyajāyata ॥ 1.10.15 ॥
priyavratottānapādau putrau putravatāṃ varau ।
kanye dve ca mahābhāge yābhyāṃ jātāḥ prajāstvimāḥ ॥ 1.10.16 ॥
devī nāmnā tathākūtiḥ prasūtiścaiva te śubhe।
svāyambhuvaḥ prasūtintu dakṣāya vyasṛjat prabhuḥ ॥ 1.10.17 ॥
prāṇo dakṣastu vijñeyaḥ saṅkalpo manurucyate।
rūceḥ prajāpateścaiva ākūtiṃ pratyapādayat ॥ 1.10.18 ॥
ākūtyāṃ mithunaṃ yajñe mānasasya ruceḥ śubham।
yajñaśca dakṣiṇā caiva yamakau sambabhūvatuḥ ॥ 1.10.19 ॥
yajñasya dakṣiṇāyāñca putrā dvādaśa jajñire।
yāmā iti samākhayātā devāḥ svāyambhuve'ntare ॥ 1.10.20 ॥
yamasya putrā yajñasya tasmādyāmāstu te smṛtāḥ।
ajitāścaiva śūkāśca gaṇau dvau brahmaṇaḥ smṛtau ॥ 1.10.21 ॥
yāmāḥ pūrvaṃ parikrāntā yataḥ saṃjñā divaukasaḥ।
svāyambhūvasutāyāntu prasūtyāṃ lokamātaraḥ ॥ 1.10.22 ॥
tasyāṃ kanyāścaturviṃśaddakṣastvajanayat prabhuḥ।
sarvāstāśca mahābhāgāḥ sarvāḥ kamalalocanāḥ ॥ 1.10.23 ॥
yogapatnyaśca tāḥ sarvāḥ sarvāstā yogamātaraḥ।
śraddhā lakṣmī dhṝtistuṣṭiḥ puṣṭirmedhā kriyā tathā।
buddhirllajjā vapuḥ śāntiḥ siddhiḥ kīrttistrayodaśī ॥ 1.10.24 ॥
patnyarthe pratijagrāha dharmo dākṣāyaṇīḥ prabhuḥ।
dvārāṇyetāni caivāsya vihitāni svayambhuvā ॥ 1.10.25 ॥
tābhyaḥ śiṣṭā yavīyasya ekādaśa sulocanāḥ।
khyātiḥ satyatha saṃbhūtiḥ smṛtiḥ prītiḥ kṣamā tathā ॥ 1.10.26 ॥
sannatiśacavānasūyā ca ūrjjā svāhā svadhā tathā।
tāstataḥ pratyapadyanta punaranye maharṣayaḥ ॥ 1.10.27 ॥
rudro bhṛgurmarīciśca aṅgirāḥ pulahaḥ kratuḥ ।
pulastyo'trirvasiṣṭhaśca pitaro'gristathaiva ca ॥ 1.10.28 ॥
satīṃ bhavāya prāyacchat khyātiñca bhṛgave tathā।
marīcaye ca sambhūtiṃ smṛtimāṅgirase dadau ॥ 1.10.29 ॥
prītiṃ caiva pulastyāya kṣamāṃ vai pulahāya ca।
kratave sannatiṃ nāma anasūyāntathātraye ॥ 1.10.30 ॥
ūrjjaṃ dadau vasiṣṭāya svāhāṃ vai hyagnaye dadau ।
svadhāṃ caiva pitṛbhyastu tāsvapatyāni vakṣyate ॥ 1.10.31 ॥
ete sarve mahābhāgāḥ prajñāḥ svānuṣṭitāḥ sthitāḥ।
manvantareṣu sarveṣu yāvadābhūtasaṃplavam ॥ 1.10.32 ॥
śraddhā kāmaṃ vijajñe vai darpo lakṣmīsutaḥ smṛtaḥ।
dhṛtyāstu niyamaḥ putrastuṣṭayāḥ santoṣa ucyate ॥ 1.10.33 ॥
puṣṭyā lābhaḥ sutaścāpi medhāputraḥ śrutastathā।
kriyāyāstu nayaḥ prokto daṇḍaḥ samaya eva ca ॥ 1.10.34 ॥
buddhervaudhasutaścāpi apramādaśca tāvubhau ।
lajjāyā vinayaḥ putro vyavasāyo vapuḥsutaḥ ॥ 1.10.35 ॥
kṣemaḥ śāntisutaścāpi sukhaṃ siddhervyajāyata।
yaśaḥ kīrtteḥ sutaścāpi ityete dharmasūnavaḥ ॥ 1.10.36 ॥
kāmasya harṣaḥ putro vai devyā ratyā vyajāyata।
ityeṣa vai sukhodarkkaḥ sargo dharmasya kīrttitaḥ ॥ 1.10.37 ॥
jajñe hiṃsā tvadharmāddhai nikṛtiścānṛtāvubhau ।
nikṛtyānṛtayorjajñe bhayaṃ naraka eva ca ॥ 1.10.38 ॥
māyā ca vedanā cāpi mithunadvayametayoḥ।
bhayājjajñe'tha sā māyā mṛtyuṃ bhūtāpahāriṇam ॥ 1.10.39 ॥
vedanāyāstataścāpi duḥkhaṃ jajñe'tha rauravāt ।
mṛtyayorvyādhijvarā śokāḥ krodho'sūyā ca jajñire ।
duḥkhāntarā smṛtā hyete sarve cādharmalakṣaṇāḥ ॥ 1.10.40 ॥
teṣāṃ bhāryā'sti putro vā te sarve nidhanāḥ smṛtāḥ ।
ityeṣa tāmasaḥ sargo jajñe dharmaniyāmakaḥ ॥ 1.10.41 ॥
prajāḥ sṛjeti vyādiṣṭo brahmaṇā nīlalohitaḥ ।
so'bhidhyāya satīṃ bhāryānnirmame hyātmasambhavām ॥ 1.10.42 ॥
nādhikānna ca hīnāṃstānmānasānātmanaḥ samān।
sahasraṃ hi sahasrāṇāmasṛjat kṛmivāsasā।
tulyā ścaivātmanaḥ sarve rūpatejobalaśrutaiḥ ॥ 1.10.43 ॥
piṅgalānsanniṣaṅgāṃśca sakaparddān vilohitān ।
vivāsān hari keśāṃśca dṛṣṭighnāṃśca kapālinaḥ ॥ 1.10.44 ॥
bahurūpān virūpāṃśca viśvarūpāṃścarūpiṇaḥ।
rathino varmiṇaścaiva dharmiṇaśca varūthinaḥ ॥ 1.10.45 ॥
sahasraśata bāhūṃśca divyān bhaumāntarikṣagān।
sthūlaśīrṣānaṣṭadaṃṣṭrānudvijihvāṃstrilocanān ॥ 1.10.46 ॥
annādān piśitādāṃśa cava ājyapān somapāṃstathā।
medapāṃ svātikāyāṃśca śitikaṇṭogramanyavaḥ ॥ 1.10.47 ॥
sopāsaṅgatalatrāṃśca dhanvino hyupavarmiṇaḥ।
āsīnān dhāvataścaiva jṛmbhinaścaiva dhiṣṭitān ॥ 1.10.48 ॥
adhyā pino'tha japato yuñjato'dhyāyatastathā।
jvalato varṣataścaiva dyotamānān pradhūpitān ॥ 1.10.49 ॥
buddhān buddhatamāṃścaiva brahmiṣṭān śubhadarśanān ।
nīlagrī vān sahasrākṣān saṃrvāścātha kṣapācarān ॥ 1.10.50 ॥
adṛśyān sarvabhūtānāṃ mahāyogān mahaujasaḥ।
rūdatodravataścaiva evaṃyuktān sahasraśaḥ।
apātayāmānasṛjat rudrarūpān surottamān ॥ 1.10.51 ॥
brahmā dṛṣṭvā'bravīdetānmāsrākṣīrīdṛśīḥ prajāḥ।
sraṣṭavyā nātmanastulyāḥ prajā naivādhikāstvayā।
anyāḥ sṛjatvaṃ bhadrante sthitohantvaṃ sṛja prajāḥ ॥ 1.10.52 ॥
ete ye vai mayā mṛṣṭā virūpā nīlalehitāḥ ।
sahasrāṇāṃ sahasrantu ātmanopamaniścitāḥ ॥ 1.10.53 ॥
ete devā bhaviṣyanti rūdrā nāma mahābalāḥ।
pṛthivyāmantārīkṣe ca rudranāmnā pratiśrutāḥ ॥ 1.10.54 ॥
śatarudrasamāmnātā bhaviṣyantīha yajñiyāḥ।
yajñabhājo bhaviṣyanti sarve devayugaiḥ saha ॥ 1.10.55 ॥
manvantareṣu ye devā bhaviṣyantīha cchandajāḥ।
taiḥ sārddhamījyamānāste sthāsyantīha yugakṣayāt ॥ 1.10.56 ॥
evamuktastadā brahmā mahādevena dhīmatā।
pratyuvāca tadā bhīmaṃ hṛṣyamāṇaḥ prajāpatiḥ ॥ 1.10.57 ॥
evaṃ bhavatu bhadraṃ te yathā te vyāhṛtaṃ prabho।
brahmaṇā samanujñā te sadā sarvamabhūt kila ॥ 1.10.58 ॥
tataḥprabhṛti deveśo na prāsūyata vai prajāḥ।
ūrddhvaretāḥ sthitaḥ sthāṇuryāvadābhūtasaṃplavam।
yasmāccoktaṃ sthito'smīti tataḥ sthāṇuriti smṛtaḥ ॥ 1.10.59 ॥
jñānaṃ vairāgyamaiśvaryaṃ tapaḥ sacatyaṃ kṣamā dhṛtiḥ।
sraṣṭṛtvamātmasambodhastvadhiṣṭātṛtvameva ca।
atha yāni daśaitāni nityantiṣṭhanti śaṅkare ॥ 1.10.60 ॥
sarvān devān ṛṣīṃścaiva sametānasuraiḥ saha।
atyeti tejasā devo mahādevastataḥ smṛtaḥ ॥ 1.10.61 ॥
atyeti devānaiścaryādbalena ca mahāsurān।
jñānena ca munīn sarvān yogādbhūtāni sarvaśaḥ ॥ 1.10.62 ॥
।।ṛṣaya ūcuḥ ।।
yogaṃ tapaśca satyañca dharmañcāpi mahāmune।
māheśvarasya jñānasya sādhanañca prajakṣva naḥ ॥ 1.10.63 ॥
yena yena ca dharmeṇa gatiṃ prāpsyanti vai dvijāḥ।
tatsarvaṃ śrotumicchāmi yogaṃ māheśvaraṃ prabho ॥ 1.10.64 ॥
।। vāyuruvāca।।
pañca dharmāḥ purāṇe tu rudreṇa samudāhṛtāḥ।
māheśvaryaṃ yathā proktaṃ rudrairakliṣṭakarmabhiḥ ॥ 1.10.65 ॥
ādityairvasubhiḥ sādhyairaśvibhyāñcaiva sarvaśaḥ।
marudbhirbhṛgubhiścaiva ye cānye vibudhālayāḥ ॥ 1.10.66 ॥
yamaśukrapurogaiśca pitṛkālāntakaistathā।
etaiśvānyaiśacava bahubhiste dharmāḥ paryupāsitāḥ ॥ 1.10.67 ॥
te vai prakṣīṇakarmāṇaḥ śāradāmbaranirmalāḥ।
upāsate munigaṇāḥ sandhāyātmānamātmani ॥ 1.10.68 ॥
gurupriyahite yuktā gurūṇāṃ vai priyepsavaḥ।
vimucya mānuṣaṃ janma viharanti ca devavat ॥ 1.10.69 ॥
maheśvareṇa ye proktāḥ pañca dharmāḥ sanātanāḥ।
tān sarvān kramayogena ucyamānānnibodhata ॥ 1.10.70 ॥
prāṇāyāmastathā dhyānaṃ pratyāhāro'tha dhāraṇā।
smaraṇañcaiva yoge'smin pañca dharmāḥ prakīrttitāḥ ॥ 1.10.71 ॥
teṣāṃ kramaviśeṣeṇa lakṣaṇaṃ kāraṇaṃ tathā।
pravakṣyāmi tathā tattvaṃ yathā rudreṇa bhāṣitam ॥ 1.10.72 ॥
prāṇāyāmagatiśvāpi prāṇasyāyāma ucyate ।
sa cāpi trividhaḥ prokto mando madhyottamastathā ॥ 1.10.73 ॥
prāṇānāñca nirodhastu sa prāṇāyāmasaṃjñitaḥ ।
prāṇāyāmapramāṇantu mātrā vai dvādaśa smṛtāḥ ॥ 1.10.74 ॥
mando dvādaśamātrastu udvātā dvādaśa smṛtāḥ ।
madhyamaśca dvirudvātaścaturviṃśatimātrikaḥ ॥ 1.10.75 ॥
uttamastatrtrirudvāto mātrāḥ ṣaṭ‌triṃśaducyate।
svedakampaviṣādānāṃ janano hyuttamaḥ smṛtaḥ ॥ 1.10.76 ॥
ityetat trividhaṃ proktaṃ prāṇāyāmasya lakṣaṇam।
pramāṇañca samāsena lakṣaṇañca nibodhata ॥ 1.10.77 ॥
siṃho vā kuñjaro vāpi tathā'nyo vā mṛgo vane।
gṛhītaḥ sevyamānastu mṛduḥ samupajāyate ॥ 1.10.78 ॥
tathā prāṇo durādharṣaḥ sarveṣāmakṛtātmanām ।
yogataḥ sevyamānastu sa evābhyāsato vrajet ॥ 1.10.79 ॥
sa caiva hi yathā siṃhaḥ kuñjaro vāpi durbalaḥ।
kālāntaravaśādyogādgamyate parimarddanāt ॥ 1.10.80 ॥
paridhāya mano mandaṃ vaśyatvaṃ cādhigacchati ।
paridhāya manodevaṃ tathā jīvati mārutaḥ ॥ 1.10.81 ॥
vaśyatvaṃ hi yathā vāyurgacchate yogamāsthitaḥ।
tadā svacchandataḥ prāṇaṃ nayate yatra cecchati ॥ 1.10.82 ॥
yathā siṃho gajo vāpi vaśyatvādavatiṣṭhate।
abhayāya manuṣyāṇāṃ mṛgebhyaḥ saṃpravarttate ॥ 1.10.83 ॥
yathā paricitaścāyaṃ vāyurvai viśvatomukhaḥ।
paridhyāyamānaḥ saṃruddhaḥ śarīre kilbiṣaṃ dahat ॥ 1.10.84 ॥
prāṇāyāmena yuktasya viprasya niyatātmanaḥ।
sarve doṣāḥ praṇaśyanti sattvasthaścaiva jāyate ॥ 1.10.85 ॥
tapāṃsi yāni tapyante vratāni niyamāśca ye।
sarvayajñaphalañcaiva prāṇāyāmaśca tatsamaḥ ॥ 1.10.86 ॥
abbinduṃ yaḥ kuśāgreṇa māsi māsi samaśrute।
saṃvatsaraśataṃ sāgraṃ prāṇāyāmañca tatsamam ॥ 1.10.87 ॥
prāṇāyāmairdaherdoṣān dhāraṇābhiśca kilbiṣam।
pratyāhāreṇa viṣayān dhyānenānāśvarān guṇān ॥ 1.10.88 ॥
tasmādyuktaḥ sadā yogī prāṇāyāmaparo bhavet ।
sarvapāpaviśuddhātmā paraṃ brahmādhigacchati ॥ 1.10.89 ॥

iti śrīma hāpurāṇe vāyuprokte manvantarādivarṇanaṃ nāma daśamo'dhyāḥ ।। 10 ।

## 1.11

।। vāyuruvāca ।।
ekaṃ mahāntaṃ divasamahorātramathāpi vā।
arddhamāsaṃ tathā māsamayanābdayugāni ca ॥ 1.11.1 ॥
mahāyugasahasrāṇi ṛṣayastapasi sthitāḥ।
upāsate mahātmānaḥ prāṇaṃ divyena cakṣuṣā ॥ 1.11.2 ॥
atūrddhvaṃ pravakṣyāmi prāṇāyāmaprayojanam।
phalañcaiva viśeṣeṇa yathāha bhagavān prabhuḥ ॥ 1.11.3 ॥
prayojanāni catvāri prāṇāyāmasya viddhivai।
śāntiḥ praśāntirdīptiśca prasādaśca catuṣṭayam ॥ 1.11.4 ॥
ghorākāraśivānāntu karmaṇāṃ phalasambhavam।
svayaṃkṛtāni kālena ihāmutra ca dehinām ॥ 1.11.5 ॥
pitṛmātṛ praduṣṭānāṃ jñātisambandhisaṅkaraiḥ।
kṣapaṇaṃ hi kaṣāyāṇāṃ pāpānāṃ śāntirucyate ॥ 1.11.6 ॥
lobhamānātmakānāṃ hi pāpānāmapi saṃyamaḥ ।
ihāmutra hitārthāya praśāntistapa ucyate ॥ 1.11.7 ॥
sūryendugrahatārāṇāṃ tulyastu viṣayo bhavet।
ṛṣīṇāñca prasiddhānāṃ jñānavijñānasampadām ॥ 1.11.8 ॥
atītānāgatānāñca darśanaṃ sāmpratasya ca ।
buddhasya samatāṃ yānti dīptiḥ syāttapa ucyate ॥ 1.11.9 ॥
indriyāṇīndriyārthāṃśca manaḥ pañca ca mārutān ।
prasādayati yenāsau prasāda iti saṃjñitaḥ ॥ 1.11.10 ॥
ityeṣa dharmaḥ prathamaḥ prāṇāyāmaścaturvidhaḥ।
sannikṛṣṭaphalo jñeyaḥ sadyaḥkālaprasādajaḥ ॥ 1.11.11 ॥
ata ūrddhvaṃ pravakṣyāmi prāṇāyāmasya lakṣaṇam।
āsanaṃ ca yathātattvaṃ yuñjato yogameva ca ॥ 1.11.12 ॥
oṅkāraṃ prathamaṃ kṛtvā candrasūyauṃ praṇamya ca।
āsanaṃ svastikaṃ kṛtvā pajhamarddhāsanantathā ॥ 1.11.13 ॥
samajānurekajānuruttānaḥ susthito'pi ca।
samo dṛḍhāsano bhūtvā saṃhṛtya caraṇāvubhau ॥ 1.11.14 ॥
saṃvṛtāsyo'vabaddhākṣa uro viṣṭabhya cāgrataḥ।
pārṣṇibhyāṃ vṛṣaṇe chādya tathā prajananaṃ tataḥ ॥ 1.11.15 ॥
kiñcidunnāmitaśirāḥ śiro grīvāṃ tathaiva ca।
samprekṣya nāsikāgraṃ svaṃ diśaścānavalokayan ॥ 1.11.16 ॥
tamaḥ pracchādya rajasā rajaḥ sattvena cchādayet ।
tataḥ sattvasthito bhūtvā yogaṃ yuñjan samāhitaḥ ॥ 1.11.17 ॥
indriyāṇīndriyārthāṃśca manaḥ pañca sa mārutān।
vigṛhya samavāyeva pratyāhāramupakramet ॥ 1.11.18 ॥
yastu pratyāharet kāmān kūrmo'ṅgānīva sarvataḥ।
tathātmaratirekasthaḥ paśyatyātmānamātmani ॥ 1.11.19 ॥
pūrayitvā śarīrantu sa bāhyābhyantaraṃ śuciḥ।
ākaṇṭhanābhiyogena pratyāhāramupakramet ॥ 1.11.20 ॥
kalāmātrastu vijñeyo nimeṣonmeṣa eva ca।
tathā dvādaśamātrastu prāṇāyāmo vidhīyate ॥ 1.11.21 ॥
dhāraṇā dvādaśāyāmo yogo vai dhāraṇādvayam।
tathā vai yogayuktaśca aiśvaryaṃ pratipadyate ।
vīkṣate paramātmānaṃ dīpyamānaṃ svatejasā ॥ 1.11.22 ॥
prāṇāyāmena yuktasya viprasya niyatātmanaḥ।
sarve doṣāḥ praṇaśyanti sattvasthaścaiva jāyate ॥ 1.11.23 ॥
evaṃ vai niyatāhāraḥ prāṇāyāmaparāyaṇaḥ।
jitvā jitvā sadā bhūmimārohettu sadā muniḥ ॥ 1.11.24 ॥
ajitā hi mahābhūmirdoṣānutpādayedbahūn ।
vivarddhayati sammohaṃ na rohedajitāṃ tataḥ ॥ 1.11.25 ॥
nālena tu yathā toyaṃ yantreṇaiva balānvitaḥ।
āpibeta prayatnena tathā vāyuñjitaśramaḥ ॥ 1.11.26 ॥
nābhyāṃ ca hṛdaye caiva kaṇṭe urasi cānane।
nāsāgre tu tathā netre bhruvormadhye'tha mūrddhani ॥ 1.11.27 ॥
kiñcidūrddhvaṃ parasmiṃśca dhāraṇā paramā smṛtā।
prāṇāpānasamārodhāt prāṇāyāmaḥ sa kathyate ॥ 1.11.28 ॥
manaso dhāraṇā caiva dhāraṇeti prakīrtitā।
nivṛtti rviṣayāṇāntu pratyāhārastu saṃjñitaḥ ॥ 1.11.29 ॥
sarveṣāṃ samavāye tu siddhiḥ syādyogalakṣaṇā।
tayotpannasya yogasya dhyānaṃ vai siddhilakṣaṇam।
dhyānayuktaḥ sadā paśyedātmānaṃ sūryacandravat ॥ 1.11.30 ॥
sattvasyānupapattau tu darśanantu nava vidyate।
adeśakālayogasya darśanantu na vidyate ॥ 1.11.31 ॥
agnyabhyāśe vane vāpi śuṣkaparṇacaye tathā।
jantuvyāpte śmaśāne vā jīrṇagoṣṭe catuṣpathe ॥ 1.11.32 ॥
saśabde sabhaye vāpi caityavalmīkasaṃcaye।
udapāne tathā nadyānna bādhātaḥ kadācana ॥ 1.11.33 ॥
kṣudhāviṣstathā'prito na ca vyākulacetanaḥ।
yuñjīta paramaṃ dhyānaṃ yogī dhyānaparaḥ sadā ॥ 1.11.34 ॥
etān doṣān viniścitya pramādādyo yunakti vai।
tasya doṣāḥ prakupyanti śarīre vighnakārakāḥ ॥ 1.11.35 ॥
jaḍatvaṃ badhiratvaṃ ca mūkatvaṃ cādhigacchati।
andhatvaṃ smṛtilopaśca jarā rogastathaiva ca ॥ 1.11.36 ॥
tasya doṣāḥ prakupyanti ajñānādyo yunakti vai।
tasmājjñānena śuddhena yogī yuñjetsamāhitaḥ ॥ 1.11.37 ॥
apramattaḥ sadā caiva na doṣān prāpruyāt vkacit ।
teṣāṃ cikitsāṃ vakṣyāmi doṣāṇāṃ ca yathākramam।
yathā gacchanti te doṣāḥ prāṇāyāmasamutthitāḥ ॥ 1.11.38 ॥
snigdhāṃ yavāgūmatyuṣṇāṃ bhuktvāṃ tatrāvadhārayet ।
etena kramayogena vātagulmaṃ praśāmyati ॥ 1.11.39 ॥
gudāvarttapratīkāramidaṃ kuryyāccikitsitam।
bhuktvā dadhi yavāgūrvā vāyurūrddhvaṃ tato vrajeta ॥ 1.11.40 ॥
vāyugraṃthiṃ tato bhittvā vāyudeśe prayojayet ।
tathāpi na viśeṣaḥ syāddhāraṇāṃ mūrdhni dhārayet ॥ 1.11.41 ॥
yuñjānasya tanuṃ tasya sattavasthasyaiva dehinaḥ।
gudāvarttapratīghāte etat kuryyāccikitsitam ॥ 1.11.42 ॥
sarvagātraprakampena samārabdhasya yoginaḥ ।
imāṃ cikitsāṃ kurvvīta tayā saṃpadyate sukhī ॥ 1.11.43 ॥
manasā yadvrataṃ kiñcidviṣṭambhīkṛtya dhārayet।
uroddhāte uraḥsthānaṃ kaṇṭhadeśe ca dhārayet ॥ 1.11.44 ॥
tvaco'vadhāte tāṃ vāci bādhirye śrotrayostathā।
jihvāsthāne tṛṣārttastu agre snehāṃśca tantubhiḥ।
phalaṃ vai cintayedyogī tataḥ saṃpadyate sukhī ॥ 1.11.45 ॥
kṣaye kuṣṭe sakīlāse dhārayetsarvasātvikīm।
yasmin yasmin rajodeśe tasmin yukto vinirddiśet ॥ 1.11.46 ॥
yogotpannasya viprasya idaṃ kuryāccikitsitam।
vaṃśakīlena mūrddhānaṃ dhārayāṇasya tāḍayet।
mūrdhni kīlaṃ pratiṣṭāpya kāṣṭhaṃ kāṣṭena tāḍayet ॥ 1.11.47 ॥
bhayabhītasya sā saṃjñā tataḥ pratyāgamiṣyati।
atha vā luptasaṃjñasya hastābhyāṃ tatra dhārayet ॥ 1.11.48 ॥
pratilabhya tataḥ saṃjñāṃ dhāraṇāṃ mūrdhni dhārayet।
srigdhamalpaṃ ca bhuñjīta tataḥ saṃpadyate sukhī ॥ 1.11.49 ॥
amānuṣeṇa sattvena yadā budhyati yogavit ।
divaṃ ca pṛthivīñcaiva vāyumagniṃ ca dhārayet ॥ 1.11.50 ॥
prāṇāyāmena tatsarvaṃ dahyamānaṃ vaśībhavet।
athāpi praviśeddehaṃ tatastaṃ pratiṣedhayet ॥ 1.11.51 ॥
tataḥ saṃstabhya yogena dhārayānasya mūrddhāni।
prāṇāyāmāgninā dagdhaṃ tatsarvaṃ vilayaṃ vrajet ॥ 1.11.52 ॥
kṛṣṇasarpāparādhaṃ tu dhārayeddhṛdayodare ।
maharjanastapaḥ satyaṃ hṛdi kṛtvā tu dhārayet ॥ 1.11.53 ॥
viṣasya tu phalaṃ pītvā viśalyāṃ dhārayettataḥ ।
sarvataḥ sanagāṃ pṛthvīṃ kṛtvā manasi dhārayet ॥ 1.11.54 ॥
hṛdi kṛtvā samudrāṃśca tathā sarvāśca devatāḥ ।
sahasreṇa ghaṭānāñca yuktaḥ snāyīta yogavit ॥ 1.11.55 ॥
udake kaṇṭhamātre tu dhāraṇāṃ mūdhni dhārayet।
pratisrotoviṣāviṣṭo dhārayet sarvagātrikīm ॥ 1.11.56 ॥
śīrṇo'rkapatrapuṭakaiḥ pibedvalmīkamṛttikām ।
cikitsitavidhirhyeṣa viśruto yoganirmitaḥ ॥ 1.11.57 ॥
vyākhyātastu samāsena yogadṛṣṭena hetunā।
bruvato lakṣaṇaṃ viddhi viprasya kathayet vkacit ॥ 1.11.58 ॥
athāpi kathayenmohāttadvijñānaṃ pralīyate।
tasmāt pravṛttiryyogasya na vaktavyā kathañcana ॥ 1.11.59 ॥
sattvaṃ tathārogyamalolupatvaṃ varṇaprabhā susvarasaumyatā ca।
gandhaḥ śubho mūtrapurīṣa malpaṃ yogapravṛttiḥ prathamā śarīre ॥ 1.11.60 ॥
ātmānaṃ pṛthivīñcaiva jvalantīṃ yadi paśyati।
kṛtvānyaṃ viśate caiva vidyāt siddhimupasthitām । 11.61 ।।

iti śrīmahāpurāṇe vāyuprokte pāśupatayogo nāmaikādaśo'dhyāyaḥ ।। 11 ।

## 1.12

।। sūta uvāca ।।
ata ūrddhvaṃ pravakṣyāmi upasargā yathā tathā ।
prādurbhavanti ye doṣā dṛṣṭatattvasya dehinaḥ ॥ 1.12.1 ॥

mānuṣyān vividhān kāmān kāmayeta ṛtuṃ striyaḥ।
vidyādānaphalañcaiva upasṛṣṭastu yogavit ॥ 1.12.2 ॥

agnihotraṃ haviryajñametat prāyatanaṃ tathā।
māyākarma dhanaṃ svargamupasṛṣṭastu kāṃkṣati ॥ 1.12.3 ॥

eṣa karmasu yuktastu so'vidyāvaśamāgataḥ।
upasṛṣṭantu jānīyādvuddhyā caiva visarjjayet।
nityaṃ brahmaparo yukta upasargāt pramucyate ॥ 1.12.4 ॥

jitapratyupasargasya jitaśvāsasya dehinaḥ।
upasargāḥ pravarttante sāttvarājasatāmasāḥ ॥ 1.12.5 ॥

pratibhāśravaṇe caiva na devānāñcaiva darśanam।
bhramāvartaśca ityete siddhilakṣaṇasaṃjñitāḥ ॥ 1.12.6 ॥

vidyā kāvyaṃ tathā śilpaṃ sarvaṃ vācāvṛtāni tu।
vidyārthāścopatiṣṭhanti prabhāvasyaiva lakṣaṇam ॥ 1.12.7 ॥

śrṛṇoti śabdān śrotavyān yojanānāṃ śatādapi।
sarvajñaśca vidhijñaśca yogī conmattavadbhavet ॥ 1.12.8 ॥

yakṣarākṣasagandharvvān vīkṣate divyamānuṣān।
vetti tāṃśca mahāyogī upasargasya lakṣaṇam ॥ 1.12.9 ॥

devadānavagandharvān ṛṣīṃścāpi tathā pitṝn।
prekṣate sarvataścaiva unmattaṃ taṃ vinirddiśet ॥ 1.12.10 ॥

bhrameṇa bhrāmyate yogī codyamāno'ntarātmanā।
bhrameṇa bhrāntabuddhestu jñānaṃ sarvaṃ praṇaśyati ॥ 1.12.11 ॥

vārttā nāśayate cittaṃ codyamāno'ntarātmanā।
varttanākrāntabuddhestu sarvaṃ jñānaṃ praṇaśyati ॥ 1.12.12 ॥

āvṛtya manasā śuklaṃ paṭaṃ vā kambalaṃ tathā।
tatastu paramaṃ brahma kṣipramevānucintayet ॥ 1.12.13 ॥

tasmāccaivātmano doṣāṃstūpasargānupasthitān ।
parita tyajeta medhāvī yadīcchet siddhimātmanaḥ ॥ 1.12.14 ॥

ṛṣayo devagandharvā yakṣoragamahāsurāḥ।
upasargeṣu saṃyuktā āvarttante punaḥ punaḥ ॥ 1.12.15 ॥

tasmādyuktaḥ sadā yogī laghvāhārī jitendriyaḥ।
tathā suptaḥ susūkṣmeṣu dhāraṇāṃ mūrdhni dhārayet ॥ 1.12.16 ॥

tatastu yogayuktasya jitanidrasya yoginaḥ।
upasargāḥ punaścānte jāyante prāṇasaṃjñakāḥ ॥ 1.12.17 ॥

pṛthivīṃ dhārayetsarvāṃ tataścāpo hyanantaram।
tato'gniñcaiva sarveṣāmākāśaṃ mana eva ca ॥ 1.12.18 ॥

tataḥ parāṃ punarbuddhiṃ dhārayedyatnato yatī।
kiddhīnāñcaiva liṅgāni dṛṣṭvā dṛṣṭvā parityajet ॥ 1.12.19 ॥

pṛthvīṃ dhārayamāṇasya mahī sūkṣmā pravartate।
apo dhārayamāṇasya āpaḥ sūkṣmā bhavanti hi।
śītā rasāḥ pravarttante sūkṣmā hyamṛtasannibhāḥ ॥ 1.12.20 ॥

tejo dhārayamāṇasya tejaḥ sūkṣmā pravarttate।
ātmānaṃ manyate tejastadbhāvamanupaśyati ॥ 1.12.21 ॥

ātmānaṃ manyate vāyuṃ vāyuvanmaṇḍalaṃ prabho ।
ākāśaṃ dhārayāṇasya vyoma sūkṣmaṃ pravarttate ॥ 1.12.22 ॥

paśyate maṇḍalaṃ sūkṣmaṃ ghoṣaścāsya pravarttate ।
ātmānaṃ manyate nityaṃ vāyuḥ sūkṣmaḥ pravarttate ॥ 1.12.23 ॥

tathā mano dhārayato manaḥ sūkṣmaṃ pravarttate ।
manasā sarvabhūtānāṃ manastu viśate hi saḥ।
buddhyā buddhiṃ yadā yuñjettadā vijñāya buddhayate ॥ 1.12.24 ॥

etāni sapta sūkṣmāṇi viditvā yastu yogavit।
parityajati medhāvī sa buddhyā paramaṃ vrajet ॥ 1.12.25 ॥

yasmin yasmiṃśca saṃyukto bhūta aiśvaryalakṣaṇe।
tatraiva saṅgaṃ bhajate tenaiva pravinaśyati ॥ 1.12.26 ॥

tasmādviditvā sūkṣmāṇi saṃsaktāni parasparam।
parityajati yobuddhyā sa paraṃ prapnuyāddvijaḥ ॥ 1.12.27 ॥

dṛśyante hi mahātmāna ṛṣayo divyacakṣuṣaḥ।
saṃsaktāḥ sūkṣmabhāveṣu te doṣāsteṣu saṃjñitāḥ।।12.28
tasmānna niścayaḥ kāryaḥ sūkṣmeṣviha kadācana।
aiśvaryājjāyate rāgo virāgaṃ brahma cocyate ॥ 1.12.28 ॥

viditvā sapta sūkṣmāṇi ṣaḍaṅgañca maheśvaram।
pradhānaṃ viniyogajñaḥ paraṃ brahmādhigacchati ॥ 1.12.29 ॥

sarvajñatā tṛptiranādibodhaḥ svatantratā nityamaluptaśaktiḥ।
anantaśaktiśca vibhorvidhijñāḥ ṣaḍāhuraṅgāni maheśvarasya ॥ 1.12.30 ॥

nityaṃ brahmadhano yukta upasargaiḥ pramucyate।
jitaśvāsopasargasya jitarāmasya yoginaḥ।
ekā bahiḥśarīre'smin dhāraṇā sarvakāmikī ॥ 1.12.31 ॥

viśedyadā dvijo yukto yatra yatrārppayenmanaḥ ।
bhūtānyāviśate vāpi trailokyañcāpi kampayet ॥ 1.12.32 ॥

etayā praviśeddehaṃ hitvā dehaṃ punastviha।
manodvāraṃ hi yogānāmādityañca vinirddiśet ॥ 1.12.33 ॥

ādānādikriyāṇāntu āditya iti cocyate।
etena vidhinā yogī viraktaḥ sūkṣmavarjjitaḥ।
prakṛtiṃ samatikramya rudraloke mahīyate ॥ 1.12.34 ॥

aiśvaryaguṇasamprāptaṃ brahmabhūtantu taṃ prabhum।
devasthāneṣu sarveṣu sarvatastu nivarttate ॥ 1.12.35 ॥

paiśācāṃśacava piśācāṃśca rākṣasena ca rākṣasān ।
gāndharveṇa ca gandharvān kaubereṇa kuberajān ॥ 1.12.36 ॥

indramaindreṇa sthānena saumyaṃ saumyena caiva hi।
prajāpatiṃ tathā caiva prājāpatyena sādhayet ॥ 1.12.37 ॥

brāhmaṃ brāhyena cāpyevamupāmantrayate prabhum।
tatra saktastu unmattastasmātsarvaṃ pravarttate ॥ 1.12.38 ॥

nityaṃ brahmaparo yuktaḥ sthānānyetāni vai tyajet ।
asajyamānaḥ sthāneṣu dvijaḥ sarvagato bhavet ॥ 1.12.39 ॥

iti śrīmahāpurāṇe vāyuprokte yogopasarganirūpaṇaṃ nāma dvādaśo'dhyāyaḥ ।। 12 ।

## 1.13

।। vāyuruvāca ।।
ata ūrddhvaṃ pravakṣyāmi aiśvaryaguṇa vistaram।
yena yogaviśeṣeṇa sarvalokānatikramet ॥ 1.13.1 ॥

tatrāṣṭaguṇamaiśvaryaṃ yogināṃ samudāhṛtam।
tatsarvaṃ kramayogena ucyamānaṃ nibodhata ॥ 1.13.2 ॥

aṇimā laghimā caiva mahimā prāptireva ca।
prākāmyajcaiva sarvatra īśitvañcaiva sarvataḥ ॥ 1.13.3 ॥

vaśitvamatha sarvatra yatra kāmāvasāyitā।
taccāpi vividhaṃ jñeyamaiśvaryaṃ sarvakāmikam ॥ 1.13.4 ॥

sāvadyaṃ niravadyaṃ ca sūkṣmañcaiva pravarttate।
sāvadyaṃ nāma tattattvaṃ pañcabhūtātmakaṃ smṛtam ॥ 1.13.5 ॥

niravadyaṃ tathā nāma pañcabhūtātmakaṃ smṛtam।
indriyāṇi manaścaiva ahahkāraśca vai smṛtam ॥ 1.13.6 ॥

tatra sūkṣmapravṛttantu pañcabhūtātmakaṃ punaḥ।
indriyāṇi manaścaiva buddhyahaṅkāra saṃjñitam ॥ 1.13.7 ॥

tathā sarvamayañcaiva ātmasthā khyātireva ca।
saṃyoga evaṃ tripidhaḥ sūkṣmeṣveva pravarttate ॥ 1.13.8 ॥

punaraṣṭaguṇasyāpi teṣvevātha pravarttate।
tasya rūpaṃ pravakṣyāmi yathāha bhagavān prabhuḥ ॥ 1.13.9 ॥

trailokye sarvabūteṣu jīvasyāniyataḥ smṛtaḥ।
aṇimā ca yathāvyaktaṃ sarvaṃ yatra pratiṣṭitam ॥ 1.13.10 ॥

trailokye sarvabhūtānāṃ duṣprāpyaṃ samudāhṛtam।
taccāpi bhavati prāpyaṃ prathamaṃ yogināṃ balāt ॥ 1.13.11 ॥

lambanaṃ plavanaṃ yoge rūpamasya sadā bhavet ।
śīghragaṃ sarvabhūteṣu dvitīyaṃ tatpadaṃ smṛtam ॥ 1.13.12 ॥

trailokye sarvabhūtānāṃ prāptiḥ prākāmyameva ca।
mahimā cāpi yo yasmiṃstṛtīyo yoga ucyate ॥ 1.13.13 ॥

trailokye sarvabhūteṣu trailokyamagamaṃ smṛtam।
prakāmān viṣayān bhuṅkte na ca pratihataḥ vkacit ।
trailokye sarvabūtānāṃ sukhaduḥkhaṃ prakarttate ॥ 1.13.14 ॥

īśo bhavati sarvatra pravibhāgena yogavit।
vaśyāni caiva bhūtāni trailokye sacarācare।
bhavanti sarvakāryeṣu icchato na bhavanti ca ॥ 1.13.15 ॥

yatra kāmāvasāyitvaṃ trailokye sacarācare।
icchayā cendriyāṇi syuḥ bhavanti na bhavanti ca ॥ 1.13.16 ॥

śabdaḥ sparśo raso gandho rūpaṃ caiva mana stathā।
pravarttante'sya cecchāto na bhavanti tathecchayā ॥ 1.13.17 ॥

na jāyate na mriyate bhidyate na ca chidyate।
na dahyate na muhyate hīyate na ca lipyate ॥ 1.13.18 ॥

na kṣīyate na kṣarati na khidyati kadācana।
kriyate caiva sarvatra tathā vikriyate na ca ॥ 1.13.19 ॥

agandharasarūpastu sparśaśabdavivarjjitaḥ।
avarṇo hyavaraścaiva tathā varṇasya karhicit ॥ 1.13.20 ॥

bhuṅkte'tha viṣayāṃścaiva viṣayairnna ca yujyate।
jñātvā tu paramaṃ sūkṣmaṃ sūkṣmatvāccāpavargakaḥ ॥ 1.13.21 ॥

vyāpakastvapavargācca vyāpitvātpuruṣaḥ smṛtaḥ।
puruṣaḥ sūkṣmabhāvāttu aiśvarye parataḥ sthitaḥ ॥ 1.13.22 ॥

guṇāntarantu aiśvarye sarvataḥ sūkṣma ucyate।
aiśvaryyamapratīghāti prāpya yogamanuttamam।
apavargaṃ tato gacchet susūkṣmaṃ paramaṃ padam ॥ 1.13.23 ॥

iti śrīmahāpurāṇe vāyuprākte yogaiśvaryāṇi nāma trayodaśodhyāyaḥ ।। 13 ।।

## 1.14

।। vāyuruvāca ।।
na caivamāgato jñānādrāgāt karmma samācaret।
rājasaṃ tāmasaṃ vāpi bhuktvā tatraiva yujyate ॥ 1.14.1 ॥

tathā sukṛtakarmmā tu phalaṃ svarge samaśrute।
tasmāt sthānāt punarbhraṣṭo mānuṣyamanupadyate ॥ 1.14.2 ॥

tasmādbrahma paraṃ sūkṣmaṃ brahma śāśvatamucyate।
brahma eva hi seveta brahmaiva paramaṃ sukham ॥ 1.14.3 ॥

pariśramastu yajñānāṃ mahatārthena varttate।
bhūyo mṛtyuvaśaṃ yāti tasmānmokṣaḥ paraṃ sukham ॥ 1.14.4 ॥

atha vai dhyānasaṃyukto brahmayajñaparāyaṇaḥ ।
na sa syād vyāpituṃ śakyo manvantaraśatairapi ॥ 1.14.5 ॥

dṛṣṭvā tu puruṣaṃ divyaṃ viśvākhyaṃ viśvarūpiṇam।
viśvapāda śirogrīvaṃ viśveśaṃ viśvabhāvanam।
viśvagandhaṃ viśvamālyaṃ viśvāmbaradharaṃ prabhum ॥ 1.14.6 ॥

gobhirmahī saṃyatate patatriṇaṃ mahātmānaṃ paramamatiṃ vareṇyam।
kaviṃ purāṇamanuśāsitāraṃ sūkṣmācca sūkṣmaṃ mahato mahāntam।
yogena paśyanti na cakṣuṣā taṃ nirindriyaṃ puruṣaṃ rukmavarṇam ॥ 1.14.7 ॥

aliṅginaṃ puruṣaṃ rukmavarṇaṃ saliṅginaṃ nirguṇaṃ cetanaṃ ca।
nityaṃ sadā sarvagatantu śaucaṃ paśyanti yuktyā hyacalaṃ prakāśam ॥ 1.14.8 ॥

tadbhāvitastejasā dīpyamānaḥ apāṇipādodarapārśvajihvaḥ।
atīndriyo'dyāpi susūkṣma ekaḥ paśyatyacakṣuḥ sa śrṛṇotyakarṇaḥ ॥ 1.14.9 ॥

nāsyāstyabuddhaṃ na ca buddhirasti sa veda sarvaṃ na ca vedavedyaḥ।
tamāhuragryaṃ puruṣaṃ mahāntaṃ sacetanaṃ sarvvagataṃ susūkṣmam ॥ 1.14.10 ॥

tāmāhurmunayaḥ sarvve loke prasavadharmiṇīm।
prakṛtiṃ sarvvabhūtānāṃ yuktāḥ paśyanti cetasā ॥ 1.14.11 ॥

sarvvataḥ pāṇipādāntaṃ sarvvato'kṣiśiromukham।
sarvvataḥ śruti (ma) māँlloke sarvvamāvṛtya tiṣṭhati ॥ 1.14.12 ॥

yuktā yogena ceśānaṃ sarvvataśca sanātanam।
puruṣaṃ sarvvabhūtānāṃ tasmāddhyātā na muhyate ॥ 1.14.13 ॥

bhūtātmānaṃ mahātmānaṃ paramātmānamavyayam।
sarvvātmānaṃ paraṃ brahma tadvai dhyātvā na muhyati ॥ 1.14.14 ॥

pavano hi yathā grāhyo vicaran sarvvamūrtiṣu।
puri śete tathābhre ca tasmāt puruṣa ucyate।
atha celluptadharmmāttu saviśeṣaiśca karmmābhiḥ ॥ 1.14.15 ॥

tatastu brahma yonyāṃ vai śukraśoṇitasaṃyutam।
strīpumāṃsaprayogeṇa jāyate hi punaḥ punaḥ ॥ 1.14.16 ॥

tatastu garbhakāle tu kalanaṃ nāma jāyate।
kālena kalanañcāpi budbudaśca prajāyate ॥ 1.14.17 ॥

mṛtpiṇḍastu yathā cakre cakravātena pīḍitaḥ।
hastābhyāṃ kriyamāṇastu viśvatvamupagacchati ॥ 1.14.18 ॥

evamātmāsthisaṃyukto vāyunā samudīritaḥ।
jāyate mānuṣastatra yathā rūpaṃ tathā manaḥ ॥ 1.14.19 ॥

vāyuḥ sambhavate teṣāṃ vātāt sañjāyate jalam।
jalātsaṃbhavati prāṇaḥ prāṇācchukraṃ vivarddhate ॥ 1.14.20 ॥

raktabhāgāstrayastriṃśacchukra bhāgāścaturddaśa।
bhāgato'rddhapalaṃ kṛtvā tato garbhe niṣevate ॥ 1.14.21 ॥

tatastu garbhasaṃyuktaḥ pañcabhirvāyubhirvṛtaḥ।
pituḥ śarīrāt pratyaṅgarūpamasyopajāyate ॥ 1.14.22 ॥

tato'sya māturāhārāt pītalīḍhapraveśitam।
nābhi srotaḥpraveśena prāṇādhāro hi dehinām ॥ 1.14.23 ॥

navamāsān parikliṣṭaḥ saṃveṣṭitaśirodharaḥ ।
veṣṭitaḥ sarvvagātraiśca aparyyāyakramāgataḥ।
navamāsoṣitaścaiva yonicchidrādavāṅ‌mukhaḥ ॥ 1.14.24 ॥

tatastu karmmabhiḥ pāpairnirayaṃ pratipadyate।
asipatravanañcaiva śālmalīcchedabhedayoḥ ॥ 1.14.25 ॥

tatra nirbhartsanañcaiva tathā śoṇitabhojanam ।
etāstu yātan ghorāḥ kumbhīpākasuduḥsahāḥ ॥ 1.14.26 ॥

yathā hyāpastu vicchinnāḥ svarūpamupayānti vai ।
tasmācchinnāśca bhinnāśca yātanāsthānamāgataḥ ॥ 1.14.27 ॥

evaṃ jīvastu taiḥ pāpaistapyamānaḥ svayaṃ kṛtaiḥ ।
prāpnuyāt karmmabhirduḥkhaṃ śeṣaṃ vā yādi cetaram ॥ 1.14.28 ॥

ekenaiva tu gantavyaṃ sarvvamṛtyuniveśanam।
ekanaiva ca bhoktavyaṃ tasmāt sukṛtamācaret ॥ 1.14.29 ॥

na hyenaṃ prasthitaṃ kaścidgacchantamanugacchati।
yadanena kṛtaṃ karmma tadenamanugacchati ॥ 1.14.30 ॥

te nityaṃ yamaviṣaye vibhinnadehāḥ krośantaḥ satatamaniṣṭasaṃprayogaiḥ।
śuṣyante parigatavedanāśarīrāḥ bahvībhiḥ subhṛśamadharmmayātanābhiḥ ॥ 1.14.31 ॥

karmaṇāḥ manasā vācā yadabhīṣṭaṃ niṣevyate।
tat prasadya haret pāpaṃ tasmāt‌ sukṛtamācaret ॥ 1.14.32 ॥

yādṛg jātāni pāpāni pūrvvaṃ karmmāṇi dehinaḥ।
saṃsāraṃ tāmasaṃ tādṛk ṣah‌vidhaṃ pratipadyate ॥ 1.14.33 ॥

mānuṣyaṃ paśubhāvañca paśubhāvānmṛgo bhavet।
mṛgatvāt pakṣibhāvantu tasmāccaiva sarīsṛpaḥ ॥ 1.14.34 ॥

sarīsṛpatvādgacchoddhi।
sthāvaratvanna saṃśayaḥ।
sthāvaratvaṃ punaḥ prāpto
yāvadunmiṣate naraḥ।
kulālacakavadbhāntastatraivaparikīrtitaḥ ॥ 1.14.35 ॥

ityevaṃ hi manuṣyādiḥ saṃsāre sthāvarāntake।
vijñeyastāmaso nāma tatraiva parivarttate ॥ 1.14.36 ॥

sāttvikaścāpi saṃsāro brahmādiḥ parikīrttitaḥ।
piśācāntaḥ savijñeyaḥ svargasthāneṣu dehinām ॥ 1.14.37 ॥

brāhme tu kevalaṃ sattvaṃ sthāvare kevalaṃ tamaḥ।
caturddaśānāṃ sthānānāṃ madhye viṣṭambhakaṃ rajaḥ।
marmasu cchidyamāneṣu vedanārttasya dehinaḥ ॥ 1.14.38 ॥

tatastu paramaṃ brahma kathaṃ vipraḥ smariṣyati ।
saṃskārāt pūrvadharmasya bhāvanāyāṃ praṇoditaḥ।
mānuṣyaṃ bhajate nityaṃ tasmānnityaṃ samādadhet ॥ 1.14.39 ॥

iti śrīmahāpurāṇe vāyuprokte pāśupatayogo nāma caturddaśo'dhyāyaḥ ।। 14 ।

## 1.15

।। vāyuruvāca ।।
caturddaśavidhaṃ hyetadbuddhvā saṃsāramaṇḍalam।
tathā samārabhet karmma saṃsārabhayapīḍitaḥ ॥ 1.15.1 ॥

tataḥ smarati saṃsāracakreṇa parivarttitaḥ।
tasmāttu satataṃ yukto dhyānatatparayuñjakaḥ।
tathā samārabhedyogaṃ yathātmānaṃ sa paśyati ॥ 1.15.2 ॥

eṣa ādyaḥ paraṃ jyotireṣa seturanuttamaḥ।
vivṛddho hyeṣa bhūtānāṃ na sambhedaśca śāśvataḥ ॥ 1.15.3 ॥

tadenaṃ setumātmānaṃ agniṃ vai viśvatomukham।
hṛdisthaṃ sarvabhūtānāmupāsīta vidhānavit ॥ 1.15.4 ॥

hutvāṣṭāvāhutīḥ samyak śucistadgatamānasaḥ।
vaiśvānaraṃ hṛdisthantu yathāvadanupūrvaśaḥ।
apaḥ pūrva sakṛt prāśya tuṣṇīṃ bhūtvā upāsate ॥ 1.15.5 ॥

prāṇāyeti tatastasya prathamā hyāhutiḥ smṛtā।
apānāya dvitīyā tu samānāyeti cāparā ॥ 1.15.6 ॥

udānāya caturthīti vyānāyeti ca pañcamī।
svāhā kāraiḥ paraṃ hutvā śeṣaṃ bhuñjīta kāmataḥ।
apaḥ punaḥ sakṛt prāśya tryācamya hṛdayaṃ spṛśet ॥ 1.15.7 ॥

ॐprāṇānāṃ granthirasyātmā rudro hyātmā viśāntakaḥ।
sa rudro hyātmanaḥ prāṇā evamāpyāyayet svayam ॥ 1.15.8 ॥

tvaṃ devānāmapi jyeṣṭha ugrastvaṃ caturo vṛṣā ।
mṛtyughno'si tvamasmabhyaṃ bhadrametaddhutaṃ haviḥ ॥ 1.15.9 ॥

evaṃ hṛdayamālabhya pādāṅguṣṭe tu dakṣiṇe।
viśrāvya dakṣiṇaṃ pāṇiṃ nābhiṃ vai pāṇinā spṛśet ।
tataḥ punarupaspṛś‌ya cātmānamabhisaṃspṛśet ॥ 1.15.10 ॥

akṣiṇī nāsikā śrotre hṛdayaṃ śira eva ca।
dvāvātmānāvubhāvetau prāṇāpānāvudāhṛtau ॥ 1.15.11 ॥

tayoḥ prāṇo'ntarātmāsya bāhyo'pāno'ta ucyate।
annaṃ prāṇastathāpānaṃ mṛtyurjjīvitameva ca ॥ 1.15.12 ॥

annaṃ brahma ca vijñeyaṃ prajānāṃ prasavastathā।
annādbhūtāni jāyante sthitirannena ceṣyate।
varddhante tena bhūtāni tasmādannantaducyate ॥ 1.15.13 ॥

tadevāgnau hutaṃ hyannaṃ bhuñjate devadānavāḥ।
gandharvayakṣarakṣāṃsi piśācāścānnameva hi ॥ 1.15.14 ॥

iti śrīmahāpurāṇe vāyu prokte pāśupatayogo nāma pañcadaśo'dhyāyaḥ ।। 15 ।

## 1.16

।। vāyuruvāca ।।
ata ūddhvaṃ pravakṣyāmi śaucācārasya lakṣaṇam।
yadanuṣṭāya śuddhātmā pretya svargaṃ hi cāpnuyāt ॥ 1.16.1 ॥

udakārthī tu śaucānāṃ munīnāmuttamaṃ padam ।
yastu teṣvapramattaḥ syāt sa munirnnāvasīdati ॥ 1.16.2 ॥

mānāvamānau dvovetau tāvevāhurviṣāmṛte ।
avamānaṃ viṣaṃ tatra mānantvamṛtamucyate ॥ 1.16.3 ॥

yastu teṣvapramattaḥ syāt sa munirnnāvasīdati ।
guroḥ priyahite yuktaḥ sa tu saṃvatsaraṃ vaset ॥ 1.16.4 ॥

niyameṣvapramattastu yameṣu ca sadā bhavet ।
prāpyānujñāntataścaiva jñānāgamanamuttamam।
avirodhena dharmasya vicaret pṛthivīmimām ॥ 1.16.5 ॥

cakṣuḥ pūtaṃ vrajenmārgaṃ vastrapūtaṃ jalaṃ pibet।
satyapūtāṃ vadedvāṇīmiti dharmānuśāsanam ॥ 1.16.6 ॥

ātithyaṃ śrāddhayajñeṣu na gacchedyogavit vkacit।
evaṃ hyahiṃsako yogī bhavediti vicāraṇā ॥ 1.16.7 ॥

vahnau vidhūme vyaṅgāre sarvṛsmin bhuktavajjane।
vicarenmatimān yogī na tu teṣveva nityaśaḥ ॥ 1.16.8 ॥

yathaivamavamanyante yathā paribhavanti ca।
yuktastathā caredbhaikṣaṃ satāṃ dharmamadūṣayan ॥ 1.16.9 ॥

bhaikṣaṃ caredgṛhastheṣu yathācāragṛheṣu ca।
śreṣṭā tu paramā ceyaṃ vṛttirasyopadiśyate ॥ 1.16.10 ॥

ata ūrddhvaṃ gṛhastheṣu śālīneṣu cared‌dvijaḥ।
śraddadhāneṣu dānteṣu śrotriyeṣu mahātmasu ॥ 1.16.11 ॥

ata ūrddhvaṃ punaścāpi aduṣṭapatiteṣu ca।
bhaikṣacaryā vivarṇeṣu jaghanyā vṛttirucyate ॥ 1.16.12 ॥

bhaikṣaṃ yavāgūṃ takraṃ vā payo yāvakameva ca।
phaळmūlaṃ vipavkaṃ vā piṇyākaṃ śaktitopi vā ॥ 1.16.13 ॥

ityete vai mayā proktā yogināṃ siddhivarddhanāḥ।
āhārāsteṣu siddheṣu śreṣṭhaṃ bhaikṣamiti smṛtam ॥ 1.16.14 ॥

abbinduṃ yaḥ kuśāgreṇa māse māse samaśnute।
nyāyato yastu bhikṣeta sa pūrvoktādviśiṣyate ॥ 1.16.15 ॥

yogināṃ caiva sarveṣāṃ śreṣṭhaṃ cāndrāyaṇaṃ smṛtam ।
ekaṃ dve trīṇi catvāri śaktito vā samācaret ॥ 1.16.16 ॥

asteyaṃ brahmacaryañca alobhastyāga eva ca।
vratāni caiva bhikṣūṇāmahiṃsā paramārthitā ॥ 1.16.17 ॥

akrodho guruśuśrūṣā śaucamāhāralāghavam।
nityaṃsvādhyāya ityete niyamāḥ parikīrtitāḥ ॥ 1.16.18 ॥

bīcayonirguṇavapurbaddhaḥ karmabhireva ca।
yathā dvipa ivāraṇye manuṣyāṇāṃ vidhīyate ॥ 1.16.19 ॥

prāpyate vācirādevāṅkuśeneva nivāritaḥ।
evaṃ jñānena śuddhena dagdhabīco hyakalmaṣaḥ।
vimuktabandhaḥ śānto'sau mukta ityabhidhīyate ॥ 1.16.20 ॥

vedaistutyā sarvayajñakriyāstu yajñe japyaṃ jñānināmāhuragrayam।
jñānāddhayānaṃ saṅgarāgavyapetaṃ tasmin prāpte śāśvatasyopalabdhiḥ ॥ 1.16.21 ॥

damaḥ śamaḥ satyamakalmaṣatvaṃ maunaṃ ca bhūteṣvakhileṣvathārjjavam।
atīndriyajñānamidaṃ tathārjjavaṃ prāhustathā jñānaviśuddhasattvāḥ ॥ 1.16.22 ॥

samāhito brahmaparo'pramādī śucistathaivātmaratirjītendriyaḥ।
samāpnuyuryogamimaṃ mahādhiyo maharṣayaścaivamaninditāmalāḥ ॥ 1.16.23 ॥

iti śrīmahāpurāṇe vāyu prokte śaucācāralakṣaṇaṃ nāma ṣoḍaśo'dhyāyaḥ ।। 16 ।

## 1.17

।। vāyuruvāca ।।
āśramatrayamutsṛjya prāptastu paramāśramam।
ataḥ saṃvatsarasyānte prāpya jñānamanuttamam ॥ 1.17.1 ॥

anujñāpya gurūṃcaiva vicaret pṛthivīmimām।
sārabhūtamupāsīta jñānaṃ yajjñeya sādhakam ॥ 1.17.2 ॥

idaṃ jñānamidaṃ jñeyamiti yastuṣitaścaret ।
api kalpasahasrāyurnnaiva jñeyamavāpnuyāt ॥ 1.17.3 ॥

tyaktasaṅgo jitakodho laghvāhāro jitendriyaḥ।
pidhāya buddhyā dvārāṇi dhyāne hyevaṃ mano dadhet ॥ 1.17.4 ॥

śūnyeṣvevāvakāśeṣu guhāsu cavane tathā।
nadīnāṃ puline caiva nityaṃ yuktaḥ sadā bhavet ॥ 1.17.5 ॥

vāgdaṇḍaḥ karmadaṇḍaśca manodaṇḍaśca te trayaḥ।
yasyaite niyatā daṇḍāḥ sa tridaṇḍī vyavasthitaḥ ॥ 1.17.6 ॥

avasthito dhyānaratirjitendriyaḥ śubhāśubhe hitya ca karmaṇī ubhe ।
idaṃ śarīraṃ pravimucya śāstrato na jāyate mriyate vā kadācit ॥ 1.17.7 ॥

iti śrīmahāpurāṇe vāyuprokte paramāśramaprāptikathanaṃ nāma saptadaśo'dhyāyaḥ ।। 17 ।

## 1.18

।। vāyuruvāca ।।
ata ūrddhvaṃ pravakṣyāmi yatīnāmiha niścayam।
prāyaścittāni tattvena yānyakāmakṛtāni tu।
atha kāmakṛtepyāhuḥ sūkṣmadharmavido janāḥ ॥ 1.18.1 ॥
pāpañca trividhaṃ proktaṃ vāṅmanaḥkāyasambhavam।
satataṃ hidivā rātrau yenedaṃ badhyate jagat ॥ 1.18.2 ॥
na karmāṇi na cāpyeṣa tiṣṭha tītiparā śrutiḥ।
kṣaṇameva prayojyantu āyuṣastu vidhāraṇāt ॥ 1.18.3 ॥
bhaveddhīro'pramattastu yogo hi paramaṃ balam।
na hi yogātparaṃ kiñcinnarāṇāmiha dṛśyate।
tasmādyogaṃ praśaṃsanti dharmayuktā manīṣiṇaḥ ॥ 1.18.4 ॥
avidyāṃ vidyayā tīrtvā prāpyaiśvayarmanuttamam।
dṛṣṭvā parāparaṃ dhīrāḥ paraṃ gacchanti tatpadam ॥ 1.18.5 ॥
vratāni yāni bhikṣūṇāṃ tathaivopavratāni ca।
ekaikāpakrame teṣāṃ prāyaścittaṃ vidhīyate ॥ 1.18.6 ॥
upetya tu striyaṃ kāmāt prāyaścittaṃ vinirdiśet ।
prāṇāyāmasamāyuktaṃ kuryātsāntapanaṃ tathā ॥ 1.18.7 ॥
tata ścarati nirddeśaṃ kṛcchrasyānte samāhitaḥ।
punarāśramamāgamya caredbhikṣuratandritaḥ ।
na marmayuktaṃ vacanaṃ hinastīti manīṣiṇaḥ ॥ 1.18.8 ॥
tathāpi ca na karttavyaḥ prasaṅgo hyeṣa dāruṇaḥ।
ahorātrādhikaḥ kaścinnāstyadharma iti śrutiḥ ॥ 1.18.9 ॥
hiṃsā hyeṣā parā sṛṣṭā daivatairmunibhistathā।
yadetaddraviṇaṃ nāma prāṇā hyete bahiścarāḥ।
sa tasya harati prāṇān yo yasya harate dhanam ॥ 1.18.10 ॥
evaṃ kṛtvā sa duṣṭātmā bhinnavṛtto vratāccyutaḥ।
bhūyo nirvedamāpannaścareccāndrāyaṇaṃ vratam ॥ 1.18.11 ॥
vidhinā śāstradṛṣṭena saṃvatsaramiti śrutiḥ।
tataḥ saṃvatsarasyānte bhūyaḥ prakṣīṇakalmaṣaḥ।
bhūyo nirvedamāpannaścareccāndrāyaṇaṃ vratam ॥ 1.18.12 ॥
ahiṃsā sarvabhūtānāṃ karmaṇā manasā girā ।
akāmādapi hiṃseta yadi bhikṣuḥ paśūn mṛgān।
kṛcchrātikṛcchraṃ kurvīta cāndrāyaṇamathīpi vā ॥ 1.18.13 ॥
skandedindriyadaurbalyāt striyaṃ dṛṣṭvā yatiryadi।
tena dhārayitavyā vai prāṇāyāmāstu ṣoḍaśa ॥ 1.18.14 ॥
divā skannasya viprasya prāyaścittaṃ vidhīyate।
trirātramupavāsaśca prāṇāyāmaśataṃ tathā ॥ 1.18.15 ॥
rātrau skannaḥ śuciḥ srātodvādaśaiva tu dhāraṇāḥ।
prāṇāyāmena śuddhātmā virajā jāyate dvijaḥ ॥ 1.18.16 ॥
ekānnaṃ madhu māṃsaṃ vā hyāmaśrāddhaṃ tathaiva ca।
abhojyāni yatīnāñca pratyakṣalavaṇāni ca ॥ 1.18.17 ॥
ekaikātikrame teṣāṃ prāyaścittaṃ vidhīyate।
prājāpatyena kṛcchreṇa tataḥ pāpāt pramucyate ॥ 1.18.18 ॥
vyatikramācca ye kecidvāṅmanaḥkāyasambhavam।
sadbhiḥ saha viniścitya yadbrūyustatsamācaret ॥ 1.18.19 ॥
viśuddhabuddhiḥ samaloṣṭakāñcanaḥ samastabhūteṣu caran sa māhitaḥ ।
sthānaṃ dhruvaṃ śāśvatamavyayaṃ satāṃ paraṃ sa gatvā na punarhi jāyate ॥ 1.18.20 ॥

iti śrīmahāpurāṇe vāyuprokte yatiprāyaśvittavidhirnāmāṣṭādaśo'dhyāyaḥ ।। 18 ।

## 1.19

।। vāyuruvāca ।।
ata ūrddhvaṃ pravakṣyāmi ariṣṭāni nibodhata।
yena jñānaviśeṣeṇa mṛtyuṃ paśyati cātmanaḥ ॥ 1.19.1 ॥

arundhatīṃ dhruvañcaiva somacchāyāṃ mahāpatham।
yo na paśyetsa no jīvennaraḥ saṃvatsarātparam ॥ 1.19.2 ॥

araśmivantamādityaṃ raśmivantañca pāvakam।
yaḥ paśyenna ca jīveta māsādekādaśātparam ॥ 1.19.3 ॥

vamenmūtraṃ karīṣaṃ vā suvarṇaṃ rajataṃ tathā।
pratyakṣamatha vā svapne daśamāsān sa jīvati ॥ 1.19.4 ॥

agrataḥ pṛṣṭhato vāpi khaṇṭaṃ yasya padambhavet।
pāṃsule kardame vāpi saptamāsān sa jīvati ॥ 1.19.5 ॥

kākaḥ kapoto gṛdhro vā nilīyedyasya mūrddhani।
kravyādo vā khagaḥ kaścit ṣaṇmāsānnātivarttate ॥ 1.19.6 ॥

badhye dvāyasapaṅktībhiḥ pāṃśuvarṣaiṇa vā punaḥ।
chāyāṃ vā vikṛtāṃ paśyeccatuḥpañca sa jīvati ॥ 1.19.7 ॥

anabhre vidyutaṃ paśyeddakṣiṇāṃ diśamāśritām।
udakendradha nurvāpi trayo dvauvā sa jīvati ॥ 1.19.8 ॥

apsu vā yadi vā''darśe ātmānaṃ yo na paśyati।
aśiraskaṃ tathātmānaṃ māsādūrddhvaṃ na jīvati ॥ 1.19.9 ॥

śavagandhi bhavedgātraṃ vasāgandhi hyathāpi vā।
mṛtyurhyupasthitastasya arddhamāsaṃ sa jīvati ॥ 1.19.10 ॥

sambhinno māruto yasya marmasthānāni kṛntati ।
adbhiḥ spṛṣṭo na dṛṣyecca tasya mṛtyurupasthitaḥ ॥ 1.19.11 ॥

ṛkṣavānarayuktena rathenāśāntu dakṣiṇām ।
gāyannatha vrajet svapne vidyānmṛtyurupasthitaḥ ॥ 1.19.12 ॥

kṛṣṇāmba radharā śyāmā gāyantī vātha cāṅganā।
yannayeddakṣiṇāmāśāṃ svapne so'pi na jīvati ॥ 1.19.13 ॥

chidraṃ vāsaśacava kṛṣṇañca svapre yo vidhṛyānnaraḥ ।
bhagnaṃ vā śravaṇaṃ dṛṣṭvā vidyānmṛtyurupasthitaḥ ॥ 1.19.14 ॥

āmastakatalādyastu nimajjetpaṅkasāgare।
dṛṣṭvā tu tādṛśaṃ svapnaṃ sadya eva na jīvati ॥ 1.19.15 ॥

bhasmāṅgārāśca keśāṃśca nadīṃ śuṣkāṃ bhujaṅgamān।
paśyedyo daśarātrantu na sa jīveta tādṛśaḥ ॥ 1.19.16 ॥

kṛṣṇaiśca vikaṭaiścaiva puruṣairudyatāyudhaiḥ।
pāṣāṇaistāḍyate svapne yaḥ sadyo na sa jīvati ॥ 1.19.17 ॥

sūryodaye pratyuṣasi pratyakṣaṃ yasya vai śivā।
krośantī sammukhābhyeti ma gatāyurbhavennaraḥ ॥ 1.19.18 ॥

yasya vai srātamātrasya hṛdayaṃ pīṅyate bhṛśam।
jāyate dantaharṣaśca taṃ gatāyuṣamādiśet ॥ 1.19.19 ॥

bhūyo bhūyaḥ śvasedyastu rātrau vā yadi vā divā।
dīpagandhañca no vetti vidyānmṛtyumupasthitam ॥ 1.19.20 ॥

rātrau cendrāyudhaṃ paśyeddivā nakṣatramaṇḍalam।
paranetreṣu cātmānaṃ na paśyenna sa jīvati ॥ 1.19.21 ॥

netramekaṃ sravedyasya karṇau sthānācca bhraśyataḥ।
nāsā ca vakrā bhavati sa jñeyo gatajīvitaḥ ॥ 1.19.22 ॥

yasya kṛṣṇā kharā jihvā paṅkabhāsañca vai mukham।
gaṇḍe cipiṭake rakte tasya mṛtyurupasthitaḥ ॥ 1.19.23 ॥

muktakeśo hasaṃścaiva gāyan nṛtyaṃśca yo naraḥ।
yāmyāśābhimukho gacchettadantaṃ tasya jīvitam ॥ 1.19.24 ॥

yasya svedasamudbhūtāḥ śvetasarṣapasannibhāḥ।
svedā bhavanti hyasakṛttasya mṛtyurupaśthitaḥ ॥ 1.19.25 ॥

uṣṭrā vā rāsabhā vāpi yuktāḥ svpare rathe'śubhāḥ।
yasya sopi na jīveta dakṣiṇābhimukho gataḥ ॥ 1.19.26 ॥

dve cātra parame'riṣṭe etadrūpaṃ paraṃ bhavet।
ghoṣaṃ na śrṛṇuyāt karṇe jyotirnnetre na paśyati ॥ 1.19.27 ॥

śvabhreyo nipatet svapne dvārañcāsya na vidyate।
na cotiṣṭhati yaḥ śvabrāttadantaṃ tasya jīvitam ॥ 1.19.28 ॥

ūrddhvā ca dṛṣṭirna ca sampratiṣṭā raktā punaḥ samparivarttamānā।
mukhasya coṣmā muṣirā ca nābhiratyuṣṇamūtro viṣamastha eva ॥ 1.19.29 ॥

divā vā yati vā rātrau pratyakṣaṃ yo'bhihanyate।
taṃ paśyedatha hantāraṃ sa hatastu na jīvati ॥ 1.19.30 ॥

agnipraveśaṃ kurute svapnānte yastu mānavaḥ।
smṛtiṃ nopalabheccāpi tadantaṃ tasya jīvitam ॥ 1.19.31 ॥

yastu prāvaraṇaṃ śuklaṃ svakaṃ paśyati mānavaḥ।
raktaṃ kṛṣṇamapi svapne tasya mṛtyurupasthitaḥ ॥ 1.19.32 ॥

ariṣṭasūcite dehe tasmin kāla upāgate।
tyaktvā bhayaviṣādañca udgacchedūbhuddhimānnaraḥ ॥ 1.19.33 ॥

prācīṃ vā yadi vodīcīṃ diśaṃ niṣkramya vai śuciḥ।
same'tisthāvare deśe vivikte janavarjjite ॥ 1.19.34 ॥

udaṅmukhaḥ prāṅmukho vā svasthaḥ svācānta eva ca।
svastikopaniviṣṭaśca namaskṛtya maheśvaram।
samakāyaśirogrīvaṃ dhāryennāvalokayet ॥ 1.19.35 ॥

yathā dīpo nivātasyo neṅgate sopamā smṛtā।
prāgudakpravaṇe deśe tasmādyuñjīta yogavit ॥ 1.19.36 ॥

prāṇe ca ramate nityaṃ cakṣuṣoḥ sparśane tathā।
śrotre manasi buddhau ca tathā vakṣasi dhārayet।
na tasya dhāraṇāyogādvāyuḥ sarvaṃ pravarttate ॥ 1.19.37 ॥

kālagharmajhca vijñāya samūhañcaiva sarvaśaḥ।
dvādaśādhyātmamityevaṃ yogadhāraṇamucyate ॥ 1.19.38 ॥

śatamaṣṭa śataṃ vāpi dhāraṇāṃ mūrdhni dhārayet।
na tasya dhāraṇāyogādvāyuḥ sarvaṃ pravartate ॥ 1.19.39 ॥

tatastvāpūrayeddehamoṅkāreṇa samāhitaḥ।
athoṅkāramayo yogī na kṣarettvakṣarī bhavet । 19.40 ।।

iti śrīmahāpurāṇe vāyuprokte ariṣṭāni nāmaikonaviṃśo'dhyāyaḥ ।। 19 ।

## 1.20

।। vāyuruvāca ।।
ata ūrddhvaṃ pravakṣyāmi oṅkāraprāptilakṣaṇam।
eṣa trimātro vijñeyo vyañjanañcātra sasvaram ॥ 1.20.1 ॥

prathamā vaidyutī mātrā dvitīyā tāmasī smṛtā।
tṛtīyā nirguṇī vidyānmātrāmakṣaragāminīm ॥ 1.20.2 ॥

gandharvīti ca vijñeyo gāndhārasvarasambhavā।
pipīlikāsamasparśā prayuktā mūrdni lakṣyate ॥ 1.20.3 ॥

tathā prayuktamoṅkāraṃ pratinirvāti mūrddhani ।
tathoṅkāramayo yogī hyakṣare tvakṣarī bhavet ॥ 1.20.4 ॥

praṇavo dhanuḥ śaro hyātmā brahma tallakṣyamucyate।
apramattena cedvadhyaṃ śaravattanmayo bhavet ॥ 1.20.5 ॥

omityekākṣaraṃ brahma guhāyāṃ nihitaṃ padam।
omityetatrayo vedāstrayo lokāstrayo'gnayaḥ।
viṣṇukramāstrayastvete ṛksāmāni yajūṃṣi ca ॥ 1.20.6 ॥

mātrāścātra catasrastu vijñeyāḥ paramārthataḥ।
tatra yuktaśca yo yogī tasya sālokyatāṃ vrajet ॥ 1.20.7 ॥

akārastvakṣaro jñeya ukāraḥ svaritaḥ smṛtaḥ।
makārastu pluto jñeyastrimātra iti saṃjñitaḥ ॥ 1.20.8 ॥

akārastvatha bhūrloka ukāro bhuvarucyate।
savyañjano makāraśca svarllokaśca vidhīyate ॥ 1.20.9 ॥

oṅkārastu trayo lokāḥ śirastasya triviṣṭapam।
bhuvanāntañca tatsarvaṃ brāhmaṃ tatpadamucyate ॥ 1.20.10 ॥

mātrāpadaṃ rudraloko hyamātrastu śivaṃ padam।
evandhyānaviśeṣeṇa tatpadaṃ samupāsate ॥ 1.20.11 ॥

tasmāddhayānaratirnityamamātraṃ hi tadakṣaram।
upāsyaṃ hi prayatnena śāśvataṃ padamicchatā ॥ 1.20.12 ॥

hṛsvā tu prathamā mātrā tato dīrghā tvanantaram।
tataḥ plutavatī caiva tṛtīyā upadiśyate ॥ 1.20.13 ॥

etāstu mātrā vijñeyā yathāvadanupūrvaśaḥ ।
yāvaccaiva tu śakyante dhāryante tāvadeva hi ॥ 1.20.14 ॥

indriyāṇi mano buddhiṃ dhyāyannātmani yaḥ sadā ।
atrāṣṭamātramapicecchṛṇuyātphalamāpnuyāt ॥ 1.20.15 ॥

māse māse'śvamedhena yo yajeta śataṃ samāḥ ।
na sa tat prāpnuyāt puṇyaṃ mātrayā yadavāpnuyāt ॥ 1.20.16 ॥

abbinduṃ yaḥ kuśāgreṇa māse māse pibennaraḥ।
saṃvatsaraśataṃ pūrṇaṃ mātrayā tadavāpnuyāt ॥ 1.20.17 ॥

iṣṭāpūrttasya yajñasya satyavākye ca yat phalam।
abhakṣaṇe ca māṃsasya mātrayā tadavāpnuyāt ॥ 1.20.18 ॥

svāmyarthe yudhyamānānāṃ śūrāṇāmanivarttinām।
yadbhavettat phalaṃ dṛṣṭaṃ mātrayā tadavāpnuyāt ॥ 1.20.19 ॥

na tathā tapasogreṇa na yajñairbhūridakṣiṇaiḥ।
yat phalaṃ prāpnuyāt samyag mātrayā tadavāpnuyāt ॥ 1.20.20 ॥

tatra vai yo'rddhamātro yaḥ pluto nāmopadiśyate।
eṣā eva bhavet kāryā gṛhasthānāntu yoginām ॥ 1.20.21 ॥

eṣā caiva viśeṣeṇa aiśvaryasamalakṣaṇā।
yogināntu viśeṣeṇa aiśvarye hyaṣṭalakṣaṇe।
aṇimādyeti vijñeyā tasmādyuñjīta tāṃ dvijaḥ ॥ 1.20.22 ॥

evaṃ hi yogī saṃyuktaḥ śucirddānto jitendriyaḥ।
ātmānaṃ vindate yastu sa sarvaṃ vindate dvijaḥ ॥ 1.20.23 ॥

ṛco yajūṃṣi sāmāni vedopaniṣadastathā।
yogajñānādavāpnoti brāhmaṇo dhyānacintakaḥ ॥ 1.20.24 ॥

sarvabhūtalayo bhūtvā abhūtaḥ sa tu jāyate।
yogī saṅkramaṇaṃ kṛtvā yāti vai śāśvataṃ padam ॥ 1.20.25 ॥

api cātra caturhastāṃ dhyāyamānaścaturmukhīm।
prakṛtiṃ viśvarūpākhyāṃ dṛṣṭvā divyena cakṣuṣā ॥ 1.20.26 ॥

ajāmetāṃ lohitaśuklakṛṣṇāṃ bahvīḥ prajāḥ sṛjamānāṃ svarūpām।
ajo hyeko juṣamāṇo'nuśete jahātyenāṃ bhuktabhogāmājo'nyaḥ।
aṣṭākṣarāṃ ṣoḍaśapāṇipādāṃ caturmukhīṃ triśikhāmekaśrṛṅgām।
ādyāmajāṃ viśvasṛjāṃ svarūpāṃ jñātvā budhāstvamṛtatvaṃ vrajanti।
ye brāhmaṇāḥ praṇavaṃ vedayanti na te punaḥ saṃsarantīha bhūyaḥ ॥ 1.20.27 ॥

ityetadakṣaraṃ brahma paramoṅkārasaṃjñitam।
yastu vedayate samyak tathā dhyāyati vā punaḥ ॥ 1.20.28 ॥

saṃsāracakramutsṛjya muktabandhanabandhanaḥ।
acalaṃ nirguṇaṃ sthānaṃ śivaṃ prāpnotyasaṃśayaḥ।
ityetadvai mayā proktamoṅkāraprāptilakṣaṇam ॥ 1.20.29 ॥

namo lokeśvarāya saṅkalpakalpagrahaṇāya mahāntamupatiṣṭhate tadvo hitaṃ yadbrahmaṇe namaḥ।
sarvatra sthānine nirguṇāya sambhaktayogīśvarāya ca ।।

puṣkaraparṇamivādbhirviśuddhamiva brahmamupatiṣṭetpavitraṃ pavitrāṇāṃ pavitraṃ pavitreṇa paripūritena pavitreṇa hrasvandīrghaplutamiti tadetamoṅkāramaśabdamasparśamarūpamarasamagandhaṃ paryupāsīta avidyeśānāya viśvarūpo na tasya avidyeśānāya namo yogīśvarāyeti ca yena dyaurugrā pṛthivī ca dṛḍhā yena svastanitaṃ yena nākastayorantarikṣamime varīyaso devānāṃ hṛdayaṃ viśvarūpo na tasya prāṇāpānaupamyaṃ cāsti oṅkāroviśvaviśvā vai yajñaḥ yajño vai vedaḥ vedo vai namaskāraḥ namaskāro rudraḥ namo rudrāya yogeśvarādhipataye namaḥ।

iti siddhipratyupasthānaṃ sāyaṃprātarmadhyāhne namaḥ iti।।

sarvakāmaphalorudraḥ।
yathā vṛntāt phalaṃ pakvaṃ pavanena samīritam।
namaskāreṇa rudrasya tathā pāpaṃ praṇaśyati ।। 20.30 ।।

yathā rudranamaskāraḥ sarvadharmaphalo dhruvaḥ।
anyadevanamaskāro na tat phalamavāpnuyāt ।। 20.31 ।।

tasmāt triṣavaṇaṃ yogī upāsīta maheśvaram।
daśāvistārakaṃ brahma tathā ca brahma vistaram ।। 20.32 ।।

oṅkāraṃ sarvataḥ kāle sarvaṃ vihitavān prabhuḥ।
tena tena tu viṣṇutvaṃ namaskāraṃ mahāyaśāḥ ।। 20.33 ।।

namaskārastathā caiva praṇavastuvate prabhum ।
praṇavaṃ stuvate yajño yajñaṃ saṃstuvate namaḥ।
namastuvati vai rudrastasmādrudrapadaṃ śivam ।। 20.34 ।।

ityetāni rahasyāni yatīnāṃ vai yathākramam।
yastu vedayate dhyānaṃ sa paraṃ prāpnuyātpadam ।। 20.35 ।।

iti śrīmahāpurāṇe vāyuprokte oṅkāraprāptilakṣaṇaṃ nāma viṃśo'dhyāyaḥ ।। 20 ।

## 1.21

।। sūta uvāca ।।
ṛṣīṇāmagnikalpānāṃ naimiṣāraṇyavāsinām ।
ṛṣiḥ śrutidharaḥ prājñaḥ sāvarṇirnnāma nāmataḥ ॥ 1.21.1 ॥
teṣāṃ sopyagrato bhūtvā vāyuṃ vākyaviśāradaḥ।
sātatyaṃ tatra kurvantaṃ priyārthe satrayājinām।
vinayenopasaṃgamya papraccha sa mahādyutim ॥ 1.21.2 ॥
।।sāvarṇiruvāca ।।
vibho purāṇasaṃ baddhāṃ kathāṃ vai vedasaṃmitām।
śrotumicchāmahe samyak prasādātsarvadarśinaḥ ॥ 1.21.3 ॥
hiraṇyagarbho bhagavān lalāṭānnīlalohitam।
kathaṃ tattejasaṃ devaṃ labdhavān putramātmanaḥ ॥ 1.21.4 ॥
kathaṃ ca bhagavān jajñe brahmā kamalasaṃbhavaḥ।
rudratvaṃ caiva sarvasya svātmajasya kathaṃ punaḥ ॥ 1.21.5 ॥
kathaṃ ca viṣṇo rudreṇa sārddhaṃ prītiranuttamā।
sarve viṣṇumayā devā sarve viṣṇumayā gaṇāḥ ॥ 1.21.6 ॥
na ca viṣṇusamā kācidgatiranyā vidhīyate।
ityevaṃ satataṃ devā gāyante nātra saṃśayaḥ।
bhavasya sakathaṃ nityaṃ praṇāmaṃ kurute hariḥ ॥ 1.21.7 ॥
।।sūta uvāca ।।
evamukte tu bhagavān vāyuḥ sāvarṇimabravīt।
aho sādhu tvayā sādho pṛṣṭaḥ praśno hyanuttamaḥ ॥ 1.21.8 ॥
bhavasya putrajanmatvaṃ brahmaṇaḥ so'bhavadyathā।
brahmaṇaḥ padma yonitvaṃ rudratvaṃ śaṃkarasya ca ॥ 1.21.9 ॥
dvābhyāmapi ca samprītir
viṣṇoścaiva bhavasya ca ।
yaccāpi kurute nityaṃ praṇāmaṃ śaṃkarasya ca।
vistareṇānupūrvyācca śrṛṇuta bruvato mama ॥ 1.21.10 ॥
manvantarasya saṃhāre paścimasya mahātmanaḥ।
āsīttu saptamaḥ kalpaḥ padmo nāma dvijottama।
vārāhaḥ sāmpratasteṣāṃ tasya vakṣyāmi vistaram ॥ 1.21.11 ॥
।।sāvarṇiruvāca।।
kiyatā caiva kālena kalpaḥ sambhavate katham।
kiṃ ca pramāṇaṃ kalpasya tatra prabrūhi pṛcchatām ॥ 1.21.12 ॥
।।vāyuruvāca।।
manvantarāṇāṃ saptānāṃ kālasaṃkhyā yathākramam।
pravakṣyāmi samāsena bruvato me nibodhata ॥ 1.21.13 ॥
koṭīnāṃ dve sahasre vai aṣṭau koṭiśatāni ca ।
dviṣaṣṭiśca tathā koṭyo niyutāni ca saptatiḥ।
kalpārddhasya tu saṃkhyāyāmetat sarvamudāhṛtam ॥ 1.21.14 ॥
pūrvoktau ca guṇacchedau varṣāgraṃ labdamādiśet ।
śataṃ caiva tu koṭīnāṃ koṭīnāmaṣṭasaptatiḥ।
dve ca śatasahasre tu navatirniyutāni ca ॥ 1.21.15 ॥
mānuṣeṇa pramāṇena yāvadvaivasvatāntaram।
eṣa kalpastu vijñeyaḥ kalpārddhadviguṇīkṛtaḥ ॥ 1.21.16 ॥
anāgatānāṃ saptānāmetadeva yathākramam।
pramāṇaṃ kālasaṃkhyāyā vijñeyaṃ matamaiśvaram ॥ 1.21.17 ॥
niyutānyaṣṭapañcāśattathā'śītiśatāni ca।
caturaśītiścavānyāni prayutāni pramāṇataḥ ॥ 1.21.18 ॥
saptarṣayo manuścaiva devāścendrapurogamāḥ।
etat kālasya vijñeyaṃ varṣāgrantu pramāṇataḥ ॥ 1.21.19 ॥
evaṃ manvantaraṃ teṣāṃ mānuṣāntaḥ prakīrttitaḥ।
praṇavāntāśacava ye devāḥ sādhyā devagaṇāśca ye।
viśvedevāśacava ye nityāḥ kalpaṃ jīvanti te gaṇāḥ ॥ 1.21.20 ॥
ayaṃ yo varttate kalpo vārāhaḥ sa tu kīrttyate।
yasmin svāyambhuvādyāśca manavaśca caturddaśa ॥ 1.21.21 ॥
।।ṛṣaya ūcuḥ।।
kasmādvārāhakalpoyaṃ nāmataḥ parikīrtitaḥ।
kasmācca kāraṇāddevo varāha iti kīrttyate ॥ 1.21.22 ॥
ko vā varāho bhagavān kasya yoniḥ kimātmakaḥ।
varāhaḥ kathamutpanna etadicchāma veditum ॥ 1.21.23 ॥
।।vāyuruvāca।।
varāhastu yathotpanno yasminnarthe ca kalpitaḥ।
vārāhaśca yathā kalpaḥ kalpatvaṃ kalpanā ca yā ॥ 1.21.24 ॥
kalpayorantaraṃ yacca tasya cāsya ca kalpitam।
tatsarvaṃ sampravakṣyāmi yathādṛṣṭaṃ yathāśrutam ॥ 1.21.25 ॥
bhavastu prathamaḥ kalpo lokādau prathitaḥ purā।
jñātavyo bhagavānatra hyānandaḥ sāmprataḥ svayam ॥ 1.21.26 ॥
brahmasthānamidaṃ divyaṃ prāptaṃ vā divyasambhavam।
dvitīyastu bhuvaḥ kalpastṛtīyastapa ucyate ॥ 1.21.27 ॥
bhavaścaturtho vijñeyaḥ paṃcamo rambha eva ca।
ṛtukalpastathā ṣaṣṭhaḥ saptamastu kratuḥ smṛtaḥ ॥ 1.21.28 ॥
aṣṭamastu bhavedvahnirnavamo havyavahanaḥ।
sāvitro daśamaḥ kalpo bhuvastvekādaśaḥ smṛtaḥ ॥ 1.21.29 ॥
uśiko dvādaśastatra kuśikastu trayodaśaḥ।
caturddaśastu gandharvo gandharvo yatra vai svaraḥ।
utpannastu yathā nādo gandharvā yatra cotthitāḥ ॥ 1.21.30 ॥
ṛṣabhastu tataḥ kalpo jñeyaḥ paṃcadaśo dvijāḥ।
ṛṣayo yatra sambhūtāḥ svaro lokamanoharaḥ ॥ 1.21.31 ॥
ṣaḍjastu ṣoḍaśaḥ kalpaḥ ṣaḍjanā yatra carṣayaḥ।
śiśiraśca vasantaśca nidāgho varṣa eva ca ॥ 1.21.32 ॥
śaraddhemanta ityete mānasā brahmaṇaḥ sutāḥ।
utpannāḥ ṣaḍja saṃsiddhāḥ putrāḥ kalpe tu ṣoḍaśe ॥ 1.21.33 ॥
yasmājjātaiśca taiḥ ṣaḍabhiḥ sadyo jāto maheśvaraḥ।
tasmāt samutthitaḥ ṣaḍjaḥ svarastūdadhisannibhaḥ ॥ 1.21.34 ॥
tataḥ saptadaśaḥ kalpo mārjālīya iti smṛtaḥ।
mārjjālīyaṃ tu tat karma yasmādbrāhmāmakalpayat ॥ 1.21.35 ॥
tatastu madhyamo nāma kalpo'ṣṭādaśa ucyate।
yasmistu madhyamo nāma svaro dhaivatapūjitaḥ ।
utpannaḥ sarvabhūteṣu madhyamo vai svayaṃbhuvaḥ ॥ 1.21.36 ॥
tatastvekonaviṃśastu kalpo vairājakaḥ smṛtaḥ।
vairājo yatra bhagavān munurvai brahmaṇaḥ sutaḥ ॥ 1.21.37 ॥
tasya putrastu dharmātmā dadīcirnnāma dhārmikaḥ।
prajāpatirmahātejā babhūva tridaśeśvaraḥ ॥ 1.21.38 ॥
akāmayata gāyatrī yajamānaṃ prajāpatim।
tasmājjajñe svaraḥ srigdhaḥ putrastasya dadhīcinaḥ ॥ 1.21.39 ॥
tato viṃśatimaḥ kalpo niṣādaḥ parikīrttitaḥ।
prajāpatistu taṃ dṛṣṭvā svayambhūprabhavaṃ tadā।
virarāma prajāḥ sraṣṭuṃ niṣādastu tapo'tapat ॥ 1.21.40 ॥
divyaṃ varṣasahasrantu nirāhāro jītendriyaḥ।
tamuvāca mahāṃtejā brahmā lokapitāmahaḥ ॥ 1.21.41 ॥
ūrddhvabāhuṃ tapoglānaṃ duḥkhitaṃ kṣutpipāsitam।
niṣīdetyabravīdenaṃ putraṃ śāntaṃ pitāmahaḥ।
tasmānniṣādaḥ sambhūtaḥ svarastu sa niṣādavān ॥ 1.21.42 ॥
ekaviṃśatimaḥ kalpo vijñeyaḥ pañcamo dvijāḥ।
prāṇo'pānaḥ samānaśca udāno vyāna eva ca ॥ 1.21.43 ॥
brahmaṇo mānasāḥ putrāḥ pañcaite brahmaṇaḥ samāḥ।
taistvarthavādibhiryuktairvāgbhiriṣṭo maheśvaraḥ ॥ 1.21.44 ॥
yasmātparigatairgītaḥ pañcabhistairmahātmabhiḥ।
svarastu pañcamaḥ snigdhaḥ tasmātkalpastu pañcamaḥ ॥ 1.21.45 ॥
dvāviṃśastu tathā kalpo vijñeyo meghavāhanaḥ।
yatra viṣṇurmahābāhurmegho bhūtvā maheśvaram।
divyaṃ varṣasahasrantu avahat kṛttivāsasam ॥ 1.21.46 ॥
tasya niḥśvasamānasya bhārākāntasya vai mukhāt।
nirjagāma mahākāyaḥ kālo lokaprakāśanaḥ।
yastvayaṃ paṭyate viprairviṣṇurvai kaśyapātmajaḥ ॥ 1.21.47 ॥
trayoviṃśatimaḥ kalpo vijñeyaścintakastathā।
prajāpatisutaḥ śrīmān citiśca mithunañca tau ॥ 1.21.48 ॥
dhyāyato brahmaṇaścaiva yasmāccintā samutthitā।
tasmāttu cintakaḥ so vai kalpaḥ proktaḥ svayambhuvā ॥ 1.21.49 ॥
caturviṃśatimaścāpi hyākūtiḥ kalpa ucyate।
ākūtiśca tathā devī mithunaṃ sambabhūva ha ॥ 1.21.50 ॥
prajāḥ sraṣṭuṃ tathākūtiṃ yasmādāha prajāpatiḥ।
tasmāt sa puruṣo jñeya ākūtiḥ kalpasaṃjñitaḥ ॥ 1.21.51 ॥
pañcaviṃśatimaḥ kalpo vijñātiḥ parikīrttitaḥ।
vijñātiśacava tathā devī mithunaṃ samprasūyate ॥ 1.21.52 ॥
dhyāyataḥ putrakāmasya manasyadhyātmasaṃjñitam।
vijñātaṃ vai samāsena vijñātistu tataḥ smṛtaḥ ॥ 1.21.53 ॥
ṣaḍ‌viṃśastu tataḥ kalpo mana ityabhidhīyate।
devī ca śāṅkarī nāma mithunaṃ samprasūyate ॥ 1.21.54 ॥
prajā vai cintamā nasya sraṣṭukāmasya vai tadā।
yasmāt prajāsambhavanādutpannastu svayambhuvā ।
tasmāt prajāsambhavanādbhāvanāsambhavaḥ smṛtaḥ ॥ 1.21.55 ॥
saptaviṃśatimaḥ kalpo bhāvo vai kalpasaṃjñitaḥ।
paurṇamāsī tathā devī mithunaṃ samapadyata ॥ 1.21.56 ॥
prajā vai sraṣṭukāmasya brahmaṇaḥ parameṣṭinaḥ।
dhyāyatastu paraṃ dhyānaṃ paramātmānamīśvaram ॥ 1.21.57 ॥
agnistu maṇḍalībhūtvā raśmijālasamāvṛtaḥ ।
bhuvandivañcaviṣṭabhya dīpyate sa mahāvapuḥ ॥ 1.21.58 ॥
tato varṣasahasrānte sampūrṇe jyotimaṇḍale।
aviṣṭayā sahotpannamapasyat sūryamaṇḍalam ॥ 1.21.59 ॥
yasmādadṛśyo bhūtānāṃ brahmaṇā parameṣṭinā।
dṛṣṭastu bhagavān devaḥ sūryyaḥ sampūrṇamaṇḍalaḥ ॥ 1.21.60 ॥
sarvve yogāśca mantrāśca maṇḍalena sahotthitāḥ।
yasmāt kalpo hyayaṃ dṛṣṭastasmāttaṃ darśa mucyate ॥ 1.21.61 ॥
yasmānmanasi sampūrṇo brahamaṇaḥ parameṣṭinaḥ।
purā vai bhagavān somaḥ paurṇamāsī tataḥ smṛtā ॥ 1.21.62 ॥
tasmāttu parvadarśe vai paurṇamāsañca yogibhiḥ।
ubhayoḥ pakṣayorjyeṣṭhamātmano hitakāmyayā ॥ 1.21.63 ॥
darśañca paurṇamāsañca ye yajanti dvijātayaḥ।
na teṣāṃ punarāvṛttirbrahmalokāt kadācana ॥ 1.21.64 ॥
yo'nāhitāgniḥ prayato vīrādhvānaṃ gatopi vā ।
samādhāya manastīvraṃ mantramuccārayecchanaiḥ ॥ 1.21.65 ॥
tvamagne rudro asuro mahī divastvaṃ śarvvo mārutaṃ pṛṣṭa īśiṣe।
tvaṃ pāśagandharvvaśiṣaṃ pūṣā vidhattapāsinā।
ityeva mantraṃ manasā samyaguccārayed‌dvijaḥ।
agniṃ praviśate yastu rudralokaṃ sa gacchati ॥ 1.21.66 ॥
somaścāgnistu bhagavān kālo rudra iti śrutiḥ।
tasmādyaḥ praviśedagniṃ sa rudrānna nivarttate ॥ 1.21.67 ॥
aṣṭāviṃśatimaḥ kalpo bṛhadityabhisaṃjñitaḥ।
brahmaṇaḥ putrakāmasya sraṣṭukāmasya vai prajāḥ।
dhyāyamānasya manasā bṛhatsāma rathantaram ॥ 1.21.68 ॥
yasmāttatra samutpanno bṛhataḥ sarvvatomukhaḥ।
tasmāttu bṛhataḥ kalpo vijñeyastattvacintakaiḥ ॥ 1.21.69 ॥
aṣṭāśītisahasrāṇāṃ yojanānāṃ pramāṇataḥ ।
rathantarantuvijñeyaṃ paramaṃ sūryyamaṇḍalam।
tasmādaṇḍantu vijñeyamabhedyaṃ sūryamaṇḍalam ॥ 1.21.70 ॥
yutsūryyamaṇḍalañcāpi bṛhatsāma tu bhidyate।
bhitvā caivaṃ dvijā yānti yogātmāno dṛḍhavratāḥ।
saṅghātamupanītāśca anye kalpā rathantare ॥ 1.21.71 ॥
ityetattu mayā proktaṃ citramadhyātmadarśanam।
ataḥ paraṃ pravakṣyāmi kalpānāṃ vistaraṃ śubham ॥ 1.21.72 ॥

iti śrīmahāpurāṇe vāyuprokte kalpanirūpaṇaṃ nāmaikaviṃśodhyāyaḥ ।। 21 ।

## 1.22

।। ṛṣaya ūcuḥ ।।
atyadbhutamidaṃ sarvvaṃ kalpānānte mahāmune।
rahasyaṃ vai samākhyātaṃ mantrāṇāñca prakalpanam ॥ 1.22.1 ॥

na tavāviditaṃ kiñcit triṣu lokeṣu vidyate।
tasmādvistarataḥ sarvvāḥ kalpasaṃkhyā bravīhi naḥ ॥ 1.22.2 ॥

।।vāyuruvāca ।।
atra vaḥ kathayiṣyāmi kalpasaṃkhyāṃ yathā tathā।
yugāgraṃ ca varṣāgrantu brahmaṇaḥ parameṣṭinaḥ ॥ 1.22.3 ॥

ekaṃ kalpasahasrantu brahmaṇo'bdaḥ prakīrttitaḥ।
etadaṣṭasahasrantu brahmaṇastadyugaṃ smṛtam ॥ 1.22.4 ॥

ekaṃ yugasahasrantu savanaṃ tat prajāpateḥ।
savanānāṃ sahasrantu dviguṇaṃ trivṛtaṃ tathā ॥ 1.22.5 ॥

brahmaṇaḥ sthitikālasya caitat sarvaṃ prakīrtitam।
tasya saṃkhyāṃ pravakṣyāmi purastādvai yathākramam ॥ 1.22.6 ॥

aṣṭāviṃśatirye kalpā nāmataḥ parikīrtitāḥ।
taiṣāṃ purastādvakṣyāmi kalpasaṃjñāṃ, yathākramam ॥ 1.22.7 ॥

rathantarasya sāmnastu upariṣṭānnibodhata।
kalpānte nāma dheyāni mantrotpattiśca yasya yā ॥ 1.22.8 ॥

ekonaviṃśakaḥ kalpo vijñeyaḥ śrṛtalohitaḥ।
yasmiṃstat paramadhyānaṃ dhyāyato brahmaṇastathā ॥ 1.22.9 ॥

śvetoṣṇīṣaḥ śvetamālyaḥ śvetāmbaradharaḥ śikhī।
utpannastu mahātejāḥ kumāraḥ pāvakopamaḥ ॥ 1.22.10 ॥

bhīmaṃ mukhaṃ mahāraudraṃ sughoraṃ śvetalohitam।
dīptaṃ dīptena vapuṣā mahāsyaṃ śvetavarccasam ॥ 1.22.11 ॥

taṃ dṛṣṭvā puruṣaḥ śrīmān brahmā vai viśvatomukhaḥ।
kumāraṃ lokadhātāraṃ viśvarūpaṃ maheśvaram ॥ 1.22.12 ॥

purāṇapuruṣaṃ devaṃ viśvātmā yogināṃ ciram।
vavande devadeveśaṃ brahmā lokapitāmahaḥ ॥ 1.22.13 ॥

hṛdi kṛtvā mahādevaṃ paramātmānamīśvaram।
sadyojātaṃ tato brahma brahmā vai sama cintayat।
jñātvā mumoca deveśo hṛṣṭo hāsaṃ jagatpatiḥ ॥ 1.22.14 ॥

tato'sya pārśvataḥ śvetā ṛṣayo brahmavarccasaḥ।
prādurbhūtā mahātmānaḥ śvetamālyānulepanāḥ ॥ 1.22.15 ॥

sunando nandakaśacavaiva viśvanando'tha nandanaḥ।
śiṣyāste vai mahātmāno yaistu brahma tato vṛtam ॥ 1.22.16 ॥

tasyāgre śveta varṇābhaḥ śvetanāmā mahāmuniḥ।
vijajñe'tha mahātejā yasmājjajñe narastvasau ॥ 1.22.17 ॥

tatra te ṛṣayaḥ sarvve sadyojātaṃ maheśvaram।
tasmādviśveśvaraṃ devaṃ ye prapaśyanti vai dvijāḥ।
prāṇāyāmaparā yuktā brahmaṇi vyavasāyinaḥ ॥ 1.22.18 ॥

te sarve pāpanirmmuktā vimalā brahmavarccasaḥ।
brahmalo kamatikramya brahmalokaṃ vrajanti ca ॥ 1.22.19 ॥

।।vāyuruvāca।।
tatastriṃśattamaḥ kalpo rakto nāma prakīrttitaḥ।
rakto yatra mahātejā raktavarṇa madhārayat ॥ 1.22.20 ॥

dhyāyataḥ putrakāmasya brahmaṇaḥ parameṣṭinaḥ।
prādurbhūto mahātejāḥ kumāro raktavigrahaḥ।
raktamālyāmbaradharo raktanetraḥ pratāpavān ॥ 1.22.21 ॥

sa taṃ dṛṣṭvā mahādevaṃ kumāraṃ raktavāsasam।
dhyānayogaṃ paraṅgatvā bubudhe viśvamīśvaram ॥ 1.22.22 ॥

sa taṃ praṇamya bhagavān brahmā paramayantritaḥ।
vāmadevaṃ tato brahmā brahmātmakaṃ vyacintayat ॥ 1.22.23 ॥

evaṃ dhyāto mahādevo brahmaṇā parameṣṭinā।
manasā prītiyuktena pitāmahamathābravīt ॥ 1.22.24 ॥

dhyāyatā putrakāmena yasmāttehaṃ pitāmahaḥ।
dṛṣṭaḥ paramayā bhaktyā dhyānayogena sattama ॥ 1.22.25 ॥

tasmāddhayānaṃ paraṃ prāpya kalpe kalpe mahātapāḥ।
vetsyase māṃ mahāsattva lokadhātāramīśvaram।
evamuktvā tataḥ śarvaḥ aṭṭahāsaṃ mumoca ha ॥ 1.22.26 ॥

tatastasya mahātmānaścatvāraśca kumārakāḥ।
sambabhūvurmamāhātmāno virejuḥ śuddhabuddhayaḥ ॥ 1.22.27 ॥

virajasva vivāhaśca viśoko viśvabhāvanaḥ।
brahmaṇyā brahmaṇastulyā vīrā adhyavasāyinaḥ ॥ 1.22.28 ॥

raktāmbaradharāḥ sarve raktamālyānulepanāḥ।
raktabhasmānuliptāṅgā raktāsyā raktalocanāḥ ॥ 1.22.29 ॥

tato varṣasahasrānte brahmaṇyā vyavasāyinaḥ।
gṛṇantaśacava mahātmāno brahma tadvāmadaivakam ॥ 1.22.30 ॥

anugrahārthaṃ lokānāṃ śiṣyāṇāṃ hitakāmyayā।
dharmopadeśamakhilaṃ kṛtvā te brāhmaṇāḥ svayam ।
punareva mahāmadevaṃ praviṣṭā rudramavyayam ॥ 1.22.31 ॥

ye'pi cānye dvijaśreṣṭā yuñjānā vāmamīśvaram।
prapadyanti mahādeṃ tadbhaktāstatparāyaṇāḥ ॥ 1.22.32 ॥

te sarve pāpanirmuktā vimalā brahmavarccasaḥ।
rudralokaṃ gamiṣyanti punarāvṛttidurlabham ॥ 1.22.33 ॥

iti śrīmahāpurāṇe vāyuprokte kalpasaṃkhyānirūpaṇaṃ nāma dvāviṃśo'dhyāyaḥ ।। 22 ।

## 1.23

।। vāyuruvāca ।।
ekatriṃśattamaḥ kalpaḥ pītavāsā iti smṛtaḥ।
brahma yatra mahātejāḥ pītavarṇatvamāgataḥ ॥ 1.23.1 ॥
dhyāyataḥ putrakāmasya brahmaṇaḥ parameṣṭinaḥ।
prādurbhūto mahātejāḥ kumāraḥ pītavastravān ॥ 1.23.2 ॥
pītagandhānuliptāṅgaḥ pītamālyadharo yuvā।
pītayajñopavītaśca pītoṣṇīṣo mahābhujaḥ ॥ 1.23.3 ॥
taṃ dṛṣṭvā dhyānasaṃyuktaṃ brahmā lokeśvaraṃ prabhum।
manasā lokadhātāraṃ vavande parameśvaram ॥ 1.23.4 ॥
tato dhyānagatastatra brahma māheśvarīṃ parām।
apaśyad gāṃ virupāṃ ca maheśvaramukhacyutām ॥ 1.23.5 ॥
catuṣpadāṃ caturvakrāṃ caturhastāṃ catuḥstanīm।
caturnnetrāṃ catuḥśrṛṅgīṃ caturddaṃṣṭrāṃ caturmukhīm।
dvātriṃśallokasaṃyuktāmīśvarīṃ sarvatomukhīm ॥ 1.23.6 ॥
sa tāṃ dṛṣṭvā mahātejāḥ mahādevīṃ maheśvarīm।
punarāha mahādevaḥ sarvadevanamaskṛtaḥ ॥ 1.23.7 ॥
matiḥ smṛtirbuddhiriti gāyamānaḥ punaḥ punaḥ।
ehyehīti mahādevī sottiṣṭhat prāñjalirbhṛśam ॥ 1.23.8 ॥
viśvamāvṛtya yogena jagatsarvaṃ vaśīkuru।
atha vā mahādevena rudrāṇī tvaṃ bhaviṣyasi।
brāhmaṇānāṃ hitārthāya paramārthaṃ bhaviṣyasi ॥ 1.23.9 ॥
athaināṃ putrakāmasya dhyāyataḥ parameṣṭinaḥ।
pradadau devadeveśaścatuṣpādāṃ maheśvarīm।
tatastāṃ dhyānayogena viditvā parameśvarīm ॥ 1.23.10 ॥
brahmā lokanamaskāryaḥ prapadya tāṃ maheśvarīm।
gāyatrīntu tato raudrīṃ dhyātvā brahmā suyantritaḥ ॥ 1.23.11 ॥
ityetāṃ vaidikīṃ vidyāṃ raudrīṃ gāyatrīmarpitām।
japitvā tu mahādevīṃ rudralokanamaskṛtām।
prapannastu mahādevaṃ dhyānayuktena cetasā ॥ 1.23.12 ॥
tatastasya mahādevo divyaṃ yogaṃ punaḥ smṛtaḥ।
aiśvaryaṃ jñānasampattiṃ vairāgyaṃ ca dadau punaḥ ॥ 1.23.13 ॥
athāṭṭahāsaṃ mumuce bhīṣaṇaṃ dīptamīśvaraḥ।
tato'sya sarvato dīptāḥ prādurbhūtāḥ kumārakāḥ ॥ 1.23.14 ॥
pītamālyāmbaradharāḥ pītagandhavilepanāḥ ।
pītoṣṇīṣaśiraskāśca pītāsyāḥ pītamūrddhajāḥ ॥ 1.23.15 ॥
tato varṣasahasrānte uṣitvā vimalaujasaḥ।
yogātmānastataḥ snātā brāhmaṇānāṃ hitaiṣiṇaḥ ॥ 1.23.16 ॥
dharmayogabalopetā ṛṣīṇāṃ dīrghasatriṇām।
upadiśya tu te yogaṃ praviṣṭā rudramīśvaram ॥ 1.23.17 ॥
evametena vidhinā prapannā ye maheśvaram।
anye'pi niyatātmāno dhyānayuktā jitondriyāḥ ॥ 1.23.18 ॥
te sarve pāpamutsṛjya virajā brahmavarccasaḥ।
praviśanti mahādevaṃ rudrante tvapunarbhavāḥ ॥ 1.23.19 ॥
tatastasmin gate kalpe pītavarṇe svayambhuvaḥ।
punaranyaḥ pravṛttastu sitakalpo hi nāmataḥ ॥ 1.23.20 ॥
ekārṇave tadāvṛtte divye varṣasahasrake ।
sraṣṭukāmaḥ prajā brahmā cintayāmāsa duḥkhitaḥ ॥ 1.23.21 ॥
tasya cintayamānasya putrakāmasya vai prabhoḥ ।
kṛṣṇaḥ samabhavadvarṇo dhyāyataḥ parameṣṭinaḥ ॥ 1.23.22 ॥
athāpaśyanmahātejāḥ prādurbhūtaṃ kumārakam।
kṛṣṇavarṇaṃ mahāvīryaṃ dīpyamānaṃ svatejasā ॥ 1.23.23 ॥
kṛṣṇāmbaravaroṣṇīṣaṃ kṛṣṇayajñopavītinam।
kṛṣṇena maulinā yuktaṃ kṛṣṇasraganulepanam ॥ 1.23.24 ॥
sa taṃ dṛṣṭvā mahātmānamamaraṃ ghora mantriṇam।
vavande devadeveśaṃ viśveśaṃ kṛṣṇapiṅgalam ॥ 1.23.25 ॥
prāṇāyāmaparaḥ śrīmān hṛdi kṛtvā maheśvaram।
manasā dhyānasaṃyuktaṃ prapannastu yatīśvaram ।
aghoreti tato brahmā brahma evānucintayan ॥ 1.23.26 ॥
evaṃ vai dhyāyatastasya brahmaṇaḥ parameṣṭinaḥ।
mumoca bhagavān rudraḥ aṭṭahāsaṃ mahāsvanam ॥ 1.23.27 ॥
athāsya pārśvataḥ kṛṣṇāḥ kṛṣṇasraganulepanāḥ ।
catvārastu mahātmānaḥ sambabhūvuḥ kumārakāḥ ॥ 1.23.28 ॥
kṛṣṇāḥ kṛṣṇāmbaroṣṇīṣāḥ kṛṣṇāsyāḥ kṛṣṇavāsasaḥ।
taiścāṭṭahāsaḥ sumahān hūṅkāraścaiva puṣkalaḥ।
namaskāraśca sumahān punaḥ punarudīritaḥ ॥ 1.23.29 ॥
tato varṣasahasrānte yogāttat pārameśvaram।
upāsitvā mahābhāgāḥ śiṣyebyaḥ pradadustataḥ ॥ 1.23.30 ॥
yogena yogasampannāḥ praviśya manasā śivam।
amalaṃ nirguṇaṃ sthānaṃ praviṣṭā viśvamīśvaram ॥ 1.23.31 ॥
evametena yogena ye cāpyanye dvijātayaḥ।
smariṣyanti vidhānajñā gantāro rudramavyayam ॥ 1.23.32 ॥
tatastasmin gate kalpe kṛṣṇarupe bhayānake।
anyaḥ pravarttitaḥ kalpo viśvarupastu nāmataḥ ॥ 1.23.33 ॥
vinivṛtte tu saṃhāre punaḥ sṛṣṭe carācare।
brahmaṇaḥ putrakāmasya dhyāyataḥ parameṣṭinaḥ।
prādurbhūtā mahānādā viśvarūpā sarasvatī ॥ 1.23.34 ॥
viśvamālyāmbaradharaṃ viśvayajñopavītinam।
viśvoṣṇīṣaṃ viśvagandhaṃ viśvasthānaṃ mahābhujam ॥ 1.23.35 ॥
atha taṃ manasā dhyātvā yuktātmā vai pitāmahaḥ।
vavande devamīśānaṃ sarveśaṃ sarvagaṃ prabhum ॥ 1.23.36 ॥
omīśānaṃ namaste'stu mahādeva namo'stu te।
evaṃ dhyānagataṃ tatra praṇamantaṃ pitāmaham।
uvāca bhagavānīśaḥ prīto'haṃ te kimicchasi ॥ 1.23.37 ॥
tatastu praṇato bhūtvā vāgbhiḥ stutvā maheśvaram।
uvāca bhagavān brahmā prītaḥ prītena cetasā ॥ 1.23.38 ॥
yadidaṃ viśvarūpante viśvagaṃ viśvamīśvaram।
etadveditumicchāmi kaścāyaṃ parameśvaraḥ ॥ 1.23.39 ॥
kaiṣā bhagavatī devī catuṣpādā caturmukhī।
catuḥśrṛṅgī caturvakrā caturddantā catuḥstanī ॥ 1.23.40 ॥
caturhastā caturnetrā viśvarupā kathaṃ smṛtā।
kinnāmadheyā ko'syātmā kiṃvīryā vāpi karmataḥ ॥ 1.23.41 ॥
।।maheśvara uvāca ।।
rahasyaṃ sarvamantrāṇāṃ pāvanaṃ puṣṭivarddhanam।
śrṛṇuṣvaitatparaṃ guhyamādisarge yathā tatham ॥ 1.23.42 ॥
ayaṃ yo varttate kalpo viśvarūpastvasau smṛtaḥ।
yasmin bhavādayo devāḥ ṣaḍviṃśanmanavaḥ smṛtāḥ ॥ 1.23.43 ॥
brahmasthānamidaṃ cāpi yadā prāptaṃ tvayā vibho।
tadāprabhṛti kalpaśca trayastriṃśattamo hyayam ॥ 1.23.44 ॥
śataṃ śatasahasrāṇāmatītā ye svayambhuvaḥ ।
purastāttava deveśa tān śrṛṇuṣva mahāmune ॥ 1.23.45 ॥
ānandastu sa vijñeya ānandaste mahālayaḥ।
gālavyagotratapasā mama putrastvamāgataḥ ॥ 1.23.46 ॥
tvayi yogaśca sāṅkhyaśca tapo vidyāvidhiḥ kriyā।
ṛtaṃ styañca yadbrahma ahiṃsā santatikramāḥ ॥ 1.23.47 ॥
dhyānaṃ dhyānavapuḥ śāntirvidyā'pidyāmatirdhṛtiḥ।
kāntiḥ śāntiḥ smṛtirmedhā lajjā śuddiḥ sarasvatī।
tuṣṭiḥ puṣṭiḥ kriyā caiva lajjā kṣāntiḥ pratiṣṭitā ॥ 1.23.48 ॥
ṣaḍ‌viṃśattadguṇā hyeṣā dvātriśākṣarasaṃjñitā ।
prakṛtiṃ viddhitāṃ brahmaṃstvatprasūtiṃ maheśvarīm ॥ 1.23.49 ॥
saiṣā bhagavatī devī tatprasūtiḥ svayambhuvaḥ।
caturmukhī jagadyoniḥ prakṛti rgauḥ prakīrttitā ।
pradhānaṃ prakṛtiṃ caiva yadāhustattvacintakāḥ ॥ 1.23.50 ॥
ajāmetāṃ lohitāṃ śuklakṛṣṇāṃ viśvaṃ saṃprasṛjamānāṃ surūpām।
ajo'haṃ vai buddhimānviśvarūpāṃ gāyatrīṃ gāṃ viśvarūpāṃ hi buddhvā ।। 23.51
evamuktavā mahādevaḥ aṭṭahāsamathākarot ।
valitāsphoṭitaravaṃ kahākahanadantathā ॥ 1.23.51 ॥
tato'sya pārśvato divyāḥ sarvarūpāḥ kumārakāḥ।
jaṭī muṇḍī śikhaṇḍī ca arddhamuṇḍaśca jajñire ॥ 1.23.52 ॥
tataste tu yathoktena yogena sumahaujasaḥ।
divyaṃ varṣasahasrantu upāsitvā maheśvaram ॥ 1.23.53 ॥
dharmopadeśaṃ niyataṃ kṛtvā yogamayaṃ dṛḍham।
śiṣṭānāṃ niyatātmānaḥ praviṣṭā rudramīśvaram ॥ 1.23.54 ॥
।।vāyuruvāca।।
tato vismayamāpanno brahmā lokapitāmahaḥ।
prapannastu mahādevaṃ bhaktiyuktena cetasā।
uvāca vacanaṃ sarvaṃ śvetatvante kathaṃ vibho ॥ 1.23.55 ॥
।।bhagavānuvāca।।
śvetakalpo yadā hyāsīdahaṃ śvetastato'bhavam।
śvetoṣṇīṣaḥ śvetamālyaḥ śvetāmbaradharaḥ śivaḥ ॥ 1.23.56 ॥
śvetāsthimāṃsaromā ca śvetatvak śvetalohitaḥ।
tena nāmnā ca vikhyātaḥ śvetakalpastadā hyasau ॥ 1.23.57 ॥
matprasādācca deveśaḥ śvetāṅgaḥ śvetalohitaḥ।
śvetavarṇā tadā hyāsīdgāyatrī brahmasaṃjñitā ॥ 1.23.58 ॥
yasmādahaṃ ca deveśa tvayā guhye pade sthitaḥ।
vijñātaḥ svena tapasā sadyo jātaḥ sanātanaḥ।
sadyo jāteti brahmaitad guhyaṃ caiva prakīrtitam ॥ 1.23.59 ॥
tasmād guhyatvamāpannaṃ ye vetsyanti dvijātayaḥ।
tatsamīpaṅgamiṣyanti punarāvṛttidurlabham ॥ 1.23.60 ॥
yadā'haṃ ca punastvāsaṃ lohito nāma nāmataḥ।
mamakṛtena varṇena kalpo vai lohitaḥ smṛtaḥ ॥ 1.23.61 ॥
tadā lohitamāsāsthilohitakṣīrasannibhā ।
lohitākṣastanavatī gāyatrī gauḥ prakīrtitā ॥ 1.23.62 ॥
tato'sya lohitatvena varṇasya ca viparyyaye।
vāmatvāccaiva yogasya vāmadevatkmāgataḥ ॥ 1.23.63 ॥
tathāpi hi mahāsattva tvayā'haṃ niyatātmanā।
vijñātaḥ śveta varṇena tasmādvarṇottamaḥ smṛtaḥ ।
tato'haṃ vāmadeveti khyātiṃ yāto mahītale ॥ 1.23.64 ॥
ye cāpi vāmadevatvaṃ jñāsyantīha dvijātayaḥ।
vijñāya cemāṃ rudrāṇīṃ gāyatrīṃ mātaraṃ vibho ॥ 1.23.65 ॥
sarvapāpavinirmuktā virajā brahmavarcasaḥ।
rudralokaṃ gamiṣyanti punarāvṛttidurlabham ॥ 1.23.66 ॥
yadā tu punarevāyaṃ kṛṣṇavarṇo bhayānakaḥ।
matkṛtena ca varṇena matkalpaḥ kṛṣṇa ucyate ॥ 1.23.67 ॥
tatrā'haṃ kālasaṃkāśaḥ kālo lokaprakāśanaḥ ।
vijñāto'haṃ tvayā brahaman ghoro ghoraparākramaḥ ॥ 1.23.68 ॥
tasmādghoratvamāpannaṃ ye māṃ vetsyanti bhūtale।
teṣāmaghoraḥ śāntaśca bhaviṣyāmyahamavyayaḥ ॥ 1.23.69 ॥
tasmādviśvatvamānnaṃ ye māṃ paśyanti būtale ।
teṣāṃ śivaśca saumyaśca bhaviṣyāmi sadaiva tu ॥ 1.23.70 ॥
tasmācca viśvarūpo vai kalpo'yaṃ samudāhṛtaḥ।
viśvarūpā tathā ceyaṃ sāvitrī samudāhṛtā ॥ 1.23.71 ॥
sarvarūpāstathā ceme saṃvṛttā mama putrakāḥ।
catvāraste samākhyātāḥ pādā vai lokasaṃmatāḥ ॥ 1.23.72 ॥
tasmācca sarva varṇatvaṃ prajātvaṃ me bhaviṣyati।
sarvabhakṣyā ca medhyā ca varṇataśca bhaviṣyati ॥ 1.23.73 ॥
mokṣo dharmastathārthaśca kāmaśceti catuṣṭayam।
tasmādvettā ca vedyaṃ ca caturddhā vai bhaviṣyati ॥ 1.23.74 ॥
bhūtagrāmāśca catvāraḥ āśramāścaturastathā।
dharmasya pādāścatvāra ścatvāro mama putrakāḥ ॥ 1.23.75 ॥
tasmāccaturyugāvasthaṃ jagadvai sacarācaram।
caturddhā'vasthitaṃ caiva catuṣpādaṃ bhaviṣyati ॥ 1.23.76 ॥
bhūrloko'tha bhuvarlokaḥ svarloko'tha mahastathā।
janastapaśca śāṃtaśca rudralokastataḥ param ॥ 1.23.77 ॥
svarloko hi tṛtīyastu caturthastu mahaḥ smṛtaḥ।
tatra lokaḥ paraṃ sthānaṃ parantadyogināṃ smṛtam ॥ 1.23.78 ॥
nirmamā nirahaṃkārāḥ kāmakrodhavivarjjitāḥ।
drakṣyante tadvido yuktā dhyānatatparayuñjakāḥ ॥ 1.23.79 ॥
yasmāccatuṣpadā hyeṣā tvayā dṛṣṭā sarasvatī।
tasmācca paśavaḥ sarve bhaviṣyanti catuṣpadāḥ।
tasmāccaiṣāṃ bhaviṣyanti catvāro vai payodharāḥ ॥ 1.23.80 ॥
somaśca mantrasaṃyukto yasmānmama mukhāccyutaḥ।
jīvaḥ prāṇabhṛtāṃ brahman sarvaḥ pītvā stanairghṛtam ॥ 1.23.81 ॥
tasmāt somamayaṃ caitadamṛtaṃ caiva saṃjñitam।
catuṣpādā bhaviṣyanti śvetatvaṃ cāsya tena tat ॥ 1.23.82 ॥
yasmāccaivaṃ kriyābhūtvā dvipādā vai maheśvarī।
dṛṣṭā punastvayā caiṣā sāvitrī lokabhāvinī।
tasmādvai dvipadāḥ sarve dvistanāśacava narāḥ smṛtāḥ ॥ 1.23.83 ॥
yasmāccaivamajā bhūtvā sarvavarṇā maheśvarī।
dṛṣṭā tvayā mahāsattvā sarvabhūtadharā parā।
tasmāttu viśvarūpatvamajānāṃ vai bhaviṣyati ॥ 1.23.84 ॥
ajaścaiva mahātejā viśvarūpo bhaviṣyati।
amogharetāḥ sarvatra mukhe cāsya hutāśanaḥ।
tasmāt sarvagato medhyaḥ paśurūpī hutāśanaḥ ॥ 1.23.85 ॥
tapasā bhāvitātmāno ye vai drakṣyanti vai dvijāḥ।
īśitve ca śivatve ca sarvagaṃ sarvataḥ sthiram ॥ 1.23.86 ॥
rajastamovinirmuktāstyaktvā mānuṣyakambuvi।
matsamīpaṃ gamiṣyanti punarāvṛttidurlabham ॥ 1.23.87 ॥
ityevamukto bhagavān brahmā rudreṇa vai dvijāḥ।
praṇamya prayato bhūtvā punarāha pitāmahaḥ ॥ 1.23.88 ॥
।।brahmovāca।।
bhagavandevadeveśa viśvarūpī maheśvaraḥ।
imāstava mahādeva tanavo lokavanditāḥ ॥ 1.23.89 ॥
viśvarūpa mahāsattva kasmin kāle mahābhuja।
kasyāṃ vā yugasambhūtyāṃ drakṣyanti tvāṃ dvijātayaḥ ॥ 1.23.90 ॥
kena vā tattvayogena dhyānayogena kena vā ।
tanavaste mahādeva śakyā draṣṭuṃ dvijātibhiḥ ॥ 1.23.91 ॥
।।bhagavānuvāca।।
tapasā naiva yogena dānadharmaphalena vā।
na tīrthaphalayogena kratubhirvā sadakṣiṇaiḥ ॥ 1.23.92 ॥
na vedādhyāpanairvāpi na cittena vivedanaiḥ ।
śakyo'haṃ mānurṣaidraṣṭumṛte dhyānātparaṃ na hi ॥ 1.23.93 ॥
sādhyo nārāyaṇaścaiva viṣṇustribhuvaneśvaraḥ ।
bhaviṣyatīha nāmnā tu vārāho nāma viśrutaḥ ॥ 1.23.94 ॥
caturvāhuścatuṣpādaśacavaturnetraścaturmukhaḥ।
tadā saṃvatsaro bhūtvā yajñarūpī bhaviṣyati।
ṣaḍaṅgaśca triśīrṣaśca tristhāne triśarīravān ॥ 1.23.95 ॥
kṛtaṃ tretā dvāparaṃ ca kaliścaiva caturyugam।
etasya pādāścatvāraḥ aṅgāni kratavastathā ॥ 1.23.96 ॥
bhujāśacava vedāścatvāro ṛtuḥ sandhimukhāni ca।
dve mukhe dve ca ayane netrāśca caturastathā ॥ 1.23.97 ॥
śirāṃsi trīṇi parvāṇi phālgunyāṣāḍhakṛttikāḥ।
divyāntarikṣabhaumāni trīṇi sthānāni yāni tu।
sambhavaḥ pralayaścaiva āśramau dvau prakīrttitau ॥ 1.23.98 ॥
sa yadā kālarūpābho varāhatve vyavasthitaḥ।
bhaviṣyati yadā sādhyo viṣṇurnārāyaṇaḥ prabhuḥ ॥ 1.23.99 ॥
tadā tvamapi deveśa caturvvakro bhaviṣyasi।
brahmalokanamaskāryo viṣṇurnārāyaṇaḥ prabhuḥ ॥ 1.23.100 ॥
ekārṇave plave caiva śayānaṃ puruṣaṃ harim।
yadā drakṣyasi deveśaṃ dhyānayuktaṃ mahāmunim ॥ 1.23.101 ॥
tadāvāṃ mama yogena mohitau naṣṭacetasau।
anyonyasparddhinau rātrāvavijñāya parasparam ॥ 1.23.102 ॥
ekaikasyodarasthāṃstu dṛṣṭvā lokāṃścarācarān।
vismayaṃ paramaṃ gatvā dhyānād‌buhdvā tu mānuṣau ॥ 1.23.103 ॥
tatastvaṃ pajhasaṃbhūtaḥ pajhanābhaḥ sanātanaḥ।
pajhāṅkitastadā kalpe khyātiṃ yāsyasi puṣkalām ॥ 1.23.104 ॥
tatastasmistadā kalpe pārāhe saptame prabhoḥ।
punarviṣṇurmahātejāḥ kālo lokaprakālanaḥ।
manurvaivasvato nāma tava putro bhaviṣyati ॥ 1.23.105 ॥
tadā caturyugāvasthe kalpe tasmin yugāntake।
bhaviṣyāmi śikhāyuktaḥ śveto nāma mahāmuniḥ ॥ 1.23.106 ॥
himavacchikhare ramye chāgale parvatottame।
catuḥśiṣyāḥ śive yuktā bhaviṣyanti tadā mama ॥ 1.23.107 ॥
śvetaścaiva śikhaścaiva śvetāśvaḥ śvetalohitaḥ।
catvāraste mahātmāno brāhmaṇā vedapāragāḥ ॥ 1.23.108 ॥
tataste brahmabhūyiṣṭā dṛṣṭvā brahmagatiṃ parām ।
tatsamīpaṃ gamiṣyanti punarāvṛttidurlabham ॥ 1.23.109 ॥
punastu mama deveśo dvitīyadvāpare prabhuḥ।
prajāpatiryadā vyāsaḥ satyo nāma bhaviṣyati ॥ 1.23.110 ॥
tadā lokahitārthāya sutāre nāma nāmataḥ।
bhaviṣyāmi kalau tasmin lokānugrahakāraṇāt ॥ 1.23.111 ॥
tatrāpi mama te putrā bhaviṣyā nāma nāmataḥ।
dundubhiḥ śatarūpaśca ṛcīkaḥ kratumāṃstathā ॥ 1.23.112 ॥
prāpya yogaṃ tathā jñānaṃ brahma caiva sanātanam।
rudralokaṃ gamiṣyanti punarāvṛtti durlabham ॥ 1.23.113 ॥
tṛtīye dvāpare caiva yadā vyāsastu bhārgavaḥ।
tadā hyahaṃ bhaviṣyāmi damanastu yugantike ॥ 1.23.114 ॥
tatrāpi ca bhaviṣyanti catvāro mama putrakāḥ।
viśokaśca vikeśaśca viśāpaḥ śāpanāśanaḥ ॥ 1.23.115 ॥
te'pi tenaiva mārgeṇa yogoktena mahaujasaḥ।
rudralokaṃ gamiṣyanti punarāvṛttidurlabham ॥ 1.23.116 ॥
caturthe dvāpare caiva yadā vyāso'ṅgirāḥ smṛtaḥ।
tadā'pyahaṃ bhaviṣyāmi suhotro nāma nāmataḥ ॥ 1.23.117 ॥
tatrāpi mama satputrāścatvāraśca tapodhanāḥ।
bhaviṣyanti dvijaśreṣṭā yogātmāno dṛḍhavratāḥ ॥ 1.23.118 ॥
