sumukho durmukhaścaiva durdamo duratikramaḥ।
prāpya yogagatiṃ sūkṣmāṃ vimalā dagdhakilbiṣāḥ।
te'pi tenaiva mārgeṇa gamiṣyanti na saṃśayaḥ ॥ 1.23.119 ॥
pañcame dvāpare caiva vyāsastu savitā yadā।
tadā cāpi bhaviṣyāmi kaṅgo nāma mahātapāḥ।
anugrahārthaṃ lokānāṃ yogātmā naikakarmakṛt ॥ 1.23.120 ॥
catvārastu mahābhāgā virajāḥ śuddhayonayaḥ ।
putrā mama bhaviṣyanti yogātmāno dṛḍhavratāḥ ॥ 1.23.121 ॥
sanaḥ sanandanaścaiva prabhuryaśca sanātanaḥ।
ṛtuḥ sanatkumāraśca nirmamā nirahaṃkṛtāḥ।
matsamīpaṃ gamiṣyanti punarāvṛttidurlabham ॥ 1.23.122 ॥
parivṛtte punaḥ ṣaṣṭe mṛtyurvyāso yadā vibhuḥ।
tadāpyahaṃ bhaviṣyāmi lokākṣirnāma nāmataḥ ॥ 1.23.123 ॥
śiṣyāśca mama te divyā yogātmāno dṛḍhavratāḥ।
bhaviṣyanti mahābhāgāścatvāro lokasammatāḥ ॥ 1.23.124 ॥
sudhāmā virajaścaiva śaṅkhapādrava eva ca।
yogātmāno mahātmānaste sarve dagdhakilbiṣāḥ।
te'pi tenaiva mārgeṇa gamiṣyanti na saṃśayaḥ ॥ 1.23.125 ॥
saptame parivartte tu yadā vyāsaḥ śatakratuḥ।
vibhurnāma mahātejā- pūrvamāsīcchatakratuḥ ॥ 1.23.126 ॥
tadā'pyahaṃ bhaviṣyāmi kalau tasmin yugāntike।
jaigīṣavyeti vikhayātaḥ sarveṣāṃ yogināṃ varaḥ ॥ 1.23.127 ॥
tatrāpi mama te putrā bhaviṣyanti yuge tadā।
sārasvataḥ sumedhāśca vasuvāhaḥ suvāhanaḥ ॥ 1.23.128 ॥
te'pi tenaiva mārgeṇa dhyānayuktiṃ samāśritāḥ ।
bhaviṣyanti mahātmāno rudralokaparāyaṇāḥ ॥ 1.23.129 ॥
vasiṣṭhaścāṣṭame vyāsaḥ parivartte bhaviṣyati।
kapilaścāsuriścaiva tathā pañcaśikho muniḥ।
vāgbaliśca mahāyogī sarva eva mahaujasaḥ ॥ 1.23.130 ॥
prāpya māheśvaraṃ yogaṃ dhyānino dagdhakalmaṣāḥ।
matsamīpaṃ gamiṣyanti punarāvṛttidurlabham ॥ 1.23.131 ॥
parivartte'tha navame vyāsaḥ sārasvato yadā।
tadā cāhaṃ bhaviṣyāmi ṛṣabho nāma nāmataḥ ।
tatrāpi mama te putrā bhaviṣyanti mahaujasaḥ ॥ 1.23.132 ॥
parāśaraśca gārgyaśca bhārgavo hyaṅgirāstathā।
bhaviṣyanti mahātmāno brāhmaṇā vedapāragāḥ ॥ 1.23.133 ॥
sarve tapobalotkṛṣṭāḥ śāpānugrahakovidāḥ।
tepi tenaiva mārgeṇa yogoktena tapasvinaḥ।
dhyānamārgaṃ samāsādya gamiṣyanti tathaiva te ॥ 1.23.134 ॥
daśame dvāpare vyāsastridhāmānāma nāmataḥ।
yadā bhaviṣyati viprāstadā'haṃ bhavitā punaḥ ॥ 1.23.135 ॥
himavacchikhare ramye bhṛgutuṅge nagottame।
nāmnā bhṛgostu śikharantasmāttacchikharambhṛguḥ ॥ 1.23.136 ॥
tatraiva mama te putrā bhaviṣyanti dṛḍhavratāḥ।
balabandhurnirāmitraḥ ketuśrṛṅgastapodhanaḥ ॥ 1.23.137 ॥
yogātmāno mahātmāno dhyānayogasamanvitāḥ।
rudralokaṃ gamiṣyanti tapasā dagdhakalmaṣāḥ ॥ 1.23.138 ॥
ekādaśe dvāpare tu trivṛdvyāso bhaviṣyati।
tadā'pyahaṃ bhaviṣyāmi gaṅgādvāre kalerdhuri ॥ 1.23.139 ॥
ugrā nāma mahānādāstatraiva mama putrakāḥ।
bhaviṣyanti mahaujaskāḥ suvṛttā lokaviśrutāḥ ॥ 1.23.140 ॥
lambodaraśca lambaśca lambākṣo lambakeśakaḥ।
prāpya māheśvaraṃ yogaṃ rudralokāya saṃsthitāḥ।
te'pi tenaiva mārgeṇa gamiṣyanti parāṃ gatim ॥ 1.23.141 ॥
dvādaśe piravartte tu śatatejā mahāmuniḥ।
bhaviṣyati mahāsattvo vyāsaḥ kavivarottamaḥ ॥ 1.23.142 ॥
tato'pyahaṃ bhaviṣyāmi atrirnāma yugāntike।
haimakaṃ vanamāsādya yogamāsthāya bhūtale ॥ 1.23.143 ॥
atrāpi mā te putrā bhasmasnānānulepanāḥ।
bhaviṣyanti mahāyoga rudralokaparāyaṇāḥ ॥ 1.23.144 ॥
sarvajñaḥ samabuddhiśca sādhyaḥ sarvastathaiva ca।
rudralokaṃ gamiṣyanti dhyānayogaparāyaṇāḥ ॥ 1.23.145 ॥
trayodaśe punaḥ prāpte parivartte krameṇa tu।
dharmo narāyaṇo nāma vyāsastu bhavitā yadā ॥ 1.23.146 ॥
tadāpyahaṃ bhaviṣyāmi vālirnāma mahāmuniḥ।
vālakhilyāśrame puṇye parvate gandhamādane ॥ 1.23.147 ॥
tatrāpi mama te putrā bhaviṣyanti tapodhanāḥ।
sudhāmā kāśyapaścaiva vasiṣṭo virajāstathā ॥ 1.23.148 ॥
mahāyogabalopetā vimalā ūrddhvaretasaḥ।
tenaiva yogamārgeṇa gamiṣyanti na saṃśayaḥ ॥ 1.23.149 ॥
surakṣaṇo yadā vyāsaḥ paryāye tu caturddaśe।
tatrāpi punarevāhaṃ bhaviṣyāmi yugāntike ॥ 1.23.150 ॥
vaṃśe tvaṅgirasaḥ śreṣṭo gautamo nāma yogavit।
tasmādbhaviṣyate puṇyaṃ gautamaṃ nāma tadvanam ॥ 1.23.151 ॥
tatrāpi mama te putrā bhaviṣyanti kalau tathā।
atrirugratapāścaiva śrāvaṇo'tha sraviṣṭakaḥ ॥ 1.23.152 ॥
yogātmāno mahātmāno dhyānayogaparāyaṇāḥ।
te'pi tenaiva mārgeṇa rudralokanivāsinaḥ ॥ 1.23.153 ॥
tataḥ prāpte pañcadaśe parivartte kramāgate।
āruṇistu yadā vyāso dvāpare bhavitā prabhuḥ ॥ 1.23.154 ॥
tadāpyahaṃ bhaviṣyāmi nāmnā vedaśirā dvijāḥ।
tatra vedaśirā nāma astraṃ tatpārameśvaram ॥ 1.23.155 ॥
bhaviṣyati mahāvīryaṃ vedaśīrṣā ca parvataḥ।
himavatpṛṣṭhamāśritya sarasvatyā nagottame ॥ 1.23.156 ॥
tadāpi mama te putrā bhaviṣyanti tapodhanāḥ।
kuṇiśca kuṇibāhuśca kuśarīraḥ kunetrakaḥ ॥ 1.23.157 ॥
yogātmāno mahātmāno brahmiṣṭāścorddhvaretasaḥ।
te'pi tenaiva mārgeṇa rudralokaṃ gatāstu te ॥ 1.23.158 ॥
tataḥ ṣoḍaśame cāpi parivartte kramāgate।
vyāsastu sañjayo nāma bhaviṣyati tadā prabhuḥ ॥ 1.23.159 ॥
tadāpyahaṃ bhaviṣyāmi gokarṇo nāma nāmataḥ।
tasmādbhaviṣyate puṇyaṃ gokarṇaṃ nāma tadvanam ॥ 1.23.160 ॥
tatrāpi mama te putrā bhaviṣyanti mahaujasaḥ।
kaśyapo hyuśanāścaiva cyavano'tha bṛhaspatiḥ।
te'pi tenaiva mārgeṇa gamiṣyanti paraṃ padam ॥ 1.23.161 ॥
tataḥ saptadaśe caiva parivartte kramāgate।
tadā bhaviṣyati vyāso nāmnā devakṛtañjayaḥ ॥ 1.23.162 ॥
tadāpyahaṃ bhaviṣyāmi guhāvāsīti nāmataḥ।
himavacchikhare caiva mahātuṅge mahālaye।
siddhikṣetraṃ mahāpuṇyaṃ bhaviṣyati mahālayam ॥ 1.23.163 ॥
tatrāpi mama te putrā brahmaṇyā yogavedinaḥ ।
bhaviṣyanti mahātmānaḥ sarvajñā nirahaṅkṛtāḥ ॥ 1.23.164 ॥
utathyo vāmadevaśca mahākālo mahālayaḥ।
teṣāṃ śatasahasrantu śiṣyāṇāṃ dhyānasādhanam ॥ 1.23.165 ॥
bhaviṣyanti tadā kalpe sarve te dhyānayuñjakāḥ।
te tu sannihitā yoge hṛdi kṛtvā maheśvaram ।
mahālaye padaṃ kṣiptvā praviṣṭāḥ śivamavyayam ॥ 1.23.166 ॥
ye cānye'pi mahātmānaḥ kāle tasmin yugāntike।
dhyānayuktena manasā vimalāḥ śuddhabuddhayaḥ ॥ 1.23.167 ॥
gatvā mahālyaṃ puṇyaṃ dṛṣṭvā māheśvaraṃ padam ।
tūrṇaṃ tārayate jantūn daśapūrvān daśāparān ॥ 1.23.168 ॥
ātmānamekaviśaṃñca tārayitvā mahārṇavam।
mama prasādādyāsyanti rudralokaṃ gatajvarāḥ ॥ 1.23.169 ॥
tato'ṣṭādaśame caiva parivartte yadā bhavet ।
tadā ṛtañjayo nāma vyāsastu bhavitā muniḥ।
tadā'pyahaṃ bhaviṣyāmi śikhaṇḍī nāma nāmataḥ ॥ 1.23.170 ॥
siddhakṣetre mahāpuṇye devadānavapūjite।
himavācchikhare puṇye śikhaṇḍī yatra parvataḥ।
śikhaṇḍino vanañcāpi ṛṣisiddhaniṣevitam ॥ 1.23.171 ॥
tatrāpi mama te putrā bhaviṣyanti tapodhanāḥ।
vācaḥśavā ṛtīkaśca śāvāsaśca dṛḍhavrataḥ ॥ 1.23.172 ॥
yogātmāno mahāśaktāḥ sarve te vedapāragāḥ।
prāpya māheśvaraṃ yogaṃ rudralokaṃ vrajanti te ॥ 1.23.173 ॥
tatastvekonaviṃśe tu parivartte kramāgate।
vyāsastu bhavitā nāmnā bharadvājo mahāmuniḥ ॥ 1.23.174 ॥
tatrāpyahaṃ bhaviṣyāmi jaṭāmālīti nāmataḥ।
himavacchikhare ramyejaṭāyuryatra parvataḥ ॥ 1.23.175 ॥
tatrāpi mama te putrā bhaviṣyanti mahaujasaḥ।
hiraṇyanāmā kauśilyaḥ kākṣīvaḥ kuthumistathā ॥ 1.23.176 ॥
īśvarā yogadharmāṇaḥ sarve te hyūrddhvaretasaḥ।
prāpya māheśvaraṃ yogaṃ gamiṣyanti na saṃśayaḥ ॥ 1.23.177 ॥
tato viṃśatime sarge parivartte krameṇa tu।
vācaḥśravāḥ smṛto vyāso bhaviṣyati mahāmatiḥ ॥ 1.23.178 ॥
tadāpyahaṃ bhaviṣyāmi hyaṭṭahāsīti nāmataḥ।
aṭṭahāsapriyāścāpi bhaviṣyanti tadā narāḥ ॥ 1.23.179 ॥
tatraiva himavatpṛṣṭe siddhacāraṇasevite।
tatrāpi mama te putrā bhaviṣyanti mahaujasaḥ।
yuktātmāno mahāsattvā dhyānino niyatavratāḥ ॥ 1.23.180 ॥
sumanturvarvarirvidvān subandhuḥ kuśikandharaḥ।
prāpya māheśvaraṃ yogaṃ rudralokāya te gatāḥ ॥ 1.23.181 ॥
ekaviśe punaḥ prāpte parivartte krameṇa tu।
vācaspatiḥ smṛto vyāso yadā sa ṛṣisattamaḥ ॥ 1.23.182 ॥
tadā'pyahaṃ bhaviṣyāmi dāruko nāma nāmataḥ।
tasmādbhaviṣyate puṇyaṃ devadāruvanaṃ mahat ॥ 1.23.183 ॥
tatrāpi mama te putrā bhaviṣyanti mahaujasaḥ।
plakṣo dākṣāyaṇiścaiva ketumālī bakastathā ॥ 1.23.184 ॥
yogātmāno mahātmāno niyatā hyūrddhvaretasaḥ।
paramaṃ yogamākthāya rudraṃ prāptāstathānaghāḥ ॥ 1.23.185 ॥
dvāviṃśe parivartte tu vyāsaḥ śuklāyano yadā।
tadā'pyahaṃ bhaviṣyāmi vārāṇasyāṃ mahāmuniḥ ॥ 1.23.186 ॥
nāmnā vai lāṅgalī bhīmo yatra devāḥ savāsavāḥ।
drakṣyanti māṃ kalau tasminnavatīrṇaṃ halāyudham ॥ 1.23.187 ॥
tatrāpi mama te putrā bhaviṣyanti sudhārmikāḥ।
tulyārcirmadhupiṅgākṣaḥ śvetaketustathaiva ca ॥ 1.23.188 ॥
te'pi māheśvaraṃ yogaṃ prāpya dhyānaparāyaṇāḥ।
virajā brahmabhūyiṣṭā rudralokāya saṃsthitāḥ ॥ 1.23.189 ॥
parivartte trayoviṃśe tṛṇabinduryadā muniḥ।
vyāso bhaviṣyati brahma tadā'haṃ bhavitā punaḥ।
śveto nāma mahākāyo muniputraḥ sudhārmikaḥ ॥ 1.23.190 ॥
tatra kālañjariṣyāmi tadā girivarottame।
tena kālañjaro nāma bhaviṣyati sa parvataḥ ॥ 1.23.191 ॥
tatrāpi mama te putrā bhaviṣyanti mahaujasaḥ।
uṣijo bṛhadukthaśca devalaḥ kavireva ca।
prāpya māheśvaraṃ yogaṃ rudralokaṃ gatā hi te ॥ 1.23.192 ॥
parivartte caturviṃśe ṛkṣo vyāso bhaviṣyati।
tatrā'haṃ bhavitā brahman kalau tasmin yugāntike।
śūlī nāma mahāyogī naimiṣe yogi vandite ॥ 1.23.193 ॥
tatrāpi mama te putrā bhaviṣyanti tapasvinaḥ।
śalihotro'gniveśyaśca yuvanāścaḥ śaradvasuḥ ।
te'pi yogabalopetā rudraṃ yāsyanti suvratāḥ ॥ 1.23.194 ॥
pañcaviṃśe punaḥ prāpte parivartte yathākramam।
vasiṣṭhastu yadā vyāsaḥ śaktirnāma bhaviṣyati ॥ 1.23.195 ॥
tadā'pyahaṃ bhaviṣyāmi daṇḍī muṇḍīśaraḥ prabhuḥ।
koṭivarṣaṃ samāsādya nagaraṃ devapūjitam ॥ 1.23.196 ॥
tatrāpi mama te putrā bhaviṣyanti kramāgatāḥ।
yogātmāno mahātmānaḥ sarve te hyūrddhvaretasaḥ ॥ 1.23.197 ॥
chagalaḥ kumbhakarṣāśyaḥ kumbhaścaiva prabāhukaḥ।
prāpya māheśvaraṃ yogaṃ gamiṣyanti tathaiva te ॥ 1.23.198 ॥
ṣaḍ‌viṃśe parivartte tu yadā vyāsaḥ parāśaraḥ।
tadā'pyahaṃ bhaviṣyāmi sahiṣṇurnāma nāmataḥ।
puṇyaṃ rudravanaṃ prāpya kalau tasmin yugāntike ॥ 1.23.199 ॥
tatrāpi mama te putrā bhaviṣyanti sudhārmikāḥ।
ulūko vaidyutaścaiva sarvako hyāśvalāyanaḥ।
prāpya māheśvaraṃ yogaṃ gantāraste tathaiva hi ॥ 1.23.200 ॥
saptaviṃśatime prāpte parivartte kramāgate।
jātūkarṇyo yadā vyāso bhaviṣyati tapodhanaḥ ॥ 1.23.201 ॥
tadā'pyahaṃ bhaviṣyāmi somaśarmmā dvijottamaḥ।
prabhāsatīrthamāsādya yogātmā lokaviśrutaḥ ॥ 1.23.202 ॥
tatrāpi mama te putrā bhaviṣyanti tapodhanāḥ।
akṣapādaḥ kaṇādaśca ulūko vatsa eva ca ॥ 1.23.203 ॥
yogātmāno mahātmāno vimalāḥ śuddhabuddhayaḥ।
prāpya māheśvaraṃ yogaṃ rudralokaṃ tato gatāḥ ॥ 1.23.204 ॥
aṣṭāviṃśe punaḥ prāpte parivartte kramāgate।
parāśarasutaḥ śrīmān viṣṇurlokapitāmahaḥ ॥ 1.23.205 ॥
yadā bhaviṣyati vyāso nāmnā dvaipāyanaḥ prabhuḥ।
tadā ṣaṣṭena cāṃśena kṛṣṇaḥ puruṣasattamaḥ।
vasudevādyaduśreṣṭo vāsudevo bhaviṣyati ॥ 1.23.206 ॥
tadā cāhaṃ bhaviṣyāmi yogātmā yogamāyayā।
lokavismayanārthāya brahmacāriśarīrakaḥ ॥ 1.23.207 ॥
śmaśāve mṛtamutsṛṣṭaṃ dṛṣṭvā lokamanāthakam।
brāhmaṇānāṃ hitārthāya praviṣṭo yogamāyayā ॥ 1.23.208 ॥
divyāṃ meruguhāṃ puṇyāṃ tvayā sārddhañca viṣṇunā।
bhaviṣyāmi tadā brahman nakulī nāma nāmataḥ ॥ 1.23.209 ॥
kāyārohaṇamityevaṃ siddhakṣetrañca vaitadā।
bhaviṣyati tu vikhyātaṃ yāvadbhūmirddhariṣyati ॥ 1.23.210 ॥
tatrāpi mama te putrā bhaviṣyanti tapasvinaḥ ।
kuśikaścaiva gārgyaśca mitrako ruṣṭa eva ca ॥ 1.23.211 ॥
yogayuktā mahātmāno brāhmaṇā vedapāragāḥ।
prāpya māheśvaraṃ yogaṃ vimalā hyūrddhvaretasaḥ।
rudralokaṃ gamiṣyanti punarāvṛttidurlabham ॥ 1.23.212 ॥
ityetadvai mayā proktamavatāreṣu lakṣaṇam।
manvādikṛṣṇaparyantamaṣṭāviṃśayugakramāt।
tatra smṛtisamūhānāṃ vibhāgo dharmalakṣaṇam ॥ 1.23.213 ॥

iti śrīmahāpurāṇe vāyu prokte māheśvarāvatārayogo nāma trayoviṃśo'dhyāyaḥ ।। 23 ।।

## 1.24

।। vāyuruvāca ।।
catvāri bhārate varṣe yugāni munayo viduḥ ।
kṛtaṃ tretā dvāparaṃ ca tiṣyaṃ ceti caturyugam ॥ 1.24.1 ॥
etatsahasraparyantamaharyadbrahmaṇaḥ smṛtam।
yāmādyāstu gaṇāḥ sapta romavantaścaturddaśa ॥ 1.24.2 ॥
saśarīrāḥ śrayante sma janalokaṃ sahānugāḥ।
evaṃ deveṣvatīteṣu maharllokājjanaṃ tapaḥ ॥ 1.24.3 ॥
manvantareṣvatīteṣu devāḥ sarve mahaujasaḥ।
tatasteṣu gateṣūrddhvaṃ sāyujyaṃ kalpavāsinām ॥ 1.24.4 ॥
sametya devaiste devāḥ prāpte saṅkālane tadā।
maharlokaṃ parityajya gaṇāste vai caturddaśa ॥ 1.24.5 ॥
bhūtadiṣvavaśiṣṭeṣu sthāvarānteṣu vai tadā ।
śūnyeṣu teṣu lokeṣu mahānteṣu bhuvādiṣu।
deveṣvatha gateṣūrddhvaṃ kalpavāsiṣu vai janam ॥ 1.24.6 ॥
tatsaṃhatyā tato brahmā devarṣigaṇadānavān।
saṃsthāpayati vai sarvvān dāhavṛṣ‌ṭyā yugakṣaye ॥ 1.24.7 ॥
yo'tītaḥ saptamaḥ kalpo mayā vaḥ parikīrtitaḥ।
samudraiḥ saptabhirgāḍhamekībhūtairmahārṇavaiḥ ।
āsīdekārṇavaṃ ghoramavibhāgaṃ tamomayam ।। 24.8
māyayaikārṇave tasmin śaṅkhacakragadādharaḥ।
jīmūtābho'mbujākṣaśca kirīṭī śrīpatirhariḥ ॥ 1.24.8 ॥
nārāyaṇamukhodgīrṇaḥ so'ṣṭamaḥ puruṣottamaḥ।
aṣṭabāhurmahorasko lokānāṃ yonirucyate।
kimapyacintyaṃ yuktātmā yogamāsthāya yogavit ॥ 1.24.9 ॥
phaṇāsahasrakalitaṃ tamapratimavarcasam।
mahābhogapaterbhogamanvāstīrya mahocchrayam।
tasminmahati paryaṅke śete vai kanakaprabhe ॥ 1.24.10 ॥
evaṃ tatra śayānena viṣṇunā prabhaviṣṇunā।
ātmārāmeṇa krīḍārthaṃ sṛṣṭaṃ nābhyāṃ tu paṅkajam ॥ 1.24.11 ॥
śatayojanavistīrṇaṃ taruṇādityavarccasam।
bajradaṇḍaṃ mahotsedhaṃ līlayā prabhaviṣṇunā ॥ 1.24.12 ॥
tasyaivaṃ krīḍamānasya samīpaṃ devamīḍhuṣaḥ।
hemabrahmāṇḍajo brahmā rukmavarṇohyatīndriyaḥ।
caturmukho viśālākṣaḥ samāgamya yadṛcchayā ॥ 1.24.13 ॥
śriyā yuktena navyena suprabheṇa sugandhinā।
taṃ krīḍamānaṃ pajhena dṛṣṭvā brahmā tu bhejivān ॥ 1.24.14 ॥
sa vismayamathāgamya śasya saṃpūrṇayā girā।
provāca ko bhavān śete ākṣito mdhyamambhasām ॥ 1.24.15 ॥
atha tasyācyutaḥ śrutvā brahmaṇastu śubhaṃ vacaḥ।
udatiṣṭhata paryyaṅkādvismayotphullalocanaḥ ॥ 1.24.16 ॥
pratyuvācottaraṃ caiva kriyate yacca kiñcana।
dyaurantarikṣaṃ bhūtañca paraṃ padamahaṃ prabhuḥ ॥ 1.24.17 ॥
tamevamuktvā bhagavān viṣṇuḥ punarathāvravīt ।
kastvaṃ khalu samāyātaḥ samīpaṃ bhagavān kutaḥ ।
kutasva bhūyo gantavyaṃ kutra vā te pratiśrayaḥ ॥ 1.24.18 ॥
ko bhavān viśvamūrtistvaṃ karttavyaṃ kiñca te mayā।
evaṃ bruvāṇa vaikuṇṭhaṃ pratyuvāca pitāmahaḥ ॥ 1.24.19 ॥
yathā bhavāṃstathā cāhamādikartta prajāpatiḥ।
nārāyaṇasamākhyātaḥ sarvvaṃ vai mayi tiṣṭhati ॥ 1.24.20 ॥
savismayaṃ paraṃ śrutvā brahmaṇā lokakartṛṇā।
so'nujñāto bhagavatā vaikuṇṭo viśvasambhavaḥ ॥ 1.24.21 ॥
kautūhalānmahāyogī praviṣṭo brahmaṇo mukham।
imānaṣṭādaśadvīpān sasamudrān saparvvatān।
praviśya sa mahātejāścāturvarṇyasamākulān।
brahmādistambaparyyantān saptalokān sanātanān ॥ 1.24.22 ॥
brahmaṇastūdare dṛṣṭvā sarvvān viṣṇurmahāyaśāḥ।
aho'sya tapaso vīryyaṃ punaḥ punarabhāṣata ॥ 1.24.23 ॥
paryyaṭan vividhān lokān viṣṇurnānāvidhāśramān।
tato varṣasahasrānte nāntaṃ hi dadṛśe tadā ॥ 1.24.24 ॥
tadā'sya vakrānniṣkramya pannagendrāriketanaḥ।
ajātaśatrurbhagavān pitāmahamathābravīt ॥ 1.24.25 ॥
bhagavan ādi madhyañca antaṃ kāladiśorna ca।
nāhamantaṃ prapaśyāmi hyudarasya tavānagha ॥ 1.24.26 ॥
evamuktvābravīdbhūyaḥ pitāmahamidaṃ hariḥ।
bhavānapyevamevādya hyudaraṃ mama śāśvatam।
praviśya lokān paśyaitānanaupamyān dvijottama ॥ 1.24.27 ॥
manaḥprahlādanīṃ vāṇīṃ śrutvā tasyābhinandya ca।
śrīpaterudaraṃ bhūyaḥ praviveśa pitāmahaḥ ॥ 1.24.28 ॥
tāneva lokān garbhasthaḥ paśyan so'cintyavikramaḥ।
paryaṭitvādidevasya dadarśāntaṃ na vai hareḥ ॥ 1.24.29 ॥
jñātvāgamantasya pitāmahasya dvārāṇi sarvāṇi pidhāya viṣṇuḥ।
vibhurmanaḥ karttumiyeṣa cāśu sukhaṃ prasupto'smi mahājalaughe ॥ 1.24.30 ॥
tato dvārāṇi sarvāṇi pihitānyupalakṣyate।
sūkṣmaṃ kṛtvātmano rūpaṃ nābhyāṃ dvāramavindata ॥ 1.24.31 ॥
pajhasūtrānumārgeṇa hyanugamya pitāmahaḥ।
ujjahārātmano rūpaṃ puṣkarāccaturānanaḥ।
virarājāravindasthaḥ pajhagarbhasamadyutiḥ ॥ 1.24.32 ॥
etasminnantare tābhyāmekaikasya tu kārtsnyataḥ।
pravarttamāne saṃharṣe madhye tasyārṇavasya tu ॥ 1.24.33 ॥
।।sūta uvāca।।
tato hyaparimeyātmā bhūtānāṃ prabhurīśvaraḥ।
śūlapāṇirmahādevo haimacīrāmbaracchadaḥ।
āgacchad yatra so'nanto nāgabhogapatirhariḥ ॥ 1.24.34 ॥
śīghraṃ vikramatastasya padbhyāmatyantapīḍitāḥ।
uddhūtāstūrṇamākāśe pṛthulāstoyabindavaḥ।
atyuṣṇāścātiśītāśca vāyustatra vavau bhṛśam ॥ 1.24.35 ॥
taddṛṣṭvā mahadāścaryaṃ brahmā viṣṇumabhāṣata।
abbindavo hi sthūloṣṇāḥ kampate cāmbujaṃ bhṛśam।
etaṃ me saṃśayaṃ brūhi kiñcānyat tvañcikīrṣasi ॥ 1.24.36 ॥
etadevaṃvidhaṃ vākyaṃ pitāmahamukhodbhavam।
śrutvāpratimakarmāha bhagavānasurāntakṛt ॥ 1.24.37 ॥
kinnu khalvatra me nābhyāṃ bhūtamanyatkṛtālayam ।
vadanti priyamatyarthaṃ vipriyepi ca te mayā ॥ 1.24.38 ॥
ityevaṃ manasā dhyātvā pratyuvācedamuttaram।
kinnvatra bhagavāṃstasmin puṣkare jātasambhramaḥ ॥ 1.24.39 ॥
kiṃ mayā yat kṛtaṃ deva yanmāṃ priyamanuttamam।
bhāṣase puruṣaśreṣṭha kimarthaṃ brūhi tattvataḥ ॥ 1.24.40 ॥
evaṃ bruvāṇaṃ deveśaṃ lokayā trāntu tattvagām।
pratyuvācāmbujābhāsko brahma vedanidhiḥ prabhuḥ ॥ 1.24.41 ॥
yo'sau tavodaraṃ pūrvaṃ praviṣṭo'haṃ tvadicchayā।
yathā mamodare lokāḥ sarve dṛṣṭāstvayā prabho।
tathaiva dṛṣṭāḥ kārtsnyena mayā lokāstavodare ॥ 1.24.42 ॥
tato varṣasahasrānte upāvṛttasya me'nagha।
nūnaṃ matsarabhāvena māṃ vaśīkartumicchatā।
āśu dvārāṇi sarvāṇi ghaṭitāni tvayā punaḥ ॥ 1.24.43 ॥
tato mayā mahābhāga sañcintya svena cetasā।
labdho nābhyāṃ praveśatu padmasūtrādvinirgamaḥ ॥ 1.24.44 ॥
mābhūtte manaso'lpo'pi vyāghāto'yaṃ kathañcana।
ityeṣānugatirviṣṇoḥ kāryāṇāmaupasargikī ॥ 1.24.45 ॥
yanma yānantaraṃ kāryaṃ mayādhyavasitaṃ tvayi।
tvāñcābādhitukāmena krīḍāpūrvaṃ yadṛcchayā।
āśu dvārāṇi sarvāṇi ghaṭitāni mayā punaḥ ॥ 1.24.46 ॥
na te'nyathāvamantavyo mānyaḥ pūjyaśca me bhavān।
sarvaṃ marṣaya kalyāṇa yanmayā'pakṛtantava।
tasmānmayocyamānastvaṃ pajhādavatara prabho ॥ 1.24.47 ॥
nāhaṃ bhavantaṃ śaknomi soduntejomayaṃ gurum।
sa covāca varaṃ brūhi pajhādavatarāmyayam ॥ 1.24.48 ॥
।।viṣṇuruvāca ।।
putro bhava mamārighna mudaṃ prāpsyasi śobhanam।
satyadhano mahāyogī tvamīḍyaḥ praṇavātmakaḥ ॥ 1.24.49 ॥
adyaprabhṛti sarveśa śvetoṣṇīṣavibhūṣaṇaḥ।
pajhayoniritītyevaṃ khyāto nāmnā bhaviṣyasi।
putro me tvaṃ bhava brahman sarvalokādhipa prabho ॥ 1.24.50 ॥
tataḥ sa bhagavān brahma varaṃ gṛhya kirīṭinaḥ ।
evaṃ bhavatu cetyuktvāṃ prītātmā gatamatsaraḥ ॥ 1.24.51 ॥
pratyāsannamathāyātaṃ bālārkābhaṃ mahānanam।
bhūtamatyadbhutaṃ dṛṣṭvā nārāyaṇamathābravīt ॥ 1.24.52 ॥
aprameyo mahāvakro daṃṣṭrī vyastaśiro ruhaḥ।
daśabāhustriśūlāṅko nayanairviśvatomukhaḥ ॥ 1.24.53 ॥
lokaprabhuḥ svayaṃ sākṣādvikṛto muñjamekhalī ।
meḍhreṇordhvena mahatā nadamāno'tibhairavam ॥ 1.24.54 ॥
kaḥ khalveṣa pumān viṣṇo tejorāśirmahādyutiḥ।
vyāpya sarvā diśo dyāñca ita evābhivarttate ॥ 1.24.55 ॥
tenaivamukto bhagavān viṣṇurbrahmāṇamabravīt।
padbhyāntalanipātena yasya vikramato'rṇave।
vegena mahatākāśe vyathitāśca jalāśayāḥ ॥ 1.24.56 ॥
chaṭābhirviṣṇuto'tyarthaṃ sicyate pajhasambhavaḥ।
ghrāṇajena ca vātena kampamānaṃ tvayā saha।
dodhūyate mahāpajhaṃ svacchandaṃ mama nābhijam ॥ 1.24.57 ॥
sa eṣa bhagavānīśo hyanādiścāntakṛdvibhuḥ।
bhavānahañca stotreṇa hyupatiṣṭāva godhvajam ॥ 1.24.58 ॥
tataḥ kruddho'mbujābhāskaṃ brahmā provāca keśavam।
na bhavān nyūnamātmānaṃ lokānāṃ yonimuttamam ॥ 1.24.59 ॥
brahmāṇaṃ lokakarttāraṃ māñca vetti sanātanam।
ko'yaṃ bhoḥ śaṅkaro nāma hyāvayorvyatiricyate ॥ 1.24.60 ॥
tasya tat krodhajaṃ vākyaṃ śrutvā viṣṇurabhāṣata।
mā maivaṃ vada kalyāṇa parivādaṃ mahātmanaḥ ॥ 1.24.61 ॥
māyāyogeśvaro dharmo durādharṣo varapradaḥ।
heturasyātra jagataḥ purāṇaḥ puruṣo'vyayaḥ ॥ 1.24.62 ॥
jīvaḥ khalveṣa jīvānāṃ jyotirekaṃ prakāśate।
bālakrīḍanakairddevaḥ krīḍato śaṅkaraḥ svayam ॥ 1.24.63 ॥
pradhānamavyayaṃ jyotiravyaktaṃ prakṛtistamaḥ।
asya caitāni nāmāni nityaṃ prasavadharmiṇaḥ।
yaḥ kaḥ sa iti duḥkhārttairmṛgyate yatibhiḥ śivaḥ ॥ 1.24.64 ॥
eṣa bījī bhavān bījamahaṃ yoniḥ sanātanaḥ।
evamukro'tha viśvātmā brahmā viṣṇumabhāṣata ॥ 1.24.65 ॥
bhavānyonirahaṃ bījaṃ kathaṃ bījī maheśvaraḥ ।
etanme sūkṣmamavyaktaṃ saṃśayaṃ chettumarhasi ॥ 1.24.66 ॥
jñātvā caivaṃ samutpattiṃ brahmaṇā lokatantriṇā।
idaṃ paramasādṛśyaṃ praśramabhyavadaddhariḥ ॥ 1.24.67 ॥
asmānmahattaraṃ guhyaṃ bhūtamavyanna vidyate।
mahataḥ paramaṃ dhāma śivamadhyātmināṃ padam ॥ 1.24.68 ॥
dvaidhībhāvena cātmānaṃ praviṣṭastu vyavasthitaḥ।
niṣkalaḥ sūkṣmamavyaktaḥ sakalaśca maheśvaraḥ ॥ 1.24.69 ॥
asya māyāvidhijñasya agamyagahanasya ca।
purā liṅgaṃ bhavadbījaṃ prathamaṃ tvādisargikam ॥ 1.24.70 ॥
mayi yonau samāyuktaṃ tadbījaṃ kālaparyayāt‌।
hiraṇmayamapārantadyonyāmaṇḍamajāyata ॥ 1.24.71 ॥
śatāni daśavarṣāṇāmaṇḍañcāpsu pratiṣṭitam।
ante varṣasahasrasya vāyunā taddvidhā kṛtam ॥ 1.24.72 ॥
kapālamekaṃ dyaurjajñe kapālamaparaṃ kṣitiḥ।
ulvantasya mahotsedhaṃ yo'sau kanakaparvataḥ ॥ 1.24.73 ॥
tatastasmāt prabuddhātmā devo devavaraḥ prabhuḥ ।
hiraṇyagarbho bhagavānahaṃ jajñe caturbhujaḥ ॥ 1.24.74 ॥
tato varṣasahasrānte vāyunā taddvidhākṛtam।
atārārkendunakṣatraṃ śūnyaṃ lokamavekṣya ca।
ko'yamatre tyabhidhyāte kumārāste'bhavaṃstadā ॥ 1.24.75 ॥
priyadarśanāssutanavo ye'tītāḥ pūrvajāstava।
bhūyo varṣasahasrānte tata evātmajāstava।
bhuvanānalasaṅkāśāḥ pajhapatrāyatekṣaṇāḥ ॥ 1.24.76 ॥
śrīmān sanatkumārastu ṛbhuścaivorddhvaretasau ।
sanātanaśca sanakastathaiva ca sanandanaḥ।
utpannāḥ samakālaṃ te buddhayā'tīndriyadarśanāḥ ॥ 1.24.77 ॥
utpannāḥ pratighātmāno jagaduśca tadaiva hi।
nārapsyante ca karmāṇi tāpatrayavivarjitāḥ ॥ 1.24.78 ॥
asya saumyaṃ bahukleśaṃ jarāśokasamanvitam।
jīvitaṃ maraṇaṃ caiva saṃbhavañca punaḥ punaḥ ॥ 1.24.79 ॥
svaprabhūtaṃ punaḥ svarge duḥkhāni narakāṃstathā।
viditvā cāgamaṃ sarvamavaśyaṃ bhavitavyatām ॥ 1.24.80 ॥
ṛbhuṃ sanatkumārañca dṛṣṭvā tava vaśe sthitau।
trayastu trīn guṇān hitvā ātmajāḥ sanakādayaḥ।
vaivarttena tu jñānena nivṛttāste mahaujasaḥ ॥ 1.24.81 ॥
tatasteṣvapavṛtteṣu sanakādiṣu vai triṣu।
bhaviṣyasi vimūḍhastu māyayā śaṅkarasya tu ॥ 1.24.82 ॥
evaṃ kalpe tu vaikalpe saṃjñā nasyati te'nagha।
kalpaśeṣāṇi bhūtāni sūkṣmāṇi pārthivāni ca ॥ 1.24.83 ॥
sā caiṣā hyaiśvarī māyā jagataḥ samudāhṛtā।
sa eṣa parvato meru rdevaloka udāhṛtaḥ ॥ 1.24.84 ॥
tavaivedaṃ hi māhātmyaṃ dṛṣṭvā cātmānamātmanā ।
jñātvā ceśvarasadbhāvaṃ jñātvā māmambujekṣaṇam ॥ 1.24.85 ॥
mahādevaṃ mahāyogaṃ bhūtānāṃ varadaṃ prabhum।
praṇavātmānamāsādya namaskṛtyā jagadgurum।
tvāñca māñcaiva saṃkruddho niḥśvāsānnirddahedayam ॥ 1.24.86 ॥
evaṃ jñātvā mahāyogaṃ abhyuttiṣṭhan mahābalaḥ।
ahaṃ tvāmagrataḥ kṛtvā stoṣye'hamanalaprabham ॥ 1.24.87 ॥
।।sūta uvāca।।
brahmāṇamagrataḥ kṛtvā tataḥ sa garuḍadhvajaḥ।
atītaiśca bhaviṣyaiśca varttamānaistathaiva ca।
nāmabhiśchāndasaiścaiva idaṃ stotramudīrayat ॥ 1.24.88 ॥
namastubhyaṃ bhagavate suvrate'nantatejase।
namaḥ kṣetrādhipataye bījine śūline namaḥ ॥ 1.24.89 ॥
ameḍhrāyorddhvameḍhrāya namo vaikuṇṭharetase ।
namo jyeṣṭāya śreṣṭāya apūrvaprathamāya ca ॥ 1.24.90 ॥
namo havyāya pūjyāya sadyo jātāya vai namaḥ ।
gahvarāya dhaneśāya haimacīrāmbarāya ca ॥ 1.24.91 ॥
namaste hyasmadādīnāṃ bhūtānāṃ prabhavāya ca।
vedakarmmāvadānānāṃ dravyāṇāṃ prabhave namaḥ ॥ 1.24.92 ॥
namo yogsya prabhave sāṃkhyasya prabhave namaḥ ।
namo dhruvaniśīthānāmṛṣīṇāṃ pataye namaḥ ॥ 1.24.93 ॥
vidyudaśanimeghānāṃ garjjitaprabhave namaḥ।
udadhīnāñca prabhave dvīpānāṃ prabhave namaḥ ॥ 1.24.94 ॥
adrīṇāṃ prabhave caiva varṣāṇāṃ prabhave namaḥ।
namo nadānāṃ prabhave nadīnāṃ prabhave namaḥ ॥ 1.24.95 ॥
namaścauṣadhiprabhave vṛkṣāṇāṃ prabhave namaḥ।
dharmmādhyakṣāya dharmmāya sthitīnāṃ prabhave namaḥ ॥ 1.24.96 ॥
namo rasānāṃ prabhave ratnānāṃ prabhave namaḥ ।
namaḥ kṣaṇānāṃ prabhave kalānāṃ prabhave namaḥ ॥ 1.24.97 ॥
nimeṣaprabhave caiva kāṣṭānāṃ prabhave namaḥ ।
ahorātrārddhamāsānāṃ māsānāṃ prabhave namaḥ ॥ 1.24.98 ॥
nama ṛtunāṃ prabhave saṃkhyāyāḥ prabhave namaḥ।
prabhave ca parārddhasya parasya prabhave namaḥ ॥ 1.24.99 ॥
namaḥ purāṇaprabhave yugasya prabhave namaḥ।
caturvidhasya sargasya prabhave'nantacakṣuṣe ॥ 1.24.100 ॥
kalpodaye nibaddhānāṃ vārttānāṃ prabhave namaḥ।
namo viśvasya prabhave brahmadiprabhave namaḥ ॥ 1.24.101 ॥
vidyānāṃ prabhave caiva vidyānāṃ pataye namaḥ।
namo vratānāṃ pataye mantrāṇāṃ pataye namaḥ ॥ 1.24.102 ॥
pitṝṇāṃ pataye caiva paśūnāṃ pataye namaḥ।
vāgvṛṣāya namastubhyaṃ purāṇavṛṣabhāya ca ॥ 1.24.103 ॥
sucārucārukeśāya ūrddhvacakṣuḥśirāya ca।
namaḥ paśūnāṃ pataye govṛṣendradhvajāya ca ॥ 1.24.104 ॥
prajāpatīnāṃ pataye siddhānāṃ pataye namaḥ।
garuḍoragasarpāṇāṃ pakṣiṇāṃ pataye namaḥ ॥ 1.24.105 ॥
gokarṇāya ca goṣṭāya śaṅkukarṇāya vai namaḥ।
vārāhāyāprameyāya rakṣodhipataye namaḥ ॥ 1.24.106 ॥
namo hyapsarasāṃpataye gaṇānāṃ (pataye) hrīmaye namaḥ।
ambhasāṃ pataye caiva tejasāṃ pataye namaḥ ॥ 1.24.107 ॥
namo'stu lakṣmīpataye śrīmate hrīmate namaḥ।
balābalasamūhāya hyakṣobhyakṣobhaṇāya ca ॥ 1.24.108 ॥
dīrghaśrṛṅgaikaśrṛṅgāya vṛṣabhāya kakudmine।
namaḥ sthairyāya vapuṣe tejase suprabhāya ca ॥ 1.24.109 ॥
bhūtāya ca bhaviṣyāya varttamānāya vai namaḥ।
suvarccase'tha vīrāya śūrāya hyatigāya ca ॥ 1.24.110 ॥
varadāya vareṇyāya namaḥ sarvagatāya ca।
namo bhūtāya bhavyāya bhavāya mahate tathā ॥ 1.24.111 ॥
janāya ca namastubhyaṃ tapase varadāya ca।
namo vandyāya mokṣāya janāya narakāya ca ॥ 1.24.112 ॥
bhavāya bhajamānāya iṣṭāya yājakāya ca।
abhyudīrṇāya dīptāya tattvāya nirguṇāya ca ॥ 1.24.113 ॥
namaḥ pāśāya hastāya namaḥ svābharaṇāya ca।
hutāya cāpahutāya prahutapraśitāya ca ॥ 1.24.114 ॥
namo'stviṣṭāya mūrttāya hyagniṣṭomartvijāya ca।
nama ṛtāya satyāya bhūtādhipataye namaḥ ॥ 1.24.115 ॥
sadasyāya namaścaiva dakṣiṇāvabhṛthāya ca।
ahiṃsāyātha lokānāṃ paśumantrauṣadhāya ca ॥ 1.24.116 ॥
namastuṣṭipradānāya tryambakāya sugandhine।
namo'stvindriyapataye parihārāya sragviṇe ॥ 1.24.117 ॥
viśvāya viśvarūpāya viśvato'kṣimukhāya ca।
sarvataḥ pāṇipādāya rudrāyāpramitāya ca ॥ 1.24.118 ॥
namo havyāya kavyāya havyakavyāya vai namaḥ।
namaḥ siddhāya medhyāya ceṣṭāya tvavyayāya ca ॥ 1.24.119 ॥
suvīrāya sughorāya hyakṣobhyakṣobhaṇāya ca।
sumedhase suprajāya dīptāya bhāskarāya ca ॥ 1.24.120 ॥
mano namaḥ suparṇāya tapanīyanibhāya ca।
virūpākṣāya tryakṣāya piṅgalāya mahaujase ॥ 1.24.121 ॥
dṛṣṭighnāya namaścaiva namaḥ saumyekṣaṇāya ca।
namo dhūmrāya śvetāya kṛṣṇāya lohitāya ca ॥ 1.24.122 ॥
piśitāya piśaṅgāya pītāya ca niṣaṅgiṇe।
namaste saviśeṣāya nirviśeṣāya vai namaḥ ॥ 1.24.123 ॥
namo vai pajhavarṇāya mṛtyughnāya ca mṛtyave ।
namaḥ śyāmāya gaurāya kadrave rohitāya ca ॥ 1.24.124 ॥
namaḥ kāntāya sandhyābhravarṇāya bahurūpiṇe।
namaḥ kapālahastāya digvastrāya kaparddine ॥ 1.24.125 ॥
aprameyāya śarvāya hyavadhyāya varāya ca।
purastāt pṛṣṭhataścaiva bibhrāṇāya kṛśānave ॥ 1.24.126 ॥
durgāya mahate caiva rodhāya kapilāya ca।
arkaprabhaśarīrāya baline raṃhasāya ca ॥ 1.24.127 ॥
pinākine prasiddhāya sphītāya prasṛtāya ca।
sumedhase'kṣamālāya digvāsāya śikhaṇḍine ॥ 1.24.128 ॥
citrāya citravarṇāya vicitrāya dharāya ca।
cekitānāya tuṣṭāya namastvanihitāya ca ॥ 1.24.129 ॥
namaḥ kṣāntāya śāntāya vajrasaṃhananāya ca।
rakṣoghnāya makhaghnāya śitikaṇṭorddhvaretase ॥ 1.24.130 ॥
arihāya kṛtāntāya tigmāyudhadharāya ca।
samodāya pramodāya iriṇāyaiva te namaḥ ॥ 1.24.131 ॥
praṇavapraṇaveśāya bhaktānāṃ śarmadāya ca।
mṛgavyādhāya dakṣāya dakṣayajñaharāya ca ॥ 1.24.132 ॥
sarvabhūtāya bhūtāya sarveśātiśayāya ca।
purabhetre ca śāntāya sugandhāya vareśave ॥ 1.24.133 ॥
puṣpavantasvarupāya bhaganetrāntakāya ca ।
kaṇādāya variṣṭāya kāmāṅgadahanāya ca ॥ 1.24.134 ॥
raveḥ karālacakrāya nāgendradamanāya ca।
daityānāmantakāyātho divyākrandakarāya ca ॥ 1.24.135 ॥
śmaśānaratinityāya namastryambakadhāriṇe।
namaste prāṇapālāya dhavamālādharāya ca ॥ 1.24.136 ॥
prahīṇaśokairvividhairbhūtaiḥ pariṣṭutāya ca।
naranārīśarīrāya devyāḥ priyakarāya ca ॥ 1.24.137 ॥
jaṭine daṇḍine tubhyaṃ vyālayajñopavītine ।
namo'stu nṛtyaśīlāya vādyanṛtyapriyāya ca ॥ 1.24.138 ॥
manyave śītaśīlāya sugītigāyate namaḥ।
kaṭakakarāya bhīmāya cograrūpadharāya ca ॥ 1.24.139 ॥
vibhīṣaṇāya bhīmāya bhagapramathanāya ca।
siddhasaṅghātagītāya mahābhāgāya vai namaḥ ॥ 1.24.140 ॥
namo muktāṭṭahāsāya kṣveḍitāsphoṭitāya ca।
nadate kūrdate caiva namaḥ pramuditāya ca ॥ 1.24.141 ॥
namo'dbhutāya svapate dhāvate prasthitāya ca।
dhyāyate jṛmbhate caiva tudate dravate namaḥ ॥ 1.24.142 ॥
calate krīḍate caiva lambodaraśarīriṇe।
namaḥ kṛtāya kampāya muṇḍāya vikarāya ca ॥ 1.24.143 ॥
nama unmattaveṣāya kiṅkiṇīkāya vai namaḥ।
namo vikṛtaveṣāya krūrogrāmarṣaṇāya ca ॥ 1.24.144 ॥
aprameyāya dīptāya dīptaye nirguṇāya ca।
namaḥ priyāya vādāya mudrāmaṇidharāya ca ॥ 1.24.145 ॥
namastokāya tanave guṇairapratimāya ca।
namo gaṇāya guhyāya agamyāgamanāya ca ॥ 1.24.146 ॥
loka dhātrī tviyaṃ bhūmiḥ pādau sajjanasevitau।
sarvveṣāṃ siddhayogānāmadhiṣṭānantavodaram ॥ 1.24.147 ॥
madhye'ntarikṣaṃ vistīrṇantārāgaṇavibhūṣitam।
tārāpatha ivā bhāti śrīmān hārastavorasi ॥ 1.24.148 ॥
diśo daśa bhujāste vai keyūrāṅgadabhūṣitāḥ।
vistīrṇapariṇāhaśca nīlāmbudacayopamaḥ ॥ 1.24.149 ॥
kaṇṭhaste śobhate śrīmān hemasūtravibhūṣitaḥ ।
daṃṣṭrākarāladurddharṣamanaupamyaṃ mukhaṃ tava ॥ 1.24.150 ॥
pajhamālākṛtoṣṇīṣaṃ śīrṣaṇyaṃ śobhate katham।
dīptiḥ sūrye vapuścandre sthairye bhūrhyanilo bale ॥ 1.24.151 ॥
taikṣṇyamagnau prabhā candre khe śabdaḥ śaityamapsu ca।
akṣarottamaniṣpandān guṇānetānvidurbudhāḥ ॥ 1.24.152 ॥
japo japyo mahāyogī mahādevo maheśvaraḥ।
pureśayo guhāvāsī khecaro rajanīcaraḥ ॥ 1.24.153 ॥
taponidhirguhagururnandano nandivarddhanaḥ।
hayaśīrṣo dharādhātā vidhātā bhūtivāhanaḥ ॥ 1.24.154 ॥
boddhavyo bodhano netā dhūrvaho duṣprakampakaḥ।
bṛhadratho bhīmakarmā bṛhatkīrtirdhanañjayaḥ ॥ 1.24.155 ॥
ghaṇṭāpriyo dhvajīchatrī patākādhvajinīpatiḥ।
kavacī paṭṭiśī śaṅkhī pāśahastaḥ paraśvabhṛt ॥ 1.24.156 ॥
agamastvanaghaḥ śūro devarājārimardanaḥ।
tvāṃ prasādya purā'smābhirdviṣanto nihatā yudhi ॥ 1.24.157 ॥
agnistvaṃ cārṇavān sarvān pibhannaiva na tṛpyase।
krodhāgāraḥ prasannātmā kāmahā kāmadaḥ priyaḥ ॥ 1.24.158 ॥
brahmaṇyo brahmacārī ca goghnastvaṃ śiṣṭapūjitaḥ।
vedānāmavyayaḥ kośastvayā yajñaḥ prakalpitaḥ ॥ 1.24.159 ॥
havyañca vedaṃ vahati vedoktaṃ havyavāhanaḥ।
prīte tvayi mahādeva vayaṃ prītā bhavāmahe ॥ 1.24.160 ॥
bhavānīśo nādimān dhāmarāśirbrahmama lokānāntvaṃ karttā tvādisargaḥ।
sāṅkhyāḥ prakṛtibhyaḥ paramaṃ tvāṃ viditvā kṣīṇadhyānāste na mṛtyuṃ viśanti ॥ 1.24.161 ॥
yogena tvāndhyānino nityayuktāḥ jñātvā bhogān santyajante punastān ।
ye'nye marttyāstvāṃ prapannā viśuddhāste karmabhirdivyabhogān bhajante ॥ 1.24.162 ॥
aprameyasya tattvasya yathā vijhaḥ svaśaktitaḥ।
kīrtitaṃ tava māhātmyamapāraṃ paramātmanaḥ।
śivo no bhava sarvatra yo'si so'si namo'stu te ॥ 1.24.163 ॥

iti śrīmahāpurāṇe vāyuprokte śārvastavaṃ nāma caturviṃśo'dhyāyaḥ ।। 24 ।

## 1.25

।।sūta uvāca।।
saṃpibanniva tau dṛṣṭvā madhupiṅgāyatekṣaṇaḥ ।
prahṛṣṭavadano'tyarthamabhavacca svakīrttanāt ॥ 1.25.1 ॥

umāpatirvirūpākṣo dakṣayajñavināśanaḥ।
pinākī khaṇḍaparaśurbhūtaprāntastrilocanaḥ ॥ 1.25.2 ॥

tataḥ sa bhagavān devaḥ śrutvā vākyāmṛtaṃ tayoḥ।
jānannapi mahābhāgaḥ prītapūrvamathābravīt ॥ 1.25.3 ॥

kau bhavantau mahātmānau parasparahitaiṣiṇau।
sametāvambujābhākṣau tasmin ghore jalaplave ॥ 1.25.4 ॥

tāvūcatūrmahātmānau sannirīkṣya parasparam।
bhagavan kiñca tathyena vijñātena tvayā vibho।
kutra vā sukhamānantyamicchācāramṛte tvayā ॥ 1.25.5 ॥

uvāca bhagavān devo madhuraślakṣṇayā girā।
bho bho hiraṇyagarbha tvāṃ tvāṃ ca kṛṣṇa vadāmyaham ॥ 1.25.6 ॥

prīto'hamanayā bhaktyā śāśvatākṣarayuktayā।
bhavantau mānanīyau vai mama hyarhatarāvubhau।
yuvābhyāṃ kiṃ dadāmyadya varāṇāṃ varamuttamam ॥ 1.25.7 ॥

tenaivamukte vacane brahmāṇaṃ viṣṇurabravīt ।
brūhi brūhi mahābhāga varo yaste vivakṣitaḥ ॥ 1.25.8 ॥

prajākāmo'smyahaṃ viṣṇo putramicchāmi dhūrvaham।
tataḥ sa bhagavān brahmā verapsuḥ putralipsayā ॥ 1.25.9 ॥

atha viṣṇuruvācedaṃ prajākāmaṃ prajāpatim।
vīramapratimaṃ putraṃ yattvamicchasi dhūrvaham ॥ 1.25.10 ॥

putratvenābhiyuṅkṣva tvaṃ devadevaṃ maheśvaram।
satasya vākyaṃ saṃpūjya keśavasya pitāmahaḥ ॥ 1.25.11 ॥

īśānaṃ varadaṃ rudramabhivādya kṛtāñjaliḥ ।
uvāca putrakāmastu vākyāni saha viṣṇunā ॥ 1.25.12 ॥

yadi me bhagavān prītaḥ putrakāmasya nityaśaḥ।
putro me bhava viśvātman svatulyo vāpi dhūrvvahaḥ।
nānyaṃ varamahaṃ vavre prīte tvayi maheśvara ॥ 1.25.13 ॥

tasya tāṃ prārthanāṃ śrutvā bhagavān bhaganetrahā।
niṣkalmaṣamamāyañca bāḍhamityabravīdvacaḥ ॥ 1.25.14 ॥

yadā kāryasamārambhe kasmiṃścittava suvrata।
aniṣṇattau ca kāryasya krodhastvāṃ samupeṣyati।
ātmaikādaśa ye rudrā vihitāḥ prāṇa hetavaḥ ॥ 1.25.15 ॥

so'hamekādaśātmā vai śūlahastaḥ sahānugaḥ।
ṛṣirmmitro mahātmā vai lalāṭādbhavitā tadā ॥ 1.25.16 ॥

prasādamatulaṃ kṛtvā brahmaṇastādṛśaṃ purā।
viṣṇuṃ punaruvācedaṃ dadāmi ca varantava ॥ 1.25.17 ॥

sa hovāca mahābhāgo viṣṇurbhavamidaṃ vacaḥ।
sarvvametat kṛtaṃ deva parituṣṭo'si me yadi।
tvayi me supratiṣṭā'stu bhaktirambudavāhana ॥ 1.25.18 ॥

evamuktastato devastamabhāṣata keśavam।
viṣṇo śrṛṇu yathā deva prīto'hantava śāśvata ॥ 1.25.19 ॥

prakāśañcāprakāśañca jaṅgamaṃ sthāvarañca yat ।
viśvarūpamidaṃ sarvvaṃ rudranārāyaṇātmakam ॥ 1.25.20 ॥

ahamagnirbhavān somo bhavān rātrirahaṃ dinam।
bhavānṛtamahaṃ satyaṃ bhavān kraturahaṃ phalam ॥ 1.25.21 ॥

bhavān jñānamahaṃ jñeyaṃ yajjapitvā sadā janāḥ ।
māṃ viśanti tvayi prīte janāḥ sukṛtakāriṇaḥ।
āvābhyāṃ sahitā caiva gatirnānyā yugakṣaye ॥ 1.25.22 ॥

ātmānaṃ prakṛtiṃ viddhi māṃ viddhi puruṣaṃ śivam।
bhavānarddhaśarīraṃ me tvahantava yathaiva ca ॥ 1.25.23 ॥

vāmapārśvamahammahyaṃ śyāmaṃ śrīvatsalakṣaṇam ।
tvañca vāmetaraṃ pārśvaṃ tvahaṃ vai nīlalohitaḥ ॥ 1.25.24 ॥

tvañca me hvadayaṃ viṣṇo tava cāhaṃ hṛdi sthitaḥ।
bhavān sarvvasya kāryasya karttāhamadhidaivatam ॥ 1.25.25 ॥

tadehi svasti te vatsa gamiṣyāmyambudaprabha।
evamuktvā gato viṣṇordevo'ntarddhānamīśvaraḥ ॥ 1.25.26 ॥

tataḥ so'ntarhite deve saṃprahṛṣṭastadā punaḥ।
aśeta śayane bhūpa praviśyāntarjale hariḥ ॥ 1.25.27 ॥

taṃ pajhaṃ pajhagarbhābhaṃ pajhākṣaḥ pajhasambhavaḥ।
samprahṛṣṭamanā brahmā bheje brāhmaṃ tadāsanam ॥ 1.25.28 ॥

atha dīrghaṇa kālena tatrāpyapratimāvubhau।
mahābalau mahāsattvau bhrātarau madhukaiṭabhau ॥ 1.25.29 ॥

ūcatuśvaiva vacanaṃ bhakṣyo vai nau bhaviṣyasi ।
evamuktvā tu tau tasminnantarddhānaṃ gatāvubhau ॥ 1.25.30 ॥

dāruṇantu tayorbhāvaṃ jñātvā puṣkarasambhavaḥ ।
māhātmyaṃ cātmano buddhvā vijñātumupacakrame ॥ 1.25.31 ॥

karṇikāghaṭanaṃ bhūyo nābhyajānādyadā gatim।
tataḥ sa pajhanālena avatīryya rasātalam।
kṛṣṇā jinottarāsaṅgandadṛśo'ntarjale harim ॥ 1.25.32 ॥

sa ca taṃ bodhayāmāsa vibuddhaṃ cedamabravīt ।
bhūtebhyo me bhayaṃ deva trāyasvau ttiṣṭha śaṅkuru ॥ 1.25.33 ॥

tataḥ sa bhagavān viṣṇuḥ saprahāsamarindamaḥ।
na bhetavyaṃ na bhetavyamityuvāca muniḥ svayam ॥ 1.25.34 ॥

tasmātpūrvaṃ tvayā coktaṃ bhūtebhyo me mahadbhayam।
tasmādbhūtādivā kyaistau daityau tvaṃ nāśayiṣyasi ॥ 1.25.35 ॥

bhūrbhūvaḥsvastato devaṃ viviśustamayonijam ।
tataḥ pradakṣiṇaṃ kṛtvā tamevāsīnamāgatam ॥ 1.25.36 ॥

gate tasmiṃtato'nanta udgīrya bhrātarau mukhāt।
viṣṇuṃ jiṣṇuñca provāca brahmāṇamabhirakṣarām।
madhukaiṭabhayorjñātvā tayorāgamanaṃ punaḥ ॥ 1.25.37 ॥

cakrāte rūpa sādṛśyaṃ viṣṇorjiṣṇośca sattamau।
kṛtasādṛśyarūpau tau tāvevābhimukhau sthitau ॥ 1.25.38 ॥

tatastau procaturddaityau brahmāṇaṃ dāruṇaṃ vacaḥ।
asmākaṃ yudhyamānānāṃ madhye vai prāśriko bhava ॥ 1.25.39 ॥

tatastau jalamāviśya saṃstambhyāpaḥ svamāyayā ।
cakratustumulaṃ yuddhaṃ yasya yenepsitaṃ tadā ॥ 1.25.40 ॥

teṣāntu yudhya mānānāṃ divyaṃ varṣaśataṅgatam।
na ca yuddhamadotseko hyanyonyaṃ saṃnyavarttata ॥ 1.25.41 ॥

lakṣaṇadvayasaṃsthānādrūpavantau sthiteṅgitau।
sādṛśyādvyākulamanā brahmā dhyānamupāgamat ॥ 1.25.42 ॥

sa tayorantaraṃ buddhvā brahma divyena cakṣuṣā।
pajhakesarajaṃ sūkṣmaṃ babandha kavacantayoḥ।
āmekhalañca gātrañca tato mantramudāharat ॥ 1.25.43 ॥

japatastvabhavatkanyā viśvarūpasamutthitā।
pajhenduvadanaprakhyā padmahastā śubhā satī।
tāṃ dṛṣṭvā vyathitau daityau bhayādvarṇavivarjjitau ॥ 1.25.44 ॥

tataḥ provāca tāṃ kanyāṃ brahmā madhurayā girā।
kā'tra tvamavagantavyā brūhi satyamanindite ॥ 1.25.45 ॥

sāmnā saṃpūjya sā kanyā brahmāṇaṃ prāñjalistadā ।
mohinīṃ viddhi māṃ māyāṃ viṣṇoḥ sandeśakāriṇīm ॥ 1.25.46 ॥

tvayā saṅkīrttyamānā'haṃ brahman prāptā tvarāyutā।
asyāḥ prītamanā brahmā gauṇaṃ nāma cakāra ha ॥ 1.25.47 ॥

mayā ca vyāhṛtā yasmāttavañcaiva samupasthitā।
mahāvyāhṛtirityeva nāma te vicariṣyati ॥ 1.25.48 ॥

itthitā ca śiro bhittvā sāvitrī tena cocyate।
ekānaṃśāttu yasmāttavamanekāṃśā bhaviṣyasi ॥ 1.25.49 ॥

gauṇāni tāvadetāni karmajānyaparāṇi ca।
nāmāni te bhaviṣyanti matprasādāt śubhānane ॥ 1.25.50 ॥

tatastau pīḍyamānau tu varamenamayācatām।
anāvṛtaṃ nau maraṇaṃ putratvañca bhavettava ॥ 1.25.51 ॥

tathetyuktvā tatastūrṇamanayat yamasādanam।
anayat kaiṭabhaṃ viṣṇurjiṣṇuścāpyanayanmadhum ॥ 1.25.52 ॥

evantau nihatau daityau viṣṇunā jiṣṇunā saha।
prītena brahmaṇā cātha lokānāṃ hitakāmyayā ॥ 1.25.53 ॥

putratvamīśena yathā hyātmā datto nibodhata।
viṣṇunā jiṣṇunā sārddhaṃ madhukaiṭabhayostathā।
samparāye vyatikānte brahmā viṣṇumabhāṣata ॥ 1.25.54 ॥

adya varṣaśataṃ pūrṇaṃ samayaḥ pratyupasthitaḥ।
saṃkṣepasaṃplavaṅghoraṃ svasthānaṃ yāmi cāpyaham ॥ 1.25.55 ॥

sa tasya vacasā devaḥ saṃhāramakarottadā।
mahīṃ nisthāvarāṃ kṛtvā prakṛtisthāṃśca jaṅgamān ॥ 1.25.56 ॥

yadi govinda bhadrante kṣiptaste yādasāṃ patiḥ।
brūhi yat karaṇīyaṃ syānmayā te lakṣmi varddhana ॥ 1.25.57 ॥

bāḍhaṃ śrṛṇu hemābha pajhayone vaco mama ।
prasādo yastvayā labdha īśvarāt putralipsayā ॥ 1.25.58 ॥

tantathā saphalaṃ kṛtvā matto'bhūdanṛṇo bhavān।
caturvidhāni bhūtāni sṛja tvaṃ visṛjasva vā ॥ 1.25.59 ॥

avāpya saṃjñāṅgovindāt pajhayoniḥ pitāmahaḥ।
prajāḥ sraṣṭumanāstepe tapa ugraṃ tato mahat ॥ 1.25.60 ॥

tasyaivantapyamānasya na kiñcitsamavarttata।
tato dīrgheṇa kālena duḥkhāt krodho vyavarddhata ॥ 1.25.61 ॥

sakrodhāviṣṭanetrabhyāmapatannaśrubindavaḥ ।
tatastebhyo'śrubindubhyo vātapittakaphātmakāḥ ॥ 1.25.62 ॥

mahābhāgā mahāsattvāḥ svastikairabhyalaṅkṛtāḥ।
prakīrṇakeśāḥ sarpāste prādurbhūtā mahāviṣāḥ ॥ 1.25.63 ॥

sarpāṃstathāgrajān dṛṣṭvā brahmātmānamanindata।
aho dhik tapasā mahyaṃ phalamīdṛśakaṃ yadi।
lokavaināśikī jajñe ādāveva prajā mama ॥ 1.25.64 ॥

tasya tīvrābhavanmūrcchā krodhāmarṣasamudbhavā।
mūrcchābhitāpena tadā jahau prāṇān prajāpatiḥ ॥ 1.25.65 ॥

tasyāpratimavīryasya dehāt kāruṇyapūrvakam।
ātmaikādaśa te rudrāḥ prodbhūtā rudatastathā।
rodanāt khalu rudrāste rudratvaṃ tena teṣu tat ॥ 1.25.66 ॥

ye rudrāḥ khalu te prāṇā ye prāṇāste tadātmakāḥ।
prāṇāḥ prāṇabhṛtāṃ jñeyāḥ sarvabhūteṣvavasthitāḥ ॥ 1.25.67 ॥

atyugrasya mahattvasya sādhunā caritasya ca।
tasya prāṇān dadau bhūyastriśūlī nīlalohitaḥ।
lalāṭāt pajhayonestu prabhurekādaśātmakaḥ ॥ 1.25.68 ॥

brahmaṇaḥ so'dadāt prāṇānātmajaḥ sa tadā prabhuḥ।
prahṛṣṭavadano rudraḥ kiṃcit pratyāgatāsavam।
abhyabhāṣattadā devo brahmāṇaṃ paramaṃ vacaḥ ॥ 1.25.69 ॥

upayācasva māṃ brahman smarttumarhasi cātmanaḥ।
māṃ ca vetthātmajaṃ rudraṃ prasādaṃ kuru me prabho ॥ 1.25.70 ॥

śratvā tvidaṃ vacastasya prabhūtañca manogatam।
pitāmahaḥ prasannātmā netre phullāmbujaprabhaiḥ ॥ 1.25.71 ॥

tataḥ pratyāgataprāṇaḥ snigdhagambhīrayā girā।
uvāca bhagavān brahmā śuddhajāmbūnadaprabhaḥ ॥ 1.25.72 ॥

bho bho vada mahābhāga ānandayasi me manaḥ।
ko bhavān viśvabhūtistvaṃ sthita ekādaśātmakaḥ ॥ 1.25.73 ॥

evamukto bhagavatā brahmaṇā'nantatejasā।
tataḥ pratyavadadrudro hyabhivādyātmajaiḥ saha ॥ 1.25.74 ॥

yatte varamahaṃ brahman yācito viṣṇunā saha।
putro me bhava deveti tvattulyo vāpi dhūrvahaḥ ॥ 1.25.75 ॥

lokeṣu viśrutaiḥ kāryaṃ sarvairviśvātmasambhavaiḥ।
viṣādantyaja deveśa lokāṃstvaṃ sraṣṭumarhasi ॥ 1.25.76 ॥

evaṃ sa bhagavānukto brahmā prītamanābhavat ।
rudraṃ pratyavadadbhūyo lokānte nīlalohitam ॥ 1.25.77 ॥

sāhāyyaṃ mama kāryārthaṃ prajāḥ sṛja mayā saha।
bījī tvaṃ sarvabhūtānāṃ tatprapannastathā bhava।
bāḍhamityeva tāṃ vāṇīṃ pratijagrāha śaṅkaraḥ ॥ 1.25.78 ॥

tataḥ sa bhagavān brahmā kṛṣṇājinavibhūṣitaḥ।
mano'gre so'sṛjaddevo bhūtānāṃ dhāraṇāṃ tataḥ।
jihvāṃ sarasvatīñcaiva tatastāṃ viśvarūpiṇīm ॥ 1.25.79 ॥

bhṛgumaṅgirasaṃ dakṣaṃ pulastyaṃ pulahaṃ kratum।
vasiṣṭhañca mahātejāḥ sasṛje sapta mānasān ॥ 1.25.80 ॥

putrānātmasamānanyān so'sṛjadviśvasambhavān ।
teṣāṃ bhūyo'numārgeṇa gāvo vakrādvijajñire ॥ 1.25.81 ॥

oṅkārapramukhān vedānabhimānyāśca devatāḥ।
evametān yatāproktān brahmā lokapitāmahaḥ ॥ 1.25.82 ॥

dakṣādyān mānasān putrān provāca bhagavān prabhuḥ।
prajāḥ sṛjata bhadraṃ vo rudreṇa saha dhīmatā ॥ 1.25.83 ॥

anugamya mahātmānaṃ prajānāṃ patayastadā।
vayamicchāmahe deva prajāḥ sraṣṭuṃ tvayā saha।
brahmaṇastveṣa sandeśastava caiva maheśvara ॥ 1.25.84 ॥

tairevamukto bhagavān rudraḥ provāca tān prabhuḥ।
brahmaṇaścātmajā mahyaṃ prāṇān gṛhya ca vai surāḥ ॥ 1.25.85 ॥

kṛtvāgrajāgrajānetān brāhmaṇānātmajānmama।
brahmādistambaparyantān saptalokānmamātmakān।
bhavantaḥ sraṣṭumarhanti vacanānmama svasti vaḥ ॥ 1.25.86 ॥

tenaivamuktāḥ pratyūcuḥ rudramādyantriśūlinam।
yathājñāpayase deva tathā tadvai bhaviṣyati ॥ 1.25.87 ॥

anumānya mahādevaṃ prajānāṃ patayastadā।
ūcurdakṣaṃ mahātmānaṃ bhavān śreṣṭhaḥ prajāpatiḥ।
tvāṃ puraskṛtya bhadrante prajāḥ srakṣyāmahe vayam ॥ 1.25.88 ॥

evamastviti vai dakṣaḥ pratyapadyata bhāṣitam।
taiḥ saha sraṣṭumārebhe prajākāmaḥ prajāpatiḥ।
sargasthite tataḥ sthāṇau brahmā sargamathāsṛjat ॥ 1.25.89 ॥

athāsya saptame'tīte kalpe vai sambabhūvatuḥ।
ṛbhuḥ sanatkumāraśca tapo lokanivāsinau।
tatau maharṣīnanyān sa mānasānasṛjat prabhuḥ ॥ 1.25.90 ॥

iti śrīmahāpurāṇe vāyuprokte madhukaiṭabhotpattivināśavarṇanaṃ nāma pañcaviṃśo' dhyāyaḥ ।। 25 ।

## 1.26

।।sūta uvāca।।
aho vismayanīyāni rahasyāni mahāmate।
tvayoktāni yathātattvaṃ lokānugrahakāraṇāt ॥ 1.26.1 ॥

tatra vai saṃśayo mahyamavatā (vā) reṣu śūlinaḥ।
kiṃ kāraṇaṃ mahādevaḥ kaliṃ prāpya sudāruṇam।
hitvā yugāni pūrvāṇi avatāraṃ karoti vai ॥ 1.26.2 ॥

asminmanvantare caiva prāpte vaivasvate prabho।
avatāraṃ kathañcakre etadicchāmi veditum ॥ 1.26.3 ॥

na te'styaviditaṃ kiñcidiha loke paratra ca।
bhaktānāmupadeśārthaṃ vinayāt pṛcchato mama।
kathayasva mahāprājña yadi śrāvyaṃ mahāmatam ॥ 1.26.4 ॥

।।lomaśa uvāca।।
evaṃ pṛṣṭo'tha bhagavān vāyurlokahite rataḥ।
idamāha mahātejā vāyurlokanamaskṛtaḥ ॥ 1.26.5 ॥

etadghuptatamaṃ loke yanmāntvaṃ paripṛcchasi।
tatsarvaṃ śrṛṇu gādheya ucyamānaṃ yathākramam ॥ 1.26.6 ॥

purā hyekārṇave vṛtte divye varṣasahasrake।
sraṣṭukāmaḥ prajā brahmā cintayāmāsa duḥśitaḥ ॥ 1.26.7 ॥

tasya cintayamānasya prādurbhūtaḥ kumārakaḥ।
divyagandhaḥ sudhāpekṣī divyāṃ śrutimudīrayan ॥ 1.26.8 ॥

aśabdasparśarūpāntāmagandhāṃ rasavarjjitām।
śrutiṃ hyudīrayan devo yāmavindaccaturmmukhaḥ ॥ 1.26.9 ॥

tatastu dhyānasaṃyuktastapa āsthāya bhairavam।
cintayāmāsa manasā tritayaṃ ko'nvayantviti ॥ 1.26.10 ॥

tasya cintayamānasya prādurbhūtaṃ tadakṣaram।
aśabdasparśarūpañca rasagandhavivarjjitam ॥ 1.26.11 ॥

athottamaṃ sa lokeṣu svamūrttiñcāpi paśyati।
dhyāyanvai sa tadā devamathainaṃ paśyate punaḥ ॥ 1.26.12 ॥

taṃ śvetamatha raktañca pītaṃ kṛṣṇaṃ tadā punaḥ।
varṇasthaṃ tatra paśyeta na strī na ca napuṃsakam ॥ 1.26.13 ॥

tatsarvaṃ suciraṃ jñātvā cintayan hi tadakṣaram ।
tasya cintayamānasya kaṇṭāduttiṣṭhate'kṣaraḥ ॥ 1.26.14 ॥

ekamātro mahāghoṣaḥ śvetavarṇaḥ sunirmalaḥ।
sa oṅkāro bhavedvedaḥ akṣaraṃ vai maheśvaraḥ ॥ 1.26.15 ॥

tataścintayamānasya tvakṣaraṃ vai svayambhuvaḥ।
prādurbhūtantu raktantu sa devaḥ prathamaḥ smṛtaḥ ॥ 1.26.16 ॥

ṛgvedaṃ prathamaṃ tasya tvagnimīळe purohitam।
etāṃ dṛṣṭvā ṛcaṃ brahmā cintayāmāsa vai punaḥ।
tadakṣaraṃ mahātejāḥ kimetaditi lokakṛt ॥ 1.26.17 ॥

tasya cintayamānasya tasminnatha maheśvaraḥ ।
dvimātramakṣaraṃ jajñe īśitvena dvimātrikam ॥ 1.26.18 ॥

tataḥ punardvimātraṃ tu cintayāmāsa cākṣaram।
prādurbhūtaṃ ca raktaṃ tacchedane gṛhya sā yajuḥ ॥ 1.26.19 ॥

iṣe tvorjjetvā vāyavastha devo vaḥ savitā punaḥ।
ṛgveda ekamātrastu dvimātrantu yajuḥ smṛtam ॥ 1.26.20 ॥

tato vedaṃ dvimātraṃ tu dṛṣṭvā caiva tadakṣaram।
dvimātraṃ cintayan brahma tvakṣaraṃ punarīśvaraḥ ॥ 1.26.21 ॥

tasya cintayamānasya coṅkāraḥ sambabhūva ha।
tatastadakṣaraṃ brahmā oṅkāraṃ samacintayat ॥ 1.26.22 ॥

athāpaśyattataḥ pītāmṛcaṃ caiva samutthitām।
agna āyāhi vītaye gṛṇāno havyadātaye ॥ 1.26.23 ॥

tatastu sa mahātejā dṛṣṭvā vedānupasthitān।
cintayitvā ca bhagavāṃstrisandhyaṃ yatrrirakṣaram।
trivarṇaṃ yat triṣavaṇamoṅkāraṃ brahmasaṃjñitam ॥ 1.26.24 ॥

tataśvaiva trisaṃyogāt trivarṇaṃ tu tadakṣaram।
lakṣyālakṣyapradṛśyaṃ ca sahitaṃ tridivaṃ trikam ॥ 1.26.25 ॥

trimātraṃ tripadaṃ caiva triyogaṃ caiva śāśvatam।
tasmāttadakṣaraṃ brahmā cintayāmāsa vai prabhuḥ ॥ 1.26.26 ॥

tasmāttadakṣaraṃ so'tha brahmarūpaṃ svayambhuvaḥ।
caturddaśamukhaṃ devaṃ paśyate dīptatejasam।
tamoṅkāraṃ sa kṛtvādau vijñeyaḥ sa svayambhuvaḥ ॥ 1.26.27 ॥

caturmukhamukhāttasmādajāyanta caturddaśa।
nānāvarṇāḥ svarā divyamādyaṃ tacca tadakṣaram।
tasmāt triṣaṣṭivarṇā vai akāraprabhavāḥ smṛtāḥ ॥ 1.26.28 ॥

tataḥ sādhāraṇārthāya varṇānāntu svayambhuvaḥ।
akārarūpa ādau tu sthitaḥ sa prathamaḥ svaraḥ ॥ 1.26.29 ॥

tatastebhyaḥ svarebhyastu caturddaśa mahāmukhāḥ।
manavaḥ samprasūyante divyā manvantare svarāḥ ॥ 1.26.30 ॥

caturddaśamukho yaśca akāro brahmasaṃjñitaḥ।
brahmakalpaḥ samākhyātaḥ sarvavarṇaḥ prajāpatiḥ ॥ 1.26.31 ॥

mukhāttu prathamāttasya manuḥ svāyambhuvaḥ smṛtaḥ।
akārastu sa vijñeyaḥ śvetavarṇaḥ svayambhuvaḥ ॥ 1.26.32 ॥

dvitīyāttu mukhāttasya ākāro vai mukhaḥ smṛtaḥ।
nāmnā svārociṣo nāma varṇaḥ pāṇḍura ucyate ॥ 1.26.33 ॥

tṛtīyāttu mukhāttasya ikāro yajuṣāṃ varaḥ।
yajurmayaḥ sa cādityo yajurvedo yataḥ smṛtaḥ ॥ 1.26.34 ॥

īkāraḥ sa manurjñeyo raktavarṇaḥ pratāpavān।
tataḥ kṣatraṃ pravarttanta tasmādraktastu kṣatriyaḥ ॥ 1.26.35 ॥

caturthāttu mukhāttasya ukāraḥ svara ucyate।
varṇatastu smṛtastāmraḥ sa manustāmasaḥ smṛtaḥ ॥ 1.26.36 ॥

pañcamāttu mukhāttasya ūkāro nāma jāyate।
pītako varṇataścaiva manuścāpi cariṣṇavaḥ ॥ 1.26.37 ॥

tataḥ ṣaṣṭānmukhāttasya oṅkāraḥ kapilaḥ smṛtaḥ।
variṣṭhaśca tataḥ ṣaṣṭo vijayaḥ sa mahātapāḥ ॥ 1.26.38 ॥

saptamāttu mukhāttasya tato vaivasvato manuḥ।
ṛkāraśca svarastatra varṇataḥ kuṣṇa ucyate ॥ 1.26.39 ॥

aṣṭamāttu mukhāttasya ṝkāraḥ śyāmavarṇataḥ।
śyāmākṣarasavarṇaśca tataḥ sāvarṇirucyate ॥ 1.26.40 ॥

mukhāttu navamāttasya lṛkāro navamaḥ smṛtaḥ।
dhūmro vai varṇataścāpi dhūmrasva manurucyate ॥ 1.26.41 ॥

daśamāttu mukhāttasya lṛkāraḥ prabhurucyate।
samaścaiva savarṇaśca babhau sāvarṇiko manuḥ ॥ 1.26.42 ॥

mukhādekādaśāttasya ekāro manurucyate।
piśaṅgo varṇataścaiva piśaṅgo varṇa ucyate ॥ 1.26.43 ॥

dvādaśāttu mukhāttasya aikāro nāma ucyate।
piśaṅgo bhasmavarṇābhaḥ piśaṅgo manurucyate ॥ 1.26.44 ॥

trayodaśānmukhāttasya okāro varṇa ucyate।
pañcavarṇasamāyukta okāro varṇa uttamaḥ ॥ 1.26.45 ॥

caturddaśamukhāttasya aukāro varṇa ucyate।
karbūro varṇataścaiva manuḥ sāvarṇirucyate ॥ 1.26.46 ॥

ityete manavaścaiva svarā varṇāśca kalpataḥ।
vijñeyā hi yathātattvaṃ svarato varṇatastathā ॥ 1.26.47 ॥

parasparasavarṇāśca svarā yasmād vṛtā hi vai ।
tasmātteṣāṃ savarṇatvādanvayastu prakīrtitaḥ ॥ 1.26.48 ॥

savarṇāḥ sadṛśāścaiva yasmājjātāstu kalpajāḥ।
tasmāt prajānāṃ loke'smin savarṇāḥ sarvasandhayaḥ ॥ 1.26.49 ॥

bhaviṣyanti yathāśailaṃ varṇāśca nyāyato'rthataḥ।
abhyāsātsandhayaścaiva tasmājjñeyāḥ svarā iti ॥ 1.26.50 ॥

iti śrīmahāpurāṇe vāyuprokte svarotpattirnāma ṣaḍ‌viṃśo'dhyāyaḥ ।। 26 ।

## 1.27

।।ṛṣayaḥ ūcuḥ।।
asmin kalpe tvayā coktaḥ prādurbhāvo mahātmanaḥ।
mahādevasya rudrasya sādhakairmunibhiḥ saha ॥ 1.27.1 ॥

।।sūta uvāca।।
utpattirādisargasya mayā prokta samāsataḥ।
vistareṇāsya vakṣyāmi nāmāni tanubhiḥ saha ॥ 1.27.2 ॥

patnīṣu janayāmāsa mahādevaḥ sutān bahūn।
kalpe'ṣṭame vyatīte tu yasmin kalpe tu tacchṛṇu ॥ 1.27.3 ॥

kalpādau cātmānastulyaṃ sutaṃ pradhyāyataḥ prabhoḥ।
prādurāsīttatoṅke'sya kumāro nīlalohitaḥ।
taṃ dadhe susvaraṃ ghoraṃ nirdahanniva tejasā ॥ 1.27.4 ॥

dṛṣṭvā rudantaṃ sahasā kumāraṃ nīlalohitam।
vka rodiṣi kumāreti brahmā taṃ pratyabhāṣata ॥ 1.27.5 ॥

so'bravīddehi me nāma prathamaṃ vai pitāmaha।
rudrastvaṃ deva nāmnāsi ityuktaḥ so'rudatpunaḥ ॥ 1.27.6 ॥

ki rodiṣīti taṃ brahmā rudantaṃ punarabravīt ।
nāma dehi dvitīyaṃ me ityuvāca svayambhuvam ॥ 1.27.7 ॥

bhavastvaṃ deva nāmnāsi ṅtyuktaḥ so'rudatpunaḥ।
kiṃ rodiṣīti taṃ brahmā pratyuvācātha śaṅkaram ॥ 1.27.8 ॥

tṛtīyaṃ dehi me nāma ityuktaḥ pratyuvāca tam।
śivastvaṃ deva nāmnāsi ityuktaḥ pratyuvāca tam।
śivastvaṃ deva nāmnāsi ityuktaḥ so'rudatpunaḥ ॥ 1.27.9 ॥

kiṃ rodiṣīti taṃ brahmā rudantaṃ punarabravīt।
caturthaṃ dehi me nāma ityuvāca svayambhuvam ॥ 1.27.10 ॥

paśūnāṃ tvaṃ patirdeva ityuktaḥ so'rudatpunaḥ।
kiṃ rodiṣīti taṃ brahmā rudantaṃ punarabravīt ॥ 1.27.11 ॥

pañcamaṃ dehi me nāma ityuktaḥ pratyuvāca tam।
īśastvaṃ deva nāmnāsi ityuktaḥ so'rudatpunaḥ ॥ 1.27.12 ॥

kiṃ rodiṣīti taṃ brahmā rudantaṃ punarabravīt।
ṣaṣṭhaṃ me nāma dehīti ityuvācātha taṃ prabhum ॥ 1.27.13 ॥

bhīmastvaṃ deva nāmnāsi ityuktaḥ so'rudatpunaḥ ।
kiṃ rodiṣīti taṃ brahmā rudantaṃ punarabravīt ॥ 1.27.14 ॥

saptamaṃ dehi me nāma ityuktaḥ pratyuvāca tam।
ugrastvaṃ deva nāmnāsi ityuktaḥ so'rudatpunaḥ ॥ 1.27.15 ॥

kiṃ rodiṣīti taṃ brahmā rudantaṃ punarabravīt।
aṣṭhamaṃ dehi me nāma tvaṃ vibho punarabravīt।
mahādevastu nāmnāsi ityukto virarāma ha ॥ 1.27.16 ॥

labdhvā nāmāni caitāni brahmaṇo nīlalohitaḥ।
provāca nāmnāmeteṣāṃ bhūtāni pradiśeti ha ॥ 1.27.17 ॥

tato'bhiśṛṣṭāstanava eṣāṃ nāmnāṃ svayambhuvā।
sūryo mahī jalaṃ vahnirvāyurākāśameva ca ॥ 1.27.18 ॥

dīkṣito brahmaṇaścandra ityete brahmadhātavaḥ।
teṣu pūjyaśca vandyaḥ syādrudrastān hinasti vai ॥ 1.27.19 ॥

tato'bravīt punarbrahmā taṃ devaṃ nīlalohitam ।
dvitīyaṃ nāmadheyante mayā proktaṃ bhaveti yat।
etasyāpo dvitīyā te tanurnāmnā bhaviṣyati ॥ 1.27.20 ॥

ityukte yat sthiraṃ tasya śarīrasthaṃ rasātmakam।
tadviveśa tatastoyaṃ tasmādāpo bhavaḥ smṛtaḥ ॥ 1.27.21 ॥

yasmādbhavanti bhūtāni tābhyastā bhāvayanti ca।
bhavanādbhāvanāccaiva bhūtānāṃ sambhavaḥ smṛtaḥ ॥ 1.27.22 ॥

tasmānmūtraṃ purīṣañca nāpsu kurvīta sarvadā।
na snāyedapsu nagnaśca na niṣṭīvet kadācana ॥ 1.27.23 ॥

maithunaṃ naiva seveta śiraḥsnānañca varjayet।
na prītaḥ paricakṣīta vahanna saṃsthito'pi vā ॥ 1.27.24 ॥

medhyāmedhyaśarīratvānnaiva duṣyantyapaḥ kvacit ।
vivarṇarasagandhāśca alpāśca parivarjayet ॥ 1.27.25 ॥

apāṃ yoniḥ samudraśca tasmāttaṃ kāmayanti tāḥ।
medhyāścaivāmṛtāścaiva bhavanti prāpya sāgaram ॥ 1.27.26 ॥

tasmādapo na rundhīta samudraṃ kāmayanti tāḥ।
na hinasti bhavo devaḥ sadaivaṃ yo'psu varttate ॥ 1.27.27 ॥

tato'bravīt punarbrahmā taṃ devaṃ kṛṣṇalohitam।
śarvastvamiti yannāma tṛtīyaṃ samudāhṛtam।
tasya bhūmistṛtīyā tu tanurnāmnā bhavatviyam ॥ 1.27.28 ॥

ityukte yat sthiraṃ tasya śarīrasyāsthisaṃjñitam।
tadviveśa tato bhūmistasmādbhūḥ śarva ucyate ॥ 1.27.29 ॥

tasmāt kurvīta no vidvān purīṣammūtrameva vā।
na cchāyāyāṃ na sopāne svacchāyāṃ nāpi mehayet ॥ 1.27.30 ॥

śiraḥ prāpṛtya kurvīta antarddhāya tṛṇairmahīm।
ya evaṃ varttate bhūmau taṃ śarvo na hinasti vai ॥ 1.27.31 ॥

tato'bravītpunarbrahmā taṃ devaṃ nīlalohitam।
īśāna iti yat‌proktaṃ caturthaṃ nāma te mayā ॥ 1.27.32 ॥

caturthasya caturthī syādvāyurnāmnā tanustava।
ityukte yaccharīrasthaṃ pañcadhā prāṇasaṃjñitam ॥ 1.27.33 ॥

viveśa taṃ tadā vāyurīśāno vāyurucyate।
tasmādenaṃ parivadedāyataṃ vāyumīśvaram।
evaṃ yuktamatheśāno naiva devo hinasti tam ॥ 1.27.34 ॥

tato'bravīt punarbrahmā taṃ devaṃ dhūmralohitam।
yatte paśupatītyuktaṃ mayā nāmeha pañcamam।
pañcamī pañcamasyaiva tanurnāmnā'gnirastu te ॥ 1.27.35 ॥

ityukte yaccharīrasthaṃ tejastasyopasaṃjñitam।
viveśa tattadā hyagnistasmātpaśupatiḥ patiḥ ॥ 1.27.36 ॥

candramāstu smṛtaḥ somastasyātmā hyoṣadhīgaṇaḥ।
evaṃ yo varttate vidvān sadā parvaṇi parvaṇi।
na hanti taṃ mahādeva evaṃ vandeta taṃ prabhum ॥ 1.27.37 ॥

gopāyati divādityaḥ prajā naktantu candramāḥ।
ekarātre sameyātāṃ sūryyācandramasāvubhau।
amāvāsyāniśāyāntu tasyāṃ yuktaḥ sadā vaset ॥ 1.27.38 ॥

tatrāviṣṭaṃ sarvamidantanubhirnāmabhiḥ saha।
ekākī yaścaratyeṣaḥ sūryyā'sau candra ucyate ॥ 1.27.39 ॥

sūryyasya yat prakāśena vīkṣyante cakṣuṣā prajāḥ।
śuklātmā saṃsthito rudraḥ pibatyambho gabhastibhiḥ ॥ 1.27.40 ॥

adyate pīyate caivāpyannapānātmakāniyā।
tanurātmabhavā sā vai deheṣvevopacīyate ॥ 1.27.41 ॥
 yayā dhatte prajāḥ sarvāḥ sthirībhūtena cetasā।
pārthivī sā tanustasya śārvī dhārayati prajāḥ ॥ 1.27.42 ॥

yāvat sthitā śarīreṣu bhūtānāṃ prāṇavṛttibhiḥ।
vāyvātmikā tu aiśānī sā prāṇāḥ prāṇinā saha ॥ 1.27.43 ॥

pītāśitāni pacati bhūtānāṃ jaṭhareṣu yā।
tataḥ pāśupatī tasya pācikā śaktirucyate ॥ 1.27.44 ॥

yānīha suṣirāṇi syurdeheṣvantargatāni vai।
vāyoḥ sañcaraṇārthāya sā bhīmā cocyate tanuḥ ॥ 1.27.45 ॥

vaitānadīkṣitānāṃ tu yā sthitirbrahmavādinām।
tanurugrātmikā sā tu tenogro dīkṣitaḥ smṛtaḥ ॥ 1.27.46 ॥

yattu saṅkalpakaṃ tasya prajāsviha samaṃ sthitam।
sā tanurmmānasī tasya candramāḥ prāṇiṣu sthitaḥ ॥ 1.27.47 ॥

navo navo bhavati hi jāyamānaḥ punaḥ punaḥ।
nīyate yo yathākāmaṃ vibhudhaiḥ pitṛbhiḥ saha।
mahādevo'mṛtātmā'sau hyammayaścandramāḥ smṛtaḥ ॥ 1.27.48 ॥

tasya yā prathamā nāmnā tanū raudrī prakīrtitā।
patnī suvarcalā tasya putrastasyāḥ śanaiśvaraḥ ॥ 1.27.49 ॥

bhavasya yā dvitīyā tu tanurāpaḥ smṛtā tu vai ।
tasyo ṣā'tra smṛtā patnī putraścāpyuśanā smṛtaḥ ॥ 1.27.50 ॥

śarvasya yā tṛtīyā tu nāma bhūmistanuḥ smṛtā।
patnī tasya vikeśīti putraścāṅgārakaḥ smṛtaḥ ॥ 1.27.51 ॥

īśānasya caturthasya svargatasya ca yā tanuḥ।
tasya patnī śivā nāma putraścāsya manojavaḥ ॥ 1.27.52 ॥

nāmnā paśupateryā tu tanuragnirdvijaiḥ smṛtā।
tasya patnī smṛtā svāhā skandaścāpi sutaḥ smṛtaḥ ॥ 1.27.53 ॥

nāmnā ṣaṣṭhasya yā bhīmā tanurākāśa ucyate।
diśaḥ patnyaḥ smṛtāstasya svargaścāsya sutaḥ smṛtaḥ ॥ 1.27.54 ॥

ugrā tanuḥ saptamī yā dīkṣitairbrāhmaṇaiḥ smṛtā।
dīkṣā patnī smṛtā tasya santānaḥ putra ucyate ॥ 1.27.55 ॥

nāmnā'ṣṭamasya mahatastanuryā candramāḥ smṛtaḥ।
patnī tu rohiṇī tasya putraścāsya budhaḥ smṛtaḥ ॥ 1.27.56 ॥

ityetāstanavastasya nāmabhiḥ parikīrtitāḥ।
tāstu vandya namasyāśca pratināma tanūṣu vai ॥ 1.27.57 ॥

bhakteḥ sūrye'psu pṛthivyāṃ vāyvagnivyomadīkṣite।
tathā ca vai candramasi tanubhirnāmabhiḥ saha।
prajāvāneti sāyujyamīśvarasya naro hi saḥ ॥ 1.27.58 ॥

ityetadvo mayākhyātaṃ guhyaṃ bhīmasya tadyaśaḥ।
śanno'stu dvipade nityaṃ śanno'stu ca catuṣpade ॥ 1.27.59 ॥

etat proktaṃ nidānaṃ vastanūnāṃ nāmabhiḥ saha।
mahādevasya devasya bhṛgostu śrṛṇuta prajāḥ ॥ 1.27.60 ॥

iti śrīmahāpurāṇe vāyuprokte mahādevatanuvarṇanaṃ nāma saptaviśo'dhyāyaḥ ।। 27 ।

## 1.28

।।sūta uvāca।।
bhṛgoḥ khyātirvijajñe'tha īśvarau sukhaduḥkhayoḥ।
śubhāśubhapradātārau sarvaprāṇabhṛtāmiha।
devau dhātāvidhātārau manvantaravicāriṇau ॥ 1.28.1 ॥

tayorjyeṣṭā tu bhaginī devī śrīrlokabhāvinī।
sā tu nārāyaṇaṃ devaṃ patimāsādya śobhanam।
nārāyaṇātmajau sādhvī balotsāhau vyajāyata ॥ 1.28.2 ॥

tasyāstu mānasāḥ putrā ye cānye divyacāriṇaḥ।
ye vahanti vimānāni devānāṃ puṇyakarmaṇām ॥ 1.28.3 ॥

dve tu kanye smṛte bhāryye vidhāturdhātureva ca।
āyatirniyatiścaiva tayoḥ putrau dṛḍhavratau ॥ 1.28.4 ॥

pāṇḍuścaiva mṛkaṇḍuśca brahmakośau sanātanau।
manasvinyāṃ mṛkaṇjośca mārkkaṇḍeyo babhūva ha ॥ 1.28.5 ॥

suto ve daśirāstasya mūrddhanyāyāmajāyata।
pīvaryyāṃ vedaśirasaḥ putrā vaṃśakarāḥ smṛtāḥ।
mārkkaṇḍeyā iti khyātā ṛṣayo vedapāragāḥ ॥ 1.28.6 ॥

pāṇḍośca puṇḍarīkāyāṃ dyutimānātmajo'bhavat।
utpannau dyutimantaśca sṛjavānaśca tāvubhau।
tayoḥ putrāśca pautrāśca bhārgavāṇāṃ parasparam।
svāyambhuve'ntare'tīte marīceḥ śrṛṇuta prajāḥ ॥ 1.28.7 ॥

patnī marīceḥ sambhūtirvijajñe sātmasambhavam।
prajāyate pūrṇamāsaṃ kanyāśvemā vibodhata।
kuṣṭiḥ pṛṣṭistviṣā caiva tathā cāpacitiḥ śubhā ॥ 1.28.8 ॥

pūrṇamāsaḥ sarasvatyāṃ dvau putrāvudapādayat।
virajañcaiva dharmiṣṭhaṃ parvvasañcaiva tāvubhau ॥ 1.28.9 ॥

virajasyātmajo vidvān sudhāmā nāma viśrutaḥ।
sudhāmasutavairājaḥ prācyāndiśi samamāśritaḥ ॥ 1.28.10 ॥

lokapālaḥ sudharmmātmā gaurīputraḥ pratāpavān ।
parvasaḥ sarvagaṇānāṃ praviṣṭaḥ sa mahāyaśāḥ ॥ 1.28.11 ॥

parvasaḥ parvasāyāntu janayāmāsa vai sutau।
yajñavāmañca śrīmantaṃ sutaṃ kāśyapameva ca।
tayorgotrakarau putrau tau jātau dharmaniśvitau ॥ 1.28.12 ॥

smṛtiśvāṅgirasaḥ patnī jajñe tāvātmasambhavau।
putrau kanyāśvatasraśca puṇyāstā lokaviśrutāḥ ॥ 1.28.13 ॥

sinīvālī kuhūścaiva rākā cānumatistathā।
tathaiva bharatāgniñca kīrttimantañca tāvubhau ॥ 1.28.14 ॥

agneḥ putrantu parjanyaṃ saṃhūtī suṣuve prabhum।
hiraṇyaromā parjanyo mārīcyāmudapādayat।
ābhūtasaṃplavasthāyī lokapālaḥ savai smṛtaḥ ॥ 1.28.15 ॥

jajñe kīrtimataścāpi dhenukā tāvakalmaṣau।
variṣṭhaṃ dhṛtimantañcāpyubhāvaṅgirasāṃ varau ॥ 1.28.16 ॥

tayoḥ putrāśca pautrāśca ye'tītā vai sahasraśaḥ।
anasūyāpi jajñe tān pulahasya prajāpateḥ ॥ 1.28.17 ॥

kanyāñcaiva śrutiṃ nāma mātā śaṅkhapadasya yā।
kardamasya tu yā patnī pulahasya prajāpateḥ ॥ 1.28.18 ॥

satyanetraśca havyaśca āpomūrtiḥ śanīvaraḥ।
somaśca pañcamasteṣāmāsīt svāyambhuve'ntare।
yāme'tīte sahātītāḥ pañcātreyāḥ prakīrtitāḥ ॥ 1.28.19 ॥

teṣāṃ putrāśca pautrāśca hyatriṇā vai mahātmanā।
svāyambhuve'ntare yāme śataśo'tha sahasraśaḥ ॥ 1.28.20 ॥

prītyāṃ pulastyabhāryāyāṃ dattālistatsūto'bhavat।
pūrvajanmani so'gastyaḥ smṛtaḥ svāyambhuve'ntare।
madhyamo devabāhuśca vinīto nāma te trayaḥ ॥ 1.28.21 ॥

svasā yavīyasī teṣāṃ sadvatī nāma viśrutā।
parjanyajananī śubhrā patnī tvagneḥ smṛtā śubhā
paulastyasya ṛṣeścāpi prītiputrasya dhīmataḥ।
dattāleḥ suṣuve patnī sujaṅghādīn bahūn sutān।
paulastyā iti vikhyātāḥ smṛtāḥ svāyambhuve'ntare ॥ 1.28.22 ॥

kṣamā tu suṣuve putrān pulahasya prajāpateḥ।
te nāgnivarcasaḥ sarve yeṣāṃ kīrtiḥ pratiṣṭitā ॥ 1.28.23 ॥

kardamaścāmbarīṣaśca sahiṣṇuśceti te trayaḥ ।
ṛṣirdhanakapīvāṃśca śubhā kanyā ca pīvarī ॥ 1.28.24 ॥

kardamasya śrutiḥ patnī ātreyya janayatsutān।
putraṃ śaṅkhapadañcaiva kanyāṃ kāmyāṃ tathaiva ca ॥ 1.28.25 ॥

sa vai śahkhapadaḥ śrīmān lokapālaḥ prajāpatiḥ।
dakṣiṇasyāṃ diśi rataḥ sāmyāṃ dattvā priyavrate ॥ 1.28.26 ॥

kāmyā priyavratāllebhe svāyambhuvasamān sutān।
daśakanyādvayañcaiva yaiḥ kṣatraṃ sampravartitam ॥ 1.28.27 ॥

putro dhanakapīvāṃśca sahiṣṇurnāma viśrutaḥ।
yaśodhārī vijajñe vai kāmadevaḥ sumadhyamaḥ ॥ 1.28.28 ॥

ṛtoḥ kratusamaḥ putro vijajñe santatiḥ śubhā।
naiṣāṃ bhāryasti putro vā sarve te hyūrddhva retasaḥ।
ṣaṣṭyetāni sahasrāṇi vālakhilyā iti śrutāḥ ॥ 1.28.29 ॥

aruṇasyāgrato yānti parivārya divākaram।
ābhūtasaṃplavātsarve pataṅgasahacāriṇaḥ ॥ 1.28.30 ॥

svasārau tu yavīyasyau puṇyātmasumatī ca te।
parvasasya snuṣe te vai pūrṇamāsasutasya vai ॥ 1.28.31 ॥

ūrjāyāntu vasiṣṭhasya putrā vai sapta jajñire।
jyāyasī ca svasā teṣāṃ puṇḍarīkā sumadhyamā ॥ 1.28.32 ॥

jananī sā dyutimataḥ pāṇḍostu mahiṣī priyā ।
asyāṃ tvime yavīyāṃso vāsiṣṭāḥ sapta viśrutāḥ ॥ 1.28.33 ॥

rajaḥ putro'rddhabāhuśca savanaścādhanaśca yaḥ।
sutapāḥ śukla ityete sarve saptarṣayaḥ smṛtāḥ ॥ 1.28.34 ॥

rajaso vāpyajanayanmārkaṇḍeyī yaśasvinī।
pratīcyāṃ diśi rājanyaṃ ketumantaṃ prajāpatim ॥ 1.28.35 ॥

gotrāṇi nāmabhisteṣāṃ vāsiṣṭānāṃ mahātmanām।
svāyambhuventare'tītāstvagnestu śrṛṇuta prajāḥ ॥ 1.28.36 ॥

ityeṣa ṛṣisargastu sānubandhaḥ prakīrttitaḥ।
vistareṇānupūrvyā cāpyagnestu śrṛṇuta prajāḥ ॥ 1.28.37 ॥

iti śrīmahāpurāṇe vāyuprokte ṛṣivaṃśānukīrttanaṃ nāmāṣṭāviṃśo'dhyāyaḥ ।। 28 ।

## 1.29

yo'sāvagnirabhimānī hyāsīt svāyambhuve'ntare।
brahmaṇo mānasaḥ putrastasmātsvāhā vyajāyata ॥ 1.29.1 ॥
pāvakaḥ pavamānaśca pāvamānaśca yaḥ smṛtaḥ।
śuciḥ śaurastu vijñeyaḥ svāhāputrāstrayastu te ॥ 1.29.2 ॥
nirmmathya pavamānastu śuciḥ śaurastu yaḥ smṛtaḥ.
pāvakā vaidyutāścaiva teṣāṃ sthānāni yāni vai ॥ 1.29.3 ॥
pavamānātmajaścaiva kavyavāhana ucyate।
pāvakāt saharakṣastu havyavāhaḥ śuceḥ sutaḥ ॥ 1.29.4 ॥
devānāṃ havyavāho'gniḥ pitṝṇāṃ kavyavāhanaḥ।
saharakṣo'surāṇāntu trayāṇāntu trayo'gnayaḥ ॥ 1.29.5 ॥
eteṣāṃ putrapautrāstu catvāriṃśannavaiva tu।
vakṣyāmi nāmatasteṣāṃ pravibhāgaṃ pṛthak pṛthak ॥ 1.29.6 ॥
vaidyuto laukikāgnistu prathamo brahmaṇaḥ sutaḥ।
brahmaudanāgnistatputro bharato nāma viśrutaḥ ॥ 1.29.7 ॥
atharvā tu bhṛgurjñeyo'pyaṅgirā'tharvaṇaḥ sutaḥ।
tasmāt sa laukikāgnistu dadhyaṅcātharvaṇaḥ sutaḥ ॥ 1.29.8 ॥
atha yaḥ pavamāno'gnirnirmanthāḥ kavibhiḥ smṛtaḥ।
sa jñeyo gārhapatyo'gnistataḥ putradvayaṃ smṛtam ॥ 1.29.9 ॥
śaṃsyastvāhavanīyo'gniryaḥ smṛto havyavāhanaḥ।
dvitīyastu sutaḥ proktaḥ śukro'gniryaḥ praṇīyate ॥ 1.29.10 ॥
tathā sabhyāvasathyau vai śaṃsyasyāgneḥ sutāvubhau।
śaṃsyāstu ṣoḍaśa nadīśvakame havyavāhanaḥ।
yo'sāvāhavanīyo'gnirabhimānī dvijaiḥ smṛtaḥ ॥ 1.29.11 ॥
kāverīṃ kṛṣṇaveṇīñca narmadāṃ yamunāntathā।
godāvarīṃ vitastāñca candrabhāgāmirāvatīm ॥ 1.29.12 ॥
vipāśāṃ kauśikīñcaiva śatadruṃ sarayūntathā।
sītāṃ sarasvatīñcaiva hrādinīṃ pāvanīṃ tathā ॥ 1.29.13 ॥
tāsu ṣoḍaśadhātmānaṃ pravibhajya pṛthak pṛthak ।
ātmānaṃ vyadadhāttāsu dhiṣṇīṣvatha babhūva saḥ ॥ 1.29.14 ॥
dhiṣṇayo divyabhicāriṇyastāsūtpannāstu dhiṣṇayaḥ।
dhiṣṇīṣu jajñire yasmāddhiṣṇayastena kīrttitāḥ ॥ 1.29.15 ॥
ityete vai nadīputrā dhiṣṇīṣveva vijajñire।
teṣāṃ viharaṇīyā ye upastheyāśca ye'gnayaḥ।
tān śrṛṇudhvaṃ samāsena kīrtyamānān yathā tathā ॥ 1.29.16 ॥
ṛtuḥ pravāhaṇo'gnīdhraḥ purastāddhiṣṇayo'paro। tu. śuklayajurvedaḥ 5.31, brahmāṇḍapurāṇam 1.2.12.27
vidhīyante yathāsthānaṃ sautye'hni savanakramāt ॥ 1.29.17 ॥
anirddeśyānyavācyānāmagnīnāṃ śrṛṇuta kramam।
samrāḍagniḥ kṛśānuryo dvitīyottaravedikaḥ ॥ 1.29.18 ॥
samrāḍagniḥ smṛtā hyaṣṭau upatiṣṭhanti tān dvijāḥ.
adhastātparṣadanyastu dvitīyaḥ so'tra dṛśyate ॥ 1.29.19 ॥
pratadvoce nabho nāma catvāri sa vibhāvyate।
brahmajyotirvasurnāma brahmasthāne sa ucyate ॥ 1.29.20 ॥
havyasūryyādyasaṃsṛṣṭaḥ śāmitre sa vibhāvyate।
viśvasyātha samudrognirbrahmasthāne sa kīrttyate ॥ 1.29.21 ॥
ṛtudhāmā ca sujyotiraudumbaryyāṃ sa kīrttyate।
brahmajyotirvasurnāma brahmasthāne sa ucyate ॥ 1.29.22 ॥
ajaikapādupastheyaḥ sa vai śālāmukhīyakaḥ।
anuddeśyopyahirbudhnyaḥ so'gnirgṛhapatiḥ smṛtaḥ ॥ 1.29.23 ॥
śasyasyaiva sutāḥ sarvve upastheyā dvijaiḥ smṛtāḥ।
tato viharaṇīyāṃśca vakṣyāmyaṣṭau tu tatsutān ॥ 1.29.24 ॥
kratupravāhaṇo'gnīdhrastatrasthā dhiṣṇayo'pare।
vihriyante yathāsthānaṃ sautyohni savanakramāt ॥ 1.29.25 ॥ tu. brahmāṇḍapurāṇam 1.2.12.27, vājasaneyi saṃhitā 5.31
pautreyastu tato hyagniḥ smṛto yo havyavāhanaḥ।
śāntisvāgniḥ pracetāstu dvitīyaḥ satya ucyate ॥ 1.29.26 ॥
tathāgnirviśvadevastu brahmasthāne sa ucyate।
avakṣuracchāvākastu buvaḥ sthāne vibhāvyate ॥ 1.29.27 ॥
uśīrāgniḥ savīryastu naiṣṭīyaḥ saṃvibhāvyate।
aṣṭamastu vyarattistu mārjālīyaḥ prakīrttitaḥ ॥ 1.29.28 ॥
dhiṣṇyā viharaṇīyā ye saumyenānyena caiva hi।
tayoryaḥ pāvako nāma sa cāpāṃ garbha ucyate ॥ 1.29.29 ॥
agniḥ so'vabhṛtho jñeyaḥ samyak prāpyāpsu hūyate।
hṛcchayastatsuto hyagnirjaṭhare yo nṛṇāṃ sthitaḥ ॥ 1.29.30 ॥
manyumān jāṭharasyāgnervidvānagniḥ sutaḥ smṛtaḥ।
parasparocchritaḥ so'gnirbhūtānāṃ ha vibhurmahān ॥ 1.29.31 ॥
putraḥ so'gnermanyumato ghoraḥ saṃvarttakaḥ smṛtaḥ ।
pibannapaḥ sa vasati samudre vaḍhavāmukhaḥ ॥ 1.29.32 ॥
samudra vāsinaḥ putraḥ saharakṣo vibhāvyate।
saharakṣasutaḥ kṣāmo gṛhāṇi sa dahennṝṇām ॥ 1.29.33 ॥
kravyādo'gniḥ sutastasya puruṣānatti yo mṛtān ।
ityete pāvakasyāgneḥ putrā hyevaṃ prakīrtitāḥ ॥ 1.29.34 ॥
tataḥ śucestu yaiḥ saurergandharvairasurāvṛtaiḥ।
mathito yastvaraṇyāṃ vai so'gniragniḥ samidhyate ॥ 1.29.35 ॥
āyurnāmātha bhagavān paśau yastu praṇīyate।
āyuṣo mahimān putraḥ sa śāvānnāmataḥ sutaḥ ॥ 1.29.36 ॥
pākayajñeṣvabhimānī so'gnistu savanaḥ smṛtaḥ।
putraśca savanasyāgneradbhutaḥ sa mahāyaśāḥ ॥ 1.29.37 ॥
vivicistvadbhutasyāpi putro'gneḥ sa mahān smṛtaḥ।
prāyaścitte'tha bhīmānāṃ hutaṃ bhuhkte haviḥ sadā ॥ 1.29.38 ॥
vivicestu suto hyarko yo'gnistasya sutāstvime।
anīkavān vāsṛjavāṃśca rakṣohā pitṛkṛttathā।
surabhirvasuratnādau praviṣṭo yaśca rukmavān ॥ 1.29.39 ॥
śuceragneḥ prajā vahnayastu caturddaśa।
ityete vahnayaḥ proktāḥ praṇīyante'dhvareṣu ye ॥ 1.29.40 ॥
ādisarge hyatītā vai yāmaiḥ saha surottamaiḥ।
svāyambhu ve'ntare pūrvamagnayaste'bhimāninaḥ ॥ 1.29.41 ॥
ete viharaṇīyāstu cetanācetaneṣviha।
sthānābhimānino loke prāgāsan havyavāhanāḥ ॥ 1.29.42 ॥
kāmyanaimittikājasreṣvete karmasvavasthitāḥ।
pūrvamanvantare'tīte śuklairyāmaiḥ sutaiḥ saha।
devairmahātmabhiḥ puṇyaiḥ prathamasyāntare manoḥ ॥ 1.29.43 ॥
ityetāni mayoktāni sthānāni sthāninaśca ha ।
taireva tu prasaṅkhyātamatītānāgateṣvapi ॥ 1.29.44 ॥
manvantareṣu sarveṣu lakṣaṇaṃ jātavedasām।
sarve tapasvino hyete sarve hyavabhṛthā stathā।
prajānāṃ patayaḥ sarve jyotiṣmantaśca te smṛtāḥ ॥ 1.29.45 ॥
svārociṣādiṣu jñeyāḥ sāvarṇyanteṣu saptasu।
manvantareṣu sarveṣu nānārūpaprayojanaiḥ ॥ 1.29.46 ॥
varttante varttamānaiśca devairiha sahāgnayaḥ।
anāgataiḥ suraiḥ sārddhaṃ varttante'nāgatāgnayaḥ ॥ 1.29.47 ॥
ityeṣa ninayo'gnīnāṃ mayā prokto yathātatham।
vistareṇānupūrvyā ca pitṝṇāṃ vakṣyate tataḥ ॥ 1.29.48 ॥

iti śrīmahāpurāṇe vāyuprokte agnivaṃśavarṇanaṃ nāmonatriṃśo'dhyāyaḥ ।। 29 ।

## 1.30

।।sūta uvāca।।
brahmaṇaḥ sṛjataḥ putrān pūrve svāyambhuve'ntare।
ambhāṃsi jajñire tāni manuṣyāsuradevatāḥ ॥ 1.30.1 ॥
pitṛvanmanyamānasya jajñire pitaro'sya vai।
teṣānnisargaḥ prāgukto vistarastasya vakṣyate ॥ 1.30.2 ॥
devāsuramanuṣyāṇāṃ dṛṣṭvā devo'bhyabhāṣata।
pitṛvanmanyamānasya jajñire vopayakṣitāḥ ॥ 1.30.3 ॥
madhvādayaḥ ṣaḍṛtavastān pitṝn paricakṣate।
ṛtavaḥ pitaro devā ityeṣā vaidikī śrutiḥ ॥ 1.30.4 ॥
manvantareṣu sarveṣu hyatītānāgateṣvapi।
ete svāyambhuve pūrvamutpannā hyantare śubhe ॥ 1.30.5 ॥
agniṣvāttāḥ smṛtā nāmnā tathā barhiṣadaśca vai।
ayajvānastathā teṣāmāsan vai gṛhamedhinaḥ।
agniṣvāttāḥ smṛtāste vai pitaro'nāhitāgnayaḥ ॥ 1.30.6 ॥
yajvānasteṣu ye hyāsan pitaraḥ somapīthinaḥ।
smṛtā barhiṣadaste vai pitarastvagnihotriṇaḥ।
ṛtavaḥ pitaro devāḥ śāstre'sminniścayo mataḥ ॥ 1.30.7 ॥
madhumādhavau rasau jñeyau śuciśukrau tu śuṣmiṇau।
nabhaścaiva nabhastaśca jīvāvetāvudāhṛtau ॥ 1.30.8 ॥
iṣaścaiva tathorjaśca sudhāvantāvudāhṛtau।
sahaścaiva sahasyaśca manyumantau tu tau smṛtau।
tapaścaiva tapasyaśca ghorāvetau tu śaiśirau ॥ 1.30.9 ॥
kālāvasthāstu ṣaṭ teṣāmmāsākhyā vai vyavasthitāḥ।
ta ime ṛtavaḥ proktāścetanācetanāstu vai ॥ 1.30.10 ॥
ṛtavo brahmaṇaḥ putrā vijñeyāste'bhimāninaḥ।
māsārddhamāsasthāneṣu sthānañca ṛtavorttavāḥ ॥ 1.30.11 ॥
sthānānāṃ vyatirekeṇa jñeyāḥ sthānābhimāninaḥ।
ahorātrañca māsāśca ṛtavaścāyanāni ca ॥ 1.30.12 ॥
saṃvatsarāśca sthānāni kālāvasthābhimāninaḥ।
nimeṣāśca kalāḥ kāṣṭā muhūrttā vai dinakṣapāḥ ॥ 1.30.13 ॥
eteṣu sthānino ye tu kālāvasthāsvavasthitāḥ।
tanmayatvāttadātmānastān vakṣyāmi nibodhata ॥ 1.30.14 ॥
parvvaṇyāstithayaḥ sandhyāḥ pakṣā māsārddhasaṃjñitāḥ।
dvāvarddhamāsau māsastu dvau māsāvṛturucyate ॥ 1.30.15 ॥
ṛtutrayaṃ cāyanaṃ dve ayane dakṣiṇottare ।
saṃvatsaraḥ sumekastu sthānānyetāni sthāninām ॥ 1.30.16 ॥
ṛtavaḥ sumekaputrā vijñeyā hyaṣṭadhā tu ṣaṭ।
ṛtuputrāḥ smṛtāḥ pañca prajāstvārttavalakṣaṇāḥ ॥ 1.30.17 ॥
yasmāccaivārttaveyāstu jāyante sthāṇujaṅgamāḥ।
ārttavāḥ pitaraścaiva ṛtavaśca pitāmahāḥ ॥ 1.30.18 ॥
sumekāttu prasūyante mriyante ca prajātayaḥ।
tasmāt smṛtaḥ prajānāṃ vai sumekaḥ prapitāmahaḥ ॥ 1.30.19 ॥
sthāneṣu sthānino hyete sthānātmānaḥ prakīrtitāḥ।
tadākhyāstanmayatvācca tadātmanaśca te smṛtāḥ ॥ 1.30.20 ॥
prajāpatiḥ smṛto yastu sa tu saṃvatsaro mataḥ।
saṃvatsaraḥ smṛto hyagniḥ ṛtamityucyate dvajaiḥ ॥ 1.30.21 ॥
ṛtāttu ṛtavo yasmājjajñire ṛtavastataḥ।
māsāḥ ṣaḍṛtavo jñeyāsteṣāṃ pañcārttavāḥ sutāḥ ॥ 1.30.22 ॥
dvipadāñcatuṣpadāñcaiva pakṣisaṃsarpatāmapi।
sthāvarāṇāṃ ca pañcānāṃ puṣpaṃ kālārttavaṃ smṛtam ॥ 1.30.23 ॥
ṛtutvamārttavatvañca pitṛtvañca prakīrtitam।
ityete pitaro jñeyā ṛtavaścārttavāśca ye ॥ 1.30.24 ॥
sarvabhūtāni tebhyo'tha ṛtukālādvijajñire।
tasmādete'pi pitara ārttavā iti naḥ śrutam ॥ 1.30.25 ॥
manvantareṣu sarveṣu sthitāḥ kālābhimāninaḥ।
sthānābhimānino hyete tiṣṭhantīha prasaṃyamāt ॥ 1.30.26 ॥
agniṣvāttā barhiṣadaḥ pitaro dvividhāḥ smṛtāḥ।
jajñāte ca pitṛbhyastu dve kanye lokaviśrute ॥ 1.30.27 ॥
menā ca dhāriṇī caiva yābhyāṃ viśvamidaṃ dhṛtam।
pitaraste nije kanye dharmārthaṃ pradaduḥ śubhe।
ta ubhe vrahmavādinyau yoginyau caiva te ubhe ॥ 1.30.28 ॥
agniṣvāttāstu ye proktāsteṣāṃ menā tu mānasī।
dhāraṇī mānasī caiva kanyā barhiṣadāṃ smṛtā ॥ 1.30.29 ॥
merostu dhāraṇīṃ nāma patnyarthaṃ vyasṛjan śubhām।
pitaraste barhiṣadaḥ smṛtā ye somapīthinaḥ ॥ 1.30.30 ॥
agniṣvāttāstu tāṃ menāṃ patnīṃ himavate daduḥ।
smṛtāste vai tu dauhitrāstaddauhitrān nibodhata ॥ 1.30.31 ॥
menā himavataḥ patnī mainākaṃ sānvasūyata।
gaṅgā saridvarā caiva patnī yā lavaṇo dadheḥ।
mainākasyānujaḥ krauñcaḥ krauñcadvīpo yataḥ smṛtaḥ ॥ 1.30.32 ॥
merostu dhāraṇī patnī divyauṣadhisamanvitam।
mandaraṃ suṣuve putraṃ tisraḥ kanyāśca viśrutāḥ ॥ 1.30.33 ॥
velā ca niyatiścaiva tṛtīyā cāyatiḥ punaḥ।
dhātuścaivāyatiḥ patnī vidhāturniyatiḥ smṛtā ॥ 1.30.34 ॥
svāyambhuve'ntare pūrvantayorvai kīrtitāḥ prajāḥ।
suṣuve sāgarādvelā kanyāmekāmaninditām ॥ 1.30.35 ॥
sāvarṇinā ca sāmudrī patnī prācīnabarhiṣaḥ।
savarṇā sātha sāmudrī daśaprācīnabarhiṣaḥ।
sarve pracetaso nāma dhanurvedasya pāragāḥ ॥ 1.30.36 ॥
teṣāṃ svāyambhuvau dakṣaḥ putratve jajñivān prabhuḥ।
tryambakasyābhiśāpena cākṣuṣasyāntare manoḥ ॥ 1.30.37 ॥
etacchutvā tataḥ sūtamapṛcchacchāṃśapāyanaḥ।
utpannaḥ sa kathaṃ dakṣo hyabhiśāpādbhavasya tu।
cākṣuṣasyānvaye pūrvaṃ tannaḥ prabrūhi pṛcchatām ॥ 1.30.38 ॥
ityuktaḥ kathayāmāsa sūto dakṣāśritāṃ kathām।
śāṃśapāyanamāmantrya tryambakācchāpakāraṇam ॥ 1.30.39 ॥
dakṣasyāsan sutā hyaṣṭau kanyā yāḥ kīrtitā mayā।
svebyo gṛhebhyo hyānāyya tāḥ pitābhyarccayadgṛhe।
tatastvabhyarcitāḥ sarvā nyavasaṃstāḥ piturgṛhe ॥ 1.30.40 ॥
tāsāṃ jyeṣṭā satī nāma patnī yā tryambakasya vai।
nājuhāvātmajāṃ tāṃ vai dakṣo rudramabhidviṣan ॥ 1.30.41 ॥
akarotsa natiṃ dakṣe na kadācinmaheśvaraḥ।
jāmātā śvaśure tasmin svabhāvāt tejasi sthitaḥ ॥ 1.30.42 ॥
tato jñātvā satī sarvāḥ svasraḥ prāptāḥ pitṝgṛham।
jagāma sāpyanāhūtā satī tat svaṃ piturgṛham ॥ 1.30.43 ॥
tato'bravīt sā pitaraṃ devī krodhādamarṣitā।
yavīyasībyo jyāyasīṃ kintu pūjāmimāṃ prabho।
asammatāmavajñāya kṛtavānasi garhitām ॥ 1.30.44 ॥
ahaṃ jyeṣṭā variṣṭā hi na tvasat karttumarhasi।
evamukto'bravīdenāṃ dakṣaḥ saṃraktalocanaḥ ॥ 1.30.45 ॥
tvantu śreṣṭha variṣṭā ca pūjyā bālā sadā mama।
tāsāṃ ye caiva bharttāraste me bahumatāḥ sadā ॥ 1.30.46 ॥
brahnamaṣṭāśca tapiṣṭāśca mahāyogāḥ sudhārmikāḥ।
guṇaiścaivādhikāḥ ślāghyāḥ sarve te tryambakātsati ॥ 1.30.47 ॥
vasiṣṭo'triḥ pulastyaśca aṅgirāḥ pulahaḥ kratuḥ।
bhṛgurmarīciśca tathā śreṣṭā jāmātaro mama ॥ 1.30.48 ॥
tasyātmā sa ca te śarvo bhaktā cāsi hi taṃ sadā।
tena tvāṃ na bubhūṣāmi pratikūlo hi me bhavaḥ ॥ 1.30.49 ॥
ityuvāca tadā dakṣaḥ saṃpramūḍhena cetasā।
śāpārthamātmanaścaiva ye coktāḥ paramarṣayaḥ ॥ 1.30.50 ॥
tathoktā pitaraṃ sā vai kruddhā devīdamabravīt ।
vāṅmanaḥkarmabhiryasmādaduṣṭāṃ māṃ vigarhase।
tasmāttyajāmyahandehamidantāta tavātmajam ॥ 1.30.51 ॥
tatastenāvamānena satī duḥkhādamarṣitā।
abravīdvacanaṃ tevī namaskṛtya maheśvaram ॥ 1.30.52 ॥
yatrāhamupapatsyehaṃ punardehena bhāsvatā।
tatrāpyahamasaṃmūḍhā sambhūtā dhārmikī punaḥ।
gaccheyaṃ dharmapatnītvaṃ tryambakasyaiva dharmataḥ ॥ 1.30.53 ॥
tatraivātha samāsīnā yuktātmānaṃ samādadhe।
dhārayāmāsa cāgneyīṃ dhāraṇāṃ manasātmanaḥ ॥ 1.30.54 ॥
tata āgneyīsamutthena vāyunā samudīritaḥ।
sarvāṅgebhyo viniḥ sṛtya vahnirbhasma cakāra tām ॥ 1.30.55 ॥
tadupaśrutya nidhanaṃ satyā devo'tha śūladhṛk।
saṃvādañca tayorbuddhvā yāthātathyena śaṅkaraḥ।
dakṣasyātha ṛṣīṇāñca cukopa bhagavān prabhuḥ ॥ 1.30.56 ॥
yasmādavamatā dakṣa matkṛte māna sā satī।
praśastāścetarāḥ sarvāḥ svasutā bhartṛbhiḥ saha ॥ 1.30.57 ॥
tasmādvaivasvataṃ prāpya punareva maharṣayaḥ।
utpatsyante dvitīye vai mama yajñe hyayonijāḥ ॥ 1.30.58 ॥
hute vai brahmaṇā śukte cākṣuṣasyāntare manoḥ।
abhivyāhṛtya ca ṛṣīn dakṣamabhyagamat punaḥ ॥ 1.30.59 ॥
bhavitā cākṣuṣo rājā cāśruṣasya samanvaye।
prācīnabarhiṣaḥ pautraḥ putraścaiva pracetasaḥ ॥ 1.30.60 ॥
dakṣa ityeva nāmnā tvaṃ mārṣāyāṃ janayiṣyasi।
kanyāyāṃ śākhināñcaiva prāpte vai cākṣuṣe'ntare ॥ 1.30.61 ॥
।।dakṣa uvāca।।
ahaṃ tatrāpi te vighnamācariṣyāmi durmate।
dharmārthakāmayukteṣu karmasviha punaḥ punaḥ ॥ 1.30.62 ॥
yasmāt tvaṃ matkṛte krūramṛṣīn vyāhṛtavānasi।
tasmātsārddhaṃ surairyajñe na tvāṃ yakṣyanti vai dvijāḥ ॥ 1.30.63 ॥
hutvāhutiṃ tataḥ krūraḥ apastyakṣyanti karmasu।
ihaiva vatsyasi tathā divaṃ hitvā yugakṣayāt ॥ 1.30.64 ॥
।।rudra uvāca।।
sarveṣāmeva lokānāṃ bhūrlokastvādirucyate।
tamahaṃ dhārayiṣyāmi nideśāt parameṣṭinaḥ ॥ 1.30.65 ॥
asyāṃ kṣitau vṛtā lokāḥ sarve tiṣṭhanti bhāskarāḥ।
tānahaṃ dhārayāmīha satataṃ na tavājñayā ॥ 1.30.66 ॥
cāturvarṇyaṃ hi devānāṃ te cāpyekatra bhuñjate।
nāhaṃ taiḥ saha bhokṣyāmi tato dāsyanti te pṛthak।
tato devaiḥ sa taiḥ sārddhaṃ nejyate pṛthagijyate ॥ 1.30.67 ॥
tato'bhivyāhṛto dakṣo rudreṇāmitatejasā।
svāyambhuve'ntare tyaktvā utpanno mānuṣeṣviha ॥ 1.30.68 ॥
jñātvā gṛhapatiṃ dakṣaṃ jñānānāmīśvaraṃ prabhum।
dakṣo nāma mahāyajñaiḥ so'yajaddaivataiḥ saha ॥ 1.30.69 ॥
atha devī satī yā tu prāpte vaivasvate'ntare।
maināyāṃ tāmumāṃ devīṃ janayāmāsa śailarāṭ ॥ 1.30.70 ॥
sā tu devī satī pūrvaṃ tataḥ paścādumā'bhavat।
saha vratā bhavasyaiṣā na tayā mucyate bhavaḥ।
yāvadicchati saṃsthātuṃ prabhurmanvantareṣviha ॥ 1.30.71 ॥
mārīcaṃ kaśyapaṃ devī yathāhitiranuvratā।
sādhyaṃ nārāyaṇaṃ śrīstu maghavantaṃ śacī yathā ॥ 1.30.72 ॥
viṣṇuṃ kīrtī ruciḥ sūryaṃ vasiṣṭhañcāpyarūndhatī।
naitāstu vijahatyetān bhartṝn devyaḥ kathaṃcana।
āvarttamānakalpeṣu punarjāyanti taiḥ saha ॥ 1.30.73 ॥
evaṃ prācetaso dakṣo jajñe vai cākṣuṣe'ntare।
prācīnabarhiṣaḥ pautraḥ putraścaiva pracetasaḥ ॥ 1.30.74 ॥
daśabhyastu pracetobhyo mārṣāyāñca punarnṛpaḥ।
jajñe rudrābhiśāpena dvitīye'sminniti śrutiḥ ॥ 1.30.75 ॥
bhṛgvādayastu te sarve jajñire vai maharṣayaḥ।
ādye tretāyuge pūrvaṃ manorvaivasvatasya ha।
devasya mahato yajñe rudrābhiśāpena dvitīye'sminniti śrutiḥ ॥ 1.30.76 ॥

iti sānuśayo'hyāsīttayorjātyantarāgataḥ।
prajāpatestu dakṣasya tryambakasya ca dhīmataḥ ।। 30.77 ।।
tasmānnānuśayaḥ kāryo vairiṣviha kadācana।
jātyantaragatasyāpi bhāvitasya śubhāśubhaiḥ।
jantuṃ na muñcati khyātistatra kāryaṃ vijānatā ।। 30.78 ।।
।।ṛṣaya ūcuḥ।।
prācetasasya dakṣasya kathaṃ vaivasvate'ntare।
vināśāmagamat sūta hayamedhaḥ prajāpateḥ ।। 30.79 ।।
devyā mṛtyuṃ kṛtaṃ matvā kruddhaṃ sarvātmakaṃ prabhum।
kathaṃ prasādayaddakṣaḥ sa yajñaḥ sādhitaḥ katham।
etadveditumicchāmastanno brūhi yathātatham ।। 30.80 ।।
।।sūta uvāca।।
pūrā merordvijaśreṣṭāḥ śrṛṅgaṃ trailokyaviśrutam।
jyotiṣkaṃ nāma sāvitraṃ sarvaratnavibhūṣitam ।। 30.81 ।।
aprameyamanādhṛṣyaṃ sarvalokanamaskṛtam।
tasmin devo giriśreṣṭe sarvadhātu vibhūṣite।
paryaṅka iva vibhrājannupaviṣṭo babhūva ha ।। 30.82 ।।
śailarājasutā cāsya nityaṃ pārśvasthitā'bhavat।
ādhityāśca mahātmāno vasavaścāmitaujasaḥ ।। 30.83 ।।
tathaiva ca mahātmānāvaśvinau bhiṣajāṃ varau।
tathā vaiśravaṇo rājā guhyakaiḥ parivāritaḥ ।। 30.84 ।।
yakṣāṇāmīśvaraḥ śrīmān kailāsanilayaḥ prabhuḥ।
upāsate mahātmānaṃ uśanā ca mahāmuniḥ.
sanatkumārapramukhāste caiva paramarṣayaḥ ।। 30.85 ।।
aṅgiraḥpramukhāścaiva tathā devarṣayo'pare।
viśvāvasuśca gandharvastathā nāradaparvatau ।। 30.86 ।।
apsarogaṇasaṅghāśca samājagmuranekaśaḥ।
vavau śivaḥ sukho vāyurnānāgandhavahaḥ śuciḥ ।। 30.87 ।।
sarvartukusumopetāḥ puṣpavanto drumā stathā।
tathā vidyādharāścaiva siddhāścaiva tapodhanāḥ ।। 30.88 ।।
mahādevaṃ paśupatiṃ paryupāsanti tatra vai।
bhūtāni ca tathānyāni nānārūpadharāṇyatha ।। 30.89 ।।
rākṣasāśca mahāraudrāḥ piśācāśca mahābalāḥ।
bahurūpadharā hṛṣṭā nānāpraharaṇodyatāḥ ।। 30.90 ।।
devasyānucarāstatra tasthurvaiśvānaropamāḥ।
nandīśvaraśca bhagavān devasyānuma te sthitaḥ ।। 30.91 ।।
pragṛhya jvalitaṃ śūlaṃ dīpyamānaṃ svatejasā।
gaṅgā ca saritāṃ śveṣṭā sarvatīrthajalodbhavā।
paryupāsata tandevarūpiṇī dvijasattamāḥ ।। 30.92 ।।
evaṃ sa bhagavāṃstatra dīpyamānaḥ surarṣibhiḥ।
devaiśca sumahābāgairmahādevo vyavasthitaḥ ।। 30.93 ।।
purā himavataḥ pṛṣṭe dakṣo vai yajñamārabhat।
gaṅgādvāre śubhe deśe ṛṣisiddhaniṣevite ।। 30.94 ।।
tatastasya makhe devāḥ śatakratupurogamāḥ।
gamanāya samāgamya buddhimāpedire tadā ।। 30.95 ।।
svairvimānairmahātmāno jvaladbhirjvalanaprabhāḥ।
devasyānumane'gacchan gaṅgādvāra iti śrutiḥ ।। 30.96 ।।
gandharvāpsarasākīrṇaṃ nānādrumalatāvṛtam।
ṛṣisaṅghaiḥ parivṛtaṃ dakṣaṃ dharmabhṛtāṃ varam ।। 30.97 ।।
pṛthivyāmantarikṣe vā ye ca svarlokavāsinaḥ।
sarve prāñjalayo bhūtvā upatasthuḥ prajāpatim ।। 30.98 ।।
ādityā vasavo rudrāḥ sādhyāḥ saha marudgaṇaiḥ।
jiṣṇunā sahitāḥ sarve āgatā yajñabhāginaḥ ।। 30.99 ।।
ūṣmapāḥ somapāścaiva ājyapā dhūmapāstathā।
aśvinau pitaraścaiva āgatā brahmaṇā saha ।। 30.100 ।।
ete cānye ca bahavo bhūtagrāmāstathaiva ca।
jarāyujāṇḍajāścaiva svedajodbhijjakāstathā ।। 30.101 ।।
āhūtā mantrataḥ sarve devāśca saha patnibhiḥ।
virājante vimānasthā dīpyamānā ivāgnayaḥ ।। 30.102 ।।
tān daṣṭvā manyumāviṣṭo dadhīco vākyamabravīt।
apūjyapūjane caiva pūjyānāṃ cāpyapūjane।
naraḥ pāpamavāpnoti mahadvai nātra saṃśayaḥ ।। 30.103 ।।
evamuktvā tu viprarṣiḥ punardakṣamabhāṣata।
pūjyantu paśubharttāraṃ kasmānnāhvayase prabhum ।। 30.104 ।।
।।dakṣa uvāca।।
santi me bahavo rudrāḥ śūlahastāḥ kaparddinaḥ।
ekādaśāvasthagatā nānyaṃ vejhi maheśvaram ।। 30.105 ।।
।।dadhīca uvāca।।
sarve nimantritā devā yena īśo nimantritaḥ।
yathāhaṃ śaṅkarādūrddhvaṃ nānyaṃ paśyāmi daivatam।
tathā dakṣasya vipulo yajño'yaṃ na bhaviṣyati ।। 30.106 ।।
।।dakṣa uvāca।।
etanmakhe śūra suvarṇapātre haviḥ samastaṃ vidhimantrapūtam।
viṣṇornayāmyapratimasya sarvaṃ prabhorvibho hyāhavanīyanityam ।। 30.107 ।।
gatāstu devatā jñātvā śailarājasutā tadā।
uvāca vacanaṃ sādhvī devaṃ paśupatiṃ tadā ।। 30.108 ।।
।।umovāca।।
bhagavan vka gatā hyete devā- śakrapurogamāḥ ।
būhi tattvena tattvajña saṃśayo me mahānayam ।। 30.109 ।।
।।maheśvara uvāca।।
dakṣo nāma mahābhāgo prajānāṃ patirūttamaḥ।
hayamedhena yajate tatra yānti divaukasaḥ ।। 30.110 ।।
।।devyuvāca।।
yajñametaṃ mahābhāga kimarthaṃ na gato'si vai।
kena vā pratiṣedhena gamanaṃ pratiṣidhyate ।। 30.111 ।।
।।maheśvara uvāca ।।
suraireva mahābhāge sarvametadanuṣṭitam।
yajñeṣu mama sarveṣu na bhāga upakalpitaḥ ।। 30.112 ।।
pūrvopāyopapannena mārgeṇa varavarṇini।
na me surāḥ prayacchanti bhāgaṃ yajñasya dhīmataḥ ।। 30.113 ।।
।।devyuvāca।।
bhagavan sarvadeveṣu prabhāvānadhiko guṇaiḥ ।
ajeyaścāpyadhṛṣyaśca tejasā yaśasā śriyā ।। 30.114 ।।
anena tu mahābhāga pratiṣedhena nāmataḥ ।
atīva duḥkhamāpannā vepathuśca mamānagha ।। 30.115 ।।
kiṃ nāma dānaṃ niyamantapo vā kuryyāmahaṃ yena patirmamādya।
labheta bhāgaṃ bhagavānacintyo yajñasya cārddhaṃ tvatha vā tṛtīyam ।। 30.116 ।।
evaṃ bruvāṇāṃ bhagavānacintyaḥ patnīṃ prahṛṣṭaḥ kṣubhitāmuvāca।
na vetsi deveśi kṛśodarāṅgi kiṃ nāma yuktaṃ vacanantavedam ।। 30.117 ।।
ahaṃ hi jānāmi viśālanetre dhyānena sarvaṃ hi vadanti santaḥ।
na vādya mohena mahendradevo lokatrayaṃ sarvathā saṃpramūḍham ।। 30.118 ।।
māmadhvare śaṃsitāraḥ stuvanti rathantare sāma gāyanti geyam।
māṃ brāhmaṇā brahmasatre yajante mādhvaryyavaḥ kalpayante ca bhāgam ।। 30.119 ।।
।।devyuvāca।।
aprākṛto'pi bhagavān sarvastrījanasaṃsadi।
stauti gopā yate vāpi svamātmānaṃ na saṃśayaḥ ।। 30.120 ।।
।।bhagavānuvāca।।
nātmānaṃ staumi deveśi paśya tvamupagaccha ca।
yaṃ srakṣyāmi varārohe bhāgārthaṃ varavarṇini ।। 30.121 ।।
evamuktvā tu bhagavān patnīṃ prāṇairapi priyām।
so'sṛjadbhagavānvakrādbhūtaṃ krodhāgnisannibham ।। 30.122 ।।
sahasraśīrṣaṃ devañca sahasracaraṇe kṣaṇam।
sahasramudgaradharaṃ sahasraśarapāṇinam ।। 30.123 ।।
śaṅkhacakragadāpāṇiṃ dīptakārmukadhāriṇam।
paraśvasidharaṃ devaṃ mahāraudraṃ bhayāvaham ।। 30.124 ।।
ghora rūpeṇa dīpyantaṃ candrārdhakṛtabhūṣaṇam।
vasānaṃ carma vaiyāghraṃ mahārudhiraniḥsravam ।। 30.125 ।।
daṃṣṭrākarālaṃ vibhrāntaṃ mahāvaktraṃ mahodaram।
vidyujjihvaṃ pralamboṣṭhaṃ lambakarṇaṃ durāsadam ।। 30.126 ।।
kuliśodyotitakarambhābhirjvalitamūrddhajam।
jvālāmālāparikṣiptaṃ muktādāmavibhūṣitam ।। 30.127 ।।
tejasā caiva dīpyantaṃ yugāntamiva pāvakam।
ākarṇadāritāsyāntañcaturdikṣu bhayānakam ।। 30.128 ।।
mahābalaṃ mahātejaṃ mahāpuruṣamīśvaram।
viśvahartṛmahā kāyaṃ mahānyagrodhamaṇḍalam।
yugapaccandraśatavaddīpyantaṃ manmathāgnivat ।। 30.129 ।।
caturmahāsyaṃ sitatīkṣṇadaṃṣṭraṃ mahogratejobalakautukāḍhayam।
yugāntasūryyāgnisahasrabhāsaṃ sahasracandrāmalakāntikāntam।
pradīptasarvauṣadhimandarābhaṃ sumerukailāsahimādritulyam ।। 30.130 ।।
yugārkābhaṃ mahāvīryyaṃ cārunāsaṃ mahānanam।
pracaṇḍagaṇḍaṃ dīptākṣamagnijvālāvilānanam ।। 30.131 ।।
mṛgendrakṛttivasanaṃ mahābhujagaveṣṭitam।
uṣṇīṣiṇaṃ candradharaṃ vkacidugraṃ vkacitsamam ।। 30.132 ।।
nānākusumamūrddhānaṃ nānāgandānulepanam ।
nānāratnavicitrāṅgaṃ nānābharaṇabhūṣitam ।। 30.133 ।।
karṇikārasrajaṃ dīptaṃ krodhādudbhrāntalocanam।
vkacinnṛtyati citrāṅgaṃ vkacidvadati susvaram ।। 30.134 ।।
vkaciddhyāyati yuktātmā vkacitstūlaṃ pramārjati।
vkacidgāyati viśvātmā vkacidrauti muhurmuhuḥ ।। 30.135 ।।
jñānaṃ vairāgyamaiśvaryyaṃ tapaḥ satyaṃ kṣamā dhṛtiḥ।
prabhutvamātmasaṃbodho hyadhiṣṭānaguṇairyutaḥ ।। 30.136 ।।
jānubhyāmavaniṃ gatvā praṇataḥ prāñjaliḥ sthitaḥ।
ājñāpaya tvaṃ deveśa kiṃ kāryyaṃ karavāṇi te ।। 30.137 ।।
tamuvācākṣipa makhaṃ dakṣasyeha maheśvaraḥ।
devasyānumatiṃ śrutvā vīrabhadro mahābalaḥ।
praṇamya śirasā pādau deveśasya umāpateḥ ।। 30.138 ।।
tato bandhāt pramuktena siṃheneveha līlayā।
devyā manyukṛtaṃ matvā hato dakṣasya sa kratuḥ ।। 30.139 ।।
manyunā ca mahābhīmā bhadrakālī maheśvarī।
ātmanaḥ sarvasākṣitve tena sārddha sahānugā ।। 30.140 ।।
sa eṣa bhagavān kruddhaḥ pretāvāsakṛtālayaḥ।
vīrabhadra iti khyāto devyā manyupramārjakaḥ ।। 30.141 ।।
so'sṛjadromakūpebhyo raudrānnāma gaṇeśvarān।
rudrānugā mahāvīryyā rudravīryaparākramāḥ ।। 30.142 ।।
rudrasyānucarāḥ sarve sarve rudrasamaprabhāḥ।
te nipetustatastūrṇaṃ śataśo'tha sahasraśaḥ ।। 30.143 ।।
tataḥ kilakilāśabda ākāśaṃ pūrayanniva।
tena śabdena mahatā trastāḥ sarve divaukasaḥ।। 30.144 ।।
parvatāśca vyaśīryanta kampate ca vasundharā।
meruśca dhūrṇate viprāḥ kṣubhyante varūṇālayāḥ ।। 30.145 ।।
agnayo naiva dīpyante na ca dīpyanti bhaskarāḥ।
grahā naiva prakāśante nakṣatrāṇi na tārakāḥ ।। 30.146 ।।
ṛṣayo nābhyabhāṣanta na devā na ca dānavāḥ।
evaṃ hi timirībhūtaṃ nirddahanti vimānitāḥ ।। 30.147 ।।
siṃhanādaṃ pramuñcante ghorarūpā mahābalāḥ।
prabhañjante pare ghorā yūpānutpāṭayanti ca ।। 30.148 ।।
pramarddanti tathā cānye vinṛtyanti tatā'pare।
ādhāvanti pradhāvanti vāyuvegā manojavāḥ ।। 30.149 ।।
cūrṇante yajñapātrāṇi yāgasyāyatanāni ca।
śīryamāṇāni dṛśyante tārā iva nabhastalāt ।। 30.150 ।।
divyānnapānabhakṣāṇāṃ rāśayaḥ parvatopamāḥ।
kṣīra nadyastathā cānyā ghṛtapāyasakardamāḥ.
madhumaṇḍodakā divyāḥ khaṇḍaśarkaravālukāḥ ।। 30.151 ।।
ṣaḍrasānnivahantyanyā guḍakulyā manoramāḥ।
uccāvacāni māṃsāni bhakṣyāṇi vividhāni ca ।। 30.152 ।।
yāni kāni ca divyāni lehyañcoṣyaṃ tathāpare।
bhuñjate vividhairvaktrairviluṇṭhanti ca sarvasaḥ।
krīḍanti vividhākārāścikṣipuḥ surayoṣitaḥ ।। 30.153 ।।
rudrakopaprayuktāstu sarvadevaiḥ surakṣitam।
taṃ yajñamahanan śīghraṃ rudrakalpāḥ samīpataḥ ।। 30.154 ।।
cakruranye tathā nādān sarvabhūtabhayaṃkarān।
chittvā śiro'nye yajñasya vinadanti bhayaṅkarāḥ ।। 30.155 ।।
dakṣo dakṣapatiścaiva devo yajñapatistathā।
mṛgarūpeṇa cākāśe prapalāyitumārabhat ।। 30.156 ।।
vīrabhadro'prameyātmā jñātvā tasya balantadā।
antarikṣagatasyāśu cicchedāsya śiro mahān ।। 30.157 ।।
dakṣaḥ prajāpatiścaiva vinaṣṭa bhrāntacetanaḥ।
