kruddhena vīrabhadreṇa śiraḥ pādena pīḍitaḥ।
jarābhibhūtatīvrātmā nipapāta mahītale ।। 30.158 ।।
trayastriṃśaddevatānāṃ tāḥ koṭayo vimalātmakāḥ।
pāśenāgnibalenāśu baddhāḥ siṃhabalena ca ।। 30.159 ।।
tato jagmurmahātmānaṃ sarve devā mahābalam।
prasīda bhagavan rudra bṛtyānāṃ mā kudhaḥ prabho ।। 30.160 ।।
tato brahmādayo devā dakṣaścaiva prajāpatiḥ।
ūcuḥ prāñjalayo bhūtvā kathyatāṃ ko bhavāniti ।। 30.161 ।।
।।vīrabhadra uvāca।।
na ca devo na cādityo na ca bhoktumihāgataḥ।
naivadraṣṭuṃ hi devendrānna ca kautūhalānvitaḥ ।। 30.162 ।।
dakṣayajñavināśārthaṃ samprāptaṃ viddhi māmiha।
vīrabhadra iti khyātaṃ rudrakopādvinirgatam ।। 30.163 ।।
bhadrakālī ca vijñeyā devyāḥ krodhādvinirgatā।
preṣitā devadevena yajñāntikamihāgatā ।। 30.164 ।।
śāraṇaṃ gaccha rājendra devaṃ te tvamumāpatim।
varaṃ krodho'pi rudrasya varadānaṃ na devataḥ ।। 30.165 ।।
vīrabhadravacaḥ śrutvā dakṣo dharmmabhṛtāṃ varaḥ।
toṣayāmāsa deveśaṃ śūlapāṇiṃ maheśvaram ।। 30.166 ।।
praduṣṭe yajñavāde tu vidruteṣu dvijātiṣu।
tārāmṛgamaye dīpte raudre bhīmamahānale ।। 30.167 ।।
śūlanirbhinnavadanaiḥ kūjadbhiḥ paricārakaiḥ।
nikhātotpāṭitairyūpairapaviddhai ryyatastataḥ ।। 30.168 ।।
utpatdbhiḥ patadbhiśca gṛdhrairāmiṣagṛdhrubhiḥ।
pakṣapātavinirdhūtaiḥ śivāśatanināditaiḥ ।। 30.169 ।।
prāṇāpānau sannirudhya tataḥ sthānena yatnataḥ।
vicārya sarvato dṛṣṭiṃ bahudṛṣṭiramitrajit ।। 30.170 ।।
sahasā devadeveśaḥ agnikuṇḍādupāgataḥ।
candrasūryyasahasrasya tejaḥ saṃvarttakopamam ।। 30.171 ।।
prahasya cainaṃ bhagavānidaṃ vacanamabravīt।
naṣṭaste jñānato dakṣa prītiste mayi sāṃpratam ।। 30.172 ।।
smitaṃ kṛtvābravīdvākyaṃ brūhi kiṃ karavāṇi te।
śrāvitañca samākhyāya devānāṃ gurubhiḥ saha ।। 30.173 ।।
tamuvācāñjaliṃ kṛtvā dakṣo devaṃ prajāpatiḥ।
bhītaśaṅkitavitrastaḥ sabāṣpavadanekṣaṇaḥ ।। 30.174 ।।
yadi prasanno bhagavān yadi vāhaṃ tava priyaḥ।
yadi vāhamanugrāhyo yadi deyo varo mama ।। 30.175 ।।
yajjagdhaṃ bhakṣitaṃ pītamaśitaṃ yacca nāśitam।
cūrṇīkṛtañjāpaviddhaṃ yajñasambhāramīdṛśam ।। 30.176 ।।
dīrghakālena mahatā prayatnena ca sañcitam।
tanna mithyā bhavenmahyaṃ varametaṃ vṛṇomyaham ।। 30.177 ।।
tathāstvityāha bhagavān bhaganetrahayo haraḥ।
dharmādhyakṣaṃ mahādevaṃ tryakṣantaṃ vai prajāpatiḥ ।। 30.178 ।।
jānubhyāmavaniṃ gatvā dakṣo labdhvā bhavādvaram।
nāmnāmaṣṭasahasreṇa stutavān vṛṣabhadhvajam ।। 30.179 ।।
।।dakṣa uvāca।।
namaste devadeveśa devāribalasūdana।
devendra hyamaraśreṣṭha devadānavapūjita ।। 30.180 ।।
sahasrākṣa virūpākṣa tryakṣa yakṣādhipapriya।
sarvataḥ pāṇipādastvaṃ sarvato'kṣiśiromukhaḥ।
sarvataḥ śrutimān loke sarvānāvṛtya tiṣṭhasi ।। 30.181 ।।
śaṅkukarṇa mahākarṇa kumbhakarṇārṇavālaya।
gajendrakarṇa gokarṇa pāṇikarṇa namo'stu te ।। 30.182 ।।
śatodara śatāvartta śatajihva śatānana।
gāyanti tvāṃ gāyatriṇo hyarccayanti tathārccinaḥ ।। 30.183 ।।
devadānavagoptā ca brahmā ca tvaṃ śatakratuḥ।
mūrttīśastvaṃ mahāmūrte samudrāmbu dharāya ca ।। 30.184 ।।
sarvā hyasmin devatāste gāvo goṣṭha ivāsate।
śarīrante prapaśyāmi somamagniṃ jaleśvaram ।। 30.185 ।।
ādityamatha viṣṇuñca brahmāṇaṃ sabṛhaspatim।
kriyā kāryyaṃ kāraṇañca karttā karaṇameva ca ।। 30.186 ।।
asacca sadasaccaiva tathaiva prabhavāvyayam।
namo bhavāya śarvāya rudrāya varadāya ca ।। 30.187 ।।
paśūnāṃ pataye caiva namastvandhakaghātine।
trijaṭāya triśīrṣāya triśūlavaradhāriṇe ।। 30.188 ।।
tryambakāya trinetrāya tripuraghnāya vai namaḥ।
namaścaṇḍāya muṇḍāya pracaṇḍāya dharāya ca ।। 30.189 ।।
daṇḍi(?) māsaktakarṇāya daṇḍimuṇḍāya vai namaḥ।
namo'rddhadaṇḍakeśāya niṣkāya vikṛtāya ca ।। 30.190 ।।
vilohitāya dhūmrāya nālagrīvāya te namaḥ।
namastvapratirūpāya śivāya ca namo'stu te ।। 30.191 ।।
sūryyāya sūryyapataye sūryyadhvajapatākine।
namaḥ pramathanāthāya vṛṣaskandhāya dhanvine ।। 30.192 ।।
namo hiraṇyagarbhāya hiraṇyakavacāya ca।
hiraṇyakṛtacūḍāya hiraṇyapataye namaḥ ।। 30.193 ।।
satraghātāya daṇḍāya varṇapānapuṭāya ca।
namaḥ stutāya stutyāya stūyamānāya vai namaḥ ।। 30.194 ।।
sarvāyābhakṣyabhakṣyāya sarvabhūtānttarātmane।
namo hotrāya mantrāya śukladhvajapatākine ।। 30.195 ।।
namo namāya namyāya namaḥ kilikilāya ca।
namaste śayamānāya śayitāyotthitāya ca ।। 30.196 ।।
sthitāya calamānāya mudrāya kuṭilāya ca।
napno narttanaśīlāya mukhavāditrakāriṇe ।। 30.197 ।।
nāṭyopahāralubdhāya gītavādyaratāya ca।
namo jyeṣṭāya śreṣṭāya balapramathanāya ca ।। 30.198 ।।
kalanāya ca kalpāya kṣayāyopakṣayāya ca।
bhīmadundubhihāsāya bhīmasenapriyāya ca ।। 30.199 ।।
ugrāya ca namo nityaṃ namaste daśabāhave।
namaḥ kapālahastāya citābhasmapriyāya ca ।। 30.200 ।।
vibhīṣaṇāya bhīṣmāya bhīṣmavratadharāya ca।
namo vikṛtavakṣāya khaḍgajihvāgradaṃṣṭriṇe ।। 30.201 ।।
pakvāmamāṃsalubdhāya tumbavīṇāpriyāya ca।
namo vṛṣāya vṛṣyāya vṛṣṇaye vṛṣaṇāya ca ।। 30.202 ।।
kaṭaṅkaṭāya caṇḍāya namaḥ sāvayavāya ca।
namaste varakṛṣṇāya varāya varadāya ca ।। 30.203 ।।
varagandhamālyavastrāya varātivaraye namaḥ ।
namo varṣāya vātāya chāyāyai ātapāya ca ।। 30.204 ।।
namo raktaviraktāya śobhanāyākṣamāline।
sambhinnāya vibhānnāya viviktavikaṭāya ca ।। 30.205 ।।
aghorarūparūpāya ghoraghoratarāya ca ।
namaḥ śivāya śāntāya namaḥ śāntatarāya ca ।। 30.206 ।।
ekapādbahunetrāya ekaśīrṣannamo'stu te।
namo vṛddhāya lubdhāya saṃvibhāgapriyāya ca ।। 30.207 ।।
pañcamālārcitāṅgāya namaḥ pāśupatāya ca।
namaścaṇḍāya ghaṇṭāya ghaṇṭayā jagdharandhriṇe ।। 30.208 ।।
sahasaśataghaṇṭāya ghaṇṭāmālāpriyāya ca।
prāṇadaṇḍāya tyāgāya namo hilihilāya ca ।। 30.209 ।।
hūṃhūṅkārāya pārāya hūṃhūṅkārapriyāya ca।
namaśca śambhave nityaṃ giri vṛkṣakalāya ca ।। 30.210 ।।
garbhamāṃsaśrṛgālāya tārakāya tarāya ca ।
namo yajñādhipataye drutāyopadrutāya ca ।। 30.211 ।।
yajñavāhāya dānāya tapyāya tapanāya ca।
namastaṭāya bhavyāya taḍitāṃ pataye namaḥ ।। 30.212 ।।
annadāyānnapataye namo'stvannabhavāya ca।
namaḥ sahasraśīrṣṇe ca sahasracaraṇāya ca ।। 30.213 ।।
sahasrodyataśūlāya sahasranayanāya ca।
namo'stu bālarūpāya bālarūpadharāya ca ।। 30.214 ।।
bālānāñcaiva goptre ca bālakrīḍanakāya ca।
namaḥ śuddhāya buddhāya kṣobhaṇāyākṣatāya ca ।। 30.215 ।।
taraṅgāṅkitakeśāya muktakeśāya vai namaḥ।
namaḥ ṣaṭkarmaniṣṭāya trikarmaniratāya ca ।। 30.216 ।।
varṇāśramāṇāṃ vidhivat pṛthakkarmapravartine।
mano ghoṣāya ghoṣyāya namaḥ kalakalāya ca ।। 30.217 ।।
śvetapiṅgalanetrāya kṛṣṇaraktakṣaṇāya ca ।
dharmārtha kāmamokṣāya krathāya kathanāya ca ।। 30.218 ।।
sāṅkhyāya sāṅkhyamukhyāya yogādhipataye namaḥ।
namorathyavirathyāya catuṣpatharatāya ca ।। 30.219 ।।
kṛṣṇā jinottarīyāya vyālayajñopavītine।
īśānavajrasaṃhāya harikeśa namo'stu te।
avivekaikanāthāya vyaktāvyakta namo'stu te ।। 30.220 ।।
kāma kāmada kāmadhna dhṛṣṭodṛptaniṣūdana।
sarva sarvada sarvajña sandhyārāga namo'stu te ।। 30.221 ।।
mahābāla mahābāho mahāsattva mahādyute।
mahāmeghavaraprekṣa mahākāla namo'stu te ।। 30.222 ।।
sthūlajīrṇaṇāṅgajaṭine valkalājinadhāriṇe।
dīptaśūryāgnijaṭine valkalājinavāsase।
sahasrasūryapratima taponitya namo'stu te ।। 30.223 ।।
unmādanaśatāvartta gaṅgātoyārddhamūrddhaja।
candrāvartta yugāvartta meghāvartta namo'stu te ।। 30.224 ।।
tvamannamannakarttā ca annadaśca tvameva hi।
annasraṣṭā ca paktā ca pakvabhuktapace namaḥ ।। 30.225 ।।
jarāyujo'ṇḍajaścaiva svedajodbhijja eva ca।
tvameva devadevaśo bhūtagrāmaścaturvidhaḥ ।। 30.226 .
carācarasya brahmā tvaṃ pratiharttā tvameva ca।
tvameva brahmaviduṣāmapi brahmavidāṃ varaḥ ।। 30.227 ।।
sattvasya paramā yonirabvāyujyotiṣāṃ nidhiḥ।
ṛksāmani tathoṅkāramāhustvāṃ brahmavādinaḥ ।। 30.228 ।।
havirhāvī havo hāvī huvāṃ vācāhutiḥ sadā।
gāyanti tvāṃ suraśreṣṭha sāmagā brahmavādinaḥ ।। 30.229 ।।
yajurmayo ṛṅmayasva sāmātharvamayastathā।
paṭyase brahmavidbhistvaṃ kalpopaniṣadāṃ gaṇaiḥ ।। 30.230 ।।
brāhmaṇāḥ kṣatriyā vaiśyāḥ śūdrā varṇāvarāśca ye।
tvāmeva meghasaṅghāśca viśvasta nitagarjjitam ।। 30.231 ।।
saṃvatsarastvamṛtavo māsā māsārddhameva ca।
kalā kāṣṭā nimeṣāśca nakṣatrāṇi yugā grahāḥ ।। 30.232 ।।
vṛṣāṇāṃ kakudaṃ tvaṃ higirīṇāṃ śikharāṇi ca।
siṃho mṛgāṇāṃ patatāṃ tārkṣyo'nantaśca bhoginām ।। 30.233 ।।
kṣīrodo hyudadhīnāñca yantrāṇāṃ dhanureva ca।
vajrampraharaṇānāñca vratānāṃ satyameva ca ।। 30.234 ।।
icchā dveṣaśca rāgaśca mohaḥ kṣāmo damaḥ śamaḥ।
vyavasāyo dhṛtirlobhaḥ kāmakrodhau jayājayau ।। 30.235 ।।
tvaṃ gadī tvaṃ śarī cāpi khaṭvāṅgī jharjharī tathā ।
chettā bhettā praharttā ca tvaṃ netāpyantako mataḥ ।। 30.236 ।।
daśalakṣaṇasaṃyukto dharmo'rthaḥ kāma eva ।
indraḥ samudrāḥ saritaḥ palvalāni sarāṃsi ca ।। 30.237 ।।
latāvallī tṛṇauṣadhyaḥ paśavo mṛgapakṣiṇaḥ।
dravyakarmaguṇārambhaḥ kālapuṣpaphalapradaḥ ।। 30.238 ।।
ādiśvāntaśca madhyaśca gāyatryoṅkāra eva ca।
harito lohitaḥ kṛṣṇo nīlaḥ pītastathāruṇaḥ ।। 30.239 ।।
kadruśca kapilaścaiva kapoto mecakastathā।
suvarṇaretā vikhyātaḥ suvarṇa ścāpyato mataḥ ।। 30.240 ।।
suvarṇanāmā ca tathā suvarṇapriya eva ca।
tvamindro'tha yamaścaiva varuṇo dhanado'nalaḥ ।। 30.241 ।।
utphullaścitrabhānuśca svarbhānurbhānureva ca।
hotraṃ hotā ca homastvaṃ hutañca prahutaṃ prabhuḥ ।। 30.242 ।।
suparṇañca tathā brahma yajuṣāṃ śatarudriyam।
pavitrāṇāṃ pavitraṃ ca maṅgalānāñca maṅgalam ।। 30.243 ।।
giriḥ stokastathā vṛkṣo jīvaḥ pudgala eva ca।
sattvaṃ tvañca rajastvañca tamaśca prajanaṃ tathā ।। 30.244 ।।
prāṇo'pānaḥ sāmānaśca udāno vyāna eva ca।
unmeṣaścaiva meṣaśca tathā jṛmbhitameva ca ।। 30.245 ।।
lohitāṅgo gadī daṃṣṭrī mahāvaktro mahodaraḥ।
suciromā haricchmaśrurūrddhvakeśastrilocanaḥ ।। 30.246 ।।
gītavāditranṛtyāṅgo gītavādanakapriyaḥ।
matsyo jalī jalo jalya javaḥ kālaḥ kalī kalaḥ ।। 30.247 ।।
vikālaśca sukālaśca duṣkālaḥ kalanāśanaḥ।
mṛtyuścaiva kṣayo'ntaśca kṣamāpāyakaro haraḥ ।। 30.248 ।।
saṃvarttako'ntakaścaiva saṃvarttakabalāhakau।
ghaṭo ghaṭīko ghaṇṭīko cūḍālolabalo balam ।। 30.249 ।।
brahmakālo'gnivaktraśca daṇḍī muṇḍī ca daṇḍadhṛk।
caturyugaścaturvedaścaturhotraścatuṣpathaḥ ।। 30.250 ।।
caturā śramavettā ca cāturvarṇyakaraśca ha।
kṣarākṣarapriyo dhūrtto'gaṇyo'gaṇyagaṇādhipaḥ ।। 30.251 ।।
rudrākṣamālyāmbaradharo giriko girikapriyaḥ।
śilpīśaḥ śilpināṃ śreṣṭhaḥ sarvaśilpapravarttakaḥ ।। 30.252 ।।
bhaganetrāntakaścandraḥ pūṣṇo dantavināśanaḥ।
gūḍhāvarttaśca gūḍhaśca gūḍhapratiniṣevitā ।। 30.253 ।।
taraṇastā rakaścaiva sarvabhūtasutāraṇaḥ।
dhātā vidhātā satvānāṃ nidhātā dhāraṇo dharaḥ ।। 30.254 ।।
tapo brahma ca satyañca brahmacaryamathārjavam ।
bhūtātmā bhūtakṛdbhūto bhūtabhavyabhavodbhavaḥ ।। 30.255 ।।
bhūrbhuvaḥsvaritaścaiva tathotpattirmaheśvaraḥ।
īśāno vīkṣaṇaḥ śānto durdānto dantanāśanaḥ ।। 30.256 ।।
brahmāvartta surāvartta kāmāvartta namo'stu te।
kāmabimbaniharttā ca karṇikārarajaḥpriyaḥ ।। 30.257 ।।
mukhacandro bhīmamukhaḥ sumukho durmukho mukhaḥ।
caturmukho bahumukho raṇe hyabhimukhaḥ sadā ।। 30.258 ।।
hiraṇyagarbhaḥ śakunirmahodadhiḥ paro virāṭ ।
adharmahā mahādaṇḍo daṇḍadhāro raṇapriyaḥ ।। 30.259 ।।
gotamogopratāraśca govṛṣeścaravāhanaḥ।
dharmakṛddharmasraṣṭā ca dharmo dharmaviduttamaḥ ।। 30.260 ।।
trailokyagoptā govindo mānado māna eva ca।
tiṣṭhan sthiraśca sthāṇuśca niṣkampaḥ kampa eva ca ।। 30.261 ।।
durvāraṇo durviṣado duḥsaho duratikramaḥ।
durddharo duṣprakampaśca durvido durjjayo jayaḥ ।। 30.262 ।।
śaśaḥ śaśāṅkaḥ śamanaḥ śītoṣṇaṃ durjarā'tha tṛṭ।
ādhayo vyādhayaścaiva vyādhihā vyādhigaśca ha ।। 30.263 ।।
sahyo yajño mṛgā vyādhā vyādhīnāmākaro'karaḥ ।
śikhaṇḍī puṇḍarīkākṣaḥ puṇḍarīkāvalokanaḥ ।। 30.264 ।।
daṇḍadharaḥ sadaṇḍaśca daṇḍamuṇḍavibhūṣitaḥ।
viṣapo'mṛtapaścaiva surāpaḥ kṣīrasomapaḥ ।। 30.265 ।।
madhupaścājyapaścaiva sarvapaśca mahābalaḥ।
vṛṣāśvavāhyo vṛṣabhastathā vṛṣabhalocanaḥ ।। 30.266 ।।
vṛṣabhaścaiva vikhyāto lokānāṃ lokasatkṛtaḥ।
candrādityau cakṣuṣī te hṛdayañca pitāmahaḥ।
agnirāpastathā devo dharmakarmaprasādhitaḥ ।। 30.267 ।।
na brahmā na ca govindaḥ purāṇṛṣayo na ca।
māhātmyaṃ vedituṃ śaktā yāthātathyena te śiva ।। 30.268 ।।
yā mūrttayaḥ susūkṣmāste na mahyaṃ yānti darśanam।
tābhirṇāṃ satataṃ rakṣa pitā putramivaurasam ।। 30.269 ।।
rakṣa māṃ rakṣaṇīyo'haṃ tavānagha namo'stu te ।।
bhaktānukampī bhagavān bhaktaścāhaṃ sadā tvayi ।। 30.270 ।।
yaḥ sahasrāṇyanekāni puṃsāmāhṛtya durddaśaḥ।
tiṣṭhatyekaḥ samudrānte sa me goptāstu nityaśaḥ ।। 30.271 ।।
yaṃ vinidrā jitaśvāsāḥ sattvasthāḥ samadarśinaḥ।
jyotiḥ paśyanti yuñjānāstasmai yogātmane namaḥ ।। 30.272 ।।
sambhakṣya sarva bhūtāni yugānte samupasthite।
yaḥ śete jalamadhyasthastaṃ prapadye'psuśāyinam ।। 30.273 ।।
praviśya vadane rāhoryaḥ somaṃ grasate niśi ।
grasatyarkañca svarbhānurbhutvā somāgnireva ca ।। 30.274 ।।
ye'ṅguṣṭhamātrāḥ puruṣā dehasthāḥ sarvadehinām।
rakṣantu te hi māṃ nityaṃ nityamāpyāyayantu mām ।। 30.275 ।।
ye cāpyutpatitā garbhādadhobhāgagatāśca ye।
teṣāṃ svāhāḥ svadhāścaiva āpnuvantu svadantu ca ।। 30.276 ।।
ye na rodanti dehasthāḥ prāṇino rodayanti ca।
harṣayanti ca hṛṣyanti namastebhyo'stu nityaśaḥ ।। 30.277 ।।
ye samudre nadīdurge parvateṣu guhāsu ca।
vṛkṣamūleṣu goṣṭeṣu kāntāragahaneṣu na ।। 30.278 ।।
catuṣpatheṣu rathyāsu catvareṣu sabhāsu ca।
candrārkayormadhyagatā ye ca candrārkaraśmiṣu ।। 30.279 ।।
rasātalagatā ye ca ye ca tasmātparaṅgatāḥ।
namastebhyo namastebhyo namastebhyaśca nityaśaḥ।
sūkṣmāḥ sthūlāḥ kṛśā hrasvā namastebhyastu nityaśaḥ ।। 30.280 ।।
sarvastvaṃ sarvago deva sarvabhūtapatirbhavān।
sarvabhūtāntarātmā ca tena tvaṃ na nimantritaḥ ।। 30.281 ।।
tvameva cejyase yasmādyajñairvividhadakṣiṇaiḥ।
tvameva karttā sarvasya tena tvaṃ na nimantritaḥ ।। 30.282 ।।
atha vā māyayā deva mohitaḥ sūkṣmayā tvayā।
etasmāt kāraṇādvāpi tena tvaṃ na nimantritaḥ ।। 30.283 ।।
prasīda mama deveśa tvameva śaraṇaṃ mama।
tvaṃ gatistvaṃ pratiṣṭā ca na cānyāsti na me gatiḥ ।। 30.284 ।।
stutvaivaṃ sa mahādevaṃ virarāma prajāpātiḥ।
bhagavānapi suprītaḥ punardakṣamabhāṣata ।। 30.285 ।।
parituṣṭo'smi te dakṣa stavenānena suvrata।
bahunātra kimuktena matsamīpaṃ gamiṣyasi ।। 30.286 ।।
athainamabravīdvākyaṃ trailokyādhipatirbhavaḥ।
kṛtvāśvāsakaraṃ vākyaṃ vākyajño vākyamāhatam ।। 30.287 ।।
dakṣa dakṣa na karttavyo manyurvighnamimaṃ prati।
ahaṃ yajñahā na tvanyo dṛśyate tatpurā tvayā ।। 30.288 ।।
bhūyaśca taṃ varamimaṃ matto gṛhṇīṣva suvrata।
prasannavadano bhūtvā tvamekāgramanāḥ śrṛṇu ।। 30.289 ।।
aśvamedhasahasrasya vājapeyaśatasya ca।
prajāpate matprasādāt phalabhāgī bhaviṣyasi ।। 30.290 ।।
vedān ṣaḍaṅgānuddhṛtya sāṅkhyānyogāṃśca kṛtsnaśaḥ।
tapaśca vipulaṃ taptvā duścaraṃ devadānavaiḥ ।। 30.291 ।।
arthairddaśārddhasaṃyuktairgūḍhamaprājñanirmmitam।
varṇāśramakṛtairdharmaiṃrviparītaṃ kvacitsamam ।। 30.292 ।।
śrutyarthairadhyavasitaṃ paśupāśavimokṣaṇam।
sarveṣāmāśramāṇāntu mayā pāśupataṃ vratam।
utpāditaṃ śubhaṃ dakṣa sarvapāpavimokṣaṇam ।। 30.293 ।।
asya cīrṇasya yatsamyak phalaṃ bhavati puṣkalam।
tadastu te mahābhāga mānasastyajyatāṃ jvaraḥ ।। 30.294 ।।
evamuktvā mahādevaḥ sapatnīkaḥ sahānugaḥ।
adarśanamanuprāpto dakṣasyāmitavikramaḥ ।। 30.295 ।।
avāpya ca tadā bhāgaṃ yathoktaṃ brahmaṇā bhavaḥ।
jvarañca sarvadharmajño bahudhā vyabhajattadā।
śāntyarthaṃ sarvabhūtānāṃ śrṛṇudhvaṃ tatra vai dvijāḥ ।। 30.296 ।।
śīrṣābhitāpo nāgānāṃ parvatānāṃ śilārujaḥ।
apāntu nālikāṃ vidyānnirmokambhujageṣvapi ।। 30.297 ।।
śaurakaḥ saurabheyāṇāmūṣaraḥ pṛthivītale ।
ibhā nāmapi dharmajña dṛṣṭipratyavarodhanam ।। 30.298 ।।
randhrodbhūtaṃ tathāśvānāṃ śikhodbhedaśca barhiṇām।
netrarogaḥ kokilānāṃ jvaraḥ prokto mahātmabhiḥ ।। 30.299 ।।
ajānāṃ pittabhedaśca sarveṣāmiti naḥ śrutam।
śukānāmapi sarveṣāṃ himikā procyate jvaraḥ।
śārdūleṣvapi vai viprāḥ śramo jvara ihocyate ।। 30.300 ।।
mānuṣeṣu tu sarvajña jvaro nāmaiṣa kīrtitaḥ।
maraṇe janmani tathā madhye ca viśate sadā ।। 30.301 ।।
etanmāheśvaraṃ tejau jvaro nāma sudāruṇaḥ।
namasyaścaiva mānyaśca sarvaprāṇibhirīśvaraḥ ।। 30.302 ।।
imāṃ jvarotpattimadīnamānasaḥ paṭetsadā yaḥ susamāhito naraḥ ।
vimuktarogaḥ sa naro mudā yuto labheta kāmān sa yathāmanīṣitān ।। 30.303 ।।
dakṣaproktaṃ stavañcāpi kīrttayedyaḥ śrṛṇoti vā।
nāśubhaṃ prāpnuyāt kiñciddīrghañcāyuravāpnuyāt ।। 30.304 ।।
yathā sarveṣu deveṣu variṣṭo yogavān haraḥ।
tathā stavo variṣṭo'yaṃ stavānāṃ brahmanirmitaḥ ।। 30.305 ।।
yaśorājyasukhaiśvaryavittāyurdhanakāṅkṣibhiḥ।
stotavyo bhaktimāsthāya vidyākāmaiśca yatnataḥ ।। 30.306 ।।
vyādhito duḥkhito dīnaścauratrasto bhayārditaḥ।
rājakāryaniyukto vā mucyate mahato bhayāt ।। 30.307 ।।
anena caiva dehena gaṇānāṃ sa gaṇādhipaḥ।
iha loke sukhaṃ prāpya gaṇa evopapadyate ।। 30.308 ।।
na ca yakṣāḥ piśācā vā na nāgā na vināyakāḥ।
kuryurvighnaṃ gṛhe tasya yatra saṃstūyate bhavaḥ ।। 30.309 ।।
śrṛṇuyādvā idaṃ nārī subhaktyā brahmacāriṇī।
pitṛbhirbhartṛpakṣābhyāṃ pūjyā bhavati devavat ।। 30.310 ।।
śrṛṇuyādvā idaṃ sarva kīrttayedvāpyabhīkṣṇaśaḥ।
tasya sarvāṇi kāryāṇi siddhiṃ gacchantyavighnataḥ ।। 30.311 ।।
manasā cintitaṃ yacca yacca vācāpyudāhṛtam।
sarvaṃ sampadyate tasya stavanasyānukīrttanāt ।। 30.312 ।।
devasya saguhasyātha devyā nandīśvarasya tu।
baliṃ vibhavataḥ kṛtvā damena niyamena ca ।। 30.313 ।।
tataḥ sa yukto gṛhṇīyānnāmānyāśu yathākramam।
īpsitān labhate'tyarthaṃ kāmān bhogāṃśca mānavaḥ।
mṛtaśca svargamāpnoti strīsahasraparivṛtaḥ ।। 30.314 ।।
sarva karmasu yukto vā yukto vā sarvapātakaiḥ।
paṭhan dakṣakṛtaṃ stotraṃ sarvapāpaiḥ pramucyate।
mṛtaśca gaṇasālokyaṃ pūjyamānaḥ surāsuraiḥ ।। 30.315 ।।
vṛṣeva vidhiyuktena vimānena virājate।
ābhūtasaṃplavasthāyī rudrasyānucaro bhavet ।। 30.316 ।।
ityāha bhagavān vyāsaḥ parāśarasutaḥ prabhuḥ ।
naitadvedayate kaścinnedaṃ śrāvyantu kasyacit ।। 30.317 ।।
śrutvaitatparamaṃ guhyaṃ ye'pi syuḥ pāpakāriṇaḥ।
vaiśyāḥ striyaśca śūdrāśca rudralokamavāpnuyuḥ ।। 30.318 ।।
śrāvayedyastu viprebhyaḥ sadā parvasu parvasu।
rudralokamavāpnoti dvijo vai nātra saṃśayaḥ ।। 30.319 ।।
iti śrīmahāpurāṇe vāyuprokte dakṣaśāpavarṇanaṃ nāma triṃśo'dhyāyaḥ ।। 30 ।

## 1.31

।।sūta uvāca ।।
ityeṣā samanujñātā kathā pāpapraṇāśinī।
yā dakṣamadhikṛtyeha kathā śarvādupāgatā ॥ 1.31.1 ॥
pitṛvaṃśaprasaṅgena kathā hyeṣā prakīrtitā।
pitṝṇāmānupūrvyeṇa devān vakṣyāmyataḥ param ॥ 1.31.2 ॥
tretāyugamukhe pūrvamāsan svāyambhuve'ntare ।
devā yāmā iti khyātāḥ pūrvaṃ ye yajñasūnavaḥ ॥ 1.31.3 ॥
ajitā brahmaṇaḥ putrā jitā jidajitāśca ye।
putrāḥ svāyambhuvasyaite śukranāmnā mānasāḥ ॥ 1.31.4 ॥
tṛptimanto gaṇā hyete devānāntu trayaḥ smṛtāḥ ।
chandogāstu trayastriṃśatsarve svāyambhuvasya ha ॥ 1.31.5 ॥
yaduryayātirdvau devau dīdhayaḥ sravaso matiḥ।
vibhāsaśca kratuścaiva prajātirviśato dyutiḥ ॥ 1.31.6 ॥
vāyaso maṅgalaścaiva yāmā dvādaśa kīrtitāḥ।
abhimanyurugradṛṣṭiḥ samayo'tha śuciśravāḥ।
kevalo viśvarūpaśca supakṣo madhupastathā ॥ 1.31.7 ॥
turīyo nirhapuścaiva yukto grāvājinastu te।
yamino viśvadevādyaṃ yaviṣṭo'mṛtavānapi ॥ 1.31.8 ॥
ajiro vibhurvibhāvaśca mṛliko'tha didehakaḥ।
śrutiśrṛṇo bṛhacchukro devā dvādaśa kīrtitāḥ ॥ 1.31.9 ॥
āsan svāyambhuvasyaite antare somapāyinaḥ।
tviṣimanto gaṇā hyete vīryavanto mahābalāḥ ॥ 1.31.10 ॥
teṣāmindraḥ sadā hyāsīdviśvabhuk prathamo vibhuḥ।
asurā yetadā teṣāmāsan dāyādabāndhavāḥ ॥ 1.31.11 ॥
suparṇayakṣagandharvāḥ piśācoragarākṣasāḥ।
aṣṭau te pitṛbhiḥ sārddhaṃ nāsatyā devayonayaḥ ॥ 1.31.12 ॥
svāyambhuve'ntare'tītāḥ prajāstvāsāṃ sahasraśaḥ।
prabhāvarūpasampannā āyuṣā ca balena ca ॥ 1.31.13 ॥
vistarādiha nocyante mā prasaṅgo bhavatviha।
svāyambhuvo nisargaśca vijñeyaḥ sāmprataṃ manuḥ ॥ 1.31.14 ॥
atīte varttamānena dṛṣṭo vaivasvatena saḥ।
prajābhirdevatābhiśca ṛṣibhiḥ pitṛbhiḥ saha ॥ 1.31.15 ॥
teṣāṃ saptarṣayaḥ pūrvamāsanye tān nibodhata।
bhṛgvaṅgirā marīciśca pulastyaḥ pulahaḥ kratuḥ ॥ 1.31.16 ॥
atriścaiva vasiṣṭhaśca sapta svāyambhuve'ntare।
agnīdhraścātibāhuśca medhā medhātithirvasuḥ ॥ 1.31.17 ॥
jyotiṣmān dyutimān havyaḥ savanaḥ putra eva ca ।।
manoḥ svāyambhuvasyaite daśa putrā mahaujasaḥ ॥ 1.31.18 ॥
vāyuproktā mahāsattvā rājānaḥ prathame'ntare।
sāsurantatsagandharvaṃ sayakṣoragarākṣasam।
sapiśācamanuṣyañca suparṇāpsarasāṅgaṇam ॥ 1.31.19 ॥
no śakyamānupūrvyeṇa vaktuṃ varṣaśatairapi।
bahutvānnāmadheyānāṃ saṅkhyā teṣāṃ kule tathā ॥ 1.31.20 ॥
yā vai vrajakulākhyāstu āsan svāyambuve'ntare।
kālena bahunātītā ayanābdayugakramaiḥ ॥ 1.31.21 ॥
।।ṛṣaya ūcuḥ।।
ka eṣa bhagavān kālaḥ sarvabhūtāpahārakaḥ।
kasya yoniḥ kimādiśca kintattvaṃ sa kimātmajaḥ ॥ 1.31.22 ॥
kimasya cakṣuḥ kā mūrtiḥ ke cāsyāvayavāḥ smṛtāḥ।
kiṃnāmadheyaḥ ko'syātmā etat prabrūhi pṛcchatām ॥ 1.31.23 ॥
।।sūta uvāca।।
śrūyatāṃ kālasadbhāvaḥ śrutvā caivāvadhāryatām।
sūryayonirnimeṣādiḥ saṅkhyācakṣuḥ sa ucyate ॥ 1.31.24 ॥
mūrttirasya tvahorātre nimeṣāvayavaśca saḥ।
saṃvatsaraśataṃ tvasya nāma cāsya kalātmakam।
sāmpratānāgatātītakālātmā sa prajāpatiḥ ॥ 1.31.25 ॥
pañcānāṃ pravibhaktānāṃ kālāvasthāṃ nibhodhata।
dinārddhamāsamāsaistu ṛtubhistvayanaistathā ॥ 1.31.26 ॥
saṃvatsarastu prathamo dvitīyaḥ parivatsaraḥ।
idvatsarastṛtīyastu caturthaścānuvatsaraḥ ॥ 1.31.27 ॥
vatsaraḥ pañcamasteṣāṃ kālaḥ sa yugasaṃjñitaḥ।
teṣāntu tattvaṃ vakṣyāmi kīrttyamānaṃ nibodhata ॥ 1.31.28 ॥
ṛturagnistu yaḥ proktaḥ sa tu saṃvatsaro mataḥ।
āditye yastvasau sāraḥ kālāgniḥ parivatsaraḥ ॥ 1.31.29 ॥
śuklakṛṣṇā gatiścāpi apāṃ sāramayaḥ khagaḥ।
sa iḍāvatsaraḥ somaḥ purāṇe niścayo mataḥ ॥ 1.31.30 ॥
yaścāyaṃ tapate lokāṃstanubhiḥ saptasaptabhiḥ।
āśukarttā ca lokasya savāyuriti vatsaraḥ ॥ 1.31.31 ॥
ahaṅkārāt rudan rudraḥ sadbhūto brahmaṇastrayaḥ।
sa rudro vatsarasteṣāṃ vijajñe nīlalohitaḥ।
teṣāṃ hi tattvaṃ vakṣyāmi kīrtyamānaṃ nibodhata ॥ 1.31.32 ॥
aṅgapratyaṅgasaṃyogāt kālātmā prapitāmahaḥ।
ṛksāma yajuṣāṃ yoniḥ pañcānāṃ patirīśvaraḥ ॥ 1.31.33 ॥
so'gniryajuśca somaśca sa bhūtaḥ sa prajāpatiḥ।
proktaḥ saṃvatsaraśceti sūryo yo'gnirmanīṣibhiḥ ॥ 1.31.34 ॥
yasmāt kālavibhāgānāṃ māsartvayanayorapi।
grahanakṣatraśītoṣṇavarṣāyuḥkarmaṇāṃ tathā।
yojitaḥ pravibhāgānāṃ divasānāñca bhāskaraḥ ॥ 1.31.35 ॥
vaikārikaḥ prasannātmā brahmaputraḥ prajāpatiḥ।
ekenaiko'tha divaso māso'thartuḥ pitāmahaḥ ॥ 1.31.36 ॥
ādityaḥ savitā bhānurjīvano brahmasatkṛtaḥ।
prabhavaścātya yaścaiva bhūtānāṃ tena bhāskaraḥ ॥ 1.31.37 ॥
tārābhimānī vijñeyastṛtīyaḥ parivatsaraḥ।
somaḥ sarvauṣadhipatiryasmātsa prapitāmahaḥ ॥ 1.31.38 ॥
ājīvaḥ sarvabhūtānāṃ yogakṣemakṛdīśvaraḥ।
avekṣaṇāṇaḥ satataṃ bibharti jagadaṃśubhiḥ ॥ 1.31.39 ॥
tithīnāṃ parvasandhīnāṃ pūrṇimādarśayorapi।
yonirniśākaro yaśca yo'mṛtātmā prajāpatiḥ ॥ 1.31.40 ॥
tasmāt sa pitṛmān soma ṛgyajuśchandātmakaḥ।
prāṇāpānasamānādyairvyānodānātmakairapi ॥ 1.31.41 ॥
karmabhiḥ prāṇināṃ loke sarvaceṣṭāpravarttakaḥ।
prāṇāpānasamānānāṃ vāyūnāñca pravarttakaḥ ॥ 1.31.42 ॥
pañcānāñcendriyamanobuddhismṛti jalātmanām।
samānakālakaraṇaḥ kriyāḥ sampādayanniva ॥ 1.31.43 ॥
sarvātmā sarvalokānāmāvahaḥ pravahādibhiḥ।
vidhātā sarvabhūtānāṃ kṣamī nityaṃ prabhañjanaḥ ॥ 1.31.44 ॥
yoniragnerapāṃ bhūme raveścandramasaścayaḥ।
vāyuḥ prajāpirbhūtaṃ lokātmā prapitāmahaḥ ॥ 1.31.45 ॥
prajāpati mukhairdevaiḥ samyagiṣṭaphalārthibhiḥ।
tribhireva kapālaistu ambakairoṣadhikṣaye।
ijyate bhagavān yasmāttasmātrryambaka ucyate ॥ 1.31.46 ॥
gāyatrī caiva triṣṭup ca jagatī caiva yā smṛtā।
tryambakā nāmataḥ proktā yonayaḥ savanasya tāḥ ॥ 1.31.47 ॥
tābhirekatvabhūtābhistrividhābhiḥ svavīryataḥ।
trisādhanapuroḍāśastri kapālaḥ sa vai smṛtaḥ ॥ 1.31.48 ॥
ityetatpañcavarṣaṃ hi yugaṃ proktaṃ manīṣibhiḥ।
yaccaiva pañcadhātmā vai proktaḥ saṃvatsaro dvijaiḥ।
saikaṃ ṣaṭkaṃ vijajñe'tha madhvādīnṛtavaḥkila ॥ 1.31.49 ॥
ṛtuputrārttavaḥ pañca iti sargaḥ samāsataḥ।
ityeṣa pavamāno vai prāṇināṃ jīvitāni tu ॥ 1.31.50 ॥
nadī vegasamāyuktaṃ kālo dhāvati saṃharan।
ahorātrakarastasmāt sa vāyurabhavatpunaḥ ॥ 1.31.51 ॥
ete prajānāṃ patayaḥ pradhānāḥ sarvadehinām ।
pitaraḥ sarva lokānāṃ lokātmānaḥ prakīrtitāḥ ॥ 1.31.52 ॥
dhyāyato brahmaṇo vakrādudyan samabhavadbhavaḥ।
ṛṣirvipro mahādevo bhūtātmā prapitāmahaḥ ॥ 1.31.53 ॥
īśvaraḥ sarvabhūtānāṃ praṇavāyopapadyate।
ātmaveśena bhūtānāmaṅgapratyaṅgasambhavaḥ ॥ 1.31.54 ॥
agniḥ saṃvatsaraḥ sūryaścandramā vāyureva ca।
yugābhimānī kālātmā nityaṃ saṃkṣepakṛdvibhuḥ।
unmādako'nugrahakṛtsa idvatsara ucyate ॥ 1.31.55 ॥
rudrāviṣṭo bhagavatā jagatyasmin svatejasā।
āśrayāśrayasaṃyogāttanubhirnāmabhistathā ॥ 1.31.56 ॥
tatastasya tu vīryeṇa lokānugrahakārakam।
dvitīyaṃ bhadrasaṃyogaṃ santatasyaikakārakam ॥ 1.31.57 ॥
devatvañca pitṛtvañca kālatvañcāsya yatparam।
tasmādvai sarvathā bhadrastadvadbhirabhipūjyate ॥ 1.31.58 ॥
patiḥ patīnāṃ bhagavān prajeśānāṃ prajāpatiḥ।
bhavanaḥ sarvabhūtānāṃ sarveṣāṃ nīlalohitaḥ।
oṣadhīḥ pratisandhatte rudraḥ kṣīṇāḥ punaḥ punaḥ ॥ 1.31.59 ॥
ityeṣāṃ yadapatyaṃ vai na tacchakyaṃ pramāṇataḥ।
bahutvāt parisaṅkhyātuṃ putrapautramanantakam ॥ 1.31.60 ॥
imaṃ vaṃśaṃ prajeśānāṃ mahatāṃ puṇyakarmaṇām।
kīrttayan sthirakīrttīnāṃ mahatīṃ siddhimāpnuyāt ॥ 1.31.61 ॥

iti śrīmahāpurāṇe vāyuprokte devavaṃśavarṇanaṃ nāmai katriṃśo'dhyāyaḥ ।। 31 ।

## 1.32

।।vāyu ruvāca।।
ata ūrddhvaṃ pravakṣyāmi praṇavasya viniśvayam।
oṅkāramakṣaraṃ brahma trivarṇañcāditaḥ smṛtam ॥ 1.32.1 ॥

yo yo yasya yathā varṇo vihito devatāstathā।
ṛco yajūṃṣi sāmāni vāyuragnistathā jalam ॥ 1.32.2 ॥

tasmāttu akṣarādeva punaranye prajajñire।
caturddaśa mahātmāno devānāṃ ye tu daivatāḥ ॥ 1.32.3 ॥

teṣu sarvagataścaiva sarvagaḥ sarvayogavit ।
anugrahāya lokānāmādimadhyānta ucyate ॥ 1.32.4 ॥

saptarṣayastathendrā ye devāśca pitṛbhiḥ saha।
akṣarānniḥ sṛtāḥ sarve devadevānmaheśvarāt ॥ 1.32.5 ॥

ihāmutra hitārthāya vadanti paramaṃ padam।
pūrvameva mayoktaste kālastu yugasaṃjñitaḥ ॥ 1.32.6 ॥

kṛtaṃ tretā dvāparañca yugādiḥ kalinā saha।
parivarttamānaistaireva bhramamāṇeṣu cakravat ॥ 1.32.7 ॥

devatāstu tadodvignāḥ kālasya vaśamāgatāḥ.
na śaknuvanti tanmānaṃ saṃssthāpayitumātmanā ॥ 1.32.8 ॥

tadā te vāgyatā bhūtvā ādau manvantarasya vai।
ṛṣayaścaiva devāśca indraścaiva mahātapāḥ ॥ 1.32.9 ॥

samādhāya manastīvraṃ sahasraṃ parivatsarān।
prapannāste mahādevaṃ bhītāḥ kālasya vai tadā ॥ 1.32.10 ॥

ayaṃ hi kālo deveśaścaturmūrtiścaturmukhaḥ ।
ko'sya vidyānmahādeva agādhasya maheśvara ॥ 1.32.11 ॥

atha dṛṣṭvā mahādevastaṃ tu kālañcaturmukham।
na bhetavyamiti prāha ko vaḥ kāmaḥ pradīyatām ॥ 1.32.12 ॥

tatkariṣyāmyahaṃ sarvaṃ na vṛthāyaṃ pariśramaḥ ।
uvāca devo bhagavān svayaṅkālaḥ sudurjayaḥ ॥ 1.32.13 ॥

yadetasya mukhaṃ śvetaṃ caturjihvaṃ hi lakṣyate।
etat kṛtayugaṃ nāma tasya kālasya vai mukham।
asau devaḥ suraśreṣṭo brahmā vaivasvato mukhaḥ ॥ 1.32.14 ॥

yadetadraktavarṇābhaṃ tṛtīyaṃ vaḥ smṛtaṃ mayā ।
trijihvaṃ lelihānaṃ tu etat tretāyugaṃ dvijāḥ ॥ 1.32.15 ॥

atra yajñapravṛttistu jāyate hi maheśvarāt।
tato'tra ijyate yajñastisro jihvāstrayo'gnayaḥ ।
iṣṭvā caivāgnayo viprāḥ kālajihvā pravarttate ॥ 1.32.16 ॥

yadetadvai mukhaṃ bhīmaṃ dvijihvaṃ raktapiṅgalam।
dvipādo'tra bhaviṣyāmi dvāparaṃ nāma tadyugam ॥ 1.32.17 ॥

yadetat kṛṣṇavarṇābhaṃ turīyaṃ raktalocanam।
ekajihvaṃ pṛthuśyāmaṃ lelihānaṃ punaḥ punaḥ ॥ 1.32.18 ॥

tataḥ kaliyugaṃ ghoraṃ sarvalokabhayaṅkaram।
kalpasya tu mukhaṃ hyetaccaturthaṃ nāma bhīṣaṇam ॥ 1.32.19 ॥

na mukhaṃ nāpi nirvāṇaṃ tasmin bhavati vai yuge।
kālagrastā prajā cāpi yuge tasmin bhaviṣyati ॥ 1.32.20 ॥

brahmā kṛtayuge pūjyastretāyāṃ yajña icyate।
dvāpare pūjyate viṣṇurahampūjyaścaturṣvapi ॥ 1.32.21 ॥

brahmā viṣṇuśca yajñaśca kālasyaiva kalāstrayaḥ।
sarveṣveva hi kāleṣu caturmūrtirmaheśvaraḥ ॥ 1.32.22 ॥

ahaṃ jano janayitā (vaḥ) kālaḥ kālapravarttakaḥ।
yugakartā tathā caiva paraṃ paraparāyaṇaḥ ॥ 1.32.23 ॥

tasmāt kaliyugaṃ prāpya lokānāṃ hitakāraṇāt।
abhayārthañca devānāmubhayorlokayorapi ॥ 1.32.24 ॥

tadā bhavyaśca pūjyaśca bhaviṣyāmi surottamāḥ।
tasmādbhayaṃ na kāryaṃ ca kaliṃ prāpya mahaujasaḥ ॥ 1.32.25 ॥

evamuktā stataḥ sarvā devatā ṛṣibhiḥ saha।
praṇamya śirasā devaṃ punarūcurjagatpatim ॥ 1.32.26 ॥

।।devarṣaya ūcuḥ।।
mahātejā mahākāyo mahāvīryo mahādyutiḥ।
bhīṣaṇaḥ sarvabhūtānāṃ kathaṃ kālaścaturmukhaḥ ॥ 1.32.27 ॥

।।mahādeva uvāca।।
eṣa kālaścaturmūrtiścaturdaṃṣṭraścaturmukhaḥ।
lokasaṃrakṣaṇārthāya atikrāmati sarvaśaḥ ॥ 1.32.28 ॥

nāsādhyaṃ vidyate cāsya sarvasmin sacarācare।
kālaḥ sṛjati bhūtāni punaḥsaṃharati kramāt ॥ 1.32.29 ॥

sarve kālasya vaśagā na kālaḥ kasyacidvaśe।
tasmāttu sarvabhūtāni kālaḥ kalayate sadā ॥ 1.32.30 ॥

vikramasya padānyasya pūrvoktānyekasaptatiḥ।
tāni manvantarāṇīha parivṛttayugakramāt ॥ 1.32.31 ॥

ekaṃ padaṃ parikramya padānāmekasaptatiḥ।
yadā kālaḥ prakramate tadā manvantarakṣayaḥ ॥ 1.32.32 ॥

evamuktvā tu bhagavān devarṣipitṛdānavān।
namaskṛtaśca taiḥ sarvaistatraivāntaradhīyata ॥ 1.32.33 ॥

evaṃ sa kāle bhagavān devarṣipitṛdānavān।
punaḥ punaḥ saṃharate sṛjate ca punaḥ punaḥ ॥ 1.32.34 ॥

ato manvantare caiva devarṣipitṛdānavaiḥ।
pūjyate bhagavānīśo bhayāt kālasya tasya vai ॥ 1.32.35 ॥

tasmāt sarvaprayatnena kalau kuryāttapo dvijaḥ।
prapannasya mahādevaṃ tasya puṇyaphalaṃ mahat।
tasmāddevā divaṃ gatvā avatīrya ca bhūtale ॥ 1.32.36 ॥

ṛṣayaścaiva devāśca kalimprāpya sudāruṇam।
tapa icchanti bhūyiṣṭhaṃ karttuṃ dharmaparāyaṇāḥ।
avatārān kaliṃ prāpya karoti ca punaḥ punaḥ ॥ 1.32.37 ॥

evaṃ kālāntare sarve ye'tītā vai sahasraśaḥ।
vaivasvate'ntare tasmin devarājarṣayastathā ॥ 1.32.38 ॥

devāpiḥ poravo rājā manuśvekṣvākuvaṃśajāḥ।
mahāyogabalopetāḥ kālāntaramupāsate ॥ 1.32.39 ॥

kṣīṇe kaliyuge tasmistiṣye tretāyuge kṛte।
saptarṣibhiścaiva sārddhaṃ bhāvye tretāyuge punaḥ
gotrāṇāṃ kṣatriyāṇāñca bhaviṣyāste prakīrtitāḥ ।। 32.40।
dvāparānte pratiṣṭhante kṣatriyā ṛṣibhiḥ saha।
kṛte tretāyuge caiva tathā kṣīṇe ca dvāpare।
narāḥ pātakino ye vai varttante te kalau smṛtāḥ ॥ 1.32.40 ॥

manvantarāṇāṃ saptānāṃ sāntānārthā śrutiḥ smṛtiḥ।
evameteṣu sarveṣu yugakṣayakramastathā ॥ 1.32.41 ॥

parasparaṃ yugānāñca brahmakṣatrasya codbhavaḥ।
yathā vai prakṛtistebhyaḥ pravṛttānāṃ yathā kṣayam ॥ 1.32.42 ॥

jāmadagnyena rāmeṇa kṣatre niravaśoṣite।
kriyante kulaṭāḥ sarvāḥ kṣatriyairvasudhādhipaiḥ।
divaṃ gatānahaṃ tubhyaṃ kīrttayiṣye nibodhata ॥ 1.32.43 ॥

aiḍamikṣvākuvaṃśasya prakṛtiṃ paricakṣate।
rājānaḥ śreṇibandhāstu takṣānye kṣatriyā bhuvi ॥ 1.32.44 ॥

aiḍavaṃśe'tha sambhūtā yathā cekṣvākavo nṛpāḥ।
tebhya eva śataṃ pūrṇaṃ kulānāmabhiṣecitam ॥ 1.32.45 ॥

tāvadeva tu bhojānāṃ vistaro dviguṇaḥ smṛtaḥ ।
bhojantu triśataṃ kṣatraṃ caturddhā tadyathādiśam ॥ 1.32.46 ॥

teṣvatītāstu rājāno bruvatastānnibodhata।
śataṃ vai prativindhyānāṃ haihayānāṃ tathā śatam ॥ 1.32.47 ॥

dhārttarāṣṭrāstvekaśataṃ aśītirjanamejayāḥ।
śataṃ vai brahmadattānāṃ kulānāṃ vīryiṇāṃ śatam ॥ 1.32.48 ॥

tataḥ śatantu paulānāṃ śataṃ kāśikuśādayaḥ ।
tathāparaṃ sahasrantu ye'tītāḥ śaśabindavaḥ।
ijānāste'śvamedhaistu sarve niyutadakṣiṇaiḥ ।। 32.50।
evaṃ saṃkṣepataḥ proktā na śakyā vistareṇa tu।
vaktuṃ rājarṣayaḥ kṛtsnā ye'tītāstairyukaiḥsaha ॥ 1.32.49 ॥

ete yayātivaṃśasya babhūvurvaṃśavarddhanāḥ।
kīrtitā dyutimantaste ye lokān dhārayanti vai ॥ 1.32.50 ॥

labhante ca varān pañca durlabhān brahmalaukikān ।
āyuḥ putrā dhanaṃ kīrtiraiśvaryaṃ bhūtireva ca ॥ 1.32.51 ॥

dhāraṇācchravaṇāccaiva pañcavargasya dhīmatām।
tathoktā laukikāścaiva brahmalokaṃ vrajanti vai ॥ 1.32.52 ॥

catvāryāhuḥ sahasrāṇi varṣāṇāṃ ca kṛtaṃ yugam ।
tasya tāvacchatī sandhyā sandhyāṃśaśca tathāvidhaḥ ॥ 1.32.53 ॥

kṛte vai prakriyāpādaścatuḥsāhasra ucyate।
tasmāccatuḥśataṃ sandhyā sandhyāṃśaśca yathāvidhaḥ ॥ 1.32.54 ॥

tretādīni sahasrāṇi saṃkhyayā munibhiḥ saha।
tasyāpi triśatī sandhyā sandhyāṃśastriśataḥ smṛtaḥ ॥ 1.32.55 ॥

anuṣaṅgapādastretāyāstrisāhasrastu saṅkhyayā।
dvāpare dve sahasre tu varṣāṇāṃ samprakīrtitam ॥ 1.32.56 ॥

tasyāpi dviśatī sandhyā sandhyāṃśo dviśatastathā।
upodvātastṛtīyastu dvāpare pāda ucyate ॥ 1.32.57 ॥

kaliṃ varṣasahasrantu prāhuḥ saṅkhyāvido janāḥ।
tasyāpi śatikā sandhyā sandhyāṃśaḥ śatameva ca ॥ 1.32.58 ॥

saṃhārapādaḥ saṃkhyātaśvaturtho vai kalau yuge।
sasandhyāni sahāṃśāni catvāri tu yugāni vai ॥ 1.32.59 ॥

etad dvādaśasāhasraṃ caturyugamiti smṛtam।
evaṃ pādaiḥ sahasrāṇi ślokānāṃ pañca pañca ca ॥ 1.32.60 ॥

sandhyāsandhyāṃśakaireva dve sahasre tathā'pare।
evaṃ dvādaśasāhasraṃ purāṇaṃ kavayo viduḥ ॥ 1.32.61 ॥

yathā vedaścatuṣpādaścatuṣpādaṃ tathā yugam।
yathā yugaṃ catuṣpādaṃ vidhātrā vihitaṃ svayam।
chacatuṣpādaṃ surāṇāntu brahmaṇā vihitaṃ purā ॥ 1.32.62 ॥

iti śrīmahāpurāṇe vāyuprokte yugadharmanirūpaṇaṃ nāma dvātriṃśo 'dhyāyaḥ ।। 32 ।

## 1.33

।।sūta uvāca।।
manvantareṣu sarveṣu atītānāgateṣviha।
tulyābhimāninaḥ sarve jāyante nāmarūpataḥ ॥ 1.33.1 ॥

devāśca vividhā ye ca tasmin manvantare'dhipāḥ।
ṛṣayo mānavāścaiva sarve tulyābhimāninaḥ ॥ 1.33.2 ॥

maharṣisargaḥ prokto vai vaṃśaṃ svāyambhuvasya tu।
vistareṇānupūrvyā ca kīrttyamānaṃ nibodhata ॥ 1.33.3 ॥

manoḥ svāyambhuvasyāsan daśa pautrāstu tatsamāḥ.
yairiyaṃ pṛthivī sarvā saptadvīpasamanvitā ॥ 1.33.4 ॥

sasamudrākaravatī prativarṣanniveśitā।
svāyambhuve'ntare pūrvamādye tretāyuge tadā ॥ 1.33.5 ॥

priyavratasya putraistaiḥ pautraiḥ svāyambhuvasya tu।
prajāsargatapoyogaistairiyaṃ viniveśitā ॥ 1.33.6 ॥

priyavratāt prajāvantaḥ vīrāt kanyā vyajāyata।
kanyā sā tu mahābhāgā karddamasya prajāpateḥ ॥ 1.33.7 ॥

kanye dve śataputrāṃśca samrāṭ kukṣiśca te ubhe।
taryorvai bhrātaraḥ śūrāḥ prajāpatisamā daśa ॥ 1.33.8 ॥

agnīdhraścavapuṣmāṃśca medhā medhātithirvibhuḥ।
jyotiṣmān dyutimān havyaḥ savanaḥ sarva eva ca ॥ 1.33.9 ॥

priyavrato'bhiṣicyaitān sapta saptasu pārthivān।
dvīpeṣu teṣu dharmeṇa dvīpāṃstāṃśca nibodhata ॥ 1.33.10 ॥

jambūdvīpeśvaraṃ cakre agnīdhrantu mahābalam।
plakṣadvīpeśvaraścāpi tena medhātithiḥ kṛtaḥ ॥ 1.33.11 ॥

śālmalau tu vapuṣmantaṃ rājānamabhiṣiktavān।
jyotiṣmantaṃ kuśadvīpe rājānaṃ kṛtavān prabhuḥ ॥ 1.33.12 ॥

dyutimantañca rājānaṃ kraujcadvīpe samādiśat।
śākadvīpeśvarañcāpi havyañcakre priyavrataḥ ॥ 1.33.13 ॥

puṣkarādhipatiñcāpi savanaṃ kṛtavān prabhuḥ।
puṣkare savanasyāpi mahāvītaḥ suto'bhavat।
dhātakiścaiva dvāvetau putrau putravatāṃ varo ॥ 1.33.14 ॥

mahāvītaṃ smṛtaṃ varṣaṃ tasya nāmnā mahātmanaḥ।
nāmnā tu dhātakeścāpi dhātakīkhaṇḍa ucyate ॥ 1.33.15 ॥

havyo vyajanayat putrān śākadvīpeśvarān prabhuḥ।
jaladañca kumārañca sukumāraṃ maṇīcakam।
vasumodaṃ sumodākaṃ saptamañca mahādrumam ॥ 1.33.16 ॥

jaladaṃ jaladasyātha varṣaṃ prathamamucyate।
kumārasya ca kaumāraṃ dvitīyaṃ parikīrtitam ॥ 1.33.17 ॥

sukumāraṃ tṛtīyantu sukumārasya kīrtitam।
maṇīcakasya caturthaṃ maṇīcakamihocyate ॥ 1.33.18 ॥

vasumodasya vai varṣaṃ pañcamaṃ vasumodakam।
modākasya tu modākaṃ varṣaṃ ṣaṣṭhaṃ prakīrtitam ॥ 1.33.19 ॥

mahādrumasya nāmnā tu saptamantu mahādrumam।
eṣāntu mānabhistāni saptavarṣāṇi tatra vai ॥ 1.33.20 ॥

krauñcadvīpeśvarasyāpi putrā dyutimatastu vai।
kuśalo manugaścoṣṇaḥ pīvaraścāndhakārakaḥ।
muniśca dundubhiścaiva sutā dyutimatastu vai ॥ 1.33.21 ॥

teṣāṃ svanāmabhirddeśāḥ krauñcadvīpāśrayāḥ śubhāḥ।
uṣṇasyoṣṇaḥ smṛto deśaḥ pīvarasyāpi pīvaraḥ ॥ 1.33.22 ॥

andhakārakadeśastu andhakāraśca kīrttyate।
munestu munideśo vai dundubherdundubhiḥ smṛtaḥ।
ete janapadāḥ sapta krauñcadvīpe tu bhāsvarāḥ ॥ 1.33.23 ॥

jyotiṣmataḥ kuśadvīpe saptaite sumahaujasaḥ।
udbhido veṇumāṃścaiva svairatho lavaṇo dhṛtiḥ।
ṣaṣṭhaḥ prabhākaraścaiva saptamaḥ kapilaḥ smṛtaḥ ॥ 1.33.24 ॥

udbhidaṃ prathamaṃ varṣaṃ dvitīyaṃ veṇumaṇḍalam।
tṛtīyaṃ svairathākāraṃ caturthaṃ lavaṇaṃ smṛtam ॥ 1.33.25 ॥

pañcamaṃ dhṛtimadvarṣaṃ ṣaṣṭhaṃ varṣaṃ prabhākaram।
saptamaṃ kapilaṃ nāma kapilasya prakīrtitam ॥ 1.33.26 ॥

teṣāṃ dvīpāḥ kuśadvīpe tatsanāmāna eva tu।
āśramācārayuktābhiḥ prajābhiḥ samalaṃkṛtāḥ ॥ 1.33.27 ॥

śālmalasyeśvarāḥ sapta putrāste tu vapuṣmataḥ।
śvetaśca haritaścaiva jīmūto rohitastathā।
vaidyuto mānasaścaiva suprabhaḥ saptamastathā ॥ 1.33.28 ॥

śvetasya śvetadeśastu rohitasya ca rohitaḥ।
jīmūtasya ca jīmūto haritasya ca hāritaḥ ॥ 1.33.29 ॥

vaidyuto vaidyutasyāpi mānasasyāpi mānasaḥ।
suprabhaḥ suprabhasyāpi saptaite deśapālakāḥ ॥ 1.33.30 ॥

saptadvīpe tu vakṣyāmi jambūdvīpādanantaram।
sapta medhātitheḥ putrāḥ plakṣadvīpeśvarā nṛpāḥ ॥ 1.33.31 ॥

jyeṣṭhaḥ śāntabhayasteṣāṃ saptavarṣāṇi tāni vai।
tasmācchāntabhayāccaiva śiśirastu sukhodayaḥ।
ānandaśca dhruvaścaiva kṣemakaśca śivastathā ॥ 1.33.32 ॥

tāni teṣāṃ sanāmāni saptavarṣāṇi bhāgaśaḥ।
niveśitāni taistāni pūrve svāyambhuve'ntare ॥ 1.33.33 ॥

medhātithestu putraistaiḥ saptadvīpanivāsibhiḥ।
varṇāśramācārayuktāḥ plakṣadvīpe prajāḥ kṛtāḥ ॥ 1.33.34 ॥

plakṣadvīpādikeṣveva śākadvīpāntareṣu vai।
jñeyaḥ pañcasu dharmo vai varṇāśramavibhāgaśaḥ ॥ 1.33.35 ॥

sukhamāyuśca rūpañca balaṃ dharmaśca nityaśaḥ।
pañcasveteṣu dvīpeṣu sarvaṃ sādhāraṇaṃ smṛtam ॥ 1.33.36 ॥

saptadvīpaparikrāntaṃ jambūdvīpaṃ nibodhata।
āgnīdhraṃ jyeṣṭhadāyādaṃ kanyāputraṃ mahābalam।
priyavrato'bhyaṣiñcattaṃ jambūdvīpeśvaraṃ nṛpam ॥ 1.33.37 ॥

tasya putrā babhūvurhi prajāpatisamaujasaḥ।
jyeṣṭo nābhi riti khyātastasya kimpuruṣo'nujaḥ ॥ 1.33.38 ॥

harivarṣastṛtīyastu caturtho'bhūdilāvṛtaḥ।
ramyaḥ syātpañcamaḥ putro harinmān ṣaṣṭha ucyate ॥ 1.33.39 ॥

kurustu saptamasteṣāṃ bhadrāśvo hyaṣṭamaḥ smṛtaḥ।
navamaḥ ketumālastu teṣāṃ deśānnibodhata ॥ 1.33.40 ॥

nābhestu dakṣiṇaṃ varṣaṃ himādvantu pitā dadau ।
hema kūṭaṃ tu yadvarṣaṃ dadau kimpuruṣāya tat ॥ 1.33.41 ॥

naiṣadhaṃ yat smṛtaṃ varṣaṃ harivarṣāya taddadau।
madhyamaṃ yatsumerostu sa dadau tadilāvṛte ॥ 1.33.42 ॥

nīlantu yat smṛtaṃ varṣaṃ ramyāyaitat pitā dadau ।
śvetaṃ yaduttaraṃ tasmāt pitrā dattaṃ harinmate ॥ 1.33.43 ॥

yaduttaraṃ śrṛṅgavato varṣa tat kurave dadau ।
varṣaṃ mālyavata ścāpi bhadrāśvāya nyavedayat ॥ 1.33.44 ॥

gandhamādanavarṣantu ketumāle nyavedayat।
ityetāni mahāntīha navavarṣāṇi bhāgaśaḥ ॥ 1.33.45 ॥

āgnīdhrasteṣu sarveṣu putrāṃstānabhyaṣiñcata।
yathākramaṃ sa dharmātmā tatastu tapasi sthitaḥ ॥ 1.33.46 ॥

ityetaiḥ sapbhiḥ kṛtsnāḥ saptadvīpā niveśitāḥ ।
priyavratasya putraistaiḥ pautraiḥ svāyambhuvasya tu ॥ 1.33.47 ॥

yāni kimpuruṣādyāni varṣāṇyaṣṭau śubhāni tu।
teṣāṃ svabhāvataḥ siddhiḥ sukhaprāyā hyayatnataḥ ॥ 1.33.48 ॥

viparyayo na teṣvasti jarāmṛtyubhayaṃ na ca ।
dharmādharmau na teṣvāstāṃ nottamādhamamadhyamāḥ ।
na teṣvasti yugāvasthā kṣetreṣveva tu sarvaśaḥ ॥ 1.33.49 ॥

nābherhi sargaṃ vakṣyāmi himāhve tannibodhata।
nābhistvajanayat putraṃ meऱudevyāṃ mahādyutiḥ।
ṛṣabhaṃ pārthivaśreṣṭhaṃ sarvakṣatrasya pūrvajam ॥ 1.33.50 ॥

ṛṣabhādbharato jajñe vīraḥ putraśatāgrajaḥ।
so'bhiṣicyātha bharataḥ putraṃ prāvrājyamāsthitaḥ ॥ 1.33.51 ॥

himāhvaṃ dakṣiṇaṃ varṣaṃ bharatāya nyavedayat।
tasmāttadbhārataṃ varṣaṃ tasya nāmnā vidurbudhāḥ ॥ 1.33.52 ॥

bharatasyātmajo vidvān sumatirnāma dhārmikaḥ।
babhūva tasmiṃstadrājyaṃ bharataḥ saṃnyayojayat।
putra saṃkrāmitaśrīko vanaṃ rājā viveśa saḥ ॥ 1.33.53 ॥

tejasastu sutaścāpi prajāpatiramitrajit।
taijasasyātmajo vidvānindradyumna iti śrutaḥ ॥ 1.33.54 ॥

parameṣṭī sutaścātha nidhane tasya śobhanaḥ ।
pratīhārakule tasya nāmnā jajñe tadanvayāt।
pratihartteti vikhyāto jajñe tasyāpi dhīmataḥ ॥ 1.33.55 ॥

unnetā pratiharttustu bhuvastasya sutaḥ smṛtaḥ ।
udgīthastasya putro'bhūtpratāviścāpi tatsutaḥ ॥ 1.33.56 ॥

pratāvestu vibhuḥ putraḥ pṛthustasya suto mataḥ ।
pṛthoścāpi suto nakto naktasyāpi gayaḥ smṛtaḥ ॥ 1.33.57 ॥

gayasya tu naraḥ putro narasyāpi suto virāṭ।
virāṭ‌suto mahāvīryo dīmāṃstasya suto'bhavat ॥ 1.33.58 ॥

dhīmataśca mahān putro mahataścāpi bhauvanaḥ।
bhauvanasya sutastvaṣṭā arijastasya cātmajaḥ ॥ 1.33.59 ॥

arijasya rajaḥ putraḥ śatajidrajaso mataḥ।
tasya putraśataṃ tvāsīdrājānaḥ sarva eva te ॥ 1.33.60 ॥

viśvajyotiḥ pradhānāyaistairimā varddhitāḥ prajāḥ।
tairidaṃ bhārataṃ varṣaṃ saptakhaṇḍaṃ kṛtaṃ purā ॥ 1.33.61 ॥

teṣāṃ vaṃśaprakūtaistu bhukteyaṃ bhāratī dharā।
kṛtatretādiyuktāni yugākhyānyekasaptatiḥ ॥ 1.33.62 ॥

ye'tītāstairyugaiḥ sārddhaṃ rājānaste tadanvayāḥ।
svāyambhuve'ntare pūrvaṃ śataśo'tha sahasraśaḥ ॥ 1.33.63 ॥

eṣa svāyambhuvaḥ sargo yenedaṃ pūritaṃ jagat।
ṛṣibhirdaivataiścāpi pitṛgandharvarākṣasaiḥ ॥ 1.33.64 ॥

yakṣabhūtapiśācaiśca manuṣyamṛgapakṣibhiḥ ।
taiṣāṃ sṛṣṭiriyaṃ loke yugaiḥ saha vivarttate ॥ 1.33.65 ॥

iti śrīmahāpurāṇe vāyuprokte svāyambhuva vaṃśānukīrttanaṃ nāma trayastriśo'dhyāyaḥ ।। 33 ।।

## 1.34

।।ṛṣaya ūcuḥ ।।
evaṃ prajāsanniveśaṃ śrutvā ca ṛṣipuṅgavaḥ।
papraccha nipuṇaḥ sūtaṃ pṛthivyāyāma vistarau ॥ 1.34.1 ॥

kati dvīpāḥ samudrā vā parvatāśca kati prabhoḥ।
kiyanti caiva varṣāṇi teṣu nadyaśca kāḥ smṛtāḥ ॥ 1.34.2 ॥

mahābhūtapramāṇañca lokā lokau tathaiva ca।
paryāyapārimāṇyañca gatiścandrārkayostathā।
etat prabrūhi naḥ sarvaṃ vistareṇa yathā tathā ॥ 1.34.3 ॥

।।sūta uvāca।।
ata ūrddhvaṃ pravakṣyāmi pṛthivyāyāmavistaram।
saṅkhyāścaiva samudrāṇāṃ dvīpānāñcaiva vistaram ॥ 1.34.4 ॥

yāvanti caiva varṣāṇi teṣu nadyaśca yāḥ smṛtāḥ।
mahābhūtapramāṇañca lokālokau tathaiva ca।
paryāyapārimāṇyañca gatiścandrārkayostathā ॥ 1.34.5 ॥

dvīpabhedasahasrāṇi saptasvantargatāni vai।
na śakyante pramāṇena vaktuṃ varṣaśatairapi ॥ 1.34.6 ॥

saptadvīpantu vakṣyāmi candrādityagrahaiḥ saha।
yeṣāṃ manuṣyāstarkeṇa pramāṇāni pracakṣate ॥ 1.34.7 ॥

acintyāḥ khalu ye bhāvā na tāṃstarkeṇa bhāvayet।
prakṛtibhyaḥ paraṃ yacca tannityañca prajakṣyate ॥ 1.34.8 ॥

navavarṣaṃ pravakṣyāmi jambūdvīpaṃ yathā tathā ।
vistarānmaṇḍalāccaiva yojanaistannibodhata ॥ 1.34.9 ॥

śatamekaṃ sahasrāṇāṃ yojanānāṃ pramāṇataḥ।
nānājanapadākīrṇaiḥ puraiśca vividhaiḥ śubhaiḥ ॥ 1.34.10 ॥

siddhacāraṇagandharvaparvatairupaśobhitam।
sarvadhātunibaddhaiśca śilājālasamudbhavaiḥ ।
parvataprabhavābhiśca nadībhiḥ parvataistathā ॥ 1.34.11 ॥

jambūdvīpaḥ pṛthuḥ śrīmān sarvvataḥ parivāritaḥ।
navabhiścāvṛtaḥ sarvvairbhuvanairbhūtabhāvanaiḥ।
lāvaṇena samudreṇa sarvvataḥ parivāritaḥ ॥ 1.34.12 ॥

jambūdvīpasya vistārāt samena tu samantataḥ।
jambūdvīpasya vistārāt samena tu samantataḥ।
prāgāyatāḥ suparvāṇaḥ ṣaḍime varṣaparvvatāḥ।
avagāḍhā ubhayataḥ samudrau pūrvapaśvimau ॥ 1.34.13 ॥

himaprāyaśca himavān hemakūṭaśca hemavān।
taruṇādityavarṇābho hairaṇyo niṣadhaḥ smṛtaḥ ॥ 1.34.14 ॥

cāturvarṇastu sauvarṇo meruścocyatamaḥ smṛtaḥ।
plutākṛtipramāṇaśca caturasraḥ samucchritaḥ ॥ 1.34.15 ॥

nānāvarṇastu pārśveṣu prajāpatiguṇānvitaḥ।
nābhivandhanasambhūto brahmaṇo'vyaktajanmanaḥ ॥ 1.34.16 ॥

pūrvvataḥ śvetavarṇo'sau brahmaṇyastasya tena tat।
pītaśca dakṣiṇenāsau tena vaiśyatvamiṣyate ॥ 1.34.17 ॥

bhṛṅgapatranibhaśvāsau pakṣvimena mahābalaḥ।
tenāsya śūdratā dṛṣṭā merornānārthakāraṇāt ॥ 1.34.18 ॥

pārśvamuttaratastasya raktavarṇaṃ svabhāvataḥ।
tenāsya kṣatratā casyāditi varṇāḥ prakīrtitāḥ।
vyaktaḥ svabhāvataḥ prokto varṇataḥ parimāṇataḥ ॥ 1.34.19 ॥

nīlaśca vaiḍhūryyamayaḥ śvetaśrṛṅgo hiraṇmayaḥ।
mayūrabarhavarṇastu śātakaumbhastu śrṛṅgavān ॥ 1.34.20 ॥

ete parvvatarājānaḥ siddhacāraṇasevitāḥ।
teṣāmantaraviṣkambho navasāhasra ucyate ॥ 1.34.21 ॥

madhye tvilāvṛtaṃ yastu mahāmeroḥ samantataḥ।
navaiva tu sahasrāṇi vistīrṇaḥ parvvatastu saḥ।
madhye tasya mahāmerornirdhūma iva pāvakaḥ ॥ 1.34.22 ॥

vedyarddhaṃ dakṣiṇaṃ meroruttarārddhaṃ tathottaram।
varṣāṇi yāni saptātra teṣāṃ ye varṣaparvvatāḥ।
dve dve sahasre vistīrṇā yojanāni samucchrayāt ॥ 1.34.23 ॥

jambūdvīpasya vistārātteṣāmāyāma ucyate।
yojanānāṃ sahasrāṇi śate dve madhyamau girī ॥ 1.34.24 ॥

nīlaśca niṣadhaścaiva tābhyāṃ hīnāstu ye'pare।
śvetaśca hemakūṭaśca himavān śrṛṅgavāṃśca yaḥ ॥ 1.34.25 ॥

navatirdvīvaśītirdvau sahasrāṇyāyatāstu ye ।
teṣāṃ madhye janapadāstāni varṣāṇi sapta vai ॥ 1.34.26 ॥

sampātaviṣamaistaistu parvvatairāvṛtāni ca।
santatāni nadībhedairagamyāni parasparam।
vasanti teṣu satvāni nānā jātīni bhāgaśaḥ ॥ 1.34.27 ॥

idaṃ haimavataṃ varṣaṃ bhārataṃ nāma viśrutam।
hemakūṭaṃ paraṃ tasmānnāmnā kimpuruṣaṃ smṛtam ॥ 1.34.28 ॥

naiṣadhaṃ hemakūṭantu harivarṣaṃ taducyate।
harivarṣātparañcaiva merośca tadilāvṛtam ॥ 1.34.29 ॥

ilāvṛtaparaṃ nīlaṃ ramyakaṃ nāma viśrutam।
ramyātparataraṃ śvetaṃ viśrutantaddhiraṇmayam।
hiraṇmayātparañcāpi śrṛṅgavāṃstu kurusmṛtam ॥ 1.34.30 ॥

dhanuḥsaṃsthe ca vijñeye dve varṣe dakṣiṇottare।
dīrghāṇi tatra catvāri madhyamantadilāvṛtam ॥ 1.34.31 ॥

arvāk ca niṣadhasyātha vedyarddhaṃ dakṣiṇaṃ smṛtam।
paraṃ nīlavato yacca vedyarddhantu taduttaram।
vedyarddhaṃ dakṣiṇe trīṇi varṣāṇi trīṇi cottare ॥ 1.34.32 ॥

tayormadhye tu vijñeyaṃ merumadhyamilāvṛtam।
dakṣiṇena tu nīlasya niṣadhasyottareṇa tu ॥ 1.34.33 ॥

udagāyato mahāśailo mālyavān nāma parvvataḥ।
yojanānāṃ sahasrorurānīlaniṣadhāyataḥ।
āyāmataśvatustriśatsahasrāṇi prakīrtitaḥ ॥ 1.34.34 ॥

tasya pratīcyāṃ vijñeyaḥ parvato gandhamādanaḥ।
āyāmādatha vistārān mālyavāniti viśrutaḥ ॥ 1.34.35 ॥

parimaṇḍalayormadhye meruruttamaparvataḥ ।
caturvarṇaḥ susauvarṇaścaturasraḥ samucchritaḥ।
avyaktā dhātavaḥ sarvve samutpannā jalādayaḥ ॥ 1.34.36 ॥

avyaktāt pṛthivī padmaṃ meruparvatakarṇikam।
catuṣpathaṃ samutpannaṃ vyaktaṃ pañcaguṇaṃ mahat ॥ 1.34.37 ॥

tataḥ sarvvāḥ samutpannā vṛttayo dvijasattamāḥ।
naikakalpārjitaiḥ puṇyaurve vidhaiḥ prāgupārjitaiḥ ॥ 1.34.38 ॥

kṛtātmabhirvinītātmā mahātmā puruṣottamaḥ।
mahādevo mahāyogī jagajjyeṣṭo maheśvaraḥ ।
sarvalokagato'nanto hyamūrtitvādajāyata ॥ 1.34.39 ॥

na tasya prākṛtī mūrttirmāṃsamedo'sthisambhavā ।
yogāccaiveśvaratvācca sarvvātmāgata eva saḥ ॥ 1.34.40 ॥

tannimittaṃ samutpannaṃ lokapadmaṃ sanātanam।
kalpaśeṣasya tasyādau kālasya gatirīdṛśī ॥ 1.34.41 ॥

tasmin padme samutpanno devadevaścaturmukhaḥ।
prajāpatipatirbrahmā īśāno jagataḥ prabhuḥ ॥ 1.34.42 ॥

tasya bījāni sargo hi puṣkarasya yathārthavat।
kṛtsnaḥ prajānisargeṇa vistareṇeha kathyate ॥ 1.34.43 ॥

yadabjaṃ vaiṣṇavaṃ kāryyaṃ tatastannābhito'bhavat।
padmākārā samutpannā pṛthivī savanadrumā ॥ 1.34.44 ॥

tadasya lokapadmasya vistareṇa prakāśitam।
varṇamānaṃ vibhāgena kramaśaḥ śrṛṇuta dvijāḥ ॥ 1.34.45 ॥

mahādvīpāstu vikhyātāścatvāraḥ patrasaṃsthitāḥ।
tataḥ karṇikasaṃsthāno merurnāma mahābalaḥ ॥ 1.34.46 ॥

nānāvarṇeṣu pārśveṣu pūrvataḥ śveta ucyate।
pītantu dakṣiṇaṃ tasya śṛṅgaṃ kṛṣṇaṃ tathāparam ॥ 1.34.47 ॥

uttaraṃ tasya raktaṃ vai śobhivarṇasamanvitam।
merustu śobhate śubhro rājavatsa tu dhiṣṭitaḥ ॥ 1.34.48 ॥

taruṇādityavarṇābho vidhūma iva pāvakaḥ।
caturaśītisāhasra utsedhena prakīrttitaḥ ॥ 1.34.49 ॥

praviṣṭaḥ ṣoḍaśādhastādvistṛtastāvadeva tu ।
sa śarāvasthitaḥ pūrvaṃ dvātriṃśanmūrdhni vistṛtaḥ ॥ 1.34.50 ॥

vistārāt triguṇaścāsya pariṇāhaḥ samantataḥ।
maṇḍalena pramāṇena tryasre'rddhantu tadiṣyate ॥ 1.34.51 ॥

catvāriṃśatsahasrāṇi yojanānāṃ samantataḥ।
aṣṭābhiradhikāni syustryasre māne prakīrttitam ॥ 1.34.52 ॥

caturasreṇa mānena pariṇāhaḥ samantataḥ।
catuḥṣaṣṭisahasrāṇi yojanānāṃ vidhīyate ॥ 1.34.53 ॥

sa parvato mahādivyo divyauṣadhisamanvitaḥ।
bhuvanairāvṛtaḥ sarvo jātarūpamayaiḥ śubhaiḥ ॥ 1.34.54 ॥

tatra devagaṇāḥ sarve gandharvoragarākṣasāḥ ।
śailarājaiḥ pradṛśyante śubhāścāpsarasāṅgaṇāḥ ॥ 1.34.55 ॥

sa tumeruḥ parivṛto bhuvanairbhūtabhāvanaḥ।
catvāro yasya deśā vai nānāpārśveṣvadhiṣṭitāḥ ॥ 1.34.56 ॥

bhadrāśvo bharataścaiva ketumālaśca paścimaḥ।
uttarāḥ kuravaścaiva kṛtapuṇyapratiśrayāḥ ॥ 1.34.57 ॥

karṇikā tasya padmasya samantātparimaṇḍalā।
yojanānāṃ sahasrāṇi navatiḥ ṣaṭ prakīrttitāḥ।
catvāraścāpyaśītiśca antarāntara dhiṣṭitāḥ ॥ 1.34.58 ॥

triśatañca sahasrāṇi yojanānāṃ pramāṇataḥ।
tasya keśarajālāni vistīrṇāni samantataḥ ॥ 1.34.59 ॥

śatasāhasrikāyāmā sāśītipṛthulāyatā।
catvāri tasya patrāṇi yojanānāṃ caturddiśam ॥ 1.34.60 ॥

tatra yāsau mayā pūrvaṃ karṇiketyabhiśabditā।
tāṃ varṇyamānāmekāgrāḥ samāsena nibodhata ॥ 1.34.61 ॥

śatāśrimenaṃ mene'triḥ sahasrāśrimṛṣirbhṛguḥ।
aṣṭāśrimenaṃ sāvarṇiścaturasrantu bhāguriḥ ॥ 1.34.62 ॥

vārṣāyaṇistu sāmudraṃ śarāvañcaiva gālavaḥ।
ūrddhvaveṇīkṛtaṃ gārgyaḥ kroṣṭakiḥ parimaṇḍalam ॥ 1.34.63 ॥

yadyadyasya hi yatpārśca parvatādhipater्ṛṣiḥ।
tattadevāsya vedāsau brahmainaṃ veda kṛtsnaśaḥ ॥ 1.34.64 ॥

maṇiratnamayaṃ citraṃ nānāvarṇaprabhāyutam।
anekavarṇanicayaṃ sauvarṇamaruṇaprabham ॥ 1.34.65 ॥

kāntaṃ sahasraparvāṇaṃ sahasrodakakandaram।
sahasra śatapatrantaṃ viddhi meruṃ nagottamam ॥ 1.34.66 ॥

maṇiratnārpitastambhairmaṇicitritavedikaiḥ।
suvarṇamaṇicitrāṅgaṃ tathā vidrumatoraṇaiḥ ॥ 1.34.67 ॥

vimānayānaiḥ śrīmadbhiḥ śatasaṅkhyairdivaukasām।
prabhādīpitaparyantaṃ meruṃ parvaṇi parvaṇi ॥ 1.34.68 ॥

tasya parvasahasre'smin nānāśrayavibhūṣite।
sarvadeva nikāyāni sanniviṣṭānyanekaśaḥ ॥ 1.34.69 ॥

tamāvasaccorddhvatale devadevaścaturmukhaḥ।
brahmā brahmavidāṃ śreṣṭo variṣṭhastridivaukasām ॥ 1.34.70 ॥

mahābhuvanasampūrṇaiḥ sarvvaiḥ kāmaphalapradaiḥ ।
mahāsurasahasraistaṃ dikṣvanekasamākulam ॥ 1.34.71 ॥
tatra brahmasabhā ramyā brahmarṣigaṇasevitā ।
nāmnā manovatī nāma sarvalokeṣu viśrutā ॥ 1.34.72 ॥

tatreśānasya devasya sahasrādityavarcasam।
mahāvimānaṃ saṃsthāpya mahimnā vartate sadā ॥ 1.34.73 ॥

tatra sarṣigaṇā devāścaturvaktrasya te tadā।
tadeva tejasāṃ rāśirdevānāṃ tatra kīrttyate ॥ 1.34.74 ॥

tatrāste śrīpatiḥ śrīmān sahasrākṣaḥ purandaraḥ।
upāsyamānastridaśairmahāyogaiḥ surarṣibhiḥ ॥ 1.34.75 ॥

tatra lokapateḥ sthānamādityasamavarcasaḥ।
mahendrasya mahārājñaḥ sarvvasiddhairnamaskṛtam ॥ 1.34.76 ॥

tamindralokaṃ lokasya ṛddhyā paramayā yutam।
dīpyate tvamaraśreṣṭaistridaśairnityasevitam ॥ 1.34.77 ॥

dvitīye'pyantarataṭe vaidiśye pūrvvadakṣiṇe।
nānādhātuśataścitraiḥ suramyamatitejasam ॥ 1.34.78 ॥

naikaratnārthitatalamanekastambhasaṃyutam।
jāmbūnadakṛtodyānaṃ nānāratnasuvedikam ॥ 1.34.79 ॥

kūṭāgārairvinikṣiptamanekairbhavanottamaiḥ ।
mahāvimānaṃ prathitaṃ bhāskaraṃ jātavedasam ॥ 1.34.80 ॥

sā hi tejovatī nāma hutāśasya mahāsabhā।
sākṣāttatra suraśreṣṭhaḥ sarvadevamukho'nalaḥ ॥ 1.34.81 ॥

śikhāśatasahasrāḍhyo jvālāmālī vibhā vasuḥ।
stūyate hūyate caiva tatra sarṣigaṇaiḥ suraiḥ ॥ 1.34.82 ॥

adhidaivakṛtaṃ viprairviśeṣaḥ sa tu ucyate।
sa vibhāgañca tejaśca sarva eva na saṃśayaḥ ॥ 1.34.83 ॥

bhogāntaramanuprāpta ekatejo vibhuḥ smṛtaḥ।
pṛthak‌tvañca hi yuktyā tu kāryakāraṇamiśritam ॥ 1.34.84 ॥

tamagniṃ lokalokajñaistadvīryaiṃstatparā kramaiḥ ।
mahātmabhirmahāsiddhairmahābhāgairnamaskṛtam ॥ 1.34.85 ॥

tṛtīye'pyantarataṭe evameva mahāsabhā।
vaivasvatasya vijñeyā loke khyātā susaṃyamā ॥ 1.34.86 ॥

tathā caturthadigdeśe nair्ṛtyādhipateḥ sabhā।
nāmnā kṛṣṇāṅganā nāma virūpākṣasya dhīmataḥ ॥ 1.34.87 ॥

pañcame'pyantarataṭe evameva mahāsabhā।
vaivasvatasya vijñeyā nāmnā śubhavatī satī।
udakādhipateḥ khyātā varuṇasya mahātmanaḥ ॥ 1.34.88 ॥

parottare tathā deśe ṣaṣṭe'ntarataṭe śive।
vāyorgandhavatī nāma sabhā sarvaguṇottarā ॥ 1.34.89 ॥
sapta me'pyantarataṭe nakṣatrādhipateḥ sabhā।
nāmnā mahodayā nāma śuddhavaiḍhūryyavedikā ॥ 1.34.90 ॥

tathāṣṭame'ntarataṭe īśānasya mahātmana

## 1.35

।। sūta uvāca ।।
yattadvai karṇikāmūlamiti vai samprakīrtitam।
tadyojanasahasrāṇāṃ saptatīnāmadhaḥ smṛtam ॥ 1.35.1 ॥

catvariṃśattathāṣṭau ca sahasrāṇyatra maṇḍalam।
śailarājāvṛtaṃ ramyaṃ merumūlamiti śrutiḥ ॥ 1.35.2 ॥

teṣāṃ girisahasrāṇāmanekeṣu mahocchritāḥ।
dikṣu sarvāsu paryyantairmaryyādāḥ parvatāḥ smṛtāḥ ॥ 1.35.3 ॥

nikuñjakandaranadīguhānirjharaśobhitāḥ।
bahuprāsādakaṭakai staṭaiśca kusumojjvalaiḥ ॥ 1.35.4 ॥

nitambapuṣpamālaughaiḥ sānubhirdhātumaṇḍitaiḥ ।
śikharairhemakapilairnaikaprasravaṇāvṛtaiḥ।
śobhitā girayaḥ sarvve puṣṭai ratna samarpitaiḥ ॥ 1.35.5 ॥

vihaṅgaśatasaṃjuṣṭaiḥ kuñjairanupamairapi।
sihaśārdūlaśarabhairnaikaiścāmaravāraṇaiḥ।
nānāvarṇākṛtidharaiḥ sevitā vividhairnagaiḥ ॥ 1.35.6 ॥

saptāśca harikṛṣṇāṅgamekaikaṃ daśaparvatam।
bāhyamābhyantarā ye tu trivāhāstu samāḥ smṛtāḥ ॥ 1.35.7 ॥

jaṭharo devakūṭaśca pūrvasyāṃ diśi parvatau।
tau dakṣiṇottarāyāmāvānīlaniṣadhāyatau ॥ 1.35.8 ॥

kailāso himavāṃścaiva dakṣiṇottaraparvatau।
pūrvapaścāyatāvetāvarṇavāntavyavasthitau ॥ 1.35.9 ॥

yo'sau merurdvijaśreṣṭāḥ prāṃśuḥ kanakaparvataḥ।
viṣkambhaṃ tasya vakṣyāmi tanme nigadataḥ śrṛṇu ॥ 1.35.10 ॥

mahāpādāstu catvāro meroratha caturddiśam।
yairdhṛtatvānna calati saptadvīpavatī mahī ॥ 1.35.11 ॥

daśayojanasāhasra āyāmasteṣu paṭyate।
devagandharvayakṣāṇāṃ nānāratnopaśobhitāḥ।
naikanirjharavaprāḍhyā ramyakandaranirmitāḥ ॥ 1.35.12 ॥

nitambapuṣpakādambaiḥ śobhitāścitrasānavaḥ।
manaḥśilādarībhiśca haritālatalaistathā ॥ 1.35.13 ॥

suvarṇamaṇicitrābhirguhābhiśca samantataḥ।
śuddhahiṅgulakaprakhyaiḥ kāñcanairdhātumaṇḍitaiḥ ॥ 1.35.14 ॥

varakāñcanacitraiśca pravālaiḥ samalaṃkṛtāḥ।
rucirāḥ śataparvāṇaḥ siddhāvāsā mudānvitāḥ।
mahāvimānaiḥ śrīmadbhiḥ samantātparidīpitāḥ ॥ 1.35.15 ॥

pūrveṇa mandaro nāma dakṣiṇe gandhamādanaḥ।
vipulaḥ paścime pārśve supārśvaścottare smṛtaḥ ॥ 1.35.16 ॥

teṣāṃ sahasraśrṛṅgeṣu vajravaiḍhūryavedikāḥ।
śākhāsahasrakalitāḥ sumūlāḥ supratiṣṭitāḥ ॥ 1.35.17 ॥

srigdhairnīlairghanaiḥ parṇaiḥ sañjhannavividhāśrayāḥ ।
anekaprajanotsedhā mahāpuṣpaphalopagāḥ ॥ 1.35.18 ॥

yakṣagandharvasevyāśca sevitāḥ siddhacāraṇaiḥ।
mahāvṛkṣāḥ samutpannāścatvāro dvīpaketavaḥ ॥ 1.35.19 ॥

mandarasya gireḥśrṛṅge mahāvṛkṣaḥ sa keturāṭ।
ālambaśākhāśikharaḥ kandaraśca pādapaḥ ॥ 1.35.20 ॥

mahākumbhapramāṇaistu puṣpairvikacakesaraiḥ।
mahāgandhairmanojñaiśca śobhitaḥ sarvakālajaiḥ ॥ 1.35.21 ॥

sahasramadhikaṃ so'tha gandhenāpūrayaddiśaḥ।
yojanānāṃ samantādvai mandamārutavījitaḥ ॥ 1.35.22 ॥

varaketureva prathito bhadrāśvo nāma yo dvijāḥ।
yatra sākṣāt hṛṣīkeśaḥ siddhasaṅghairmahīyate ॥ 1.35.23 ॥

tasya rudrakadambasya tadā śvetaharo hariḥ ।
prāptavānaparaśreṣṭhaḥ sa tatra sahitaḥ purā ॥ 1.35.24 ॥

tena cālokitaṃ sarvaṃ dvīpaṃ dvipadanāyakāḥ।
yasya nāmnā samākhyāto bhadrāśvo nāma nāmataḥ ॥ 1.35.25 ॥

dakṣiṇasyāpi śailasya śikhare devasevitā।
jambūḥ sadā puṣpaphalā sadā mālyopaśobhitā ॥ 1.35.26 ॥

mahāmūlairmahāskandhaiḥ snigdhavarṇairvibhūṣitā।
navaiḥ sadā puṣpaphalaiḥ śākhābhiścopaśobhitā ॥ 1.35.27 ॥

tasyā hyatipramāṇāni svādūni ca mṛdūni ca।
phalānyamṛtakalpāni patanti girimūrddhani ॥ 1.35.28 ॥

tasmādgirivaraprasthāt punaḥ prasyandavāhinī।
nadī jambūnadī nāma pravṛttā madhuvāhinī ॥ 1.35.29 ॥

tatra jāmbūnadannāma suvarṇaṃ jvalanaprabham।
devālaṅkāramatulaṃ jāyate pāpanāśanam ॥ 1.35.30 ॥

devadānavagandharvā yakṣarākṣasapannagāḥ।
yat pibantyamṛtaprakhyaṃ madhu jāmbhūrasasravam ॥ 1.35.31 ॥

sa keturdakṣiṇe dvīpe jambhūrlokeṣu viśrutā।
yasyā nāmnā sa vikhyāto jambhūdvīpaḥ sanātanaḥ ॥ 1.35.32 ॥

vipulasyāpi śailasya paścimasya mahātmanaḥ।
jātaḥ śrṛṅge'tisumahānaśvattha ścaiva pādapaḥ ॥ 1.35.33 ॥

vilambivaramālādyaḥ suvarṇamaṇivedikaḥ।
mahoccaskandhaviṭapo naikasattvaguṇālayaḥ ॥ 1.35.34 ॥

kumbhapramāṇaiḥ sukhadaiḥ phalaiḥ sarvarttukaiḥ śubhaiḥ।
sa ketuḥ ketumālānāṃ devagandharvasevitaḥ ॥ 1.35.35 ॥

ketumāleti ca yathā tasyā nāma prakīrtitam।
tannibodhata viprendrā niruktaṃ nāma karmataḥ ॥ 1.35.36 ॥

kṣīrodamathane vṛtte daityapakṣe parājite।
mahāsamarasammardavṛkṣakṣobhavimarditā ॥ 1.35.37 ॥

sahasrākṣeṇa vihitā mālā tasya sutānitā।
tasya skandhe samāsaktyā hyaśvatthasya vanaspateḥ ॥ 1.35.38 ॥

sā tathaiva mahāgandhā hyamlānā sarvakāmikī।
ijyate sumahābhāgā vividhaiḥ siddhacāraṇaiḥ ॥ 1.35.39 ॥

tasya ketoḥ sadā mālā devadattā virājate।
pavaneneritā divyaṃ vāti gandhaṃ manoramam ॥ 1.35.40 ॥

tābhyāṃ nāmāṅkito dvīpaḥ paścime bahuvistaraḥ।
ketumāla iti khyāto divi ceha ca sarvaśaḥ ॥ 1.35.41 ॥

svapārśvasyottare cāpi śrṛṅge jāto mahādrumaḥ ।
nyagrodho vipulaskandho'nekayojanamaṇḍalaḥ ॥ 1.35.42 ॥

mālyadāmakalāpaiśca vividhairgandhaśālibhiḥ।
śākāvilambī śuśubhe siddhacāraṇasevitaḥ ॥ 1.35.43 ॥

pravālakumbhasadṛśairmadhupūrṇaiḥ phalaiḥ sadā।
sa hyuttara kurūṇāntu ketuvṛkṣaḥ prakāśate ॥ 1.35.44 ॥

sanatkumārāvarajā mānasā brahmaṇaḥ sutāḥ।
sapta tatra mahābhāgāḥ kuravo nāma viśrutāḥ ॥ 1.35.45 ॥

tatra tairāgatajñānaiḥ sattvasthaiḥ puṇyakīrtibhiḥ।
akṣayaṃ kṣemamaparaṃ lokaṃ prāptaṃ sanātanam ॥ 1.35.46 ॥

teṣāṃ nāmāṅkito dvīpaḥ saptānāṃ vai mahātmanām ।
divi ceha ca vikhyātā uttarāḥ kuravaḥ sadā ॥ 1.35.47 ॥

iti śrīmahāpurāṇe vāyuprokte jambūdvīpavarṇanaṃ nāma pañcatriṃśo'dhyāyaḥ ।। 35 ।

## 1.36

।।sūta uvāca।।
teṣāṃ caturṇāṃ vakṣyāmi śailendrāṇāṃ yathākramam।
anubandhāni ramyāṇi sarvakālarttukāni ca ॥ 1.36.1 ॥

sārikābhirmayūraiśca cakoraiśca madotkaṭaiḥ।
śukaiśca bhṛṅgarājaiśca citrakaiśca samantataḥ ॥ 1.36.2 ॥

jīvañjīvakanādaiśca hemakānāñca nāditaiḥ।
mattakokilanādaiśca valgūnāñca nināditaiḥ ॥ 1.36.3 ॥

sugrīvakāñcanaravaiḥ kalaviṅkarutaistathā।
kūjitāntaraśabdaiśca suramyāṇi ca sarvaśaḥ ॥ 1.36.4 ॥

madātkaṭairmadhuraiśca bhramaraiśca mahālasaiḥ।
upagītavanāntāni kinnaraiśca vkacit vkacit ॥ 1.36.5 ॥

puṣpavṛṣṭiṃ vimuñcanti mandamārutakampitāḥ।
taravo yatra dṛśyante cārupallavaśobhitāḥ ॥ 1.36.6 ॥

stabakairmañjarībhiśca tāmraiḥ kisalayaistathā।
mandavātavaśāllolairdolayadbhiryutāni ca ॥ 1.36.7 ॥

nānādhātuvicitraiśca kāntarūpaiḥ śilāśataiḥ।
śallaiḥ vkaciddvijaśreṣṭā vinyastaiḥ śobhitāni ca ॥ 1.36.8 ॥

devadānavagandharvairyakṣarākṣasapannagaiḥ।
siddhāpsarogaṇaiścaiva sevitāni tatastataḥ ॥ 1.36.9 ॥

manoharāṇi catvāri devākrīḍanakānyatha।
caturdiśamudārāṇi nāmnā śrṛṇuta tāni me ॥ 1.36.10 ॥

pūrvañcaitrarathaṃ nāma dakṣiṇaṃ nandanaṃ vanam।
vaibhrājaṃ paścimaṃ vidyāduttaraṃ saviturvanam ॥ 1.36.11 ॥

mahāvaneṣu caiteṣu niviṣṭāni yathākramam।
anubandhāni ramyāṇi vihaṅgaiḥ kūjitāni ca ॥ 1.36.12 ॥

vanairvistīrṇatīrthāni mahāpuṇyāvanāni ca।
mahānāgādhivāsāni sevitāni mahātmabhiḥ ॥ 1.36.13 ॥

surasāmalaloyāni śivāni susukhāni ca।
siddhadevāsuravarairupaspṛṣṭajalāni ca ॥ 1.36.14 ॥

chatrapramāṇairvikacairmahāgandhairmanoharaiḥ।
puṇḍarīkairmahāpatrairutpalaiḥ śobhitāni ca।
mahāsarāṃsi catvāri tāni vakṣyāmi nāmataḥ ॥ 1.36.15 ॥

aruṇodaṃ saraḥ pūrvaṃ dakṣiṇaṃ mānasaṃ smṛtam।
sitodaṃ paścimasaro mahābhadrantathottaram ॥ 1.36.16 ॥

aruṇodañca pūrveṇa ye ca śailāstataḥ smṛtāḥ।
tān kīrtyamānāṃstattvena śrṛṇudhvaṃ vistarānmama ॥ 1.36.17 ॥

śītāntaśca kumuñjaśca suvīraścācalottamaḥ।
vikaṅko maṇiśīlaśca vṛṣabhaścācalottamaḥ ॥ 1.36.18 ॥
mahānīlo'tha rucakaḥ sabindurmandarastathā।
veṇumāṃśca sumedhaśca niṣadho devaparvataḥ ॥ 1.36.19 ॥

ityete parvatavarā anye ca girayastathā।
pūrveṇa mandarasyaite siddhavāsā udāhṛtāḥ ॥ 1.36.20 ॥
saraso mānasasyeha dakṣiṇā ye mahācalāḥ।
ye kīrtitā mayā te vai nāmatastānnibodhata ॥ 1.36.21 ॥

śailastriśikharaścāpi śiśiraścācalottamaḥ।
kaliṅgaśca pataṅgaśca rucakaścaiva sānumān ॥ 1.36.22 ॥

tāmrābhaśca viśākhaśca tathā śvetodaro giriḥ।
samūlo viṣadhāraśca ratnadhāraśca parvataḥ ॥ 1.36.23 ॥

ekaśrṛṅgo mahāmūlo gajaśailaḥ piśācakaḥ।
pañcaśailo'tha kailāso himavaṃścācalottamaḥ ॥ 1.36.24 ॥

ityete devacaritā hyutkṛṣṭāḥ parvatottamāḥ।
digbhāgo dakṣiṇe proktā meroramaravarccasaḥ ॥ 1.36.25 ॥

apareṇa sitodasya saraso dvijasattamāḥ।
uttamā ye mahāśailāstān pravakṣye yathākramam ॥ 1.36.26 ॥

suvakṣāḥ śikhiśailaśca kālo vaiḍhūryaparvataḥ।
kapilaḥ piṅgalo rudraḥ surasaśca mahācalaḥ ॥ 1.36.27 ॥

kumudo madhumāṃścaiva añjanīmukuṭastathā।
kṛṣṇaśca pāṇḍaraścaiva sahasraśikharaścaha ॥ 1.36.28 ॥

pāriyātraśca śailendrastriśrṛṅgaścācalottamaḥ।
ityete parvatavarā digbhāge paścime smṛtāḥ ॥ 1.36.29 ॥

mahābhadrasya sarasa uttareṇāpi śrīmataḥ।
ye mayā pūrvataḥ proktāstānvadiṣye yathākramam ॥ 1.36.30 ॥

śaṅkukūṭo mahāśailo vṛṣabho haṃsaparvataḥ।
nāgaśca kapilaścaiva indraśailaśca sānumān ॥ 1.36.31 ॥

nīlaḥ kanaka śrṛṅgaśca śataśrṛṅgaśca parvataḥ।
puṣpako meghaśailaśca virājaścācalottamaḥ।
jārudhiścaiva śailendra ityete uttarāḥ smṛtāḥ ॥ 1.36.32 ॥

eteṣāṃ śailamukhyānāmantareṣu yathākramam।
sthalyo'hyantaradroṇyaśca sarāṃsi ca nibodhata ॥ 1.36.33 ॥

iti śrīmahāpurāṇe vāyuprokte bhuvanavinyāso nāma ṣaṭ‌triṃśo'dhyāyaḥ ।। 36 ।

## 1.37

।।sūta uvāca।।
śītāntasyācalendrasya kumuñjasyāntareṇa tu।
droṇyo vihaṅgasaṅghuṣṭā nānāsattvaniṣevitāḥ ॥ 1.37.1 ॥

triyojanaśatāyāmā vistīrṇāḥ śatayojanāḥ।
surasāmalapānīyaramyaṃ tatra sarovaram ॥ 1.37.2 ॥

droṇyāyāmapramāṇaistu puṇḍarīkaiḥ sugandhibhiḥ।
sahasraśatapatrairhi mahāpadmairalaṃkṛtam ॥ 1.37.3 ॥

mahoragairadhyuṣitaṃ mahābhogairdurāsadaiḥ।
devadānavagandharvairupaspṛṣṭaṃ jalaṃ śubham ॥ 1.37.4 ॥

puṇyaṃ tacchrīsaro nāma prakāśaṃ divi ceha ca।
prasannajalasampūrṇaṃ śaraṇyaṃ sarvadehinām ॥ 1.37.5 ॥

tatra tvekaṃ mahāpadmaṃ madhye padmavanasya ha।
koṭipatrapracāraṃ tattaruṇādityavarcasam ॥ 1.37.6 ॥

nityaṃ vyākośamajaraṃ cāñcalyāccātimaṇḍalam।
cārukeśarajālāḍhyaṃ mattaṣaṭ‌padanāditam ॥ 1.37.7 ॥

tasmin padme bhagavatī sākṣācchrīrnityameva hi।
lakṣmyāḥ padmaṃ tadāvāsaṃ mūrttimatyā na saṃśayaḥ ॥ 1.37.8 ॥

sarasastasya pūrvasmin tīre siddhaniṣevita।
sadā puṣpaphalaṃ ramyaṃ tatra bilvavanaṃ mahat ॥ 1.37.9 ॥

śatayojanavistīrṇaṃ triyojanaśatāya tam।
ardhakrośoccaśikharairmahāvṛkṣaiḥ sahasraśaḥ ॥ 1.37.10 ॥

śākhāsahasrakalitairmahāskandhaiḥ samākulam।
phalaiḥ suvarṇasaṅkāśairharitaiḥ pāṇḍaraistathā ॥ 1.37.11 ॥

amṛtasvādusadṛśairbherīmātraiḥ sugandhibhiḥ।
śīryamāṇaiḥ patadbhiśca kīrṇā bhūmirnirantarā ॥ 1.37.12 ॥

nāmnā tacchrīvanaṃ nāma sarvalokeṣu viśrutam।
gandharvaiḥ kinnarairyakṣairmahānāgaiśca sevitam ॥ 1.37.13 ॥

siddhaiścaiva samākīrṇaṃ nityaṃ bilvaphalāśibhiḥ।
vividhairbhūtasaṅghaiśca nityameva niṣevitam ॥ 1.37.14 ॥

tasmin vane bhagavatī sākṣācchrīrnityameva hi।
devī sannihitā tatra siddhasaṅghairnamaskṛtā ॥ 1.37.15 ॥

vikaṅkasyācalendrasya maṇiśailasya cāntare।
śatayojanavistīrṇaṃ dviyojanaśatāyatam ॥ 1.37.16 ॥

vipulañcampakavanaṃ siddhacāraṇasevitam।
puṣpalakṣmyāvṛtaṃ bhāti jvalantamiva nityadā ॥ 1.37.17 ॥

arddhakrośoccaśikharairmahāskandhaiḥ palāśibhiḥ ।
praphullaśākhāśikharaiḥ piñjaraṃ bhāti tadvanam ॥ 1.37.18 ॥

dvibāhupariṇāhaistaistrihastāyāmavistaraiḥ ।
manaḥ śilācūrṇanibhaiḥ pāṇḍukesaraśālibhiḥ ॥ 1.37.19 ॥

puṣpairmanoharairvyāptaṃ vyākośairgandhaśālibhiḥ।
virājate vanaṃ sarvaṃ mattabhramaranāditam ॥ 1.37.20 ॥

tadvanaṃ dānavairdevagandharvairyakṣarākṣasaiḥ।
kinnarairapsarobhiśca mahānāgaiśca sevitam ॥ 1.37.21 ॥

tatrāśramaṃ bhagavataḥ kaśyapasya prajāpateḥ।
siddhasādhyagaṇā kīrṇaṃ nānāśrutivibhūṣitam।
mahānīlakumuñjābhyāmantarepyacalāvatha ॥ 1.37.22 ॥

mahānadyāḥ sukhāyāstu tīre siddhaniṣevite।
pañcāśadyojanāyāmaṃ triṃśadyojanavistaram।
ramyaṃ tālavanaṃ taddhi arddhakrośoccamastakam ॥ 1.37.23 ॥

mahāmūlairmahāsāraiḥ sthirairaviralaiḥ śubhaiḥ।
kumudāñjanasaṃsthānaiḥ parivṛttairmahā phalaiḥ।
mṛṣṭagandharasopetairupetaṃ siddhasevitam ॥ 1.37.24 ॥

māhendrasya dvipendrasya tatra vāsa udāhṛtaḥ।
airāvatasya bhadrasya sarvalokeṣu viśrutaḥ ॥ 1.37.25 ॥

veṇumantasya śailasya sumedhasyottareṇa ca।
sahasrayojanāyāmaṃ vistīrṇaṃ śatayojanam ॥ 1.37.26 ॥

vṛkṣagulmalatāgucchaiḥ sarvavīrudbhirīritam।
dūrvāprastāramevātha sarvasatvavivarjitam ॥ 1.37.27 ॥

tathā niṣadhaśailasya devaśailasya cottare।
sahasrayojanāyāmā śatayojanavistṛtā ॥ 1.37.28 ॥

 savāṃhyekaśilā bhūmirvṛkṣavīrudvivarjitā।
āplutā pādamātreṇa hyudakena samantataḥ ॥ 1.37.29 ॥

ityetā hyantaradroṇyo nānākārāḥ prakīrttitāḥ।
meroḥ pūrveṇa viprendrā yathāvadanupūrvaśaḥ ॥ 1.37.30 ॥

iti śrīmahāpurāṇe vāyuprokte bhuvanavinyāso nāma saptatriṃśo'dhyāyaḥ ।। 37 ।

## 1.38

।।sūta uvāca ।।
ataḥ paraṃ pravakṣyāmi dakṣiṇāndiśamāśritāḥ।
yā droṇyaḥ siddhacaritāḥ śṛṇu tā hyanupūrvaśaḥ ॥ 1.38.1 ॥

śiśirasyācalendrasya pataṅgasyāntareṇa ca।
ślakṣṇabhūmiśriyā yuktaṃ latāliṅgitapādapam ॥ 1.38.2 ॥

pṛthukṣepoccaśikharaiḥ pādapairupaśobhitam।
udumbaravanaṃ ramyaṃ pakṣisaṅghaniṣevitam ॥ 1.38.3 ॥

pakvairvidrumasaṅkāśai rmadhupūrṇairmanoramaiḥ।
jvalitaṃ tadvanaṃ bhāti mahākumbhopamaiḥ phalaiḥ ॥ 1.38.4 ॥

tat siddhayakṣagandharvāḥ kinnarā uragāstathā।
vidyādharāśca muditā upajīvanti nityaśaḥ ॥ 1.38.5 ॥

prasannasvādusalilāstatra nadyo bahūdakāḥ।
surasāmalatoyāstāḥ sarāṃsi ca samantataḥ ॥ 1.38.6 ॥

tatrāśramaṃ bhagavataḥ karddamasya prajāpateḥ।
ramyaṃ suragaṇākīrṇaṃ sarvataścitrakānanam।
samantādyojanaśataṃ tadvanaṃ parimaṇḍalam ॥ 1.38.7 ॥

tāmravarṇasya śailasya pataṅgasyāntareṇa tu।
śatayojanavistīrṇaṃ dviyojanaśatāyatam ॥ 1.38.8 ॥

taruṇādityasaṅkāśaiḥ puṇḍarīkaiḥ samantataḥ।
sahasrapatrairvikacairmahāpadmairalaṅkṛtam ॥ 1.38.9 ॥

tathā bhramarasaṃlīnaiḥ śatapatraiḥ sugandhibhiḥ।
praphulllaiḥ śobhitajalaṃ raktanīlairmahotpalaiḥ ॥ 1.38.10 ॥

sarovaraṃ mahāpuṇyaṃ devadānavasevitam।
mahoragairadhyuṣitaṃ nīlajāla vibhūṣitam ॥ 1.38.11 ॥

tasya madhye janapado hyāyataḥ śatayojanaḥ।
triṃśadyojanavistīrṇo raktadhātuvibhūṣitaḥ ॥ 1.38.12 ॥

tasyopari mahāramyā prāṃśu prākāratoraṇā।
naranārīgaṇākīrṇā sphītā vibhavavistaraiḥ ॥ 1.38.13 ॥

valabhīkūṭanirvyūhairmaṇibhaktivicitritaiḥ।
ratnacitrārpitatalaiḥ ślakṣṇacitrottaracchadaiḥ ॥ 1.38.14 ॥

mahābhavanamālābhirmahāprāṃśubhiruttamaiḥ।
vidyādharapuraṃ tatra śobhate bhrājayacchubham ॥ 1.38.15 ॥

vidyādharapatistatra pulomā tatra viśrutaḥ।
citraveṣadharaḥ sragvī māhendrasadṛśadyutiḥ ॥ 1.38.16 ॥

dīptānāṃ citraveṣāṇāṃ sūryapratimatejasām।
vidyādharasahasrāṇāmanekeṣāṃ sa rājarāṭ ॥ 1.38.17 ॥

viśākhasyācalendrasya pataṅgasyāntareṇa ca।
sarasastāmravarṇasya pūrve tīre pariśrutam ॥ 1.38.18 ॥

pañceṣukṣepaṇairviddhaṃ suśākhaṃ varṇaśobhitam ।
sarva kālaphalaṃ tatra sphītaṃ cāmravaṇaṃ mahat ॥ 1.38.19 ॥

phalaiḥ kanakasaṅkāśairmahāsvādaiḥ sugandhibhiḥ।
mahākumbhapramāṇaiścātanuśākhaiḥ samantataḥ ॥ 1.38.20 ॥

gandharvakinnarā yakṣā nāgā vidyādharāstathā।
pibantyāmrarasaṃ tatra susvāduṃ hyamṛtopamam ॥ 1.38.21 ॥

tatrāmrarasapītānāṃ muditānāṃ mahātmanām।
śrūyante hṛṣṭa puṣṭānāṃ nādāstasmin mahāvane ॥ 1.38.22 ॥

sumūlasyācalendrasya vasudhārasya cāntare।
samā surabhipūrṇāḍhyā vihaṅgairupaśobhitā ॥ 1.38.23 ॥

triṃśadyojanavistīrṇā pañcāśadyojanāyatā।
tatra bilvasthalī viprāḥ śuddhā nimnaphaladrumāḥ ॥ 1.38.24 ॥

susvādairvidrumanibhaiḥ phalairbilvairmahopamaiḥ।
śīryamāṇairviśīrṇaiśca praklinnatalamṛttikāḥ ॥ 1.38.25 ॥

tāṃ sthalīmupajīvanti yakṣagandharvakinnarāḥ।
siddhā nāgāśca bahuśo nityaṃ bilvaphalāśinaḥ ॥ 1.38.26 ॥

antare vasudhārasya ratnadhārasya cāntare।
triṃśadyojanavistīrṇamāyataṃ śatayojanam ॥ 1.38.27 ॥

sugandhaṃ kiṃśukavanaṃ nityaṃ puṣpitapādapam।
puṣpalakṣmyāvṛtaṃ bhāti pradīptamiva sarvataḥ ॥ 1.38.28 ॥

yasya gandhena divyena vāsyate parimaṇḍalam।
samagraṃ yojanaśataṃ kānanāni samantataḥ ॥ 1.38.29 ॥

tat siddhacāraṇagaṇairapsarobhiśca sevitam ।
ramyaṃ tat kiṃśuka vanaṃ jalāśayavibhūṣitam ॥ 1.38.30 ॥

tatrādityasya devasya dīptamāyatanaṃ mahat ।
māse māse'natarati tatra sūryaḥ prajāpatiḥ ॥ 1.38.31 ॥

tatra kālasya karttāraṃ sahasrāṃśuṃ surottamam।
siddhasaṅghā namasyanti sarvalokanamaskṛtam ॥ 1.38.32 ॥

pañcakūṭasya śailasya kailāsasyāntareṇa tu।
ṣaṭ‌triṃśadyojanāyāmaṃ vistīrṇaṃ śatayojanam ॥ 1.38.33 ॥

kṣudrasattvairanādhṛṣyaṃ sarvato haṃsapāṇḍuram।
duṣpāraṃ sarvasatvānāṃ durgamaṃ lomaharṣaṇam ॥ 1.38.34 ॥

ityetā hyantaradroṇyo dakṣiṇe parikīrtitāḥ।
yathānupūrvamakhilāḥ siddhasaṅghaniṣevitāḥ ॥ 1.38.35 ॥

paśvimāyāṃ diśitathā ye'ntaradroṇivistarāḥ।
tān varṇyamānāṃstatvena śrṛṇutemān dvijottamāḥ ॥ 1.38.36 ॥

antarāle girau tasmin suvakṣaḥ śikhiśailayoḥ।
samantādyojanaśatamekabhūmaṃ śilātalam ॥ 1.38.37 ॥

nityataptaṃ mahāghoraṃ duḥsparśaṃ romaharṣaṇam।
agamyaṃ sarvasattvānāmīśvarāṇāṃ sudāruṇam ॥ 1.38.38 ॥

madhye tasyāṃ śilāsthalyāṃ triṃśadyojanamaṇḍalam।
jvālāsahasrakalilaṃ vahnisthānaṃ sudāruṇam ॥ 1.38.39 ॥

anindhanastatra sadā jvālāmālī vibhāvasuḥ।
jvalatyeṣa sadā devaḥ śaśvattatra hutāśanaḥ ॥ 1.38.40 ॥

adhidevakṛte yo'sāvagnerbhāgo vidhīyate।
sa tatra jvalate nityaṃ lokasaṃvarttako'nalaḥ ॥ 1.38.41 ॥

antare śailavarayordevā vāpi tayoḥ śubhāḥ ।
mātuluṅgasthalī tatra hyāyāmāddaśayojanā ॥ 1.38.42 ॥

madhuvyañjanasaṃsthānaiḥ surasaiḥ kanakaprabhaiḥ।
phalaiḥ pariṇataiḥ sarvā śobhitā sā mahāsthalī ॥ 1.38.43 ॥

tatrāśramaṃ mahā puṇyaṃ siddhasaṅghaniṣevitam।
bṛhaspateḥ pramuditaṃ sarvakāmaguṇairyutam ॥ 1.38.44 ॥

tathaiva śailavarayoḥ kumudāñjanayorapi।
antare kesaradroṇī hyanekāyāma yojanā ॥ 1.38.45 ॥

dvibāhupariṇāhaistaistrihastāyatavistṛtaiḥ।
candrāṃśuvarṇairvyākośairmattaṣaṭpadanāditaiḥ ॥ 1.38.46 ॥

madhusarpīrajaḥ pṛktairmahāgandhairmanoharaiḥ।
śabalaṃ tadvanaṃ bhāti kusumaiḥ sarvakālajaiḥ ॥ 1.38.47 ॥

tatra viṣṇoḥ suragurordīptamāyatanaṃ mahat।
prakāśantriṣu lokeṣu sarvalokanamaskṛtam ॥ 1.38.48 ॥

antare śailavarayoḥ kṛṣṇapāṇḍurayorapi।
triṃśadyojanavistīrṇaṃ navatyāyatayojanam ॥ 1.38.49 ॥

ślakṣṇamekaśilaṃ deśaṃ vṛkṣavīrudvivarjitam ।
sukhapādapracā rañca nimnonnatavivarjitam ॥ 1.38.50 ॥

madhye tu sarasastasya ramyā tu sthalapadminī।
sahasrapatrairvyākośaiḥ chatramātrairalaṅkṛtā ॥ 1.38.51 ॥

puṇḍarīkairmahāpadmai rucirairgandhaśālibhiḥ ।
śatapatraiśca vikacairutpalairnīlapatrakaiḥ ॥ 1.38.52 ॥

madotkaṭairmadhukarairbhramaraiśca madotkaṭaiḥ।
mṛdugadghadakaṇṭānāṃ kinnarāṇāñca nisvanaiḥ ॥ 1.38.53 ॥

upagītapadmakhaṇḍāḍhyā vistīrṇā sthalapadminī।
yakṣagandharvacaritā siddhacāraṇasevitā ॥ 1.38.54 ॥

madhye tasyāśca padminyāḥ pañcayojanamaṇḍalaḥ।
nyagrodho vipulaskandho hyanekārohimaṇḍitaḥ ॥ 1.38.55 ॥

tatra candraprabhaḥ śrīmān pūrṇacandranibhānana)।
sahasravadano devo nīlavāsāḥ surārihā ॥ 1.38.56 ॥

padma mālyadharasthalyāṃ mahābhāgo'parājitaḥ।
ijyate yakṣagandharvairvidyādharagaṇaistathā ॥ 1.38.57 ॥

tasminnāyatane sākṣādanādinidhano hariḥ।
padmopahāraurvividhai rijyate siddhacāraṇaiḥ ॥ 1.38.58 ॥

tadanantasado nāma sarvalokeṣu viśrutam।
padmamālāvalambābhirmālābhirupaśobhitam ॥ 1.38.59 ॥

tathā sahasraśikharakumudasyāntareṇa ca।
pañcāśadyojanāyāmaṃ triṃśadyojanavistaram ।
iṣukṣepoccaśikharaṃ nānāvihagasevitam ॥ 1.38.60 ॥

mahāgandhairmahāsvādairgajadehanibhaiḥ phalaiḥ।
madhusravairmahāvṛkṣairupetaṃ tat samantataḥ ॥ 1.38.61 ॥

tatrāśramaṃ mahāpuṇyaṃ devarṣigaṇasevitam।
śukrasya prathitaṃ tatra bhāsvaraṃ puṇyakarmaṇaḥ ॥ 1.38.62 ॥

śaṅkukūṭasya śailasya vṛṣabhasyāntareṇa ca।
parūṣakasthalī ramyā hyanekāyatayojanā ॥ 1.38.63 ॥

bilvapramāṇaiśca śubhairmahāsvādaiḥ sugandhibhiḥ।
phalaiḥ praklidyate bhūmiḥ paruṣairvṛntavicyutaiḥ ॥ 1.38.64 ॥

tāṃ sthalīmupajīvanti kinnaroragasādhavaḥ।
parūṣakarasonmattā mānāḍhyāstatra cāraṇāḥ ॥ 1.38.65 ॥

kapiñjalasya śailasya nāgaśailasya cāntare।
dviyojanaśatāyāmā vistīrṇā śatayojanā ॥ 1.38.66 ॥

sthalī manoharā sā hi nānāvanavibhūṣitā ।
nānāpuṣpaphalopetā kinnaroragasevitā ॥ 1.38.67 ॥

drākṣāvanāni ramyāṇi tathā nāgavanāni ca।
kharjūravanakhaṇḍāni nīlāśokavanāni ca ॥ 1.38.68 ॥

dāḍimānāñca svādūnāmakṣoṭakavanāni ca।
atasītilakānāñca kadalīnāṃ vanāni ca ॥ 1.38.69 ॥

badarīṇāñca svādūnāṃ vanakhaṇḍāni sarvaśaḥ।
svāduśītāmbupūrṇābhirnadībhiḥ śobhitāni ca ॥ 1.38.70 ॥

tathā puṣpakaśailasya mahāmeghasya cāntare।
ṣaṣṭiyojanavistīrṇā sā bhūmiḥ śatamāyatā ॥ 1.38.71 ॥
samā pāṇitalaprakhyā kaṭinā pāṇḍurā ghanā।
vṛkṣagulmalatāgulmaistṛṇaiśvāpi vivarjitā ॥ 1.38.72 ॥

varjitā vividhaiḥ satvairnnityamasmin nirāśrayā।
sā kānanasthalī nāma dāruṇā romaharṣaṇā ॥ 1.38.73 ॥

mahāsarāṃsi ca tathā mahāvṛkṣāstathaiva ca।
mahāvanāni sarvāṇi kāntanāmāni sarvaśaḥ ॥ 1.38.74 ॥

sarasāñca vanānāñca sā sthalī ca prajāpateḥ।
kṣudrāṇāṃ sarasāñcaiva saṅkhyā tatra na vidyate ॥ 1.38.75 ॥

daśa dvādaśa saptāṣṭau viṃśatrriṃśacca yojanāḥ।
sthalyo droṇyaśca vikhyātāḥ sarāṃsi ca vanāni ca ॥ 1.38.76 ॥

kecit santi mahāghorāḥ śyāmāḥ parvatakukṣayaḥ।
sūryāṃśujālairaspṛṣṭā nityaṃ śītā durāsadāḥ ॥ 1.38.77 ॥

tathā hyanalataptāni sarāṃsi dvijasattamāḥ।
śailakukṣyantarasthāni sahasrāṇi śatāni ca ॥ 1.38.78 ॥

iti śrīmahāpurāṇe vāyuprokte bhuvanavinyāso nāmāṣṭatriṃśo'dhyāyaḥ ।। 38 ।

## 1.39

।।sūta uvāca।।
ataḥ paraṃ pravakṣyāmi yasmin yasmin śiloccaye।
ye sanniviṣṭā devānāṃ vividhānāṃ gṛhottamāḥ ॥ 1.39.1 ॥

tatra yo'sau mahāśailaḥ śītānto naika vistaraḥ।
naikadhātuśataiścitrairnaikaratnākarākaraḥ ॥ 1.39.2 ॥

nitambaiḥ puṣpasālambairnaikasattvaguṇālayaḥ।
mahārhamaṇicitrābhirhemavaṃśairalaṃkṛtaḥ ॥ 1.39.3 ॥

nitambaiḥ ṣaṭpadodgītaiḥ pravālairhemacitrakaiḥ।
taṭaiḥ kusumasaṅkīrṇairmattabhramaranāditaiḥ ॥ 1.39.4 ॥

latālambaiścitravadbhiścitrairdhātuśatārcitaiḥ।
sānubhī ratnacitraiśca puṣpāḍhyaiśca vibhūṣitaḥ ॥ 1.39.5 ॥

vimalasvādupānīyairnaikaprasravamairyutaḥ।
nikuñjaiḥ kusumotkīrṇairanekaiśca vibhūṣitaḥ ॥ 1.39.6 ॥

puṣmauḍupavahābhiśca sravantībhiralaṃkṛtaḥ।
kinnarācaritābhiśca darībhiḥ sarvatastataḥ ॥ 1.39.7 ॥

yakṣagandharvacaritairanekaiḥ kandarodaraiḥ।
śobhitaśca sukhāsevyaiścitrairgahanasaṅkaṭaiḥ ॥ 1.39.8 ॥

nānāsatvagaṇākīrṇaiḥ supānīyaiḥ sukhāśrayaiḥ।
nānāpuṣpaphalopetaiḥ pādapaiḥ samalaṃkṛtaḥ ।। 39.9 .
tasmin guhāśrayākīrṇe anekodarakandare।
krīḍāvanaṃ mahendrasya sarvakāmaguṇairyutam ॥ 1.39.9 ॥

tatra taddevarājasya pārijātavanaṃ mahat।
prakāśaṃ triṣu lokeṣu gīyate śrutiniścayāt ॥ 1.39.10 ॥

taruṇādityasaṃkāśai rmahāgandhairmanoharaiḥ।
puṣpairbhāti nagaśreṣṭhaḥ sudīpta iva sarvaśaḥ ॥ 1.39.11 ॥

samagraṃ yojanaśataṃ taṃ gandhamanilo vavau।
pārijātakapuṣmāṇāṃ māhendra vananirgataḥ ॥ 1.39.12 ॥

vaiḍhūryanīlaiḥ kamalaiḥ sauvarṇairvajrakesaraiḥ।
sarvagandhabalopetairmattaṣaṭpadanāditaiḥ ॥ 1.39.13 ॥

vyākośaurvikacaiścāpi śatapatrairmanoharaiḥ।
sapaṅkajairmahā patrairvāpyastatra vibhūṣitāḥ ॥ 1.39.14 ॥

virejurantarambusthāḥ sauvarṇamaṇibhūṣitāḥ।
paripsandekṣaṇā nityaṃ mīnayūthāḥ sahasraśaḥ ॥ 1.39.15 ॥

kūrmaiścānekasaṃsthānairhemaratnapariṣkṛtaiḥ।
cañcūryamāṇaiḥ salilairbhāti citraṃ samantataḥ ॥ 1.39.16 ॥

nānāvarṇaiśca śakhunairnānāratnatanūruhaiḥ।
suvarṇapuṣpaiścānekairmaṇituṇḍairdvijātibhiḥ ॥ 1.39.17 ॥

valgusvaraiḥ sadonmattaiḥ sampatadbhiḥ samantataḥ।
śuśubhe tadvanaṃ ramyaṃ sahasrākṣasya dhīmataḥ ॥ 1.39.18 ॥

mattabhramarasannādairvihaṅgānāñca kūjitaiḥ।
nityamā nanditavanaṃ tasmāt krīḍāvanaṃ mahat ॥ 1.39.19 ॥

suvarṇapārśvaiśca nagairmaṇimuktāpuraskṛtaiḥ।
maṇiśrṛṅgakalāpannaiḥ patadbhiśca samantataḥ ॥ 1.39.20 ॥

śākhāmṛgaiśca citrāṅgairnānāratnatanūruhaiḥ।
nānāvarṇaprakāraiśca satvairanyaiḥ samākulam ॥ 1.39.21 ॥

muñcanti puṣpavarṣañca tatra bālalatā drumāḥ।
pārijātakapuṣpāṇāṃ mandamāruta kampitāḥ ॥ 1.39.22 ॥

śayanāsananirvyūhaiḥ stīrṇai ratnavibhūṣitaiḥ।
vihārabhūmayastatra dvijāḥ śakravane śubhāḥ।
na ca śīto na cāpyuṣṇo ravistatra samaḥ sadā ॥ 1.39.23 ॥

nityamunmādajanano madhumādhavasambhavaḥ।
vāti cāpyanilastatra nānāpuṣpādhivāsitaḥ।
nityaṃ saṅgasukhāhlādī śramaklamavināśanaḥ ॥ 1.39.24 ॥

tasminnindravane śubhre devadānavapannagāḥ।
yakṣarākṣasaguhyāśca gandharvāścāmitaujasaḥ ॥ 1.39.25 ॥

vidyādharāśca siddhāśca kinnarāśca mudā yutāḥ।
athāpsarogaṇāścaiva nityaṃ krīḍāparāyaṇāḥ ॥ 1.39.26 ॥

tasya parvatarājasya pūrve pārśve mahocitam।
kumuñcaṃ śailarājānaṃ naikanirjharakandaram ॥ 1.39.27 ॥

tasya dhātuvicitreṣu kūṭeṣu bahuvistarāḥ।
aṣṭau puryo hyudīrṇāśca dānavānāṃ mahātmanām ॥ 1.39.28 ॥

vajrake parvate cāpi anekaśikharodaraiḥ।
udīrṇā rākṣasāvāsā naranārīsamākulāḥ ॥ 1.39.29 ॥

nīlakā nāma te ghorā rākṣasāḥ kāmarūpiṇaḥ।
tatra te'bhiratā nityaṃ mahābalaparākramāḥ ॥ 1.39.30 ॥

mahānīle'pi śailendre purāṇi daśa pañca ca।
hayānanānāṃ vikhyātāḥ kinnarāṇāṃ mahātmanām ॥ 1.39.31 ॥

devaseno mahābāhurbalamindrādayastathā।
tatra kinnararājāno daśapañca ca garvitāḥ ॥ 1.39.32 ॥

suvarṇapārśvāḥ prāyeṇa nānāparṇasamākulaiḥ।
bilapraveśairnagaraiḥ śailendraḥ so'bhyalaṃkṛtaḥ ॥ 1.39.33 ॥

atidāruṇā dṛṣṭiviṣā hyagnikopā durāsadāḥ।
mahoragaśatāstatra suvarṇavaśavartinaḥ ॥ 1.39.34 ॥

sunāge'pi mahāśaile daityāvāsā- sahasraśaḥ।
harmyaprāsāda kalilāḥ prāṃśuprākāratoraṇāḥ ॥ 1.39.35 ॥

veṇumante mahāśaile vidyādharapuratrayam।
triṃśadadyojanavistīrṇaṃ pañcāśadyojanāyatam ॥ 1.39.36 ॥

ulūko romaśaścaiva mahānetraśca vīryavān।
vidyādharavarāstatra śakratulyaparākramāḥ ॥ 1.39.37 ॥

vaikaṅke śailaśikhare hyantaḥkandaranirjhare।
mahoccaśrṛṅge rucire ratnadhātuvicitrite ॥ 1.39.38 ॥

tatrāste gāruḍirnityaṃ uragārirdurāsadaḥ।
mahāvāyujavaścaṇḍaḥ sugrīvo nāma vīryavān ॥ 1.39.39 ॥

mahāpramāṇai rvikrāntairmahābalaparākramaiḥ।
saśailo hyāvṛtaḥ sarvaḥ pakṣibhiḥ pannagāribhiḥ ॥ 1.39.40 ॥

karañje'bhirato nityaṃ sākṣādbhūtapatiḥ prabhuḥ।
vṛṣabhāṅko mahādevaḥ śaṅkaro yogināṃ prabhuḥ ॥ 1.39.41 ॥

nānāveṣadharairbhūtaiḥ pramathaiśca durāsadaiḥ।
karañje sānavaḥ sarve hyavakīrṇāḥ samantataḥ ॥ 1.39.42 ॥

vasudhāre vasumatāṃ vasūnāmamitaujasām।
aṣṭāvāyatanānyāhuḥ pūjitāni mahātmanām ॥ 1.39.43 ॥

ratnadhātau girivare ṛṣīṇāñca mahātmanām।
saptāśramāṇi puṇyāni siddhāvāsayutāni ca ॥ 1.39.44 ॥

mahāprajāpateḥ sthānaṃ hemaśrṛṅgo nagottame।
caturvaktrasya devasya sarvabhūtanamaskṛtam ॥ 1.39.45 ॥

gajaśaile bhagavato nānābhūtagaṇāvṛtāḥ ।
rudrāḥ pramuditā nityaṃ sarvabhūtanamaskṛtāḥ ॥ 1.39.46 ॥

sumedhe dhātucitrāḍhye śailendre meghasannibhe।
naikodaradarīvapranikuñjaiścopaśobhite ॥ 1.39.47 ॥

ādityānāṃ vasūnāñca rudrāṇāñcāmitaujasām।
tatrāyatanavinyāsā ramyāścaivāśvinorapi ॥ 1.39.48 ॥

sthānāni siddhairdevānāṃ sthāpitāni nagottame।
tatra pūjāparā nityaṃ yakṣa gandharvakinnarāḥ ॥ 1.39.49 ॥

gandharvanagarī sphītā hemakakṣe nagottame।
aśītyāmarapuryyābhā mahāprākāratoraṇā ॥ 1.39.50 ॥

siddhā hyapattanā nāma gandharvā yuddha śālinaḥ।
yeṣāmadhipatirdevo rājarājaḥ kapiñjalaḥ ॥ 1.39.51 ॥

anale rākṣasāvāsāḥ pañcakūṭe'pi dānavāḥ।
ūrjitā devaripavo mahābalaparākramāḥ ॥ 1.39.52 ॥

śataśrṛhge puraśataṃ yakṣāṇāmamitaujasām।
tāmrābhe kādraveyasya takṣakasya purottamam ॥ 1.39.53 ॥

viśākhe parvataśreṣṭe naikavapradarīśubhe।
guhāniratavāsasya guhasyāyatanaṃ mahat ॥ 1.39.54 ॥

śvetodare mahāśaile mahābhavanamaṇḍite।
puraṃ garuḍhaputrasya sunābhasya mahātmanaḥ ॥ 1.39.55 ॥

piśācake girivare harmyaṃ prāsāda maṇḍitam।
yakṣagandharvacaritaṃ kuberabhavanaṃ mahat ॥ 1.39.56 ॥

harikūṭe harirdevaḥ sarvabhūtanamaskṛtaḥ।
prabhāvāttasya śailo'sau mahānābhaḥ prakāśate ॥ 1.39.57 ॥

kumude kinnarāvāsā añjane ca mahoragāḥ।
kṛṣṇe gandharvvanagarā mahābhavanaśālinaḥ ॥ 1.39.58 ॥

pāṇḍure cāruśikhare mahāprākāratoraṇe।
vidyādharapuraṃ tatra mahābhavanamālinam ॥ 1.39.59 ॥

sahasraśikhare śaile daityānāmugrakarmmaṇām।
purāṇi samudīrṇānāṃ sahasraṃ hemamālinām ॥ 1.39.60 ॥

mukuṭe pannagāvāsā anekāḥ parvatottamāḥ।
puṣpake vai munigaṇā nityameva mudā yutāḥ ॥ 1.39.61 ॥

vaivasvatasya somasya vāyornāgādhipasya ca।
supakṣe parvatavare catvāryyāyatanāni ca ॥ 1.39.62 ॥

gandharvaiḥ kinnarairyakṣairnnāgairvidyādharottamaiḥ।
siddhairhi teṣu sthāneṣu nityamiṣṭaḥ prapūjyate ॥ 1.39.63 ॥

iti śrīmahā purāṇe vāyuprokte bhuvanavinyāso nāmaikonacatvāriṃśo'dhyāyaḥ ।। 39 ।

## 1.40

।।sūta uvāca।।
maryyādāparvate śubhre devakūṭe nibodhata।
vistīrṇe sikhare tasya kūṭe girivarasya ha ॥ 1.40.1 ॥

samantādyojanaśataṃ mahābhavanamaṇḍitam।
janmakṣetraṃ suparṇasya vainateyasya dhīmataḥ ॥ 1.40.2 ॥

naikairmahā pakṣigaṇairgāruḍaiḥ śīgravikramaiḥ।
sampūrṇavīryasampannairdamanairuragāribhiḥ ॥ 1.40.3 ॥

pakṣirājasya bhavanaṃ prathamaṃ tanmahātmanaḥ।
mahāvāyupraveśasya śālmali dvīpavāsinaḥ ॥ 1.40.4 ॥

tasyaiva cārumūrdhnastu kūṭeṣu ca maharddhiṣu।
dakṣiṇeṣu vicitreṣu saptasvapi tu śobhinaḥ ॥ 1.40.5 ॥

sandhyābhrābhāḥ samuditā rukmaprākāratoraṇāḥ।
mahābhavanamālābhiḥ śobhitā devanirmitāḥ ॥ 1.40.6 ॥

triṃśadyojanavistīrṇāścatvāriṃśattamāyatāḥ।
sapta gandharvanagarā nara nārīsamākulāḥ ॥ 1.40.7 ॥

āgneyā nāma gandharvā mahābalaparākramāḥ।
kuberānucarā dīptāsteṣānte bhavanottamāḥ ॥ 1.40.8 ॥

tasya cottarakūṭeṣu bhuvanasya mahāgireḥ।
harmyaprāsādabaddhaṃ ca udyānavanaśobhitam ॥ 1.40.9 ॥

puramāśīviṣaiḥ purṇaṃ mahāprākāratoraṇam।
vāditraśatanirghoṣairānanditavanāntaram ॥ 1.40.10 ॥

duṣprasahyamamitrāṇāṃ triṃśadyojanamaṇḍalam।
nagaraṃ saiṃhikeyānāmudīrṇaṃ devavidviṣām।
siddhadevarṣicaritaṃ devakūṭe nibodhata ॥ 1.40.11 ॥

dvitīye dvijaśārdūla maryyādāparvate śubhe।
mahābhavanamālābhirnānāvarṇābhirāvṛtam ॥ 1.40.12 ॥

suvarṇamaṇicitrābhiranekābhiralaṃkṛtam ।
viśālarathyaṃ durdharṣaṃ nityaṃ pramuditaṃ śivam ॥ 1.40.13 ॥

naranārīgaṇākīrṇaṃ prāṃśuprākāratoraṇam ।
ṣaṣṭiyojanavistīrṇaṃ śatayojanamāyatam ॥ 1.40.14 ॥

nagaraṃ kālakeyānāmasurāṇāṃ durāsadam।
devakūṭataṭe ramye sanniviṣṭaṃ sudurjayam।
mahābhracayasaṅkāśaṃ sunāsannāma viśrutam ॥ 1.40.15 ॥

tasyaiva dakṣiṇe kūṭe viṃśadyojanavistaram।
dviṣaṣṭiyojanāyāmaṃ hemaprākāratoraṇam ॥ 1.40.16 ॥

hṛṣṭapuṣṭāvaliptānāmāvāsāḥ kāmarūpiṇām।
autkacānāṃ pramuditaṃ rākṣasānāṃ mahāpuram ॥ 1.40.17 ॥

madhyame tu mahākūṭe devakūṭasya vai gireḥ ।
suvarṇamaṇipāṣāṇaiścitraiḥ ślakṣaṇataraiḥ śubhaiḥ।
śākhāśatasahasrādyairnaikārohasamākulam ॥ 1.40.18 ॥

srigdha parṇamahāmūlamanekaskandhavāhanam।
ramyaṃ hyaviralacchāyaṃ daśayojanamaṇḍalam ॥ 1.40.19 ॥

tatra bhūtavaṭannāma nānābhūtagaṇālayam।
mahādevasya prathitaṃ tryambakasya mahātmanaḥ।
dīptamāyatanaṃ tatra sarvalokeṣu viśrutam ॥ 1.40.20 ॥

varāhagajasiṃharkṣaśārdūlakarabhānanaiḥ।
gṛdhrolūkamukhaiścaiva meṣoṣṭrājamahāmukhaiḥ ॥ 1.40.21 ॥

kadambairvikaṭaiḥ sthūlairlambakeśatanūruhaiḥ।
nānāvarṇākṛtidharairnānāsaṃsthānasaṃsthitaiḥ ॥ 1.40.22 ॥

dīptairanekairugrāsyairbhūtairugraparākramaiḥ।
aśūnyamabhavannityaṃ mahāpāriṣadaistathā ॥ 1.40.23 ॥

tatra bhūtapaterbhūtā nityampūjāṃ prayuñjate।
jharjharaiḥ śaṅkhapaṭahairbherīḍiṇḍimagomukhaiḥ ॥ 1.40.24 ॥

raṇitālasitodgītai rnityaṃ valitavarjitaiḥ।
visphūrjjitaśataistatra pūjāyuktā gaṇeśvarāḥ।
prītāḥ purāripramathāstatra krīḍāparāḥ sadā ॥ 1.40.25 ॥

siddhadevarṣigandharvayakṣanāgendra pūjitaḥ।
sthāne tasmin mahādevaḥ sākṣāllokaśivaḥ śivaḥ ॥ 1.40.26 ॥

iti śrīmahāpurāṇe vāyuprokte bhuvanavinyāso nāma catvāriṃśo'dhyāyaḥ ।। 40 ।

## 1.41

।।sūta uvāca ।।
viviktacāruśikharaṃ patritaṃ śaṅkhavarcasam।
kailāsaṃ devabhaktānāmālayaṃ sukṛtātmanām ॥ 1.41.1 ॥
tasya kūṭataṭe ramye madhyame kundasannibhe।
yojanānāṃ śatāyāme pañcāśacca tathāyatam ॥ 1.41.2 ॥
suvarṇamaṇicitrābhi anekābhiralaṃkṛtam।
mahābhavanamālābhirbhūṣitaṃ naikavistaram ॥ 1.41.3 ॥
dhanādhyakṣasya devasya kuberasya mahātmanaḥ।
nagarantadanādhṛṣyamṛddhiyuktaṃ mudāyutam ॥ 1.41.4 ॥
tasya madhye sabhā ramyā nānākanakamaṇḍitā।
vipulā nāma vikhyātā vipulastambhatoraṇā ॥ 1.41.5 ॥
tatra tatpuṣpakaṃ nāma nānāratnavibhūṣitam।
mahāvimānaṃ ruciraṃ sarvakāmaguṇairyutam ॥ 1.41.6 ॥
manojavaṃ kāmagamaṃ hemajālavibhūṣitam।
vāhanaṃ yakṣarājasya kuberasya mahātmanaḥ ॥ 1.41.7 ॥
tatraikapiṅgalo devo mahādevasakhaḥ svayam।
vasati sma sa yakṣendraḥ sarvabhūtanamaskṛtaḥ ॥ 1.41.8 ॥
tatrāpsarogaṇairyyakṣairgandharvaiḥ siddhacāraṇaiḥ।
vasati sma mahātmā'sau kubero devasattamaḥ ॥ 1.41.9 ॥
tatra padmamahāpadmau tathā makarakacchapau।
kumudaḥ śaṅkha nīlau ca nandano nidhisattamaḥ ॥ 1.41.10 ॥
aṣṭāvete'kṣayā divyā dhaneśasya mahātmanaḥ।
mahānidhānāstiṣṭhanti sabhāyāṃ ratnasañcitāḥ ॥ 1.41.11 ॥
tathendrāgniyamādīnāṃ devānāmapsarogaṇaiḥ।
teṣāṃ kailāsa āvāso yatra yakṣeśvaraḥ prabhuḥ ॥ 1.41.12 ॥
kṛtvā pūrvamupasthānaṃ yakṣendrasya mahātmanaḥ।
paścādgacchanti ye yasya vihitāḥ paricārakāḥ ॥ 1.41.13 ॥
tatra mandākinī nāma suramyā vipulodakā।
suvarṇamaṇisopānā nānāpuṣpotkaṭotkaṭā ॥ 1.41.14 ॥
jāmbūnadamayaiḥ padmairgandhasparśaguṇānvitaiḥ।
nīlavaidūryyapatraiśca gandhopaitairmahotpalaiḥ ॥ 1.41.15 ॥
tathā kumudakhaṇḍaiśca mahāpadmairalaṅkṛtā ।
yakṣagandharvanārībhirapsarobhiśca śobhitā ॥ 1.41.16 ॥
devadānavagandharvairyakṣarākṣasapannagaiḥ।
upaspṛṣṭajalā ramyā vāpī mandākinī tathā ॥ 1.41.17 ॥
tathā alakanandā ca nandā ca saritāṃ varā ।
etaireva guṇairyuktā nadyo devarṣisevitāḥ ॥ 1.41.18 ॥
tasyaiva śailarājasya pūrve kūṭe pariśrutāḥ।
sahasrayojanāyāmāstriṃśadyojana vistarāḥ ॥ 1.41.19 ॥
