arājabhrājavaṃśastvaṃ tatra nityaṃ bhaviṣyasi ॥ 2.31.49 ॥

ano tvaṃ pratipadyasva pāpmānaṃ jarayā saha।
evaṃ varṣasahasrantu careyaṃ yauvanena te ॥ 2.31.50 ॥

       anuruvāca।।
jīrṇaḥ śiśuvaraṃ datte jarayā hyaśuciḥ sadā।।
na juhoti sa kāle'gni tāṃ jarānnābikāmaye ॥ 2.31.51 ॥

          yayātiruvāca।।
yastvaṃ me hṛdayājjāto vayaḥ svanna prayacchasi।
jarādoṣastvayokto'yaṃ tasmātte pratipatsyate ॥ 2.31.52 ॥

prajā ca yauvanaṃ prāptā vinaśiṣyatyatastava।
agnipraskandanaparastvaṃ cāpyeva bhaviṣyasi ॥ 2.31.53 ॥

pūro tvaṃ pratipadyasva pāpmānañjarayā saha।
jarāvalī ca māntāta palitāni ca paryaguḥ ॥ 2.31.54 ॥

kāvyasyośanasaḥ śāpānna ca tṛpto'smi yauvane।
kañcitkālañjareyaṃ vai viṣayān vayasā tava ॥ 2.31.55 ॥

pūrṇeṃ varṣasahasre te pratidāsyāmi yauvanam।
svañcaiva pratipatsyāmi pāpmānañjarayā saha ॥ 2.31.56 ॥

             sūta uvāca।।
evamuktaḥ pratyuvāca putraḥ pitaramañjasā।
yathānumanyase tāta kariṣyāmi tathaiva ca ॥ 2.31.57 ॥

pratipatsyāmi te rājan pāpmānaṃ jarayā saha।
gṛhāṇa yauvanaṃ mattaścara kāmān yathepsitān ॥ 2.31.58 ॥

jarayāhaṃ praticchanno vayorūpadharastava।
yauvanaṃ bhavate dattvā cariṣyāmi yathārtavat ॥ 2.31.59 ॥

          yayātiruvāca।।
pūro prīto'smi bhadrante prītaścedaṃ dadāmi te।
sarvakāmasamṛddhā te prajā rājye bhaviṣyati ॥ 2.31.60 ॥

           sūta uvāca।।
pūroranumato rājā yayātiḥ svāṃ jarāntataḥ।
saṃkrāmayāmāsa tadā prasādādbhārgavasya tu ॥ 2.31.61 ॥

yauvanenātha vayasā yayātiranahuṣātmajaḥ ।
prītiyukto naraśreṣṭhaścacāra viṣayān svakān ॥ 2.31.62 ॥

yathākāmaṃ yathotsāhaṃ yathākālaṃ yathāsukham।
dharmmāvirodhādrājendro yathārhati sa eva hi ॥ 2.31.63 ॥

devānatarpayadyajñaiḥ pitṝñchrāddhaistathaiva ca।
dīnāṃścānugrahairiṣṭaiḥ kāmaiśca dvijasattamān ॥ 2.31.64 ॥

atithīnannapānaiśca vaiśyāṃśca paripālanaiḥ।
ānṛśaṃsyena śūdrāṃśca dasyūn saṃnigraheṇa ca ॥ 2.31.65 ॥

dharmmeṇa ca prajāḥ sarvvā yathāvadanurañjayan।
yayātiḥ pālayāmāsa sākṣādindra ivāparaḥ ॥ 2.31.66 ॥

sa rājā siṃhavikrānto yuvā viṣayagocaraḥ।
avirodhena dharmasya cacāra sukhamuttamam ॥ 2.31.67 ॥

sa mārgamāṇaḥ kāmānāmantardoṣanidarśanāt।
viśvāsaheto reme vai vaibrāje nandane vane ॥ 2.31.68 ॥

apaśyatsa yadā tāṃ vai varddhamānāṃ nṛpastadā।
gatvā pūroḥ sakāśaṃ vai svāṃ jarā pratyapadyata ॥ 2.31.69 ॥

sa samprāpya tu tān kāmāṃstṛptaḥ khinnaśca pārthivaḥ।
kālaṃ varṣasahasraṃ vai sasmāra manujādhipaḥ। ॥ 2.31.70 ॥

parisaṅkhyāya kālañca kalākāṣṭāstathaiva ca।
pūrṇaṃ mattvā tataḥ kālaṃ pūruṃ putramuvāca ha ॥ 2.31.71 ॥

yathāsukhaṃ yathotsāhaṃ yathākālamariṃdama।
sevitā viṣayāḥ putra yauvanena mayā tava ॥ 2.31.72 ॥

pūro prīto'smi bhadraṃ te gṛhāṇa tvaṃ svayauvanam।
rāṣṭrañca nṛpaṃ pūruṃ putraṃ kanīyasam।
brāhmaṇapramukhā varṇā idaṃ vacanamabruvan ॥ 2.31.73 ॥

pratipede jarāṃ rājā yayātirnahuṣātmajaḥ।
yauvanaṃ pratipede ca pūruḥ svaṃ punarātmanaḥ ॥ 2.31.74 ॥

abhiṣektukāmañca nṛpaṃ pūruṃ putraṃ kanīyasam।
brāhmaṇapramukhā varṇā idaṃ vacanamabruvan ॥ 2.31.75 ॥

kathaṃ śukrasya naptāraṃ devayānyāḥ sutaṃ prabho।
śreṣṭhaṃ yadumatikramya pūro rājyaṃ pradāsyasi ॥ 2.31.76 ॥

yadurjyeṣṭhastava suto jātastamanu turvasuḥ।
śarmiṣṭāyāḥ suto druhyustano'nuḥ pūrureva ca ॥ 2.31.77 ॥

kathaṃ jyeṣṭānatikramya kanīyān rājyamarhati ।
ataḥ sambodhayāmi tvāṃ dharmmaṃ samanupālaya ॥ 2.31.78 ॥

          yayātiruvāca।।
brāhmaṇapramukhā varṇāḥ sarve śrṛṇvantu me vacaḥ।
jyeṣṭaṃ prati yathā rārṣṭraṃ na deyaṃ me kathañcana ॥ 2.31.79 ॥

mātā pitrorvacanakṛtsa hi putraḥ praśasyate ।
mama jyeṣṭena yadunā niyogo nānupālitaḥ ॥ 2.31.80 ॥

pratikūlaṃ pituryaśca na sa putraḥ satāṃ mataḥ।
sa putraḥ putravad yaśca varttate pitṛmātṛṣu ॥ 2.31.81 ॥

yadunāhamavajñātastathā turvasunāpi ca।
druhyuṇā cānunā caivamapyavajñā kṛtā bhṛśam ॥ 2.31.82 ॥

pūruṇā tu kṛtaṃ vākyaṃ mānitaśca viśeṣataḥ।
kanīyān mama dāyādo jarā yena dhṛtā mama।
sarvakāmaḥ sarvakṛtaḥ pūruṇā putrakāriṇā ॥ 2.31.83 ॥

śukreṇa ca varo dattaḥ kāvye nośanasā svayam।
putro yastvānuvartteta sa rājā te mahāmate ॥ 2.31.84 ॥

bhavato'numatopyevaṃ pūru rāṣṭre'bhiṣicyatām ।
yaḥputro guṇasampanno mātāpitrorhitaḥ sadā।
sarvamarhati kalyāṇaṃ kanīyānapi sa prabhuḥ ॥ 2.31.85 ॥

arhaḥ pūruridaṃ rāṣṭraṃ yaḥ priyaḥ priyakṛttava।
varadānena śukrasya na śakyaṃ vaktumuttaram ॥ 2.31.86 ॥

paurajānapadaistuṣṭairityukto nāhuṣastadā।
abhiṣicya tataḥ pūruṃ svarāṣṭre sutamātmanaḥ ॥ 2.31.87 ॥

diśi dakṣiṇapūrvasyāṃ turvasuṃ tu nyaveśayat।
dakṣiṇāparato rājā yaduṃ śreṣṭhaṃ nyaveśayat ॥ 2.31.88 ॥

pratīcyāmuttarasyāñca druhyuñcānuñca tāvubhau।
saptadvīpāṃ yayātistu jittvā pṛthvīṃ sasāgarām।
vyabhajat pañcadhā rājā putrebhyo nāhuṣastadā ॥ 2.31.89 ॥

tairiyaṃ pṛthivī sarvā saptadvīpā sapattanā।
yathāpradeśaṃ dharmajñairdharmmeṇa pratipālyate ॥ 2.31.90 ॥

evaṃ visṛjya pṛthivīṃ putrebhyo nāhuṣastadā।
putrasaṃkrāmitaśrīstu prītimānabhavannṛpaḥ ॥ 2.31.91 ॥

dhanurnyasya pṛṣatkāṃśca rājyañcaiva suteṣu tu।
prītimānabhavadrājā bhāramāveśya bandhuṣu ॥ 2.31.92 ॥

atra gāthā mahārājñā purā gītā yayātinā।
yo'bhipretyāharan kāmān kūrmoṅgānīva sarvaśaḥ ॥ 2.31.93 ॥

na jātu kāmaḥ kāmānāmupabhogena śāmyati।
haviṣā kṛṣṇavartmeva bhūya evābhivarddhate ॥ 2.31.94 ॥

yat pṛthivyāṃ vrīhiyavaṃ hiraṇyaṃ paśavaḥ striyaḥ ।
nālamekasya tatsarvamiti paśyanna muhyati ॥ 2.31.95 ॥

yadā tu kurute bhāvaṃ sarvvabhūteṣu pāvakam।
karmmaṇā manasā vācā brahma sampadyate tadā ॥ 2.31.96 ॥

yadā parānna bibheti yadā tvasmānna bibhyati।
yadā necchati na dveṣṭi brahma sampadyate tadā ॥ 2.31.97 ॥

yā dustyajā durmmatibhiryā na jīryati jīryyataḥ।
doṣāprāṇāntiko rāgastāṃ tṛṣṇāntyajataḥ sukham ॥ 2.31.98 ॥

jīryyanti jīryataḥ kośā dantā jīryanti jaryitaḥ।
jīvitāśā dhanāśā ca jīryyatopi na jīryati ॥ 2.31.99 ॥

yaccākāmasukhaṃ loke yacca divyaṃ mahat sukham।
tṛṣṇāsya ca sukhasyaiva kalāṃ nārhati ṣoḍaśīm ॥ 2.31.100 ॥

evamuktvā sa rājarṣiḥ sadāraḥ prasthito vanam।
bhṛgutuṅge tapastaptvā tatraiva ca mahāyaśāḥ।
pālayitvā vrataśataṃ tatraiva svargamāpnuyāt ॥ 2.31.101 ॥

tasya vaṃśāstu pañcaite puṇyā devarṣisatkṛtāḥ।
yairvyāptā pṛthivī kṛtsnā sūryasyeva gabhastibhiḥ ॥ 2.31.102 ॥

dhanyaḥ prajāvānāyuṣmān kīrtimāṃśca bhavennaraḥ।
yayāteścaritaṃ sarvaṃ paṭhañchṛṇvan dvijottamaḥ ॥ 2.31.103 ॥

iti śrīmahāpurāṇe vāyuprokte candra vaṃśakīrttanaṃ nāmaikatriṃśo'dyāyaḥ ।। 31 ।।

## 2.32

।।sūrya uvāca।।
yadorvaṃśaṃ pravakṣyāmi śreṣṭhasyottamatejhasaḥ।
vistareṇānupūrvyeṇa gadato me nibodhata ॥ 2.32.1 ॥

yadoḥ putrā babhūvurhi pañca devasutopamāḥ।
sahasrajidatha śreṣṭhaḥ kroṣṭurnīlo jito laghuḥ ॥ 2.32.2 ॥

sahasrajitsutaḥ śrīmāñchatajinnāma pārthivaḥ।
satajitsutā vikhyā tāstrayaḥ paramadhārmikāḥ ॥ 2.32.3 ॥

haihayaśca hayaścaiva rājā veṇuhayaśca yaḥ।
haihayasya tu dāyādo dharmmatattva iti śrutiḥ ॥ 2.32.4 ॥

dharmmatantrastu kīrttistu saṃjñeyastasya cātmajaḥ।
saṃjñeyasya tu dāyādo mahiṣmānnāma pārthivaḥ ॥ 2.32.5 ॥

āsīnmahiṣmataḥ putro bhadraśreṇyaḥ pratāpavān।
vārāṇasyadhipo rājā kathitaḥ pūrva eva hi ॥ 2.32.6 ॥

bhadraśreṇyasya dāyādo durmado nāma pārthivaḥ।
durmadasya tato dhīmān kanko nāma viśrutaḥ ॥ 2.32.7 ॥

kanakasya tu dāyādāścatvāro lokaviśrutāḥ।
kṛta vīryaḥ kārtavīryaḥ kṛtavarmā tathaiva ca ॥ 2.32.8 ॥

kṛto jātaścaturtho'bhūtkṛtaviryāttato'rjunaḥ।
jajñe bāhusahasreṇa saptadvīpeśvaro nṛpaḥ ॥ 2.32.9 ॥

sa hi varṣāyutaṃ taptvā tapaḥ paramaduścaram।
dattamārādhayāmāsa kārttavīryo'trisambhavam ॥ 2.32.10 ॥

tasmai datto varān prādāccaturo bhūritejasaḥ।
pūrvvaṃ bāhusahasrantu sa vavre prathamaṃ varam ॥ 2.32.11 ॥

adharmme dīyamānasya sadbhistasmānnivāraṇam।
dharmmeṇa pṛthivīñjitvā dharmmeṇaivānupālanam ॥ 2.32.12 ॥

saṃgrāmāṃstu bahūn jittvā hatvā cārīn sahasraśaḥ।
saṃgrāme yuddhayamānasya vadhaḥ syādadhikādraṇe ॥ 2.32.13 ॥

teneyaṃ pṛthivī kṛtsnā saptadvīpā sapattanā ।
saptodadhiparikṣiptā kṣātreṇa vidhinā janāḥ ॥ 2.32.14 ॥

tasya bāhusahasrantu yuddhyataḥ kila dhīmataḥ।
yauddho dhvajo rathaścaiva prādurbhavati māyayā ॥ 2.32.15 ॥

daśayajñasahasrāṇi teṣu dvīpeṣu saptasu।
nirargalāḥ sma nirvṛttāḥ śrūyante tasya dhīmataḥ ॥ 2.32.16 ॥

sarve yajñā mahābāhostasyāsan bhūritejasaḥ।
sarve kāñcanavedīkāḥ sarve yūpaiśca kāñcanaiḥ ॥ 2.32.17 ॥

sarve devairmmāhābhāgairvimānasthairalaṃkṛtāḥ।
gandharvvairapsarobhiśca nityamevopaśobhitāḥ ॥ 2.32.18 ॥

tasya rājño jagau gāthāṃ gandharvo nāradastathā।
caritaṃ tasya rājarṣermahimānaṃ nirīkṣya ca ॥ 2.32.19 ॥

na nūnaṃ kārttavīryasya gatiṃ yāsyanti mānavāḥ।
yajñairdānaistapobhiśca vikrameṇa śrutena ca ॥ 2.32.20 ॥

dvīpeṣu saptasu sa vai khaḍgī varaśarāsanī।
rathī rājāpyanucaro'nyo'gāccaivānudṛśyate ॥ 2.32.21 ॥

anaṣṭadravyaścaivāsīnna śoko na ca vibhramaḥ।
prabhāveṇa mahārājñaḥ prajā dharmmeṇa rakṣataḥ ॥ 2.32.22 ॥

pañcāśītisahasrāṇi varṣāṇāṃ sa narādhipaḥ।
sapta sapta vārān samrāṭ cakravarttī babhūva ha ॥ 2.32.23 ॥

sa eva paśupālo'bhūt kṣetrapālastathaiva ca।
sa eva vṛṣṭyā parjanyo yogitvādarjjuno'bhavat ॥ 2.32.24 ॥

sa vai bāhusahasreṇa jyāghātakaṭinena ca ।
bhāti raśmisahasreṇa śāradeneva bhāskaraḥ ॥ 2.32.25 ॥

sa hi nāgasahasreṇa māhiṣmatyāṃ narādhipaḥ।
karkoṭakasabhāñjitvā purīṃ tatra nyaveśayat ॥ 2.32.26 ॥

sa vai vege samudrasya prāvṛṭkālāmbujekṣaṇaḥ ।
krīḍanniva sukhodvignaḥ prāvṛṭkālañcakāra ha ॥ 2.32.27 ॥

lulitā krīḍatā tena hemasragdāmamālinī।
ūrmmibhrūkuṭisannādā śaṅkitābhyeti narmadā ॥ 2.32.28 ॥

purā sa tāmanusarannavagāḍho mahārṇavam।
cakāroddhṛttya velāntaṃ sa kālaḥ prāvṛṇodvanam ॥ 2.32.29 ॥

tasya bāhu sahasreṇa kṣobhyamāṇe mahādadhau।
bhavanti līnā niśceṣṭāḥ pātālasthā mahāsurāḥ ॥ 2.32.30 ॥

cūrṇīkṛtamahāvīcilīnamīnamahāviṣāḥ।
patitā viddhaphenaughamāvarttakṣiptadussaham ॥ 2.32.31 ॥

cakāra kṣobhayanrājā doḥsahasreṇa sāgaram।
devāsuraparikṣiptaṃ kṣīrodamiva sāgaram ॥ 2.32.32 ॥

mandarakṣobhaṇakṛtā hyamṛtodakaśaṅki tāḥ।
sahasotpāditā bhītā bhīmaṃ dṛṣṭvā nṛpottamam ॥ 2.32.33 ॥

nataniścalamūrddhāno babhūvuśca mahoragāḥ।
sāyāhne kadalīṣaṇḍā nirvātastimitā iva ॥ 2.32.34 ॥

sa vai baddhvā dhanuryāna utsiktaḥ pañcabhiḥ śataiḥ।
laṅkāyāṃ mohayitvā tu sabalaṃ rāvaṇaṃ balāt।
nirjitya baddhvā cānīya māhiṣmatyāṃ babandha tam ॥ 2.32.35 ॥

tato gatvā pulastyastu arjunaṃ ca prasādayat।
mumoca rājā paulastyaṃ pulastyenānupālitam ॥ 2.32.36 ॥

tasya bāhusahasrasya babhūva jyātalasvanaḥ।
yugānte'mbudavṛkṣasya sphuṭitasyāśaneriva ॥ 2.32.37 ॥

aho mṛdhe mahāvīryaṃ bhārgavo yasya so'cchinat।
mṛdhe sahasraṃ bāhūnāṃ hematālavanaṃ yathā ॥ 2.32.38 ॥

tṛṣitena kadācitsa bhikṣitaścitrabhānunā।
sapta dvīpāṃścitrabhānoḥ prādādbhikṣāṃ viśāmpatiḥ ॥ 2.32.39 ॥

purāṇi ghoṣān grāmāṃśca pattanāni ca sarvvaśaḥ।।
jajvāla tasya bāṇeṣu citrabhānurdidhakṣayā ॥ 2.32.40 ॥

sa tasya puruṣendrasya prabhāveṇa mahāyaśāḥ।
dadāha kārtavīryasya śailāṃścāpi vanāni ca ॥ 2.32.41 ॥

sa śūnyamāśramaṃ sarvaṃ varuṇasyātmajasya vai।
dadoha savanadvīpāṃścitrabhānuḥ sahaihayaḥ ॥ 2.32.42 ॥

saṃlebhe varuṇaḥ putraṃ purā bhāsvinamuttamam।
vasiṣṭhanāmā sa muniḥ khyātaścāpaḥ śritaḥ śrutaḥ ॥ 2.32.43 ॥

tatrāpadastadā krodhādarjunaṃ śaptavānvibhuḥ।
yasmānna varjitamidaṃ vanaṃ te mama haihaya ॥ 2.32.44 ॥

tasmāt te duṣkaraṃ karmma kṛtamanyo haniṣyati।
arjuno nāma kaunteyo na ca rājā bhaviṣyati ॥ 2.32.45 ॥

arjuna tvāṃ mahāvīryo rāmaḥ praharatāṃ varaḥ।
chittvā bāhusahasraṃ vai pramathya tarasā balīṃ ॥ 2.32.46 ॥

tapasvī brāhmaṇaścaiva vadhiṣyati mahābalaḥ।
tasya rāmastadā hyāsīnmṛtyuśāpena dhīmataḥ ॥ 2.32.47 ॥

rājñā tena varaścaiva svayameva vṛtaḥ purā।
tasya putraśataṃ hyāsīt pañca tatra mahārathāḥ ॥ 2.32.48 ॥

kṛtāstrā balinaḥ śūrā dharmmātmāno yaśasvanaḥ ।
śūraśca śūrasenaśca vṛṣṭyādyaṃ vṛṣa eva ca ॥ 2.32.49 ॥

jayadhvajaśca vai putrā avantiṣu viśāṃpateḥ।
jayadhvajasya putrastu tālajaṅghaḥ pratāpavān ॥ 2.32.50 ॥

tasya putraśataṃ hyeva tālajaṅghā iti śrutam।
teṣāṃ pañca gaṇāḥ khyātā haihayānāṃ mahātmanām ॥ 2.32.51 ॥

vīrahotrā hyasaṅkhyātā bhojāścāvartayastathā।
tuṇḍikerāśca vikrāntāstālajaṅghāstathaiva ca ॥ 2.32.52 ॥

vīrahotrasutaścāpi ananto nāma pārthivaḥ।
durjayastasya putrastu babhūvāmitradarśanaḥ ॥ 2.32.53 ॥

anaṣṭadravyatā caiva tasya rājño babhūva ha।
prabhāveṇa mahārājaḥ prajāstāḥ paryyapālayat ॥ 2.32.54 ॥

na tasya vittanāśaśca naṣṭaṃ pratilabheta saḥ।
kārtavīryasya yo janma kathayediha dhīmataḥ ॥ 2.32.55 ॥

vittavān bhavatyatraiva dharmmaścāsya vivarddhate।
yathā tvaṣṭā yathā dātā tathā svarge mahīyate ॥ 2.32.56 ॥

iti śrīmahāpurāṇe vāyuprokte kārttavīryyārjunotpattivivaraṇaṃ nāma dvātriṃśo'dhyāyaḥ ।। 32 ।

## 2.33

ṛṣaya ūcuḥ।।
kimarthaṃ bhuvanaṃ dagdhamapavasyaṃ mahātmanām।
kārtavīryeṇa vikramya tannaḥ prabrūhi pṛcchatām ॥ 2.33.1 ॥

rakṣitā sa tu rājarṣiḥ prajānāmiti naḥ śrutam।
kathaṃ sa rakṣitā bhūtvānāśayattattapovanam ॥ 2.33.2 ॥

       sūta uvāca।।
ādityo viprarūpeṇa kārtavīryamupasthitaḥ।
tṛptikāmaḥ prayacchānnamādityo'haṃ na saṃśayaḥ ॥ 2.33.3 ॥

         rājovāca।।
bhagavan kena te tuṣṭirbhavedbrūhi divākara।
kīdṛśaṃ bhojanaṃ dajhi śrutvā ca vidadhāmyaham ॥ 2.33.4 ॥

         sūrya uvāca।।
sthāvaraṃ dehi me sarvamāhāraṃ dadatāṃ vara।
tena tṛpto bhaveyaṃ vai na tuṣye'nyena pārthiva ॥ 2.33.5 ॥

          rājovāca ।।

na śakyaṃ sthāvaraṃ sarvvaṃ tejasā mānuṣeṇa tu।
nirddagdhuṃ tapatāṃ śreṣṭha tvāmeva praṇamāmyaham ॥ 2.33.6 ॥

          āditya uvāca।।
tuṣṭaste'haṃ śarān dajhi akṣayān sarvataḥ sukhān।
prakṣiptāḥ prajvaliṣyanti mama tejaḥsamanvitāḥ ॥ 2.33.7 ॥

ādiṣṭaṃ tejasā meghasāgaraṃ śoṣayiṣyati।
śuṣkaṃ bhasma kariṣyāmi tena prīto narādhipa ॥ 2.33.8 ॥

tataḥ śarānathādityastvarjunāya prayacchati।
tataḥ saṃprāpya sumahatsthāvaraṃ sarvvameva hi ॥ 2.33.9 ॥

āśramānatha grāmāṃśca ghoṣāṃśca nagarāṇi ca।
tapovanāni ramyāṇi vanānyupavanāni ca ॥ 2.33.10 ॥

evaṃ prācīnamadahattataḥ sūryyapradakṣiṇam।
nirvṛkṣā nistṛṇā bhūmirdagdhā sūryeṇa tejasā ॥ 2.33.11 ॥

etasminneva kāle tu apo nilayamāśritaḥ।
daśavarṣasahasrāṇi jalavāsā mahānṛṣiḥ ॥ 2.33.12 ॥

pūrṇe vrate mahātejā udatiṣṭhattapodhanaḥ।
so'paśyadāśramaṃ dagdhamarjunena mahānṛṣiḥ।
krodhācchaśāpa rājarṣiṃ kīrttitaṃ vo yathā mayā ॥ 2.33.13 ॥

           sūta uvāca।।
kroṣṭoḥ śrṛṇuta rājarṣervaṃśamuttamapūruṣam।
yasyānvavāye saṃbhūto vṛṣṇirvṛṣṇikulodvahaḥ ॥ 2.33.14 ॥

kroṣṭoreko'bhavat putro vṛjinīvān mahāyaśāḥ।
vārjinīvatamicchanti svāhiṃ svāhovatāṃ varam ॥ 2.33.15 ॥

svāheḥ putro'bhavadrājā raśādurdadatāṃ varaḥ।
ghṛtamprasūtamicchanti raśādoragryamātmajam ॥ 2.33.16 ॥

mahākratubhirīje sa vividhairāptadakṣiṇaiḥ।
citraiścitrarathastasya putra karmmabhiranvitaḥ ॥ 2.33.17 ॥

evaṃ citraratho vīro yajñān vipuladakṣiṇān।
śaśabinduḥ paraṃ vṛtto rājarṣīṇāmanuṣṭitaḥ ॥ 2.33.18 ॥

cakravarttī mahāsattvo mahāvīryo bahuprajaḥ।
tatrānuvaṃśaśloko'yaṃ yasmin gītaḥ purāvidaiḥ ॥ 2.33.19 ॥

śaśabindostu putrāṇāṃ śatānāmabhavacchatam।
dhīmatāmanurūpāṇāṃ bhūridraviṇatejasām ॥ 2.33.20 ॥

teṣāṃ ṣaṭ ca pradhānāstu pṛthuṣāṭkā mahābalāḥ।
pṛthuśravā pṛthuyaśāḥ pṛthudharmmā pṛthuñjayaḥ ॥ 2.33.21 ॥

pṛthukīrttiḥ pṛthundātā rājānaḥ śāśibindavāḥ।
śaṃsanti ca purāṇāni pārthaśravasamantaram।
antaraḥ sa purā yastu yajñasya tanayo'bhavat ॥ 2.33.22 ॥

uśanā sutadharmmātmā avāpya pṛthivīmimām।
ājahārāśvamedhānāṃ śatamuttamadhārmmikaḥ ॥ 2.33.23 ॥

maruttastasya tanayo rājarṣīṇāmanuṣṭitaḥ।
vīraḥ kambalabarhistu maruttatanayaḥ smṛtaḥ ॥ 2.33.24 ॥

putrastu rukmakavaco vidvān kambalavarhiṣaḥ।
nihatya rukmakavacaḥ purā kavacino raṇe ॥ 2.33.25 ॥

dhanvino niśitairbāṇairavāpa śriyamuttamām।
brāhmaṇebhyo dadau vittamaśvamedhamahāyaśāḥ ॥ 2.33.26 ॥

rājñastu rukmakavacādaparāvṛttya vīrahāḥ।
jajñire pañca putrāstu mahāsattvā mahābalāḥ ॥ 2.33.27 ॥

rukmeṣuḥ pṛthurukmaśca jyāmaghaḥ parigho hariḥ।
parighañca hariñcaiva videhe sthāpayatpitā ॥ 2.33.28 ॥

brahmeṣurabhavadrājā pṛthurukmastadāśrayaḥ।
tebhyaḥ pravrajito rājyā jjyāmagho'bhavadāśrame ॥ 2.33.29 ॥

praśāntastu vane ghore brāhmaṇenāvabodhitaḥ।
jagāma dhanurādāya deśamadhyaṃ rathī dhvajī ॥ 2.33.30 ॥

narmmadānūpa ekākī mekalāvṛttikā api।
ṛkṣavantaṃ giriṃ gatvā śuktimanyāmathāviśat ॥ 2.33.31 ॥

jyāmaghasyābhavadbhāryā śaibhyā balavatī bhṛśam।
aputro'pi sa vai rājā bhāryāmanyāṃ na vindati ॥ 2.33.32 ॥

tasyāsīdvijayo yuddhe tataḥ kanyāmavāpa saḥ।
bhāryāmuvāca rājā sa snuṣeti tu nareśvaraḥ ॥ 2.33.33 ॥

evamuktābravīdevaṃ kāmye yante snuṣeti sā।
yaste janiṣyate putrastasya bhāryā bhaviṣyati ॥ 2.33.34 ॥

tasya sā tapasogreṇa śaibyā vaiśaṃ prasūyata ।
putraṃ vidarbhaṃ subhagā śaibyā pariṇatā satī ॥ 2.33.35 ॥

rājaputrau tu vidvāṃsau snuṣāyāṃ krathukauśikau।
putrau vidarbho'janayacchūrau raṇaviśāradau ॥ 2.33.36 ॥

lomapādaṃ tṛtīyantu paścājjajñe sudhārmikaḥ।
loma pādātmajovasturāhṛtistasya cātmajaḥ ॥ 2.33.37 ॥

kauśikasya cidiḥ putrastasmāccaidyā nṛpāḥ smṛtāḥ ।
krathorvidarbhaputrastu kuntistasyātmajo'bhavat ॥ 2.33.38 ॥

kunterdhṛṣṭasuto jajñe purodhṛṣṭaḥ pratāpavān ।
dhṛṣṭasya putro dharmātmā nirvṛtiḥ paravīrahā ॥ 2.33.39 ॥

tasya putro daśārhastu mahābalaparākramaḥ।
daśarhasya suto vyomā tato jīmūta ucyate ॥ 2.33.40 ॥

jīmūtaputro vikṛtistasya bhīmarathaḥ sutaḥ.
atha bhīmarathasyāsīt putro rathavaraḥ kila ॥ 2.33.41 ॥

dātā dharmmarato nityaṃ śīlasatyaparāyaṇaḥ।
tasya putro navarathastato daśarathaḥ smṛtaḥ ॥ 2.33.42 ॥

tasya caikādaśarathaḥ śakunistasya cātmajaḥ।
tasmāt karambhako dhanvī devarāto'bhavattataḥ ॥ 2.33.43 ॥

devakṣatro'bhavadrājā devarātirmmahāyaśāḥ।
devakṣatrasuto jajñe devanaḥ kṣatranandanaḥ ॥ 2.33.44 ॥

devanāt sa madhurjajñe yasya medhārthasambhavaḥ।
madhoścāpi mahātejā manurmanuvaśastathā ॥ 2.33.45 ॥

nandanaśca mahātejā mahāpuruvaśastathā।
āsīt puruvaśāt putraḥ purudvān puruṣottamaḥ ॥ 2.33.46 ॥

jajñe purudvataḥ putro bhadravatyāṃ purūdvahaḥ।
aikṣākī tvabhavadbhāryā sattvastasyāmajāyata।
sattvāt sattvaguṇo petaḥ sāttvataḥ kīrtivarddhanaḥ ॥ 2.33.47 ॥

imāṃ visṛṣṭiṃ vijñāya jyāmaghasya mahātmanaḥ।
prajāvāneti sāyujyaṃ rājñaḥ somasya dhīmataḥ ॥ 2.33.48 ॥

iti śrīmahā purāṇe vāyuprokte jyāmaghavṛttāntakathanaṃ nāma trayastriṃśo'dhyāyaḥ ।। 33 ।।

## 2.34

sūta uvāca।।
sātvatī rūpasampannaṃ kauśalyā suṣuve sutam।
bhajinaṃ bhajamānaṃ ca divyaṃ devāvṛdhaṃ nṛpam ॥ 2.34.1 ॥

andhakañca sahābhojaṃ vṛṣṇiñca yadunandanam।
teṣāṃ hi sargāścatvāraḥ śrṛṇudhvaṃ vistareṇa vai ॥ 2.34.2 ॥

bhajamānasya śrṛñjayyāṃ bāhyaścopari bāhyakaḥ।
śrṛñjayasya sute dve tu bāhyakaste udāvahat ॥ 2.34.3 ॥

tasya bhārye bhaginyau te prāsūteti sutān bahūn।
nimiśca paṇavaścaiva vṛṣṇiḥ parapurañjayaḥ ॥ 2.34.4 ॥

ye bāhyakāryyaśrṛñjayyāṃ bhajamānādvijajñire।
ayutāyutasāhasra śatajidatha vāmakaḥ ॥ 2.34.5 ॥

bāhyakāryyābhaginyāṃ ye bhajamānā dvijajñire।
teṣāṃ devāvṛdho rājā cacāra paramaṃ tapaḥ ॥ 2.34.6 ॥

putraḥ sarvaguṇopeto mama bhūyāditi sma ha।
saṃyojyātmānamevaṃ savarṇā sā jalamaspṛśat ॥ 2.34.7 ॥

sā copasparśanāttasya cakāra ṛṣimāpagā।
kalyāṇañca narapatestasya sā nimnagottamā ॥ 2.34.8 ॥

cintayābhiparītāṅgā jagāmātha viniścayam।
nādhigacchāmi tāṃ nārīṃ yasyāmevaṃvidhaḥ sutaḥ ॥ 2.34.9 ॥

bhavetsarvaguṇopeto rājño devāvṛdhasya hi।
tasmādasya svayaṃ cāhaṃ bhavāmyadya sahavratā।
jajñe tasyāḥ svayaṃ hasto bhāvastasya yatheritaḥ ॥ 2.34.10 ॥

atha bhūtvā kumārī tu sāvitrī paramaṃ vacaḥ।
cintayāmāsa rājānaṃ tāmiyeṣa sa parthivaḥ ॥ 2.34.11 ॥

tasyāmādhatta garbhaṃ sa tejasvinamudāradhīḥ।
atha sā navame māsi suṣuve saritāṃvarā ॥ 2.34.12 ॥

putraṃ sarvaguṇopetaṃ yathā devāvṛdhepsitaḥ।
tatra vaṃśe purāṇajñā gāthāṃ gāyanti vai dvijāḥ ॥ 2.34.13 ॥

guṇān devāvṛdhasyāpi kīrttayanto mahātmanaḥ।
yathaiva śrṛṇute dūrāt saṃpaśyati tathāntikāt ॥ 2.34.14 ॥

babhruḥ śreṣṭo manuṣyāṇāṃ devairdevāvṛdhaḥ samaḥ।
puruṣāḥ pañcaṣaṣṭiśca sahasrāṇi ca saptatiḥ।
ye'mṛtatvamanuprāptā babhrurdevāvṛdhādapi ॥ 2.34.15 ॥

yajvā dānapatirvīro brahmaṇyaḥ satya vāg budhaḥ।
kīrttimāṃśca mahābhāgaḥ sāttvatānāṃ mahārathaḥ ॥ 2.34.16 ॥

tasyānvavāye sumahābhojayemārtikāvalāḥ।
gāndhārī caiva mādrī ca vṛṣṇerbhāryye babhūvatuḥ ॥ 2.34.17 ॥

gāndhārī janayāmāsa sumitraṃ mitranandanam।
mādrī yudhājitaṃ putraṃ sā tu vai devamīḍhuṣam ॥ 2.34.18 ॥

anamitraṃ sutañcaiva tāvubhau puruṣottamau।
anamitrasuto nighno nighnasya dvau babhūvatuḥ ॥ 2.34.19 ॥

prasenaśca mahābhāgaḥ śakrajicca sutāvubhau।
tasya śakrajitaḥ pūrvaḥ sakhā prāṇasamo'bhavat ॥ 2.34.20 ॥

sa kadācinniśāpāye rathena rathināṃvaraḥ।
toyakūlādapaḥ spraṣṭumupasthātuṃ yayau ravim ॥ 2.34.21 ॥

tasyopatiṣṭhataḥ sūryo vivasvānagrataḥ sthitaḥ।
aspaṣṭamūrtirbhagavāṃ stejomaṇḍalavān vibhuḥ ॥ 2.34.22 ॥

atha rājā vivasvantamuvāca sthitamagrataḥ।
yathaiva vyomni paśyāmi tvāmahaṃ jyotiṣāmpate ॥ 2.34.23 ॥

tejomaṇḍalinañcaiva tathaivāpyagrataḥ sthitam।
ko viśeṣo vivasvaṃste sākṣādupagatena vai ॥ 2.34.24 ॥

etacchrutvā sa bhagavān maṇiratnaṃ syamantakam।
svakaṇṭādavamucyātha babandha nṛpatestadā ॥ 2.34.25 ॥

tato vigrahavantaṃ taṃ dadarśa nṛpatistadā।
pratimāmatha tāṃ dṛṣṭvā muhūrttaṃ kṛtavāṃstathā ॥ 2.34.26 ॥

tamatiprasthitaṃ bhūyo vivasvantaṃ sa śakrajit।
provācāgnisavarṇaṃ tvaṃ yena lokān prayāsyati।
tadaiva maṇiratnaṃ tanmāṃ bhavān dātumarhati ॥ 2.34.27 ॥

syamantakaṃ nāma maṇiṃ dattavāṃstasya bhāskaraḥ।
sa tamābaddhya nagaraṃ praviveśa mahīpatiḥ ॥ 2.34.28 ॥

taṃ janāḥ paryadhāvanta sūryo'yaṃ gacchatīti ha।
sabhāṃ vismāyayitvātha purīmantaḥpuraṃ tathā ॥ 2.34.29 ॥

taṃ prasenijite divyaṃ maṇiratnaṃ syamantakam।
dadau bhrātre narapatiḥ premṇā śakrajiduttamam ॥ 2.34.30 ॥

syamantako nāma maṇiryasya rāṣṭre sthito bhevat ।
kālavarṣī ca parjanyo na ca vyādhibhayaṃ tadā ॥ 2.34.31 ॥

lipsāṃ cakre prasenāttu maṇiratnaṃ syamantakam।
govindo na ca taṃ lebhe śakto'pi na jahāra ca ॥ 2.34.32 ॥

kadā cinmṛgayāṃ yātaḥ prasenastena bhūṣitaḥ।
syamantakakṛte siṃhādvadhaṃ prāptaḥ sudāruṇam ॥ 2.34.33 ॥

jāmbavānṛkṣarājastu taṃ siṃhaṃ nijaghāna vai ।
ādāya ca maṇiṃ divyaṃ svaṃ bilaṃ praviveśa ha ॥ 2.34.34 ॥

tatkarma kṛṣṇasya tato vṛṣṇyandhakamahattarāḥ।
maṇaugṛdhnuntu manvānāstameva viśaśaṅkire ॥ 2.34.35 ॥

mithyābhiśastiṃ tebhyastāṃ balavānarisūdanaḥ।
amṛṣyamāṇo bhagavān vanaṃ sa vicacāra ha ॥ 2.34.36 ॥

sa tu prasenamṛgayāmacarattatra cāpyatha।
prasenasya padaṃ gṛhya puruṣai rāptakāribhiḥ ॥ 2.34.37 ॥

ṛkṣavantaṃ girivaraṃ vindhyañca nagamuttamam।
anveṣaṇapariśrāntaḥ sa dadarśa mahāmanāḥ ॥ 2.34.38 ॥

sāśvaṃ hataṃ prasenaṃ taṃ nāvindattatra vai maṇim।
atha siṃhaḥ prasenasya śarīrasyāvidūrataḥ ॥ 2.34.39 ॥

ṛkṣeṇa nihato dṛṣṭaḥ pādaiṛkṣasya sūcitām।
padairanveṣayāmāsa guhāmṛkṣasya yādavaḥ ॥ 2.34.40 ॥

mahatyatibile vāṇīṃ śuśrāva pramaderitām।
dhātryā kumāramādāya sutaṃ jāmbavato dvijāḥ।
prītimatyātha maṇinā mārodīrityudīritām ॥ 2.34.41 ॥

         ।।dhātryuvāca।।
prasenamavadhīt siṃhaḥ siṃho jāmbavatā hataḥ।
sukumāraka mārodīstava hyeṣa syamantakaḥ ॥ 2.34.42 ॥

vyaktīkṛtañca śabdaṃ taṃ tūrṇaṃ so'pi yayau bilam।
apaśyacca vilābhyāśe prasenamavadāritam॥ 2.34.43 ॥

praviśya cāpi bhagavāstadṛkṣabilamañjasā।
dadarśa ṛkṣarājānaṃ jāmbavantamudāradhīḥ ॥ 2.34.44 ॥

yuyudhe vāsudevastu bile jāmbavatā saha।
bāhubhyāmeva govindo divasānekaviṃśatim ॥ 2.34.45 ॥

praviṣṭe ca bilaṃ kṛṣṇe vāsudeva puraḥsarāḥ ।
punardvāravatīmetya hataṃ kṛṣṇaṃ nyavedayan ॥ 2.34.46 ॥

vāsudevastu nirjitya jāmbavantaṃ mahābalam।
lebhe jāmbavatīṃ kanyāmṛkṣarājasya sammatām ॥ 2.34.47 ॥

bhagavattejasā grasto jāmbavān prasabhaṃ maṇim।
sutāṃ jāmbavatīmāśu viṣvaksenāya dattavān ॥ 2.34.48 ॥

maṇiṃ syamantakaṃ caiva jagrāhātma viśuddhaye।
anunīya ṛkṣarājaṃ niryayau ca tadā bilāt ॥ 2.34.49 ॥

evaṃ sa maṇimādāya viśoddhyātmānamātmanā।
dadau satrājite taṃ vai maṇiṃ sātvatasannidhau ॥ 2.34.50 ॥

kanyāṃ punarjāmbavatīmuvāca madhusūdanaḥ।
tasmānmithyābhiśāpāt sa vyamucyata janārdanaḥ ॥ 2.34.51 ॥

imāṃ mithyābhiśastiṃ yaḥ kṛṣṇasyeha vyapohitām।
veda mithyābhiśasteḥ sa nābhiśasyati karhicit ॥ 2.34.52 ॥

daśa svasṛbhyo bhāryyābhyaḥ śatrajittaḥ śataṃ sutāḥ।
khyātimantastrayasteṣāṃ bhaṅgakārastu pūrvvajaḥ।
vīro vratapatiścaiva hyapasvāntaśca supriyaḥ ॥ 2.34.53 ॥

atha dvāravatī nāma bhaṅgakārasya suprajā।
suṣuve sā kumārīstu tisro rūpaguṇānvitāḥ ॥ 2.34.54 ॥

satya bhāmottamā strīṇāṃ vratinīva dṛḍhavratā।
tathā tapasvinī caiva pitā kṛṣṇasya tāṃ dadau ॥ 2.34.55 ॥

yattat satrājite kṛṣṇo maṇiratnaṃ syamantakam।
prādāttadāharadratnaṃ bhojena śatadhanvanā ॥ 2.34.56 ॥

tadā hi prārthayāmāsa satyabhāmāmaninditām।
akrūro ratnamanvicchan maṇiñcaiva syamantakam ॥ 2.34.57 ॥

bhadrakāraṃ tato hatvā śatadhanvā mahābalaḥ।
rātrau taṃ maṇimādāya tato'krūrāya dattavān ॥ 2.34.58 ॥

akrūrastu tadā ratnamādāya sa nararṣabhaḥ।
samayaṃ kāraṇaṃ cakre bodhyo nānyaistvayetyuta ॥ 2.34.59 ॥

vayamabhyupapatsyāmaḥ kṛṣṇena tvaṃ pradharṣitaḥ।
mama ca dvārakāḥ sarvā vaśe tiṣṭantyasaṃśayam ॥ 2.34.60 ॥

hate pitari duḥśārttā satyabhāmā yaśasvinī।
prayayau rathamāruhya nagaraṃ vāraṇāvatam ॥ 2.34.61 ॥

satyabhāmā tu tadvṛttaṃ bhojasya śatadhanvanaḥ।
bharturnivedya duḥkhārttā pārśvasthāśrūṇyavartayat ॥ 2.34.62 ॥

pāṇḍavānāntu dagdhānāṃ hariḥ kṛtvodakakriyām ।
tulyārthe caiva bhrātṝṇāṃ niyojayati sātyakim ॥ 2.34.63 ॥

tata stvaritamāgamya dvārakāṃ madhusūdanaḥ।
pūrvvajaṃ halinaṃ śrīmānidaṃ vacanamabravīt ॥ 2.34.64 ॥

hataḥ prasenaḥ siṃhena satrājicchatadhanvanā।
syamantakamahaṃ mārge tasya prahara he prabho ॥ 2.34.65 ॥

tadāroha rathaṃ śīghraṃ bhojaṃ hatvā mahābalam।
syamantako mahābāho tadāsmākaṃ bhaviṣyati ॥ 2.34.66 ॥

tataḥ pravṛtte yuddhe tu tumule bhojakṛṣṇayoḥ।
śatadhanvā na cākrūramavaikṣat sarvato diśi ॥ 2.34.67 ॥

anaṣṭāśvāvarohantu kṛtvā bhojajanārdanau।
śakto'pi sādhyādvārddhakyānnākrūro'bhyupapadyata ॥ 2.34.68 ॥

apayāne tato buddhiṃ bhūyaścakre bhayānvitaḥ।
yojanānāṃ śataṃ sāgraṃ yayā ca pratyapadyata ॥ 2.34.69 ॥

vijñātahṛdayā nāma śatayojanagāminī।
bhojasya vaḍhavādityo yayā kṛṣṇamayodhayat ॥ 2.34.70 ॥

pravṛddhavegā vaḍavā tvadhvanāṃ śatayojanam।
dṛṣṭā rathagatistasya śatadhanvānamarddayat ॥ 2.34.71 ॥

tatastasya hayāste tu śramāt khedācca vai dvijāḥ।
khamutpetū rathaprāṇāḥ kṛṣṇo rāmamathābravīt ॥ 2.34.72 ॥

tiṣṭhasveha mahābāho dṛṣṭadoṣā mayā hayāḥ।
padybhāṃ gatvā hariṣyāmi maṇiratnaṃ syamantakam ॥ 2.34.73 ॥

padbhyāmeva tato gatvā śatadhanvānamacyutaḥ।
mithilādhipatiṃ taṃ vai jaghāna paramāstravit ॥ 2.34.74 ॥

syamantakaṃ na cāpaśyaddhatvā bhojaṃ mahābalam।
nivṛttaṃ cābravīt kṛṣṇaṃ ratnaṃ dehīti lāṅgalī ॥ 2.34.75 ॥

nāstīti kṛṣṇaścovāca tato rāmo ruṣānvitaḥ।
dhikchabdamasakṛt pūrvvaṃ pratyuvāca janārddanam ॥ 2.34.76 ॥

bhrātṛtvānmarṣayāmyeṣa svasti te'stu vrajāmyaham।
kṛtyaṃ na me drārakayā na tvayā na ca vṛṣṇibhiḥ ॥ 2.34.77 ॥

praviveśa tato rāmo mithilāmarimarddanaḥ।
sarvvakāmairupahṛtairmaithilenaiva pūjitaḥ ॥ 2.34.78 ॥

etasminneva kāle tu babhrurmatimatāṃvaraḥ।
nānārūpān kratūn sarvvānājahāra nirargalān ॥ 2.34.79 ॥

dīkṣāmayaṃ sakavacaṃ rakṣārthaṃ praviveśa ha।
syamantakakṛte rājā gādhiputro mahāyaśāḥ ॥ 2.34.80 ॥

arthān ratnāni cāgryāṇi dravyāṇi vividhāni ca ।
ṣaṣṭivarṣagate kāle yajñeṣu vinyayojayat ॥ 2.34.81 ॥

akrūrayajña ityete khyātāstasya mahātmanaḥ।
bahvannadakṣiṇāḥ sarvve sarvvakāmapradāyinaḥ ॥ 2.34.82 ॥

atha duryyodhano rājā gatvā'tha mithilāṃ prabhuḥ।
gadāśikṣāṃ tato divyāṃ balabhadrādavāptavān ।। 34.83।
prasādya tu tato viprā vṛṣṇyandhakamahārathaiḥ।
ānīto dvārakāmeva kṛṣṇena ca mahātmanā ॥ 2.34.83 ॥

akrūramandhakaiḥ sārddhamupāyāt puruṣarṣabhaḥ।
yuddhe hatvā tu śatrugnaṃ saha bandhumatā balī ॥ 2.34.84 ॥

śvaphalkatanayāyāntu narāyāṃ narasattamau।
bhaṅgakārasya tanayo viśrutau sumahābalau ॥ 2.34.85 ॥

jajñāte'ndhakamukhyasya śatrughno bandhumāṃśca tau।
vadhārthaṃ bhaṅgakārasya kṛṣṇo na prītimān bhavet ॥ 2.34.86 ॥

jñāti bhedabhayādbhītaḥ samupekṣitavāṃstathā।
apayāte tathākrūre nāvarṣatpākaśāsanaḥ ॥ 2.34.87 ॥

anāvṛṣṭyā hataṃ rāṣṭramabhavattadvaghodyatam।
tataḥ prasādayāmāsurakrūraṃ kukurāndhakāḥ ॥ 2.34.88 ॥

punardvāravatīṃ prāpte tadā dānapatau tathā।
pravavarṣa sahasrākṣaḥ kukṣau jalanidhestataḥ ॥ 2.34.89 ॥

kanyāñca vāsudevāya svasāraṃ śīlasammatām।
akrūraḥ pradadau śrīmān prītyarthaṃ yadupuṅgavaḥ ॥ 2.34.90 ॥

ata vijñāya yogena kṛṣṇo babhrugataṃ maṇim।
sabhāmadhye tadā prāha tamakrūraṃ janārdanaḥ ॥ 2.34.91 ॥

yacca ratnaṃ maṇivaraṃ tava hastagataṃ prabho।
tatprayacchasva mānārha vimatiñcātra mā kṛthāḥ ॥ 2.34.92 ॥

ṣaṣṭivarṣagate kāle yadroṣo'bhūttadā mama।
susaṃrūḍhaḥ sakṛt prāptastatkālāśritya sa mahān ॥ 2.34.93 ॥

tataḥ kṛṣṇasya vacanāt sarvvasātvatasaṃsadi।
pradadau taṃ maṇiṃ babhrurakleśena mahāmatiḥ ॥ 2.34.94 ॥

tata ārjjavasaṃprāptababhruhastādarindamaḥ।
dadau prahṛṣṭamanasā taṃ maṇiṃ babhrave punaḥ ॥ 2.34.95 ॥

sa kṛṣṇahastāt saṃprāpya maṇiratnaṃ syamantakam।
ābaddhya gāndinīputro virarājāṃśumāniva ॥ 2.34.96 ॥

imāṃ mithyābhiśastiṃ yo viśuddhāmapi cottamām ।
veda mithyābhi śastiṃ sa na vrajecca kathañcana ॥ 2.34.97 ॥

animitrācchinirjajñe kaniṣṭādvṛṣṇinandanāt ॥ 2.34.98 ॥

satyavāk satyasampannaḥ satyakastasya cātmajaḥ।
sātyakiryuyudhānasya tasya bhūtiḥ suto'bhavat ॥ 2.34.99 ॥

bhūteryugandharaḥ putra iti bhautyāḥ prakīrttitāḥ।
jajñāte tanayau pṛśreḥ śvaphalkaścitrakaśca yaḥ ॥ 2.34.100 ॥

śvaphalkastu mahārājo dharmātmā yatra varttate।
nāsti vyādhibhayaṃ tatra na cāvṛṣṭibhayaṃ tathā ॥ 2.34.101 ॥

kadācit kāśirājasya vibhostu dvijasattamāḥ।
trīṇi varṣāṇi viṣaye nāvarṣatpākaśāsanaḥ ॥ 2.34.102 ॥

sa tatra vāsayāmāsa śvaphalkaṃ paramārcitam।
śvaphalkaparivāsena prāvarṣatpākaśāsanaḥ ॥ 2.34.103 ॥

śvaphalkaḥ kāśirājasya sutāṃ bhāryāmaninditām।
gāndinīṃ nāma gāṃ sā hi dadau viprāya nityaśaḥ ॥ 2.34.104 ॥

sā māturudarasthā vai bahuvarṣa śatān kila।
vasati sma na vai jajñe sarbhasthāntāṃ pitābravīt ॥ 2.34.105 ॥

jāyasva śīghraṃ bhadrante kimarthaṃ cāpi tiṣṭhasi।
provāca cainaṃ garbha sthā sā kanyā gaurdine dine ॥ 2.34.106 ॥

yadi dattā tadā syāṃ hi yadi syāmīhatāṃ pitaḥ।
tathetyuvāca tāṃ tasyāḥ pitā kāmamapūpurat ॥ 2.34.107 ॥

dātā yajvā ca śūraśca śrutavānatithipriyaḥ।
tasyāḥ putraḥ smṛto'krūraḥ śvaphalko bhūridakṣiṇaḥ ॥ 2.34.108 ॥

upamaṅgustathā maṅgurmṛduraścārimejayaḥ।
girirakṣastatā yakṣaḥ śatrughno vārimarddanaḥ ॥ 2.34.109 ॥

dharmabhṛcca śrṛṣṭacayo vargamocastathāparaḥ।
āvāhaprativāhau ca vasudevā varāṅganā ॥ 2.34.110 ॥

akrūrādugrasenyāntu sutau dvau kulanandinau।
devaścānupadevaśca jajñāte devasaṃmitau ॥ 2.34.111 ॥

citrakasyābhavan putrāḥ pṛthurvipṛthureva ca।
aśvagrīvo'śvabāhuśca supārśvakagaveṣaṇau ॥ 2.34.112 ॥

ariṣṭanemiraśvaśca suvarmā varmacarmabhṛt ।
abhūmirbahubhūmiśca śraviṣṭāśravaṇe striyau ॥ 2.34.113 ॥

satyakāt kāśiduhitā lebhe sā caturaḥ sutān।
kakudaṃ bhajamānañca śamīkabalabarhiṣau ॥ 2.34.114 ॥

kakudasya suto vṛṣṭirvṛṣṭestu tanayo'bhavat।
kapotaromā tasyātha revato'bhavadātmajaḥ ॥ 2.34.115 ॥

tasyāsīttumburusakhā vidvān putro'bhavatkila।
khyāyate yasya nāmnā sa candanodakadundubhiḥ ॥ 2.34.116 ॥

tasmāccābhijitaḥ putra utpannastu punarvasuḥ।
aśvamedhantu putrārthe ājahāra narottamaḥ ॥ 2.34.117 ॥

tasya madhye'tirātrasya sadomadhyātsamutthitam।
tatastu vidvān dharmajño dātā yajvā punarvasuḥ ॥ 2.34.118 ॥

tasyāpi putramithunaṃ bāhubāṇājitaḥ kila।
āhukaścāhukī caiva khyātau matimatāṃvarau ॥ 2.34.119 ॥

imāṃścodāharantyatra ślokān prati tamāhukam।
sopāsaṅgānukarṣāṇāṃ sadhvajānāṃ varūthinām ॥ 2.34.120 ॥

rathānāṃ meghaghoṣāṇāṃ sahasrāṇi daśaiva tu।
nāsatyavādī tvāsīttu nāyajvā nāsahasradaḥ ॥ 2.34.121 ॥

nāśucirnāpyadharmātmā nāvidvānna kṛśo'bhavat।
āhukasya dhṛtiḥ putra ityevamanu śuśrumaḥ ॥ 2.34.122 ॥

śvetena paricāreṇa kiśorapratimān hayān।
aśītiyuktaniyutānyāhukapratimo'vrajat ॥ 2.34.123 ॥

pūrvasyāndiśi nāgānāṃ bhojasya pratirejire।
rūpyakāñcanakakṣāṇāṃ sahasrāṇyekaviṃśatiḥ ॥ 2.34.124 ॥

tāvantyeva sahasrāṇi uttarasyāntathā diśi।
bhūmipālasya bhojasya uttiṣṭet kiṅkiṇī kila ॥ 2.34.125 ॥

āhukaścāhukāndhāya svasāraṃ tvāhukīndadau।
āhukāndhasya duhitā dvau putrau sambabhūvatuḥ ॥ 2.34.126 ॥

devakaścograsenaśca devagarbhasamāvubhau ।
devakasya sutā vīrā jajñire tridaśopamāḥ ॥ 2.34.127 ॥

devānāmapi devaśca sudevo devarañjitā।
teṣāṃ svasāraḥ saptāsan vasudevāya saṃdadau ॥ 2.34.128 ॥

vṛkadevopadevā ca tathānyā devarakṣitā।
śrīdevā śāntidevā ca mahādevā tathāparā ॥ 2.34.129 ॥

saptamī devakī tāsāṃ sunāmā cārudarśanā।
navograsenasya sutāḥ kaṃsasteṣāntu pūrvajaḥ ॥ 2.34.130 ॥

nyagrodhaśca sunāmā ca kadvaśaṃkuśca bhūmayaḥ।
sūtanū rāṣṭrapālaśca yuddhatuṣṭaḥ supuṣṭimān ॥ 2.34.131 ॥

teṣāṃ svasāraḥ pañcaiva karmadharmavatī tathā।
śatāṅkrū rāṣṭrāpālā ca kaṅvā caiva varāṅganā ॥ 2.34.132 ॥

ugraseno mahāpatyo vikhyātaḥ kukurodbhavaḥ।
kukurāṇāmimaṃ vaṃśaṃ dhārayannamitaujasām।
ātmano vipulaṃ vaṃśaṃ prajāvāṃśca bhavennaraḥ ॥ 2.34.133 ॥

bhajamānasya putrastu rathimukhyo vidūrathaḥ।
rājyādhidevaḥ śūraśca viduraśca suto'bhavat ॥ 2.34.134 ॥

tasya śūrasya tu sutā jajñire balavattarāḥ ।
vātaścaiva nivātaśca śoṇitaḥ śvetavāhanaḥ ॥ 2.34.135 ॥

śamī ca gadavarmā ca nidātaḥ śakraśakrajit।
śamiputraḥ pratikṣiptaḥ pratikṣiptasya cātmajaḥ ॥ 2.34.136 ॥

svayambhojaḥ svayambhojāddhṛdikaḥ sambabhūva ha।
hṛdikasya sutāstvāsan daśa bhīmaparākramāḥ ॥ 2.34.137 ॥

kṛtavarmā kṛtasteṣāṃ śatadhanvā tu madhyamaḥ।
devārhaśca vanārhaśca bhiṣag dvaitarathaśca yaḥ ॥ 2.34.138 ॥

sudāntaśca dhiyāntaśca nakavān kanakodbhavaḥ।
devārhasya suto vidvān jajñe kambalabarhiṣaḥ ॥ 2.34.139 ॥

asamaujāḥ sutastasya sumahaujāśca viśrutaḥ।
ajāvaputrāya tataḥ pradadāvasamaujase।
sudaṃṣṭrañca surūpañca kṛṣṇa ityandhakāḥ smṛtāḥ ॥ 2.34.140 ॥

andhakānāmimaṃ vaṃśaṃ kīrttayānastu nityaśaḥ।
ātmāno vipulaṃ vaṃśaṃ labhate nātra saṃśayaḥ ॥ 2.34.141 ॥

asmakyāṃ janayāmāsa śūro vai devamānuṣim।
māṣyāntu janayāmāsa śūro vai devamīḍhuṣam ॥ 2.34.142 ॥

bhāṣyāntu jajñire śūrādbhojāyāṃ puruṣā daśa।
vasudevo mahābāhuḥ pūrvamānakadundubhiḥ ॥ 2.34.143 ॥

jajñe tasya prasūtasya dundubhiḥ prāṇadaddivi।
ānakānāñca saṃhrādaḥ sumahānabhavaddivi ॥ 2.34.144 ॥

papāta puṣpavarṣañca śūrasya bhavane mahat।
manuṣyaloke kṛtsne'pi rūpe nāsti samo bhuvi ॥ 2.34.145 ॥

yasyāsīt puruṣāgryasya kīrttiścandramaso yathā।
devabhāgastato jajñe tato devaśravāḥ punaḥ ॥ 2.34.146 ॥

anādṛṣṭikaḍaścaiva nandanaścaiva bhṛñjinaḥ।
śyāmaḥ śamīko gaṇḍūṣaḥ catasrastu varāṅganāḥ ॥ 2.34.147 ॥

pṛthā ca śrutavedā ca śrutakīrttiḥ śrutaśravāḥ।
rājādhidevī ca tathā pañcaitā vīramātaraḥ ॥ 2.34.148 ॥

pṛthāṃ duhitaraṃ cakre kunti stāṃ pāṇḍurāvahat।
anapatyāya vṛddhāya kuntibhojāya tāṃ dadau ॥ 2.34.149 ॥

tasmāt kuntīti vikhyātā kuntībhojātmajā pṛthā।
kuruvīraḥ pāṇḍumukhyastasmādbhāryāmavindata ॥ 2.34.150 ॥

pṛthā jajñe tataḥ putrān trīnagnisamatejasaḥ।
loke'pratirathān vīrān śakratulyaparākramān ॥ 2.34.151 ॥

dharmādyudhiṣṭiraṃ putraṃ mārutācca vṛkodaram।
īndrāddhanañjayañcaiva pṛthā putrānajījanat ॥ 2.34.152 ॥

mādravatyāntu janitāvāśvināviti viśrutam।
nakulaḥ sahadevaśca rūpasattvaguṇānvitau ॥ 2.34.153 ॥

jajñe ca śrutadevāyāṃ tanayo vṛddhaśarmaṇaḥ।
karūṣādhipatirvīro dantavakro mahābalaḥ ॥ 2.34.154 ॥

kaikeyāṃ śrutakīrtyāntu jajñe santardanaḥ punaḥ।
cekitānabṛhatkṣatrau tathaivānyau mahābalau ॥ 2.34.155 ॥

vindānuvindāvāvantyau bhrātarau sumahābalau।
śrutaśravāyāṃ caidyastu śiśupālo babhūva ha ॥ 2.34.156 ॥

damaghoṣasya rājarṣeḥ putro vikhyātapauruṣaḥ।
yaḥ purāsīddaśagrīvaḥ saṃbabhūvārimardanaḥ ॥ 2.34.157 ॥

yaduśravānujastasya rujakanyo'nujastathā।
patnyastu vasudevasya trayodaśa varāṅganāḥ ॥ 2.34.158 ॥

pauravī rohiṇī caiva madirā cāparā tathā।
tathaiva bhadrā vaiśākhī devakī saptamī tathā ॥ 2.34.159 ॥

sugandhirvanarājī ca dve cānye paricārike।।
rohiṇī pauravī caiva vālmīkasyātmajābhavat ॥ 2.34.160 ॥

jyeṣṭā patnī mahābhāgā dayitānakadundubheḥ ।
jyeṣṭhaṃ lebhe sutaṃ rāmaṃ sāraṇaṃ niśavaṃ tathā ॥ 2.34.161 ॥

durddamaṃ damanaṃ śubhraṃ piṇḍārakakuśītakau।
citrāṃ nāma kumārīñca rohiṇyaṣṭau vyajāyata ॥ 2.34.162 ॥

pautrau rāmasya jajñāte vijñātau niśitotsukau।
pārśvī ca pārśvanandī ca śiśuḥ satyadhṛtistathā ॥ 2.34.163 ॥

mandabāhyo'tha rāmāṇagirikau gira eva ca।
śuklagulmeti gulmaśca daridrāntaka eva ca ॥ 2.34.164 ॥

kumāryaścāpi pañcādyā nāmatastā nibodhata।
arciṣmatī sunandā ca surasā suvacāstathā ॥ 2.34.165 ॥

tathā śatabalā caiva sāraṇasya sutāstvimāḥ।
bhadrāśvo bhadraguptiśca bhadravighnastathaiva ca ॥ 2.34.166 ॥

bhadrabāhurbhadraratho bhadrakalpastathaiva ca।
supārśvakaḥ kīrttimāṃśca rohitāśvaśca bhadrajaḥ ॥ 2.34.167 ॥

durmmadaścābhibhūtaśca rohiṇyāḥ kulajāḥ smṛtāḥ ।
nandopanantadau mitraśca kukṣimitrastathācalaḥ ॥ 2.34.168 ॥

citropa citre kanye ca sthitaḥ puṣṭirathāparaḥ।
madirāyāḥ sutā hyete sudevo'tha vijajñire ॥ 2.34.169 ॥

upabimbo'tha bimbaśca sattvadantamahaujasau।
catvāra ete vikhyātā bhadrāputrā mahābalāḥ ॥ 2.34.170 ॥

vaiśākhyāṃ samadācchauriḥ putraṃ kauśikamuttamam।
devakyāṃ jajñire śauriḥ suṣeṇaḥ kīrtimānapi ॥ 2.34.171 ॥

tadayo bhadrasenaśca yajudāyaśca pañcamaḥ।
ṣaṣṭo bhadravidekaśca kaṃsaḥ sarvāñjaghāna tān ॥ 2.34.172 ॥

atha tasyāmavasthāyāmāyuṣmān saṃbabhūva ha।
loka nāthaḥ punarviṣṇuḥ pūrvakṛṣṇaḥ prajāpatiḥ ॥ 2.34.173 ॥

anujātā'bhavat kṛṣṇā subhadrā bhadrabhāṣiṇī।
kṛṣṇā subhadreti punarvyākhyātā vṛṣṇinandinī ॥ 2.34.174 ॥

subhadrāyāṃ rathī pārthādabhimanyurajāyata।
vasudevasya bhāryāsu mahābhāgāsu saptasu।
ye putrā jajñireśūrā nāmatastānnibodhata ॥ 2.34.175 ॥

ato'sya saha devāyāṃ śūro jajñe'bhayāsakhaḥ।
śārṅgadevājanattambuṃ śaurī jajñe kulodvaham ॥ 2.34.176 ॥

upasaṅgaṃ vasuñcāpi tanayau devarakṣitau।
evaṃ daśa sutāstasya kaṃsastānapyaghātayat ॥ 2.34.177 ॥

vijayaṃ rojanañcaiva varddhamānaṃ tathaiva ca।
etān sarvvān mahābhāgānupadevā vyajāyata ॥ 2.34.178 ॥

svagāhavaṃ mahātmānaṃ vṛka devī tvajāyata ।
āgāhī ca svasā caiva surūpā śiśirāyiṇī ॥ 2.34.179 ॥

saptamaṃ devakīputraṃ sunāsā suṣuve bhuvam।
gaveṣaṇaṃ mahābhāgaṃ saṅgrāme citra yodhinam ॥ 2.34.180 ॥

śrāddhadevaṃ purā yena vane viracitā dvijāḥ।
śaibyāyāmadadacchauriḥ putraṃ kauśikamavyayam ॥ 2.34.181 ॥

sugandhī vanarājī ca śaurerāstāṃ parigrahaḥ।
puṇḍraśca kapilaścaiva vasudevātmajau hi tau।
tayo rājā'bhavat puṇḍraḥ kapilastu vanaṃ yayo ॥ 2.34.182 ॥

tasyāṃ samabhavadvīro vasudevātmajo balī।
rājā nāma niṣādo'sau prathamaḥ sa dhanurddharaḥ ॥ 2.34.183 ॥

vikhyāto devarātasya mahābhāgaḥ suto'bhavat।
paṇḍitānāṃ mataṃ prāhurdevaśravasamudbhavam ॥ 2.34.184 ॥

asmakyāṃ labhate putramanādṛṣṭiṃ yaśasvinam।
nivarttaḥ śakraśatrughnaṃ śrāddhadevaṃ mahābalam ॥ 2.34.185 ॥

ajāyata śrāddhadevo niṣadhādiryataḥ śrutaḥ।
ekalavyo mahāvīryo niṣādaiḥ parivarddhitaḥ ॥ 2.34.186 ॥

gaṇḍūṣāyānapatyāya kṛṣṇastuṣṭo'dadat sutau।
cārudeṣṇañca sāmbañca kṛtāstrau śastalakṣaṇau ॥ 2.34.187 ॥

tantijastantimālaśca svaputrau kanakasya tu।
vastāvanestvaputrāya vasudevaḥ pratāpavān।
sautirdadau sutaṃ vīraṃ śauriṃ kauśikameva ca ॥ 2.34.188 ॥

tapāśca kodhanuścaiva virajāḥ śyāmasṛñjimau।
anapatyo'bhavacchyāmaḥ śyāmakastu vanaṃ yayau।
jugupsamāno bhojatvaṃ rājarṣitvamavāpnuyāt ॥ 2.34.189 ॥

ya idaṃ janma kṛṣṇasya paṭhate niyatavrataḥ।
śrāvayedbrāhmaṇañcāpi sumahatsukhamāpnuyāt ॥ 2.34.190 ॥

devadevo mahātejāḥ pūrvvaṃ kṛṣṇaḥ prajāpatiḥ ।
vihārārthaṃ manuṣyeṣu jajñe nārāyaṇaḥ prabhuḥ ॥ 2.34.191 ॥

devakyāṃ vasudevena tapasā puṣkarekṣaṇaḥ।
caturbāhuḥ sa vijñeyo divyarūpaḥ śriyānvitaḥ ॥ 2.34.192 ॥

prakāśo bhagavān yogī kṛṣṇo mānuṣamāgataḥ।
avyakto'vyaktaliṅgasthaḥ sa eva bhagavān prabhuḥ ॥ 2.34.193 ॥

nārāyaṇo yataścakre prabhavaṃ cāvyayo hi saḥ।
devo nārāyaṇo bhūtvā harirāsītsanātanaḥ ॥ 2.34.194 ॥

yo'sṛjaccādipuruṣaṃ purā cakre prajāpatim।
aditerapi putratvametya yādavanandanaḥ।
devo viṣṇuriti khyātaḥ śakrādavarajo'bhavat ॥ 2.34.195 ॥

prasādajaṃ yasya vibhoradityāḥ putrakāraṇam।
vadhārthaṃ suraśatrūṇāṃ daityadānavarakṣasām ॥ 2.34.196 ॥

yayātivaṃśajasyātha vasudevasya dhīmataḥ।
kulaṃ puṇyaṃ yataḥ karma bheje nārāyaṇaḥ prabhuḥ ॥ 2.34.197 ॥

sāgarāḥ samakampanta celuśca dharaṇīdharāḥ।
jajvaluścāgnihotrāṇi jāyamāne janārdane ॥ 2.34.198 ॥

śivāśca pravavurvātāḥ praśāntimabhavadrajaḥ।
jyotīṃṣyabhyadhikaṃ rejurjāyamāne janārdane ॥ 2.34.199 ॥

abhijinnāma nakṣatraṃ jayantī nāma śarvarī।
muhūrtto vijayo nāma yatra jāto janārdanaḥ ॥ 2.34.200 ॥

avyaktaḥ śāśvataḥ kṛṣṇo harirnārāyaṇaḥ prabhuḥ।
jāyate smaiva bhagavān nayanairmohayan prajāḥ ॥ 2.34.201 ॥

ākāśāt puṣpavṛṣṭīśca vavarṣa tridaśeśvaraḥ।
gīrbhirmaṅgalayuktābhiḥ stuvanto madhusūdanam।
maharṣayaḥ sagandharvā upatasthuḥ sahasraśaḥ ॥ 2.34.202 ॥

vasudevastu taṃ rātrau jātaṃ putramadhokṣajam।
śrīvatsalakṣaṇaṃ dṛṣṭvā divi divyaiḥ sulakṣaṇaiḥ।
uvāca vasudevaḥ svaṃ rūpaṃ saṃhara vai prabho ॥ 2.34.203 ॥

bhīto'haṃ kaṃsatastāta etadeva bravīmyaham।
mama putrā hatāstena jyeṣṭāste'dbhutadarśanāḥ ॥ 2.34.204 ॥

vasudevavacaḥ śrutvā rūpaṃ sa hṛtavān prabhuḥ।
anujñātaḥ pitā tvenaṃ nandagopagṛhaṃ gataḥ।
ugrasenamate tiṣṭhan yaśodāyai tadā dadau ॥ 2.34.205 ॥

tulyakālantu garbhiṇyau yaśodā devakī tathā।
yaśodā nandagopasya patnī sā nandagopateḥ ॥ 2.34.206 ॥

yāmeva rajanīṃ kṛṣṇo jajñe vṛṣṇikulaprabhuḥ।
tāmeva rajanīṃ kanyāṃ yaśodāpi vyajāyata ॥ 2.34.207 ॥

taṃ jātaṃ rakṣamāṇastu vasudevo mahāyaśāḥ।
prādāt putraṃ yaśodāyai kanyāntu jagṛhe svayam ॥ 2.34.208 ॥

dattvainaṃ nandagopasya rakṣamāmiti cābravīt।
sutaste sarvvakalyāṇo yādavānāṃ bhaviṣyati।
ayaṃ sa garbho devakyā asmatkleśān haniṣyati ॥ 2.34.209 ॥

ugrasenātmajāyāñca kanyāmānakadundubheḥ।
nivedayāmāsa tadā kanyeti śubhalakṣaṇā ॥ 2.34.210 ॥

svāsāyāṃ tanayaṃ kaṃso jātaṃ naivāvadhārayat।
atha tāmapi duṣṭātmā hyutsasarja mudānvitaḥ ॥ 2.34.211 ॥

hatā vai yā yadā kanyā japatyeṣa vṛthāmatiḥ।
kanyā sā vavṛdhe tatra vṛṣṇisadmani pūjitā ॥ 2.34.212 ॥

putravatparipālyanto devā devān yathā tadā ।
tāmeva vidhinotpannāmāhuḥ kanyāṃ prajāpatim ॥ 2.34.213 ॥

ekādaśā tu jajñe vai rakṣārthaṃ keśavasya ha।
tāṃ vai sarve sumanasaḥ pūjayiṣyanti yādavāḥ।
devadevo divyavapuḥ kṛṣṇaḥ saṃrakṣito'nayā ॥ 2.34.214 ॥

          ṛṣaya ūcuḥ ।।

kimarthaṃ vasudevasya bhojaḥ kaṃso narādhipaḥ।
jaghāna putrān bālān vai tanno vyākhyātumarhasi ॥ 2.34.215 ॥

           sūta uvāca।।
śrṛṇudhvaṃ vai yathā kaṃsaḥ putrānānakadundubheḥ।
jātāñjātāñciśūn sarvvān niṣpipeṣa vṛthāmatiḥ ॥ 2.34.216 ॥

bhayādyathā mahābāhurjātaḥ kṛṣṇo vivāsitaḥ।
tathā ca goṣu govindaḥ saṃvṛddha- puruṣottamaḥ ॥ 2.34.217 ॥

uktaṃ hi kila devakyā vasudevasya dhīmataḥ ।
sārathyaṃ kṛtavān kaṃso yuvarājastadā'bhavat ॥ 2.34.218 ॥

tato'ntarikṣe vāgāsīddivyā bhūtasya kasyacit।
kaṃso yayā sadā bhītaḥ puṣkalā lokasākṣiṇī ॥ 2.34.219 ॥

yāmetāṃ vahase kaṃsa rathena parakāraṇāt।
asyā yaḥ saptamo garbhaḥ sa te mṛtyurbhaviṣyati ॥ 2.34.220 ॥

tāṃ śrutvā vyathito vāṇīṃ tadā kaṃso vṛthāmatiḥ।
niṣkramya khaḍgaṃ tāṃ kanyāṃ hantukāmo'bhavattadā ॥ 2.34.221 ॥

tamuvāca mahābāhurvasudevaḥ pratāpavān।
ugrasenātmajaṃ kaṃsaṃ sauhṛdātpraṇayena ca ॥ 2.34.222 ॥

nastriyaṃ kṣatriyo jātu hantumarhati kaścana।
upāyaḥ paridṛṣṭo'tra mayā yādavanandana ॥ 2.34.223 ॥

yo'syāḥ sambhavate garbhaḥ saptamaḥ pṛthivī pate।
tamahante prayacchāmi tatra kuryyā yathākramam ॥ 2.34.224 ॥

tvaṃ tvidānīṃ yatheṣṭatvaṃ vartethā bhūridakṣiṇa।
sarvānasyāstu vai garbhān satyaṃ neṣyāmi te vaśam ॥ 2.34.225 ॥

evaṃ mithyā naraśreṣṭha vāgeṣā na bhaviṣyati।
evamukto'nunītaḥ sa jagrāha tanayāṃstadā ॥ 2.34.226 ॥

vasudevaśca tāṃ bhāryyāmavāpya mudito'bhavat।
kaṃsaścāsyāvadhīt putrān pāpakarmmā vṛthāmatiḥ ॥ 2.34.227 ॥

        ṛṣaya ūcuḥ ।।

ka eṣa vasudevaśca devakī ca yaśasvinī।
nandagopastu kastveṣa yaśodā ca mahāyaśāḥ।
yo viṣṇuṃ janayāmāsa yā cainaṃ cābhyavarddhayat ॥ 2.34.228 ॥

           sūta ūvāca।।
puruṣāḥ kaśyapasyāsannādityāstu striyāstathā।
atha kāmān mahābāhurdevakyāḥ samavarddhayat ॥ 2.34.229 ॥

acarat sa mahīṃ devaḥ praviṣṭo mānuṣīṃ tanum।
mohayan sarvabhūtāni yogātmā yogamāyayā ॥ 2.34.230 ॥

naṣṭe dharmme tadā jajñe viṣṇurvṛṣṇikule svayam।
kartuṃ dharmmavyavasthānamasurāṇāṃ praṇāśanam ॥ 2.34.231 ॥

āhṛtā rukmiṇī kanyā satyā nagnajitastadā।
sātrājitī satyabhāmā jāmbavatyapi rohiṇī ॥ 2.34.232 ॥

śaibyā sudevī mādrī ca suśīlā nāma cāparā।
kālindī mitravindā ca lakṣmaṇā jālavāsinī ॥ 2.34.233 ॥

evamādīni devānāṃ sahasrāṇi ca ṣoḍaśa।
caturddaśa tu ye proktā gaṇāścāpsarasāṃ divi ।
vicintya devaiḥ śakreṇa viśiṣṭāstviha preṣitāḥ ॥ 2.34.234 ॥

patnyarthaṃ vāsudevasya utpannā rājaveśmasu।
etāḥ patnyo mahābhāgā viṃṣvaksenasya viśrutāḥ ॥ 2.34.235 ॥

pradyumnaścārudeṣṇaśca sudeṣṇaḥ śarabhastathā।
cāruśca cārubhadraśca bhadracārustathā'paraḥ ॥ 2.34.236 ॥

cāruvindhyaśca rukmiṇyāṃ kanyā cārumatī tathā।
sānurbhānustathākṣaśca rohito mantrayastathā ॥ 2.34.237 ॥

jarāndhakastāmravakṣā bhaumariśca jarandhamaḥ।
catasro jajñire teṣāṃ svasāro garuḍadhvajāt ॥ 2.34.238 ॥

bhānurbhaumarikā caiva tāmraparṇī jarandhamā।
satyabhāmāsutānetāñjāmbavatyāḥ prajāḥ śrṛṇu ॥ 2.34.239 ॥

bhadraśca bhadraguptaśca bhadravindrastathaiva ca।
saptabāhuśca vikhyātaḥ kanyā bhadrāvatī tathā।
sambodhanī ca vikhyātā jñeyā jāmbavatīsutāḥ ॥ 2.34.240 ॥

saṃgrāmajicca śatajit ta na ca sahasrajit।
ete putrāḥ sudevyāśca viṣvaksenasya kīrttitāḥ ॥ 2.34.241 ॥

vṛko vṛkāśvo vṛkajidvṛjinī ca surāṅganā।
mitrabāhuḥ sunīthaśca nāgnajityāḥ prajāstviha ॥ 2.34.242 ॥

evamādīni putrāṇāṃ saha srāṇi nibodhata।
prayutantu samākhyātaṃ vāsudevasya ye sutāḥ ॥ 2.34.243 ॥

ayutāni tathāṣṭau ca śūrā raṇaviśāradāḥ।
janārdanasya vaṃśo vaḥ kīrttito'yaṃ yathātatham ॥ 2.34.244 ॥

bṛhatī nartakonneyī sunaye saṅgatā tathā ।
kanyā sā bṛhaducchasya śauneyasya mahātmanaḥ ॥ 2.34.245 ॥

tasyāḥ putrāstu vikhyātā strayaḥ samitiśobhanāḥ ।
aṅgadaḥ kumudaḥ śvetaḥ kanyā śvetā tathaiva ca ॥ 2.34.246 ॥

avagāhaśca citraśca śūraścitravaraśca yaḥ।
citrasenaḥ sutaścāsya kanyā citravatī tathā ॥ 2.34.247 ॥

tumbaśca tumbabāṇaśca janastambaśca tāvubhau।
upāṅgasya smṛtau dvau tu vajrāraḥ kṣipra eva ca ॥ 2.34.248 ॥

bhūrīndraseno bhūriśca gaveṣasya sutāvubhau ।
yudhiṣṭirasya kanyā tu sutanurnāma viśrutā ॥ 2.34.249 ॥

tasyāmaśvasuto jajñe vajro nāma mahāyaśāḥ।
vajrasya pratibāhustu sucārustasya cātmajaḥ ॥ 2.34.250 ॥

kāśmā supārśvaṃ tanayaṃ jajñe sāmbā tarasvinam।
tisraḥ koṭyastu putrāṇāṃ yādavānāṃ mahātmanām ॥ 2.34.251 ॥

ṣaṣṭiṃśatasahasrāṇi vīryyavanto mahābalāḥ।
devāṃśāḥ sarvva eveha utpannāste mahaujasaḥ ॥ 2.34.252 ॥

daivāsure hatā ye ca asurā vai mahātapāḥ।
ihotpannā manuṣyeṣu bādhante sarvvamānavān ।
teṣāmutsādanārthantu utpannā yādave kule ॥ 2.34.253 ॥

kulāni daśa caikañca yādavānāṃ mahātmanām।
sarvvamakakulaṃ yadvadvarttate vaiṣṇave kule ॥ 2.34.254 ॥

viṣṇusteṣāṃ pramāṇe ca prabhutve ca vyavasthitaḥ ।
nideśasthāyibhistasya baddhyante sarvamānuṣāḥ ॥ 2.34.255 ॥

iti prasūtirvṛṣṇīnāṃ samāsavyāsayogataḥ।
kīrttitā kīrttanāccaiva kīrttisiddhimabhīpsitām ।। 34.257 ।।

iti śrīmahāpurāṇe vāyuprokte viṣṇuvaṃśānukīrttanaṃ nāma catustriṃśo'dhyāyaḥ ।। 34 ।।

## 2.35

manuṣyaprakṛtīn devān kīrtyamānānnibodhata ।
saṅkarṣaṇo vāsudevaḥ pradyumnaḥ sāmba eva ca ॥ 2.35.1 ॥
aniruddhaśca pañcaite vaṃśavīrāḥ prakīrttitāḥ।
saptarṣayaḥ kuberaśca yakṣo maṇivarastathā ॥ 2.35.2 ॥
śālakī badaraścaiva vidvān dhanvantaristathā।
nandinaśca mahādevaḥ śālaṅkāyana ucyate।
ādidevastadā jiṣṇurebhiśca saha daivataiḥ ॥ 2.35.3 ॥
           ।।ṛṣaya ūcuḥ ।।
viṣṇuḥ kimarthaṃ sambhūtaḥ smṛtāḥ sambhūtayaḥ kati।
bhaviṣyāḥ kati vānye tu prādurbhāvā mahātmanaḥ ॥ 2.35.4 ॥
brahmakṣetre yugānteṣu kimarthamiha jāyate ।
punaḥ punarmmanuṣyeṣu tannaḥ prabrūhi pṛcchatām ॥ 2.35.5 ॥
vistareṇaiva sarvāṇi karmmāṇi ripughātinaḥ।
śrotumicchāmahe samyag dehaiḥ kṛṣṇasya dhīmataḥ ॥ 2.35.6 ॥
karmmaṇāmānupūrvyañca prādurbhāvāśca ye prabho ।
yā cāsya prakṛtiḥ sūta tāścāsmān vaktumarhasi ॥ 2.35.7 ॥
kathaṃ sa bhagavān viṣṇuḥ sureṣvariniṣūdanaḥ।
vasudevakule dhīmān vāsudevatvamāgataḥ ॥ 2.35.8 ॥
amaraiḥ sūta kiṃ puṇyaṃ puṇyakṛdbhiralaṃkṛtam।
devalokaṃ samutsṛjya martyalokamihāgataḥ ॥ 2.35.9 ॥
devamānuṣayornetā bhūrbhuvaḥprasavo hariḥ।
kimarthaṃ divyamātmānaṃ mānuṣe samaveśayat ॥ 2.35.10 ॥
yaścakraṃ vartayatyeko manuṣyāṇāṃ manomayam।
manuṣye sa kathaṃ buddhiṃ cakre cakrabhṛtāṃ varaḥ ॥ 2.35.11 ॥
gopāyanaṃ yaḥ kurute jagatāṃ sārvvalaukikam।
sa kathaṃ gāṃ gato viṣṇurgopamanvakarotprabhuḥ ॥ 2.35.12 ॥
mahābhūtāni bhūtātmā yo dadāra cakāra ha।
śrīgarbhaḥ sa kathaṃ garbhe striyā bhūcarayā dhṛtaḥ ॥ 2.35.13 ॥
yena lokān kramairjittvā tribhistrīṃstridaśepsayā।
sthāpitā jagato mārgāstrivargapravarāstrayaḥ ॥ 2.35.14 ॥
yo'ntakāle jagatpītvā kṛtvā toyamayaṃ vapuḥ।
lokamekārṇavaṃ cakre dṛśyādṛśyena vartmanā ॥ 2.35.15 ॥
yaḥ purāṇe purāṇātmā vārāhaṃ vapurāsthitaḥ।
dadau jittvā vasumatīṃ surāṇāṃ surasattamaḥ ॥ 2.35.16 ॥
yena saiṃhaṃ vapuḥ kṛtvā dvidhākṛtvā ca yatpunaḥ।
pūrvvadaityo mahāvīryyo hiraṇyakaśipurhataḥ ॥ 2.35.17 ॥
yaḥ purā hyanalo bhūtvā aurvvaḥ saṃvarttako vibhuḥ।
pātālastho'rṇavagataḥ papau toyamayaṃ haviḥ ॥ 2.35.18 ॥
sahasracaraṇaṃ devaṃ sahasrāṃśuṃ sahasraśaḥ।
sahasraśirasaṃ devaṃ yamāhurvai yuge yuge ॥ 2.35.19 ॥
nābhyāraṇyāḥ samudbhūtaṃ yasya paitāmahaṃ gṛham।
ekārṇavagate loke tatpaṅkajamapaṅkajam ॥ 2.35.20 ॥
yena te nihatā daityāḥ saṃgrāme tārakāmaye।
sarvvadevamayaṃ kṛtvā sarvāyudhadharaṃ vapuḥ ॥ 2.35.21 ॥
garuḍasthena cotsiktaḥ kālanemirnipātitaḥ।
uttarāṃśe samudrasya kṣīrodasyāmṛtodadheḥ।
yaḥ śete śāśvataṃ yogamāsthāya timiraṃ mahat ॥ 2.35.22 ॥
purāṇī garbhamadhatta divyaṃ tapaḥprakarṣādaditiḥ purā yam।
śakrañca yo daityagaṇāvaruddhaṃ garbhāvamānena bhṛśaṃ cakāra ॥ 2.35.23 ॥
yadānilo lokapadāni hṛtvā cakāra daityān salileśayāṃstān ।
kṛtvādidevastridivasya devāṃścakre sureśaṃ puruhūtameva ॥ 2.35.24 ॥
gārhapatyena vidhinā anvāhāryyeṇa karmmaṇā।
agnimāhavanīyañca vediñcaiva kuśasravam ॥ 2.35.25 ॥
prokṣaṇīyaṃ sruvañcaiva avabhṛthaṃ tathaiva ca।
atha trīniha yaścakre havyabhāga pradānmakhe ॥ 2.35.26 ॥
havyādāṃśca surāṃścakre kavyādāṃśca pitṝnapi।
bhogārthaṃ yajñavidhinā yo yajño yajñakarmmaṇi ॥ 2.35.27 ॥
yūpān samitsruvaṃ somaṃ pavitraṃ paridhīnapi।
yajñiyāni ca dravyāṇi yajñīyāṃśca tathānalān ॥ 2.35.28 ॥
sadasyān yajamānāṃśca aśvamedhān kratūttamān।
vibabhrāja purā yaśca pārameṣṭyena karmmaṇā ॥ 2.35.29 ॥
yugānurūpaṃ yaḥ kṛtvā trīlloँkān hi yathākramam।
kṣaṇā nimeṣāḥ kāṣṭāśca kalāstraikālameva ca ॥ 2.35.30 ॥
muhūrttāstithayo māsā dinasaṃvatsarāstathā।
ṛtavaḥ kālayogāśca pramāṇaṃ trividhantathā ॥ 2.35.31 ॥
āyuḥ kṣetrāṇyupacayaṃ lakṣaṇaṃ rūpasauṣṭhavam।
medhā vittaṃ ca śauryyañca śāstrasyaiva ca pāraṇam ॥ 2.35.32 ॥
trayo varṇāstrayo lokāstraividyaṃ pāvakāstrayaḥ।
traikālyaṃ trīṇi karmmāṇi tisro māyāstrayo guṇāḥ ॥ 2.35.33 ॥
sṛṣṭā lokāḥ surāścaiva yenātyantena karmmaṇā।
sarvvabhūtagaṇāḥ sṛṣṭāḥ sarvvabhūtagaṇātmanā ॥ 2.35.34 ॥
nṛṇāmindriyapūrvveṇa yogena ramate ca yaḥ ।
gatāgatānāṃ yo netā sarvvatra vividheśvaraḥ ॥ 2.35.35 ॥
yo gatirdharmayuktānāmagatiḥ pāpakarmmaṇām।
cāturvarṇyasya prabhavaścāturvarṇyasya rakṣitā ॥ 2.35.36 ॥
cāturvidyasya yo vettā caturāśramasaṃśrayaḥ।
digantaraṃ nabho bhūmirāpo vāyurvibhāvasuḥ ॥ 2.35.37 ॥
candrasūryyadvayaṃ jyotiryugeśaḥ kṣaṇadācaraḥ।
yaḥ paraḥ śrūyate devo yaḥ paraṃ śrūyate tapaḥ ॥ 2.35.38 ॥
yaḥ parantapasaḥ prāhuryaḥ paramparamātmavān।
ādityādistu yo devo yaśca daityāntako vibhuḥ ॥ 2.35.39 ॥
yugānteṣvantako yaśca yaśca lokāntakāntakaḥ।
seturyo lokasetūnāṃ medhyo yo medhyakarmmaṇām ॥ 2.35.40 ॥
vedyo yo vedaviduṣāṃ prabhuryaḥ prabhavātmanām।
somabhūtastu bhūtānāmagnibhūto'gnivarcasām ॥ 2.35.41 ॥
manuṣyāṇāṃ manobhūtastapobhūtastapasvinām ।
vinayo nayatṛptānāṃ tejastejasvināmapi ॥ 2.35.42 ॥
vigraho vigrahāṇāṃ yo gatirgatimatāmapi।
ākāśa prabhavo vāyurvāyuprāṇā hutāśanaḥ ॥ 2.35.43 ॥
divā hutāśanaprāṇāḥ prāṇo'gnermadhusūdanaḥ।
raso'bhavacchoṇitaṃ vai śoṇitānmāṃsamucyate ॥ 2.35.44 ॥
māṃsāttu medaso janma medaso'sthi nirūpyate।
asthnā majjā samabhavanmajjātaḥ śukrasambhavaḥ ॥ 2.35.45 ॥
śukrādgharbhaḥ samabhavadrasamūlena karmmaṇā।
tatrāpi prathamañcāpastāḥ saumyarāśirucyate ॥ 2.35.46 ॥
garbhoṣmasambhavo jñeyo dvitīyo rāśirucyate।
śukraṃ somātmakaṃ vidyādārttavaṃ pāvakātmakam ॥ 2.35.47 ॥
bhāvau rasānugāvetau vīryye ca śaśipāvakau।
kaphavarge'bhavacchukraṃ pittavarge ca śoṇitam ॥ 2.35.48 ॥
kaphasya hṛdayaṃ sthānaṃ nābhyāṃ pittaṃ pratiṣṭitam।
dehasya madhye hṛdayaṃ sthānantu manasaḥ smṛtam ॥ 2.35.49 ॥
nābikoṣṭāntaraṃ yattu tatra devo hutāśanaḥ।
manaḥ prajāpatirjñeyaṃ kaphaḥ somo vibhāvyate ॥ 2.35.50 ॥
pittamagniḥ smṛtāvetāvagnisomātmakaṃ jagat।
evaṃ pravarttito garbho varttate'mbudasannibhaḥ ॥ 2.35.51 ॥
vāyuḥ praveśanaṃ cakre saṅgataḥ paramātmanā।
sa pañcadhā śarīrastho vidyate varddhayet punaḥ ॥ 2.35.52 ॥
prāṇāpānau samānaśca udāno vyāna eva ca।
prāṇo'sya paramātmānaṃ varddhayan parivarttate ॥ 2.35.53 ॥
apānaḥ paścimaṃ kāyamudānorddhvaśarīragaḥ।
vyāno vyānasyate yena samānaḥ sarvvasandhiṣu ॥ 2.35.54 ॥
bhūtāvāptistatastasya jāyatendriyagocarā।
pṛthivī vāyurākāśamāpo jyotiśca pañcamam ॥ 2.35.55 ॥
sarvvendriyā niviṣṭāstaṃ svaṃ svaṃ yogaṃ pracakrire।
pārthivaṃ dehamāhustaṃ prāṇātmānaṃ ca mārutam ॥ 2.35.56 ॥
chidrāṇyākāśayonīni jalāsrāvaṃ pravarttate ।
tejaścakṣuḥṣvitā jyotsnā teṣāṃ yannāmataḥ smṛtam।
saṅgrāmā viṣayāścaiva yasya vīryyātpravarttitāḥ ॥ 2.35.57 ॥
ityetān puruṣaḥ sarvvān sṛjaँllokān sanātanaḥ।
naidhane'smin kathaṃ loke naratvaṃ viṣṇurāgataḥ ॥ 2.35.58 ॥
eṣa naḥ saṃśayo dhīmanneṣa vai vismayo mahān ।
kathaṃ gatirgatimatāmāpanno mānuṣīṃ tanum ॥ 2.35.59 ॥
śrotumicchāmahe viṣṇoḥ karmmāṇi ca yathākramam।
āścaryyāṇi paraṃ viṣṇurvedadevaiśca kathyate ॥ 2.35.60 ॥
viṣṇorutpattimāścaryyaṃ kathayasva mahāmate।
etadāścaryyamākhyānaṃ kathyatāṃ vai sukhāvaham ॥ 2.35.61 ॥
prakhyātabalavīryyasya prādurbhāvā mahātmanaḥ।
karmmaṇāścaryyabhūtasya viṣṇoḥ sattvamihocyatām ॥ 2.35.62 ॥
           ।।sūta uvāca।।
ahañca kīrttayiṣyāmi prādurbhāvaṃ mahātmanaḥ।
yathā sa bhagavāñjāto mānuṣeṣu mahātapāḥ ॥ 2.35.63 ॥
saptasaptatapaḥ proktā bhṛguśāpena mānuṣe।
jāyate ca yugānteṣu devakāryyarthasiddhaye ॥ 2.35.64 ॥
tasya divyatanuṃ viṣṇorgadato me nibodhata।
yugadharmme parāvṛtte kāle ca śithile prabhuḥ ॥ 2.35.65 ॥
kartuṃ dharmmavyavasthānaṃ jāyate mānuṣeṣviha।
bhṛgoḥ śāpanimittena devāsurakṛtena ca ॥ 2.35.66 ॥
            ।।ṛṣaya ūcuḥ।।
kathaṃ devāsurakṛte adhyāhāramavāpnuyāt।
etadveditumicchāmo vṛttaṃ daivāsuraṃ katham ॥ 2.35.67 ॥
             ।।sūta uvāca।।
daivāsuraṃ yathāvṛttaṃ bruvatastannibodhata।
hiraṇyakaśipurdaityastrailokyaṃ prāk praśāsati ॥ 2.35.68 ॥
balinādhiṣṭitaṃ rāṣṭraṃ punarlokatraye kramāt।
sakhyamāsītparaṃ teṣāṃ devānāmasuraiḥ saha ॥ 2.35.69 ॥
yugaṃ vai daśasaṅkīrṇamāsīdavyāhataṃ jagat।
nideśasthāyinaścaiva tayordevāsurābhavan ॥ 2.35.70 ॥
balavān vai vivādo'yaṃ saṃpravṛttaḥ sudāruṇaḥ।
devāsurāṇāṃ ca tadā ghorakṣayakaro mahān ॥ 2.35.71 ॥
teṣāṃ dāyanimittaṃ vai saṃgrāṇā bahavo'bhavan।
vārāhe'smin daśa dvau ca ṣaṇḍāmārkottarāḥ smṛtā ॥ 2.35.72 ॥
nāmatastu samāsena śrṛṇudhvaṃ tān vivakṣataḥ।
prathamo nārasiṃhastu dvitīyaścāpi vāmanaḥ ॥ 2.35.73 ॥
tṛtīyaḥ sa tu vārāhaścaturtho'mṛtamandhanaḥ।
saṃgrāmaḥ pañcamaścaiva sughorastārakāmayaḥ ॥ 2.35.74 ॥
ṣaṣṭo hyāḍībakasteṣāṃ saptamastraipuraḥ smṛtaḥ।
andhakāro'ṣṭamasteṣāṃ dhvajaśca navamaḥ smṛtaḥ ॥ 2.35.75 ॥
vārttaśca daśamo jñeyastato hālā halaḥ smṛtaḥ।
smṛto dvādaśamasteṣāṃ ghorakolāhalo'paraḥ ॥ 2.35.76 ॥
hiraṇyakaśipurdaityo narasiṃhena sūditaḥ।
vāmanena balirvaddhastrailokyākramaṇe kṛte ॥ 2.35.77 ॥
hiraṇyākṣo hato dvandve prativāde tu daivataiḥ।
mahābalo mahāsattvaḥ saṃgrāmeṣvaparājitaḥ ॥ 2.35.78 ॥
daṃṣṭrāyāntu varāheṇa samudrādbhūryadā kṛtā ।
prāhlādo nirjito yuddhe indreṇāmṛtamanthane ॥ 2.35.79 ॥
virocanastu prāhlādirnityamindravadhodyataḥ।
indreṇaiva sa vikramya nihatastārakāmaye ॥ 2.35.80 ॥
bhavādavadhyatāṃ prāpya viśeṣāstrādibhistu yaḥ।
sañjabho nihataḥ ṣaṣṭe śakrāviṣṭena viṣṇunā ॥ 2.35.81 ॥
aśaknuvanto deveṣu puraṃ goptuṃ tridaivatam ।
nihatā dānavāḥ sarve tripurastryambakeṇa tu ॥ 2.35.82 ॥
aṣṭame tvasurāścaivaṃ rākṣasāścāndhakārakāḥ।
jitadevamanuṣyaistu pitṛbhiścaiva saṅgatān ॥ 2.35.83 ॥
saṃvṛtān dānavāṃścaiva saṅgatān kṛtsnaśaśca tān ।
tathā viṣṇusahāyena mahendreṇa nibarhitāḥ ॥ 2.35.84 ॥
hato dhvajo mahendreṇa māyācchannaśca yodhayan।
dhvaje lakṣyaṃ samāviśya vipravarttirmahābhujaḥ ॥ 2.35.85 ॥
daityāṃśca dānavāṃścaiva saṃhatān kṛtsnaśaśca tān।
rajiḥ kolāhale sarvān devaiḥ parivṛto'jayat।
yajñāmṛtena vijitau ṣaṇḍāmārkau tu daivataiḥ ॥ 2.35.86 ॥
ete daivāsurā vṛttāḥ saṃgrāmā dvādaśaiva tu।
devāsurakṣayakarāḥ prajānāmaśivāya ca ॥ 2.35.87 ॥
hiraṇyakaśipū rājā varṣāṇāmarbudaṃ babhau।
tathā śatasahasrāṇi hyadikāni dvisaptatiḥ ।
aśītiṃ ca sahasrāṇi trailokyasyeśvaro'bhavat ॥ 2.35.88 ॥
paryāye tasya rājā'nu balirvarṣārbudaṃ punaḥ ।
ṣaṣṭiṃ caiva sahasrāṇi triṃśataṃ niyutāni ca ॥ 2.35.89 ॥
bale rājyādhikārastu yāvatkālaṃ babhūva ha।
prahlādena gṛhīto'bhūttāvatkālaṃ tadāsuraiḥ ॥ 2.35.90 ॥
indrāstrayaste vikhyātā asurāṇāṃ mahaujasaḥ ।
daityasaṃsthamidaṃ sarvamāsīddaśayugaṃ kila ॥ 2.35.91 ॥
asapatnaṃ tataḥ sarvaṃ rāṣṭraṃ daśayugaṃ purā।
trailokyamavyayamidaṃ mahendreṇa tu pālyate ॥ 2.35.92 ॥
prahlādasya tataścādastrailokyaṃ kālaparyayāt ।
paryāyeṇa ca saṃprāpte trailokye pākaśāsanaḥ ॥ 2.35.93 ॥
tato'surān parityajya yajñe devā upāgaman ।
yajñe devānatha gate kāvyaṃ te hyasurābruvan ॥ 2.35.94 ॥
kṛtaṃ no miṣatāṃ rāṣṭraṃ tyaktvā yajñaṃ punargatāḥ।
sthātuṃ na śaknumo hyadya praviśāmo rasātalam ॥ 2.35.95 ॥
evamukto'bravīdetān viṣaṇṇaḥ sāntvayan girā।
mābhaiṣṭa dhārayiṣyāmi tejasā svena cāsurāḥ ॥ 2.35.96 ॥
vṛṣṭiroṣadhayaścaiva rasā vasu ca yadvayam।
kṛtsnā mayi ca tiṣṭhanti pādasteṣāṃ sureṣu vai।
yuṣmadarthaṃ pradāsyāmi tatsarvaṃ dhāryate mayā ॥ 2.35.97 ॥
tato devāsurān dṛṣṭvā dhṛtān kāvyena dhīmatā।
amantrayaṃstadā te vai saṃvignā vijigīṣayā ॥ 2.35.98 ॥
eṣa kāvya idaṃ sarvaṃ vyāvarttayati no balāt ।
sādhu gacchāmahe tūrṇaṃ kṣīṇānnāpyāyayasva tān ।
prasahya hatvā śiṣṭān vai pātālaṃ prāpayāmahe ॥ 2.35.99 ॥
tato devāḥ susaṃrabdhā dānavānabhisṛtya vai।
jadhnustai rvadhyamānāste kāvyamevābhidudruvuḥ ॥ 2.35.100 ॥
tataḥ kāvyastu tāndṛṣṭvā tūrṇaṃ devairabhidrutān।
samare'ktrakṣatārttāṃstān devebhyastān diteḥ sutān ॥ 2.35.101 ॥
kāvyo dṛṣṭvā sthitān devān tatra devo'bhyacintayat।
tānuvāca tato dhyātvā pūrvavṛttamanusmaran ॥ 2.35.102 ॥
trailokyaṃ vijitaṃ sarvaṃ vāmanena tribhiḥ kramaiḥ ।
balirbaddho hato jambho nihataśca virocanaḥ ॥ 2.35.103 ॥
mahārheṣu dvādaśasu saṃgrāmeṣu surairhatāḥ।
taistairupāyairbhūyiṣṭā nihatā ye pradhānataḥ ॥ 2.35.104 ॥
kiñcicchiṣṭāstu vai yūyaṃ yuddheṣvantyeṣu vai svayam।
nītiṃ vo hi vidhāsyāmi kālaḥ kaścitpratīkṣyatām ॥ 2.35.105 ॥
yāsyāmyahaṃ mahādevaṃ mantrārthe vijayāya vaḥ।
agnimāpyāyayeddhotā mantraireva bṛhaspatiḥ ॥ 2.35.106 ॥
tato yāsyāmyahaṃ devaṃ mantrārthe nīlalohitam।
yuṣmānanugrahīṣyāmi punaḥ paścādihāgataḥ ॥ 2.35.107 ॥
yūyaṃ tapaścaradhvaṃ vai saṃvṛtā valkalairvane।
na vai devā vadhiṣyanti yāvadāgamanaṃ mama ॥ 2.35.108 ॥
apratīpāṃstato mantrān devāt prāpya maheśvarāt।
yotsyāmahe punardevāṃstataḥ prāpsyatha vai jayam ॥ 2.35.109 ॥
tataste kṛtasaṃvādā devānūcustato'surāḥ।
nyastavādā vayaṃ sarve lokān yūyaṃ kramantu vai ॥ 2.35.110 ॥
vayaṃ tapaścariṣyāmaḥ saṃvṛtā valkalairvane।
prahlādasya vacaḥ śrutvā satyavyāharaṇaṃ tu tat ॥ 2.35.111 ॥
tato devā nivṛttā vai vijvarā muditāśca ha।
nyastaśastreṣu daityeṣu svān vai jagmuryathāgatān ॥ 2.35.112 ॥
tatastānabravītkāvyaḥ kañcitkālamupāsyatām।
nirutsukaistapoyuktaiḥ kālaṃ kāryārthasādhakaiḥ।
piturmamāśramasthā vai sarve devāḥ savāsavāḥ ॥ 2.35.113 ॥
sa sandiśyāsurān kāvyo mahādevaṃ prapadya ca।
praṇamyenasuvācātha jagatprabhavamīśvaram ॥ 2.35.114 ॥
mantrānicchāmyahaṃ deva me nasanti bṛhaspatau।
parābhavāya devānāmasureṣvabhayāvahān ॥ 2.35.115 ॥
evamukto'bravīddevo mantrānicchasi vai dvija।
vrataṃ cara mayo ddiṣṭaṃ brahmacārī samāhitaḥ ॥ 2.35.116 ॥
pūrṇaṃ varṣasahasraṃ vai kuṇḍadhūmamavākśirāḥ।
yadyupāsyasi bhadrante matto mantramavāpsyasi ॥ 2.35.117 ॥
tathokto deva devena sa śukrastu mahātapāḥ।
pādau saṃspṛśya devasya bāḍhamityabhyabhāṣata ॥ 2.35.118 ॥
vrataṃ carāmyahaṃ śeṣaṃ yathoddiṣṭo'smi vai prabho।
tato niyukto devena kuṇḍadhāro'sya dhūmakṛt ॥ 2.35.119 ॥
asurāṇāṃ hitārthāya tasmiñchukre gate tadā।
mantrārthaṃ tatra vasati brahmacarye maheśvaraḥ ॥ 2.35.120 ॥
tadbuddhvā nātipūrvantu rājyaṃ nyastaṃ tadāsuraiḥ।
tasmiñchidre tadāmarṣā devāstān samabhidravan।
niśitāttāyudhāḥ sarve bṛhaspatipurogamāḥ ॥ 2.35.121 ॥
dṛṣṭvāsuragaṇā devān pragṛhītāyudhān punaḥ।
utpetuḥ sahasā sarve santrastāste tato'bhavan ॥ 2.35.122 ॥
nyastaśastre jaye datte ācāryavratamāsthite।
santyajya. samayaṃ devāste sapatnajighāṃsavaḥ ॥ 2.35.123 ॥
anācāryāstu bhadraṃ vo viśvastāstapasi sthitāḥ।
cīravalkājinadharā niṣkriyā niṣparigrahāḥ ॥ 2.35.124 ॥
raṇe vijetuṃ devān vai naśakṣyāmaḥ kathañcana।
aśuddhena prapadyāmaḥ śaraṇaṃ kāvyamātaram ॥ 2.35.125 ॥
jñāpayāmastatamidaṃ yāvadāgamanaṃ guroḥ।
vinivṛtte tataḥ kāvye yotsyāmo yudhi tān surān ॥ 2.35.126 ॥
evamuktvā surān yogyaṃ śaraṇaṃ kāvyamātaram।
prāpadyanta tato bhītāstadā caiva tadā'bhayam ॥ 2.35.127 ॥
dattanteṣāntu bhītānāṃ daityā nāmabhayārthinām।
na bhetavyaṃ na bhetavya bhayantyajata dānavāḥ ॥ 2.35.128 ॥
matsannidhau vartatāṃ vo na bhīrbhavitumarhati।
bhayāccāpyabhipannāṃstān dṛṣṭvā devāsurāṃstadā ॥ 2.35.129 ॥
abhijagmuḥ prasahyaitānavicārya balābalam।
tāṃstrastān vadhyamānāṃśca devairdṛṣṭvāsurāṃstadā ॥ 2.35.130 ॥
devī kruddhābravīdenānanindratvaṃ karomyaham।
saṃstabhya śīghraṃ saṃrambhādindraṃ sā'bhyacarattataḥ ॥ 2.35.131 ॥
tataḥ saṃstambhitaṃ dṛṣṭvā śakraṃdevāstu yūpavat।
vyadravanta tato bhītā dṛṣṭvā śakraṃ vaśīkṛtam ॥ 2.35.132 ॥
gateṣu surasaṅgheṣu viṣṇurindramabhāṣata।
māṃtvaṃ praviśa bhadrante neṣyāmi tvāṃ sureśvara ॥ 2.35.133 ॥
evamuktastato viṣṇuṃ praviveśa purandaraḥ।
viṣṇunā rakṣitaṃ dṛṣṭvā devī kruddhā vaco'vadat ॥ 2.35.134 ॥
eṣā tvāṃ viṣṇunā sārddhaṃ dahāmi maghavāniva।
miṣatāṃ sarvabhūtānāṃ dṛśyatāṃ me tapobalam ॥ 2.35.135 ॥
tayābhibhūtau tau devāvindraviṣṇū jajalpatuḥ।
kathaṃ mucyeva sahitau viṣṇurindramabhāṣata ॥ 2.35.136 ॥
indro'bravījjahi hyenāṃ yāvannau na dahedvibho।
viśeṣeṇābhibhūto'hamatastvañca hi mā ciram ॥ 2.35.137 ॥
tataḥ samīkṣya tāṃ viṣṇuḥ strīvadhaṃ karttumāsthitaḥ।
abhidhyāya tataścakramāpannaḥ satvaraṃ prabhuḥ ॥ 2.35.138 ॥
tasyāḥ satvaramāṇāyāḥ śīghrakārī surārihā।
striyā viṣṇustato devyā krūraṃ buddhvā cikīrṣitam।
kruddhastadastramāviddhya śiraściccheda mādhavaḥ ॥ 2.35.139 ॥
taṃ dṛṣṭvā strīvadhaṃ ghoraṃ cukopa bhṛgurīśvaraḥ।
tato'bhiśasto bhṛguṇā viṣṇurbhāryāvadhe tadā ॥ 2.35.140 ॥
yasmātte jānatā dharmānavadhyā strī niṣūditā।
tasmāttvaṃ saptakṛtvo vai mānuṣeṣu prapatsyasi ॥ 2.35.141 ॥
tatastenābhiśāpena naṣṭe dharme punaḥ punaḥ।
loke sarvahitārthāya jāyate mānuṣeṣviha ॥ 2.35.142 ॥
anuvyāhṛtya viṣṇuṃ sa tadādāya śiraḥ svayam।
samānīya tataḥ kāye apo gṛhyedamabravīt ॥ 2.35.143 ॥
eṣa tvāṃ viṣṇunā satye hatāṃ saṃjīvayāmyaham ।
yadi kṛtsno mayā dharmaścarito jñāyate'pi vā।
tena satyena jīvasva yadi satyaṃ bravīmyaham ॥ 2.35.144 ॥
satyābhivyāhṛtā tasyā devī saṃjīvitā tadā।
tadā tāṃ prokṣya śītābhiradbhirjīveti so'bravīt ॥ 2.35.145 ॥
tatastāṃ sarvabhūtāni dṛṣṭvā suptotthitāmiva।
sādhu sādhvityadṛśyānāṃ vācastāḥ sasvarurdiśaḥ ॥ 2.35.146 ॥
dṛṣṭvā sañjīvitāmevaṃ devīṃ tāṃ bhṛguṇā tadā।
miṣatāṃ sarvabhūtānāṃ tadadbhutamivābhavat ॥ 2.35.147 ॥
asaṃbhrāntena bhṛguṇā patnīṃ sañjīvitāṃ tataḥ।
dṛṣṭvā śakro na lebhe'tha śarma kāvyabhayāttataḥ ॥ 2.35.148 ॥
prajāgare tataścendro jayantīmātmanaḥ sutām।
provāca matimān vākyaṃ svāṃ kanyāṃ pākaśāsanaḥ ॥ 2.35.149 ॥
eṣa kāvyo hyanindrāya carate dāruṇaṃ tapaḥ।
tenāhaṃ vyākulaḥ putri kṛto dhṛtimatā dṛḍham ॥ 2.35.150 ॥
gaccha sambhāvayasvainaṃ śramāpanayanaiḥ śubhaiḥ।
taistairmanonukūlaiśca hyupacārairatandritā ॥ 2.35.151 ॥
devī sā hīndratuhitā jayantī śubhacāriṇī।
yuktadhyānañca śāmyaṃ taṃ durbalaṃ dhṛtimāsthitam ॥ 2.35.152 ॥
pitrā yathoktaṃ kāvyaṃ sā kāvye kṛtavatī tadā।
gīrbhiścaivānukūlābhiḥ stuvatī valgubhāṣiṇī ॥ 2.35.153 ॥
gātrasaṃvāhanaiḥ kāle sevamānā sukhāvahaiḥ ।
śuśrūṣantyanukūlā ca uvāsa bahulāḥ samāḥ ॥ 2.35.154 ॥
pūrṇe dhūmavrate cāpi ghore varṣasahasrike ।
vareṇa cchandayāmāsa kāvyaṃ prīto'bhavattadā ॥ 2.35.155 ॥
evaṃ bruvaṃstvayaikena cīrṇaṃ nānyena kenacit।
tasmāttvaṃ tapasā buddhyā śrutena ca balena ca ॥ 2.35.156 ॥
tejasā cāpi vibudhān sarvānabhibhaviṣyasi।
yacca kiñcinmama brahman vidyate bhṛgunandana ॥ 2.35.157 ॥
sāṅgañca sarahasyañca yajñopaniṣadāntathā।
pratibhāsyati te sarvaṃ taccādyantaṃ na kasyacit ॥ 2.35.158 ॥
sarvābhibhāvī tena tvaṃ dvijaśreṣṭo bhaviṣyasi।
evaṃ dattvā varāṃstasmai bhārgavāya punaḥ punaḥ ॥ 2.35.159 ॥
ajeyatvaṃ dhaneśatvamavadhyatvaṃ ca vai dadau।
etān labdhvā varān kāvyaḥ samprahṛṣṭatanūruhaḥ ॥ 2.35.160 ॥
harṣāt prādurbabhau tasya devastotraṃ maheśvaram।
tadā tiryaksthitastvevaṃ tuṣṭuve nīlalohitam ॥ 2.35.161 ॥
namo'stu śitikaṇṭāya surāpāya suvarcase।
ririhāṇāya lopāya vatsarāya jagatpate ॥ 2.35.162 ॥
kapardine hyūrddhvaromṇe hayāya karaṇāya ca।
saṃskṛtāya sutīrthāya devadevāya raṃhase ॥ 2.35.163 ॥
uṣṇīṣiṇe suvakrāya sahasrākṣāya mīḍhuṣe।
vasuretāya rudrāya tapase cīravāsase ॥ 2.35.164 ॥
hrasvāya muktakeśāya senānye rohitāya ca ॥ 2.35.165 ॥
kavaye rājavṛddhāya takṣakakrīḍanāya ca।
giriśāyārkanetrāya yatine jāmbavāya ca।
suvṛttāya suhastāya dhanvine bhārgavāya ca ॥ 2.35.166 ॥
sahasrabāhave caiva sahasrāmalacakṣuṣe।
sahasrakukṣaye caiva sahasracaraṇāya ca ॥ 2.35.167 ॥
sahasraśirase caiva bahurūpāya vedhase।
bhavāya viśvarūpāya śvetāya puruṣāya ca ॥ 2.35.168 ॥
niṣaṅgiṇe kavacine sūkṣmāya kṣapaṇāya ca।
tāmrāya caiva bhīmāya ugrāya ca śivāya ca ॥ 2.35.169 ॥
babhrave ca piśaṅgāya piṅgalāyāruṇāya ca।
mahādevāya śarvvāya viśvarūpaśivāya ca ॥ 2.35.170 ॥
hiraṇyāya ca śiṣṭāya śreṣṭāya madhyamāya ca ।
pinākine ceṣumate citrāya rohitāya ca ॥ 2.35.171 ॥
dundubhyāyaikapādāya arhāya buddhaye tathā।
mṛgavyādhāya sarpāya sthāṇave bhīṣaṇāya ca ॥ 2.35.172 ॥
bahurūpāya cogrāya trinetrāyeśvarāya ca।
kapilāyaikavīrāya mṛtyave tryambakāya ca ॥ 2.35.173 ॥
vāstoṣpate vinākāya śaṅkarāya śivāya ca।
āraṇyāya guhasthāya yatine brahmacāriṇe ॥ 2.35.174 ॥
sāṅkhyāya caiva yogāya dhyānine dīkṣitāya ca।
antarhitāya śarvvāya mānyāya māline tathā ॥ 2.35.175 ॥
buddhāya caiva puṇyāya dhārmikāya śubhāya ca।
rodhase cekitānāya brahmiṣṭāya maharṣaye ॥ 2.35.176 ॥
catuṣpādāya medhyāya dharmiṇe śīghragāya ca।
śikhaṇḍine kapālāya daṃṣṭriṇe viśvamedhase ॥ 2.35.177 ॥
apratīghātāya dīptāya bhāskarāya sumedhase।
krūrāya vikṛtāyaiva bībhatsāya śivāya ca ॥ 2.35.178 ॥
saumyāya caiva puṇyāya dhārmikāya śubhāya ca।
avadhyāya mṛtāṅgāya nityāya śāśvatāya ca ॥ 2.35.179 ॥
sādyāya śarabhāyaiva śūline ca tricakṣuṣe।
somapāyājyapāyaiva dhūmapāyoṣmapāya ca ॥ 2.35.180 ॥
śucaye rerihāṇāya sadyojātāya mṛtyave।
piśitāśāya kharvāya medhāya vaidyutāya ca ॥ 2.35.181 ॥
vyāśritāya śraviṣṭāya bhāratāyāntarikṣaye।
kṣamāya saha mānāya satyāya tapanāya ca ॥ 2.35.182 ॥
tripuraghnāya dīptāya cakrāya romaśāya ca।
tigmāyudhāya medhyāya siddhāya ca pulastaye ॥ 2.35.183 ॥
rocamānāya khaṇḍāya sphītāya ṛṣabhāya ca।
bhogine puñjamānāya śāntāyaivorddhvaretase ॥ 2.35.184 ॥
aghaghnāya makhghnāya mṛtyave yajñiyāya ca।
kṛśānave pracetāya vahnaye kiśalāya ca ॥ 2.35.185 ॥
sikatyāya prasannāya vareṇyāyaiva cakṣuṣe।
kṣipregave sudhanvāya pramedhyāya priyāya ca ॥ 2.35.186 ॥
rakṣoghnāya paśughnāya vighnāya śayanāya ca।
vibhrāntāya mahantāya antaye durgamāya ca ॥ 2.35.187 ॥
dakṣāya ca jaghanyāya lokānāmīśvarāya ca।
anāmayāya corddhvāya saṃhatyādhiṣṭitāya ca ॥ 2.35.188 ॥
hiraṇyabāhave caiva satyāya śamanāya ca।
asikalyāya māghāya rīriṇyāyaikacakṣuṣe ॥ 2.35.189 ॥
śreṣṭāya vāmadevāya īśānāya ca dhīmate।
mahākalpāya dīptāya rādenāya hasāya ca ॥ 2.35.190 ॥
vṛtadhanvane kavicine rathine ca varūthine।
bhṛgunāthāya śukrāya vahniriṣṭāya dhīmate ॥ 2.35.191 ॥
aghāya aghaśaṃsāya vipriyāya priyāya ca ।
digvāsaḥkṛttivāsāya bhagaghnāya namo'stu te ॥ 2.35.192 ॥
paśūnāṃ pataye caiva bhūtānāṃ pataye namaḥ।
praṇane ṛgyajuḥsāmne svadhāyai ca sudhāya ca ॥ 2.35.193 ॥
vaṣaṭkāratamāyaiva tubhyamantātmane namaḥ ।
sraṣṭre dhātre tathā hotre hartre ca kṣapaṇāya ca ॥ 2.35.194 ॥
bhūtabhavyabhavāyaiva tubhyaṃ kālātmane namaḥ।
vasave caiva sādhyāya rudrādityāśvināya ca ॥ 2.35.195 ॥
viśvāya marute caiva tubhyandevātmane namaḥ।
agnisomartvigijyāya paśumantrauṣadhāya ca ॥ 2.35.196 ॥
dakṣiṇāvabhṛthāyaiva tubhyaṃ yajñātmane namaḥ ।
tapase caiva satyāya tyāgāya ca śamāya ca ॥ 2.35.197 ॥
ahiṃsāyāpyalobhāya suveśāyātiśāya ca।
sarvabhūtātmabhūtāya tubhyaṃ yogātmane namaḥ ॥ 2.35.198 ॥
pṛthivyai cāntarikṣāya divāya ca mahāya ca।
janastapāya satyāya tubhyaṃ lokātmane namaḥ ॥ 2.35.199 ॥
avyaktāyātha mahate bhūtāyaivondriyāya ca ।
tanmātrāya mahāntāya tubhyaṃ tattvātmane namaḥ ॥ 2.35.200 ॥
nityāya cārthaliṅgāya sūkṣmāya cetanāya ca।
śuddhāya vibhave caiva tubhyaṃ nityātmane namaḥ ॥ 2.35.201 ॥
namaste triṣu lokeṣu svarānteṣu bhavādiṣu।
satyānteṣu mahānteṣu caturṣu ca namo'stu te ॥ 2.35.202 ॥
namaḥstotre mayā hyasmin sadasadvyāhṛtaṃ vibho।
madbhakta iti brahmaṇya sarvantat kṣantumarhasi ॥ 2.35.203 ॥

iti śrīmahāpurāṇe vāyuprokte viṣṇumāhātmye śambhustavakīrttanaṃ nāma pañcatriṃśo'dhyāyaḥ ।। 35 ।।

## 2.36

sūta uvāca।।
evamārādhya deveśamīśānaṃ nīlalohitam।
brahmeti praṇatastasmai prāñjalirvākyamabravīt ॥ 2.36.1 ॥

kāvyasya gātraṃ saṃspṛśya hastena prītimān bhavaḥ।
nikāmaṃ darśanaṃ dattvā tatraivāntaradhīyata ॥ 2.36.2 ॥

tataḥ so'ntarhite tasmin deveśānucare tadā।
tiṣṭhantīṃ prāñjalirbhūtvā jayantīmidamabravīt ॥ 2.36.3 ॥

kasya tvaṃ subhage kā vā duḥkhite mayi duḥkhitā।
mahatā tapasā yuktaṃ kimarthaṃ māñjugopasi ॥ 2.36.4 ॥

anayā satataṃ bhaktyā praśrayeṇa damena ca।
snehena caiva suśroṇi prīto'smi varavarṇini ॥ 2.36.5 ॥

kimicchasi varārehe kaste kāmaḥ samṛdhyatām।
taṃ te saṃpūrayāmyadya yadyapi syāt sudurlabham ॥ 2.36.6 ॥

evamuktā''bravīdanaṃ tapasā jñātumarhasi।
cikīrṣitaṃ me brahniṣṭhatvaṃ hi vettha yathātatham ॥ 2.36.7 ॥

evamukte'bravīdenāṃ dṛṣṭvā divyena cakṣuṣā।
māhendrī tvaṃ varārohe maddhitārthamihāgatā ॥ 2.36.8 ॥

mayā saha tvaṃ suśroṇi daśa varṣāṇi bhāmini।
adṛśyaṃ sarvabhūtaistu saṃprayogamihecchasi ॥ 2.36.9 ॥

devendrānalavarṇābhe varārohe sulocane।
imaṃ vṛṇīṣva kāmaṃ te matto vai valgubhāṣiṇi ॥ 2.36.10 ॥

evaṃ bhavatu gacchāmo gṛhān vai mattakāśini ।
tataḥ svagṛhamāgamya jayantyā sahitaḥ prabhuḥ ॥ 2.36.11 ॥

sa tayā saṃ va saddevyā daśa varṣāṇi bhāgaśaḥ।
adṛśyaḥ sarvabhūtānāṃ māyayā saṃvṛtastadā ॥ 2.36.12 ॥

kṛtārthamāgataṃ dṛṣṭvā kāvyaṃ sarve diteḥ sutāḥ ।
abhijagmurgṛhaṃ tasya muditāste didṛkṣavaḥ ॥ 2.36.13 ॥

gatā yadā na paśyanto jayantyā saṃvṛtaṃ gurum।
dākṣiṇyaṃ tasya tadbudhvā pratijagmuryathāgatam ॥ 2.36.14 ॥

bṛhaspatistu saṃruddhaṃ jñātvā kāvyaṃ cakāra ha।
pitrarthe daśa varṣāṇi jayantyā hitakāmyayā ॥ 2.36.15 ॥

buddhvā tadantaraṃ so'tha daityānāmiva coditaḥ।
kāvyasya rūpamāsthāya so'surānsamabhāṣata ॥ 2.36.16 ॥

tataḥ samāgatān dṛṣṭvā bṛhaspatiruvāca tān।
svāgataṃ mama yājyānāṃ saṃprāpto'smi hitāya ca ॥ 2.36.17 ॥

ahaṃ vo'dhyāpayiṣyāmi prāptā vidyā mayā hi sā।
tataste hṛṣṭamanaso vidyārthamupapedire ॥ 2.36.18 ॥

pūrṇakāmastadā tasmin samaye daśavārṣike।
yayau ca samakālaṃ sa sadyotpannamatistadā ॥ 2.36.19 ॥

samayānte devayānī sadyo jātā sutā tadā।
buddhiṃ cakre tataścāpi yājyānāṃ pratyavekṣaṇe ॥ 2.36.20 ॥

           ।।śukra uvāca।।
devi gacchāmahe draṣṭuṃ tava yājyān śucismite।
vibhrāntaprekṣite sādhvi trivarṇāyatalocane ॥ 2.36.21 ॥

evamuktā'bravīddevī bhaja bhaktān mahāvrata।
eṣa brahman satāṃ dharmo na dharmaṃ lopayāmi te ॥ 2.36.22 ॥

           ।।sūta uvāca।।
tato gatvāsurān dṛṣṭvā devācāryeṇa dhīmatā।
vāñcitān kāvyarūpeṇa vedhasā'suramabravīt ॥ 2.36.23 ॥

kāvyaṃ māṃ tāta jānīdhvaṃ eṣa hyāṅgiraso bhuvi।
vañcitā bata yūyaṃ vai mayi śakte tu dānavāḥ ॥ 2.36.24 ॥

śrutvā tathā bruvāṇantaṃ sambhrāntā ditijāstataḥ।
prekṣante sma hyubhau tatra sitāsitaśucismitau ॥ 2.36.25 ॥

sampramūḍhāḥ sthitāḥ sarve prāpadyanta na kiñcana।
tatasteṣu pramūḍheṣu kāvyastān punarabravīt ॥ 2.36.26 ॥

ācāryyo vo hyahaṃ kāvyo devācāryo'yamaṅgirāḥ।
anugacchata māṃ sarve tyajatainaṃ bṛhaspatim ॥ 2.36.27 ॥

evamuktāsurāḥ sarve tāvṛbhau samavaikṣata।
tadā'surā viśeṣantu na vyajānaṃstayordvayoḥ ॥ 2.36.28 ॥

bṛhaspatiruvācaitānasambhrānto'yamaṅgirāḥ।
kāvyo'haṃ yo gururdaityā madrūpo'yaṃ bṛhaspatiḥ ॥ 2.36.29 ॥

sa mohayati rūpeṇa māmakenaiṣa vo'surāḥ।
śrutvā tasya tataste vai saṃmantryārthavaco'bruvan ॥ 2.36.30 ॥

ayanno daśa varṣāṇi satataṃ śāsti vai prabhuḥ।
eṣa vai gururasmākamantarepsurayaṃ dvijaḥ ॥ 2.36.31 ॥

tataste dānavāḥ sarve praṇipatyābhivādya ca।
vacanaṃ jagṛhustasya cirābhyāsena mohitāḥ ॥ 2.36.32 ॥

ūcustamasurāḥ sarve kruddhāḥ saṃraktalocanāḥ.
ayaṅgururhite'smākaṃ gaccha tvaṃ nāsi no guruḥ ॥ 2.36.33 ॥

bhārgavo'ṅgiraso vāyaṃ bhavatvevaiṣa noguruḥ।
sthitā vayaṃ nideśe'sya gacchatvaṃ sādhu mā ciram ॥ 2.36.34 ॥

evamuktvāsurāḥ sarve prāpadyanta bṛhaspatim।
yadā na pratipadyante tenoktaṃ tanmahaddhitam ॥ 2.36.35 ॥

cukopa bhārgavasteṣāmavalepena vai tadā।
bodhitā hi mayā yasmānna māṃ bhajata dānavāḥ ॥ 2.36.36 ॥

tasmāt pranaṣṭa saṃjñāṃ vai parābhavaṅgamiṣyatha।
idi vyāhṛtya tān kāvyo jagāmātha yathāgatam ॥ 2.36.37 ॥

jñātvā'bhiśastānasurān kāvyena tu bṛhaspatiḥ।
kṛtārthaḥ sa tadā hṛṣṭaḥ svaṃ rūpaṃ pratyapadyata।
buddhvā'surāṃstadā bhraṣṭān kṛtārtho'ntaradhīyata ॥ 2.36.38 ॥

tataḥ pranaṣṭe tasmiṃste vibhrāntā dānavāstadā।
aho dhig vañcitāḥ smeha parasparamathābruvan ॥ 2.36.39 ॥

pṛṣṭhato vimukhāścaiva tāḍitā vedhasā vayam।
dagdhāścaivopayogācca svesve cārtheṣu māyayā ॥ 2.36.40 ॥

tato'surāḥ paritrastā devebhyastvaritā yayuḥ।
prahlādamagrataḥ kṛtvā kāvyasyānugamaṃ punaḥ ॥ 2.36.41 ॥

tataḥ kāvyaṃ samāsādya abhitasthu ravāṅmukhāḥ।
tānāgatān punardṛṣṭvā kāvyo yājyānuvāca ha ॥ 2.36.42 ॥

mayāpi bodhitāḥ kāle yato māṃ nābhinandatha।
tatastenāvalepena gatā yūthaṃ parābhavam ॥ 2.36.43 ॥

prahlādastamathovāca mānaṃ tvaṃ tyaja bhārgava।
svān yājyān bhajamānāṃśca bhaktāṃścaiva viśeṣataḥ ॥ 2.36.44 ॥

tvayā pṛṣṭā vayaṃ tena devācāryeṇa mohitāḥ।
bhaktānarhasi nastrātuṃ jñātvā dīrgheṇa cakṣuṣā ॥ 2.36.45 ॥

yadi nastvaṃ na kuruṣe prasādaṃ bhṛgunandana।
apadhyātā stvayā hyadya pravekṣyāmo rasātalam ॥ 2.36.46 ॥

           sūta uvāca।।
jñātvā kāvyo yathātattvaṃ kāruṇyenānukampayā ।
evamukto'nunītaḥ sa stutaḥ kopaṃ nyayacchata ॥ 2.36.47 ॥

uvācedanna bhetavyaṃ na gantanyaṃ rasātalam।
avaśyambhāvī hyartho'yaṃ prāpto vo mayi jāgrati ॥ 2.36.48 ॥

na śakyamanyathā kartuṃ dṛṣṭaṃ hi balavattaram ।
saṃjñā pranaṣṭā yā vo'dya kāmaṃ tāṃ pratilapsyatha ॥ 2.36.49 ॥

prāptaḥ paryyāyakālo va iti brahmā'bhyabhāṣata।
matprasādācca yuṣmābhirbhuktaṃ trailokyamūrjjitam ॥ 2.36.50 ॥

yugākhyo daśa saṃpūrṇo devānākramya mūrddhani।
tāvantameva kālaṃ vai brahmā rājyamabhāṣata ॥ 2.36.51 ॥

sāvarṇike punastubhyaṃ rājyaṃ kila bhaviṣyati।
lokānāmīśvaro bhāvī pautrastava punarbaliḥ ॥ 2.36.52 ॥

evaṃ kilamahaṃ proktaḥ pautraste brahmaṇā svayam।
tathāhṛteṣu lokeṣu tapo'sya na kilābhavat ॥ 2.36.53 ॥

yasmāt pravṛttayaścāsya na kāmānabhisandhitāḥ।
tasmādajena prītena dattaṃ sāvarṇike'ntare ॥ 2.36.54 ॥

devarājyaṃ balerbhāvyamiti māmīśvaro'bravīt।
tasmādadṛśyo bhūtānāṃ kālākāṅkṣī sa tiṣṭhati ॥ 2.36.55 ॥

prītena cāmaratvaṃ vai dattaṃ tubyaṃ svayambhuvā।
tasmānnirutsu kastvaṃ vai paryyāyaṃ saha mākulaḥ ॥ 2.36.56 ॥

na ca śakyaṃ mayā tubhyaṃ purastādvai visarpitum ।
brahmaṇā pratiṣiddho'smi bhaviṣyaṃ jānatā prabho ॥ 2.36.57 ॥

imau ca śiṣyau dvau mahyaṃ tulyāvetau bṛhaspateḥ ।
daivataiḥ saha saṃrabdhān sarvvān vo dhārayiṣyataḥ ॥ 2.36.58 ॥

evamuktastu daiteyāḥ kāvyenākliṣṭakarmmaṇā।
tatastābhyāṃ yayuḥ sārddhaṃ prahlādapramukhāstadā ॥ 2.36.59 ॥

avaśyambhāvamarthatvaṃ śrutvā śukrācca dānavāḥ।
sakṛdāśaṃsamānāste jayaṃ kāvyena bhāṣitam ॥ 2.36.60 ॥

daṃśitāḥ sāyudhāḥ sarve tato devān samāhvayan।
atha devāsurān dṛṣṭvā saṃgrāme samupasthitān ॥ 2.36.61 ॥

tataḥ saṃvṛttasannāhā devāstān samayodhayan।
daivāsure tatastasmin varttamāne śataṃ samāḥ।
ajayannasurā devān bhagnā devā amantrayan ॥ 2.36.62 ॥

             ।।devā ūcuḥ ।।

ṣaṇḍāmārkaprabhāvaṃ na jānīmastva surairvayam।
tasmādyajñaṃ samuddiśya kāryyaṃ cātmahitañca yat ॥ 2.36.63 ॥

tajjñānāpahṛtāvetau kṛtvā jeṣyāmahe'surān ।
athopāmantrayan devāḥ ṣaṇḍāmārkau tu tāvubhau ॥ 2.36.64 ॥

yajñe samāhvayiṣyāmastyajatamasurān dvijau ।
grahaṃ taṃ vā grahīṣyāmo hyanujitya tu dānavān ॥ 2.36.65 ॥

evaṃ tatyajatustau tu ṣaṇḍāmārkau tadāsurān ।
tato devā jayaṃ prāptā dānavāśca parābhavam ॥ 2.36.66 ॥

devāsurān parābhāvya ṣaṇḍāmārkāvupāgaman।
kāvyaśāpābhibhūtāśca hyanādhārāśca te punaḥ ॥ 2.36.67 ॥

vadhyamānāstadā devairviviśuste rasātalam।
evaṃ nirudyamāste vai kṛtāḥ śakreṇa dānavāḥ।
tataḥ prabhṛti śāpena bhṛgunaimittikena ca ॥ 2.36.68 ॥

jajñe punaḥ punarviṣṇuryajñe ca śithile prabhuḥ।
karttuṃ dharmmavyavasthānamadharmmasya ca nāśanam ॥ 2.36.69 ॥

prahlādasya nideśe tu ye'surā na vyavasthitāḥ।
manuṣyavadhyāṃstān sarvvān brahmā vyāhārayat prabhuḥ ॥ 2.36.70 ॥

dharmmānnārāyaṇastasmān sambhūtaścākṣuṣe'ntare।
yajñaṃ pravartayāmāsa caitye vaivasvate'ntare ॥ 2.36.71 ॥

prādurbhāve tadānyasya brahmaivāsīt purohitaḥ।
caturthyāntu yugākhyāyāmāpanneṣvasureṣvatha ॥ 2.36.72 ॥

sambhūtaḥ sa samudrāntarhiraṇyakaśiporvadhe।
dvitīyo narasiṃṅo'bhūdrudraḥ surapurassaraḥ ॥ 2.36.73 ॥

balisaṃstheṣu lokeṣu tretāyāṃ saptame yuge।
daityaistrailokya ākrānte tṛtīyo vāmano'bhavat ॥ 2.36.74 ॥

saṃkṣipyātmānamaṅgeṣu bṛhaspatipurassaram।
yajamānantu daityendramadityāḥ kulanandanaḥ।
dvijo bhūtvā śubhe kāle baliṃ vairocanampurā ॥ 2.36.75 ॥

trailokyasya bhavān rājā tvayi sarvvaṃ pratiṣṭitam।
dātumarhasi me rājan vikramāṃstrīniti prabhuḥ ॥ 2.36.76 ॥

dadāmītyeva taṃ rājā balirvairocano'bravīt।
vāmanantaṃ ca vijñāya tato'numuditaḥ svayam ॥ 2.36.77 ॥

sa vāmano divaṃ khaṃ ca pṛthivīṃ ca dvijottamāḥ।
tribhiḥ kramairviśvamidaṃ jagadākrāmata prabhuḥ ॥ 2.36.78 ॥

atyaricyata bhūtātmā bhāskaraṃ svena tejasā।
prakāśayan diśaḥ sarvvāḥ pradiśaśca mahāyaśāḥ ॥ 2.36.79 ॥

śuśubhe sa mahābāhuḥ sarvvalokān prakāśayan।
āsurīṃ śriyamāhṛtya trīṃllokāṃśca janārdanaḥ।
saputrapautrānasurān pātālatalamānayat ॥ 2.36.80 ॥

namuciḥ śambaraścaiva prahlādaścaiva viṣṇunā।
krūrā hatā vinirddhūtā diśaḥ saṃpratipedire ॥ 2.36.81 ॥

mahābhūtāni bhūtātmā saviśeṣāṇi mādhavaḥ।
kālañca sakalaṃ viprāṃstatrādbhutamadarśayat ॥ 2.36.82 ॥

tasya gātre jagatsarvamātmānamanupaśyati ।
na kiñcidasti lokeṣu yadavyāptaṃ mahātmanā ॥ 2.36.83 ॥

tadvai rūpamupendrasya devadānavamānavāḥ।
dṛṣṭvā sammumuhuḥ sarve viṣṇutejovimohitāḥ ॥ 2.36.84 ॥

baliḥ silo mahāpāśaiḥ sabandhuḥ sasuhṛdgaṇaḥ।
virocana kulaṃ sarvaṃ pātāle sanniveśitam ॥ 2.36.85 ॥

tataḥ sarvāmaraiśvaryaṃ dattvendrāya mahātmane।
mānuṣeṣu mahābāhuḥ prādurāsījjanārdanaḥ ॥ 2.36.86 ॥

etāstisraḥ smṛtāstasya divyāḥ sambhūtayaḥ śubhāḥ।
mānuṣyāḥ sapta yāstasya śāpajāṃstānnibodhata ॥ 2.36.87 ॥

tretāyuge tu daśame dattātreyo babhūva ha।
naṣṭe dharme caturthaśca mārkaṇḍeyapuraḥsaraḥ ॥ 2.36.88 ॥

pañcamaḥ pañcadaśyāṃ tu tretāyāṃ sambabhūva ha।
māndhātuścakravarttitve tasthau tathyapuraḥsaraḥ ॥ 2.36.89 ॥

eko naviṃśe tretāyāṃ sarvvakṣatrāntako'bhavat।
jāmadagnyastathā ṣaṣṭo viśvāmitrapuraḥsaraḥ ॥ 2.36.90 ॥

caturviṃśe yuge rāmo vasiṣṭena purodhasā।
saptamo rāva ṇasyārthe jajñe daśarathātmajaḥ ॥ 2.36.91 ॥

aṣṭamo dvāpare viṣṇuraṣṭāviṃśe parāśarāt ।
vedavyāsastato jajñe jātūkarṇapuraḥsaraḥ ॥ 2.36.92 ॥

tathaiva navamo viṣṇuradityāḥ kaśyapātmajaḥ।
devakyāṃ vasudevāttu brahnagārgyapuraḥsaraḥ ॥ 2.36.93 ॥

aprameyo niyojyaśca yatra kāmacaro vaśī।
krījate bhagavāँ lloke bālaḥ krījanakairiva ॥ 2.36.94 ॥

na pramātuṃ mahābāhuḥ śakyo'sau madhusūdanaḥ।
paraṃ paramametasmādviśvarūpānna vidyate ॥ 2.36.95 ॥

aṣṭāviṃśa time tadvaddvāparasyāṃśasaṅkṣaye।
naṣṭe dharme tadā jajñe viṣṇurvṛṣṇikule prabhuḥ ॥ 2.36.96 ॥

karttuṃ dharmavyavasthānamasurāṇāṃ praṇāśanam।
mohayan sarvabhūtāni yogātmā yogamāyayā ॥ 2.36.97 ॥

praviṣṭo mānuṣīṃ yoniṃ pracchannaścarate mahīm।
vihārārthaṃ manuṣyeṣu sāndīpanipuraḥsaram ॥ 2.36.98 ॥

yatra kaṃsañca śālvañca dvividañca mahāsuram।
ariṣṭaṃ vṛṣabhañcaiva pūtanāṃ keśinaṃ hayam ॥ 2.36.99 ॥

nāgaṃ kuvalayāpīḍaṃ mallarājagṛhādhipam।
daityān mānuṣadehasthān sūdayāmāsa vīryavān ॥ 2.36.100 ॥

chinnaṃ bāhusahasrañca bāṇasyādbhutakarmaṇaḥ ।
narakaśca hataḥ saṅkhaye yavanaśca mahābalaḥ ॥ 2.36.101 ॥

hṛtāni ca mahīpānāṃ sarvaratnāni tejasā।
durācārā śca nihatāḥ pārthivā ye rasātale ॥ 2.36.102 ॥

ete lokahitārthāya prādurbhāvā mahātmanaḥ।
asminneva yuge kṣīṇe sandhyā śliṣṭe bhaviṣyati ॥ 2.36.103 ॥

kalkirviṣṇuyaśā nāma pārāśaryaḥ pratāpavān।
daśamo bhāvyasambhūto yājñavalkyapuraḥsaraḥ ॥ 2.36.104 ॥

anukarṣan sarvasenāṃ hastyaśvarathasaṅkulām।
pragṛhītāyudhaurviprairvṛtaḥ śatasahasraśaḥ ॥ 2.36.105 ॥

nātyarthaṃ dhārmikā ye ca ye ca dharmadviṣaḥ vkacit।
īdīcyānmadhyadeśāṃśca tathā vindhyāparāntikān ॥ 2.36.106 ॥

tathaiva dākṣiṇātyāṃśca dravijān siṃhalaiḥ saha।
gāndhārān pāradāṃścaiva pahlavān yavanāñchakān ॥ 2.36.107 ॥

tuṣārān barbarāṃścaiva pulindān daradān khasān ।
lampākānandhakān rudrān kirātāṃścaiva sa prabhuḥ ॥ 2.36.108 ॥

pravṛttacakrobalavān mlecchānāmantakṛdbalī।
adṛśyaḥ sarvabhūtānāṃ pṛthivīṃ vicariṣyati ॥ 2.36.109 ॥

mānavaḥ sa tu saṃjajñe devasyāṃśena dhīmataḥ ।
pūrvajanmani viṣṇuryaḥ pramitirnāma vīryavān ॥ 2.36.110 ॥

gātreṇa vai candrasamaḥ pūrṇe kaliyuge'bhavat।
ityetāstasya devasya daśa sambhūtayaḥ smṛtāḥ ॥ 2.36.111 ॥

taṃ taṃ kālañca kāryañca tattaduddiśya kāraṇam।
aṃśena triṣu lokeṣu tāstā yonīḥ prapatsyate ॥ 2.36.112 ॥

pañcaviṃśotthite kalpe pañcaviṃśati vai samāḥ।
vinighnan sarvvabhūtāni mānuṣāneva sarvvaśaḥ ॥ 2.36.113 ॥

kṛtvā bījāvaśeṣāntu mahīṃ krūreṇa karmmaṇā।
saṃśātayitvā vṛṣalān prāyaśastānadhārmmikān ॥ 2.36.114 ॥

tataḥ sa vai tadā kalkiścaritārthaḥ sasainikaḥ।
karmaṇā nihatā ye tu siddhāste tu punaḥ svayam ॥ 2.36.115 ॥

akasmāt kupitānyonyaṃ bhaviṣyanti ca mohitāḥ ।
kṣapayitvā tu tān sarvān bāvinārthena coditān ॥ 2.36.116 ॥

gaṅgāyamunayormadhye niṣṭāṃ prāpsyati sānugaḥ।
tato vyatīte kalkau tu sāmānyaiḥ saha sainikaiḥ ॥ 2.36.117 ॥

nṛpeṣvatha vinaṣṭeṣu tadā tvapragrahāḥ prajāḥ।
rakṣaṇe vinivṛtte tu hatvā cānyonyamāhave ॥ 2.36.118 ॥

parasparahṛtāśvāsā nirākrandāḥ suduḥkhitāḥ।
purāṇi hitvā grāmāṃśca tulyāstā niṣparigrahāḥ ॥ 2.36.119 ॥

pranaṣṭaśrutidharmāśca naṣṭadharmāśramāstathā।
hrasvā alpāyuṣaścaiva vanaukasa ime smṛtāḥ ॥ 2.36.120 ॥

saritparvatasevinyaḥ patramūlaphalāśanāḥ।
cīra patrājinadharāḥ saṅkaraṃ ghoramāsthitāḥ ॥ 2.36.121 ॥

alpāyuṣo naṣṭavārttā bahvābādhāḥ suduḥkhitāḥ।
evaṃ kaṣṭamanuprāptāḥ kalisandhyaṃśake tadā ॥ 2.36.122 ॥

prajāḥ kṣayaṃ prayāsyanti sārddhaṃ kaliyugena tu ।
kṣīṇe kaliyuge tasmin pravṛtte ca kṛte punaḥ ॥ 2.36.123 ॥

prapatsyante yathānyāyaṃ svabhāvādeva nānyatā।
ityetat kīrtitaṃ sarvaṃ devāsuraviceṣṭitam ॥ 2.36.124 ॥

yaduvaṃśaprasaṅgena mahadvo vaiṣṇavaṃ yaśaḥ ।
turvasostu pravakṣyāmi pūrordruhyoranostathā ॥ 2.36.125 ॥
