daityasya śīghraṃ śirasi tāṃ dhāraya mamājñayā ॥ 2.44.45 ॥

niścalārthaṃ yamaḥ śrutvā dhārayanmastake śilām।
śilāyāṃ dhāritāyāntu saśilaścāsuro'calat ॥ 2.44.46 ॥

devānūce'tha rudrādīñchilāyāṃ niścalāḥ kila।
tiṣṭhantu devāḥ sakalāstathetyuktvā ca te sthitāḥ ॥ 2.44.47 ॥

devāḥ pādairlakṣayitvā tathāpi calito'suraḥ।
brahmātha vyākulo viṣṇuṃ gataḥ kṣīrābdhiśāyinam।
tuṣṭāva praṇato bhūtvā natvā cādṛtya taṃ prabhum ॥ 2.44.48 ॥

        ।.brahmovāca।।
brahmāṇḍasya pate nātha namāmi jagatāṃ patim।
katiṃ kīrttimatāṃ nṝṇāṃ buktimuktipradāyakam ॥ 2.44.49 ॥

viṣvakseno'bravīdviṣṇuṃ deva tvāṃ stauti padmajaḥ।
harirāhānaya tvaṃ taṃ viṣṇūktaḥ sa tamānayat।
ajamūce hariḥ kasmādāgato'si vadasva tat ॥ 2.44.50 ॥

       ।।brahmovāca।।
devadeva kṛte yoge pracacāla gayāsuraḥ।
śilāyāṃ devarūpiṇyāṃ nyastāyāṃ tasya mastake ॥ 2.44.51 ॥

rudrādiṣu ca deveṣu saṃsthiteṣvasuro'calat।
idānīṃ niścalārthaṃ hi prasādaṃ kuru mādhava ॥ 2.44.52 ॥

brahmaṇo vacanaṃ śrutvā hyākṛṣya svaśarīrataḥ ।
mūrttiṃ dadau niścalārthaṃ brahmaṇe bhagavānhariḥ ॥ 2.44.53 ॥

ānīya mūrttiṃ brahmāpi śilāyāṃ samadhārayat।
tathāpi calitaṃ vīkṣya punardevamathāhvayat ॥ 2.44.54 ॥

āgatya viṣṇuḥ kṣīrābdheḥ śilāyāṃ saṃsthito'bhavat।
janārddanābhidhānena puṇḍarīketi nāmataḥ।
śilāyāṃniścalārthaṃ hi svayamādigadādharaḥ ॥ 2.44.55 ॥

niścalārthaṃ pañcadhāsīcchilāyāṃ prapitāpahaḥ।
pitāmaho'tha phalgvīśaḥ kedāraḥ kanakeśvaraḥ ॥ 2.44.56 ॥

brahmā sthitaḥ svayaṃ tatra gajarūpī vināyakaḥ।
gayādityaścottarārko dakṣiṇārkastridhā raviḥ ॥ 2.44.57 ॥

lakṣmīḥ sītābhidhānena gaurī ca maṅgalāhvayā।
gāyatrī caiva sāvitrī trisandhyā ca sarasvatī ॥ 2.44.58 ॥

indro bṛhaspatiḥ pūṣā vasavo'ṣṭau mahābalāḥ।
viśvedevāścāśvineyau māruto viśvanāyakaḥ।
sayakṣoragagandharvvāstasthurdevāḥ svaśāktibhiḥ ॥ 2.44.59 ॥

ādyayā gadayā cāsau yasmāddaityaḥ sthirīkṛtaḥ।
sthita ityeva hariṇā tasmādādigadādharaḥ ॥ 2.44.60 ॥

ūce gayāsuro devānkimarthaṃ vañcito hyaham।
yajñārthaṃ brahmaṇe dattaṃ śarīramamalaṃ mayā।
viṣṇorvacanamātreṇa kiṃ na syāṃ niścalo hyaham ॥ 2.44.61 ॥

yatsuraiḥ pīḍito'tyarthaṃ gadayā hariṇā tathā।
pīḍito yadyahaṃ devāḥ prasannāḥ santu sarvadā ॥ 2.44.62 ॥

gadādharādayastuṣṭāḥ procuḥ sārddhaṃ gayāsuram।
varaṃ brūhi prasannāḥ smo devānūce gayāsuraḥ ॥ 2.44.63 ॥

yāvatpṛthvī parvatāśca yāvaccandrārkatārakāḥ।
tāvacchilāyāṃ tiṣṭhantu brahmaviṣṇumaheśvarāḥ।
anye ca sakalā devā mannāmnā kṣetramastu vai ॥ 2.44.64 ॥

pañcakrośaṃ gayākṣetraṃ krośamekaṃ gayāśiraḥ ।
tanmadhye sarvatīrthāni prayacchantu hitaṃ nṛṇām ॥ 2.44.65 ॥

snānāditarpaṇaṃ kṛtvā piṇḍadānātphalādhikam।
mahātmā vai sahasrañca kulānāṃ coddharennaraḥ ॥ 2.44.66 ॥

vyaktāvyaktasvarūpeṇa yūyaṃ tiṣṭhata sarvadā।
gadādharaḥ svayaṃ lokādbhūyātsarvāghanāśanāt ॥ 2.44.67 ॥

śrāddhaṃ sapiṇḍakaṃ yeṣāṃ brahmalokaṃ prayāntu te।
brahmahatyādikaṃ pāpaṃ vinaśyatu ca sevinām ॥ 2.44.68 ॥

naimiṣaṃ puṣkaraṃ gaṅgā prayāgaścāvimuktikam।
etānyanyāni tīrthāni divi bhuvyantarikṣataḥ।
samāyāntu sadā nṝṇāṃ prayacchantu hitaṃ surāḥ ॥ 2.44.69 ॥

kiṃ bahūktyā suragaṇā yuṣmāsvekāpi devatā।
cenna tiṣṭedahaṃ cāpi samayaḥ pratipālyatām ॥ 2.44.70 ॥

gayāsuravacaḥ śrutvā procurviṣṇvādayaḥsurāḥ।
tvayā yatprārthitaṃ sarvvaṃ tadbhaviṣyatyasaṃśayam ॥ 2.44.71 ॥

asmatpādānarccayitvā yāsyanti paramāṃ gatim।
devairdattavaro daityo harṣito niścalo'bhavat ॥ 2.44.72 ॥

sthiteṣu caiva deveṣu brāhmaṇebhyo dadāvajaḥ।
grāmāṃśca pañcapañcāśatpañcakrośīṃ gayāṃ tathā।
gṛhānkṛtvā dadau divyānsarvvopaskarasaṃyutān ॥ 2.44.73 ॥

kāmadhenuṃ kalpavṛkṣaṃ pārijātādikāṃstarūn।
mahānadīṃ kṣīravahāṃ ghṛtakulyāstathaiva ca ॥ 2.44.74 ॥

madhuśravāṃ madhukulyāṃ dadhyādyāḍhyasarāṃsi ca।
suvarṇadīrghikāṃ caiva bahūnannādiparvvatān ॥ 2.44.75 ॥

bhakṣyabhojyaphalādīṃśca sarvvaṃ brahmā sṛjandadau।
na yācayadhvaṃ viprendrā anyānuktvā dadāvajaḥ ॥ 2.44.76 ॥

dattvā yayau brahmalokaṃ natvā hyādigadādharam ।
dharmmāraṇye tatra dharmmaṃ yājayitvā yayācire ॥ 2.44.77 ॥

dharmmayāge ca lobhādvai pratigṛhya dhanādikam।
tato brahmā samāgatya brāhmaṇāṃstāñchaśāpa ha ॥ 2.44.78 ॥

kṛtavanto yato lobhaṃ maddatteṣvakhileṣvapi।
tasmādṛṇādhikā yūyaṃ bhaviṣyanti sadā dvijaḥ ॥ 2.44.79 ॥

yuṣmākaṃ syādvārivahā nadī pāṣāṇaparvvatāḥ।
nadyādayo vārivahā mṛnmayāśca yathā gṛhāḥ ॥ 2.44.80 ॥

kāmadhenuḥ kalpavṛkṣo mallokamupatiṣṭhatām।
evaṃ śaptā brahmaṇā te prārthayanto'bruvannajam ॥ 2.44.81 ॥

tvayā yaddattamakhilaṃ tatsarvaṃ śāpato gatam।
jīvanārthaṃ prasādaṃ no bhagavānkarttumarhasi ॥ 2.44.82 ॥

tacchrutvā brāhmaṇānbrahmā provācedaṃ dayānvitaḥ।
tīrthopajīvikā yūyamācandrārkaṃ bhaviṣyatha ॥ 2.44.83 ॥

lokāḥ puṇyā gayāyāṃ ye śrāddhino brahmalokagāḥ।
yuṣmānye pūjayiṣyanti tairahaṃ pūjitaḥ sadā ॥ 2.44.84 ॥

ākrāntaṃ daityajaṭharaṃ dharmmeṇa virajādriṇā।
nābhikūpasamīpe tu devī yā virajā sthitā।
tatra piṇḍādikaṃ kṛtvā triḥsaptakulamuddharet ॥ 2.44.85 ॥

mahendragiriṇā tasya kṛtau pādau suniścalau।
itatra piṇḍādikṛtsapta kulānyuddharate naraḥ ॥ 2.44.86 ॥

iti śrīmahāpurāṇe vāyuprokte gayāmāhātmyaṃ nāma catuścatvāriṃśo'dhyāyaḥ ।। 44 ।। * ।।

## 2.45

।।nārada uvāca।।
kathaṃ śilā samutpannā yayākrānto gayāsuraḥ ।
kiṃ rūpaṃ kiṃ ca māhātmyaṃ tasyāḥ kiṃ vada nāma ca ॥ 2.45.1 ॥

           ।ṣanatkumāra uvāca।।
āsīddharmmo mahātejāḥ sarvvavijñānapāragaḥ।
viśvarupā ca tatpatnī bharttṛvrataparāyaṇā ॥ 2.45.2 ॥

tasyāṃ dharmmavratāyāstu kanyā dharmmavratā satī।
sarvva lakṣaṇasampannā lakṣmīriva guṇādhikā ॥ 2.45.3 ॥

tasyāṃ ye tu guṇā hyāsaṃste tiṣṭhanti jagatrtraye।
dharmmo dharmmavratāyāstu triṣu lokeṣu mārgayan ॥ 2.45.4 ॥

nānu rūpaṃ varaṃ lebhe dharmmo'tha varasiddhaye।
tapaḥ kuru varārthaṃ tvaṃ tathetyuktvā vanaṃ yayau ॥ 2.45.5 ॥

kanyā sā ca tapastepe sarvveṣāṃ duṣkarañca yat।
vāyubhakṣā śvetakalpe yugānāmayutaṃ purā ॥ 2.45.6 ॥

brahmaṇo mānasaḥ putro marīcirnāma viśrutaḥ ।
paryyaṭanpṛthivīṃ sarvvāṃ kanyāratnaṃ dadarśa saḥ ॥ 2.45.7 ॥

rūpayauvanasampannāṃ parame tapasi sthitām।
papracchātha marīcistāṃ kā tvaṃ kasyāpi tadvada ॥ 2.45.8 ॥

rūpeṇānena māṃ bhīru vimohayasi suvrate ।
brahmātmajo'haṃ vikhyāto marīcirvvedapāragaḥ ॥ 2.45.9 ॥

marīcervvacanaṃ śrutvā kanyā provāca taṃ munim।
ahaṃ dharmmavratā nāma dharmmaputrī tapo'nvitā ॥ 2.45.10 ॥

pativratārthaṃ viprendra carāmi paramaṃ tapaḥ।
dharmmavratāṃ marīcistāmuvāca prītipūrvvkam ॥ 2.45.11 ॥

pativratā darśanānme bhaviṣyasi śubhavrate।
pativratecchayā pṛthvīṃ vicarāmi hyaharniśam ॥ 2.45.12 ॥

tvañcetpativratā jātā bhaje tvāṃ bhaja māṃ varam।
loke na tvādṛśī kanyā mama tulyo na te varaḥ ॥ 2.45.13 ॥

dharmmavrate dharmmapatnī tasmāttvaṃ bhava me'dhunā।
dharmmavratā muniṃ prāha dharmmaṃ yācaya suvrata ॥ 2.45.14 ॥

tacchrutvā dharmmamagamanmuniṃ dharmo dadarśa ha।
tejaḥpuñjaṃ varaṃ natvā āsanārghyādinārccayat ॥ 2.45.15 ॥

kimartamāgataḥ pṛṣṭo marīcirdharmmamabravīt।
kanyārthaṃ bhramatā pṛthvī dṛṣṭā te kanyakā varā ।
mahyaṃ kanyāñca tāṃ dehi śreyastava bhaviṣyati ॥ 2.45.16 ॥

arghyādinā samabhyarcya dharmmaṃ proce tatheti tam।
dharmmavratāṃ samānīya dattavāṃstāṃ marīcaye ॥ 2.45.17 ॥

varaṃ ca dattavāṃstasmai tadvākyaṃ yattathā kṛtam।
agnihotreṇa sahitāṃ svāśramaṃ tāṃ dvijo'nayat ॥ 2.45.18 ॥

reme munistayā sārddhaṃ yathā viṣṇuḥ śriyā saha।
pārvvatyā ca yathā śambhuḥ sarasvatyā yathā hyajaḥ ॥ 2.45.19 ॥

jajñe putraśataṃ tasyāṃ marīcerviṣṇunopamam।
marīciḥ phalapuṣpārthaṃ vanaṃ gatvā samāgataḥ ॥ 2.45.20 ॥

śrāntaḥ kadācittāṃ patnīmuvāceti pativratām।
bhuktvā tu śayanasthasya pādasaṃvāhanaṃ kuru ॥ 2.45.21 ॥

dharmmavratā tathetyuktvā śayanasthasya sā muneḥ।
pādasaṃvāhanaṃ cakre ghṛte nābhyajya tatparā ॥ 2.45.22 ॥

nidrāyamāṇe'tha munau brahmā taṃ deśamāgataḥ।
ityeṣa dṛṣṭvā brahmāṇaṃ manasārccayituṃ prabhum ॥ 2.45.23 ॥

pādasaṃvāhanaṃ kuryyāṃ kiṃ pūjyo'yaṃ jagadguruḥ।
ityākulā samuttasthau matvā sā taṃ gurorgurum ॥ 2.45.24 ॥

arghyapādyādikaṃ dattvā brahmāṇaṃ samapūjayat।
satkṛtāyāntu śayyāyāṃ viśrāmamakarodajaḥ ॥ 2.45.25 ॥

etasminnantare bharttā samuttasthau ca talpataḥ।
dharmmavratāmapaśyansa vipraḥ kruddhaḥ śaśāpa tām ॥ 2.45.26 ॥

pādasaṃvāhanaṃ tyaktvāyasmādājñāṃ vihāya me ।
gatānyatra tataḥ pāpācchāpadagdhā śilā bhava ॥ 2.45.27 ॥

bhartrā dharmmavratā śaptā marīciṃ prāha sā ruṣā।
śayāne tvayi saṃprāpte brahmā tvajjanako guruḥ ॥ 2.45.28 ॥

tvayotthāya hi karttavyaṃ svaguroḥ pūjanaṃ sadā।
mayā tu dharmmacāriṇyā tava kāryye kṛte mune ॥ 2.45.29 ॥

adoṣāhaṃ yataḥ śaptā tasmācchāpaṃ dadāmi te।
tvañca śāpaṃ mahādevādbharttaḥ prāpsyasyasaṃśayam ॥ 2.45.30 ॥

vyākulaṃ taṃ patiṃ dṛṣṭvā vyākulāgātprajāpatim।
natvā śayānaṃ brahmāṇamagniṃ prajvālya cendhanaiḥ ॥ 2.45.31 ॥

gārhapatye sthitā cakre tapaḥ paramaduṣkaram।
tathā śapto marīciśca tapastepe sudāruṇam ॥ 2.45.32 ॥

pativratāyāstapasā marīcestapasā yathā।
indrādayaśca santaptā gatāste śaraṇaṃ harim ॥ 2.45.33 ॥

ūcuḥ kṣīrāmbūdau suptaṃ santaptāstapasā hare।
pativratāyāśca munestrailokyaṃ rakṣa keśava ॥ 2.45.34 ॥

indrādīnāṃ vacaḥ śrutvā viṣṇurdharmmavratāṃ yayau।
etasminneva kāle tu prabuddho bhagavānajaḥ।
ūcurdharmmarvatāṃ devā agnisthāṃ tāṃ sakeśavāḥ ॥ 2.45.35 ॥

agnimadhye tapaḥ karttuṃ kasya śaktiḥ pativrate।
tvayā kṛtaṃ tatparamaṃ sarvvalokabhayaṅkaram ॥ 2.45.36 ॥

varaṃ varaya dharmmajñe asmatto yadabhīpsitam।
viṣṇvādīnāṃ vacaḥ śrutvā devāndharmmavratābravīt ।। 45.37
bhartṛśāpamaśaktāhaṃ nivarttayitumojasā।
datto marīcinā śāpo mahyaṃ sa hyapagacchatu ॥ 2.45.37 ॥

dharmmavratāvacaḥ śrutvā procuretāṃ surāḥ punaḥ ।
dharmmavrate dharmmaputri śāpo'yaṃ paramarṣiṇā ॥ 2.45.38 ॥

dattaste na nirākarttuṃ śakyo devadvijātibhiḥ।
tasmādanyaṃ varaṃ brūhi yato dharmmasya saṃsthitiḥ ॥ 2.45.39 ॥

bhavedvai triṣu lokeṣu vedoktasya śubhavrate।
devānāṃ vacanaṃ śrutvā devāndharmmavratābravīt ॥ 2.45.40 ॥

bharttuḥ śāpānmocayituṃ na śaktāśca yadāmarāḥ।
mahyaṃ varaṃ prayacchadhvamevaṃvidhamanuttamam ॥ 2.45.41 ॥

śilāhaṃ hi bhaviṣyāmi brahmāṇḍe pāvanī śubhā।
nadīnadasarastīrthadevādibhyo'tipāvanī ॥ 2.45.42 ॥

ṛṣyādibhyo munubhyaśca mukhyadevebhya eva ca।
trailokye yāni liṅgāni vyaktāvyaktātmakānyapi।
tāni tiṣṭhantu maddehe tīrtharūpeṇa sarvvadā ॥ 2.45.43 ॥

tīrthānyapi ca sarvvāṇi nakṣatrapramukhāstathā।
tiṣṭhantu devāḥ sakalā devyaśca munayastathā ॥ 2.45.44 ॥

brahmā viṣṇuśca rudraśca lakṣayitvā padaṃ mayi।
pañcāgnayaḥ kumārādyā bahurupeṇa saṃsthitāḥ ॥ 2.45.45 ॥

mūrttāmūrttasvarūpeṇa padarūpeṇa devatāḥ।
śilāyāṃ krośamātreṇa mūrttirūpāḥ sthitā bhuvi ॥ 2.45.46 ॥

tāṃ dṛṣṭvā sarvvalokaśca mahāpātakanāśinīm।
pūto dharmmādhikārī ca śrāddhakṛdbrahmalokabhāk ॥ 2.45.47 ॥

śilāsthiteṣu tīrthaṣu snātvā kṛtvātha tarpaṇam।
śrāddhaṃ sapiṇḍakaṃ yeṣāṃ brahmalokaṃ prayāntu te ॥ 2.45.48 ॥

gadādharo dṛśyatīrthaṃ sarvvatīrthottamottamam।
sthāsyanti ca mariṣyanti yāntu brahmapurīṃ narāḥ।
vārāṇasī prayāgaśca puruṣottamasaṃjñakam ॥ 2.45.49 ॥

gaṅgāsāgarasaṃjñañca nityaṃ tiṣṭhatu phalguni।
gadādharādhiṣṭitaṃ tatsarvvatīrthottamottamam।
muktirbhavet pitṝṇāṃ ca mṛtānāṃ śrāddhataḥ sadā ॥ 2.45.50 ॥

jarāyujāṇḍajā vāpi svedajā vāpi codbhidaḥ।
tyaktvā dehaṃ śilāyānte yāntu viṣṇusvarūpatām ॥ 2.45.51 ॥

yathārccite harau sarvve yajñāḥ pūrṇā bhavanti hi।
tathā śrāddhaṃ tarpaṇañca snānaṃ cākṣayamastviha ॥ 2.45.52 ॥

mama dehe sureśānāṃ ye japanti śrutādikam।
acireṇāpi te siddhāḥ siddhibhājo bhavantu vai ॥ 2.45.53 ॥

pitṝṇāṃ kulasāhasramātmanā sahitaṃ naraḥ।
śrāddhādinā samuddhṛtya viṣṇulokaṃ nayed‌dhruvam ॥ 2.45.54 ॥

yāvatyo hi saricchreṣṭā gaṅgādyāśca hradāḥ śubhāḥ।
samudrādyāḥ saromukhyā mānasādyāḥ sureśvarāḥ।
nṛṇāṃ śrāddhaṃ vidadhato muktaye nivasantu me ॥ 2.45.55 ॥

śarīreṇa samāyāntu kvacinno yāntu devatāḥ।
eko viṣṇustridhāmūrttiryāvatsaṅkīrtyate budhaiḥ ॥ 2.45.56 ॥

tāvacchilāyāṃ sarvvāṇi tīrthāni saha daivataiḥ।
sadā tiṣṭhantu munayo gandharvvāṇāṃ gaṇāśca ye ॥ 2.45.57 ॥

sarvvadevasvarūpā ca nāmeyaṃ devarūpiṇī।
yāvattiṣṭhati brahmāṇḍaṃ tāvattiṣṭhatu vai śilā।
mama dehe'śmarūpe ca ye japanti tapanti ca ॥ 2.45.58 ॥

juhotyagnau ca teṣāṃ vai tadakṣayyopatiṣṭhatām ।
akṣayantu bhavecchrāddhaṃ japahomatapāṃsi ca।
śilāparvvatarūpeṇa mayi tiṣṭhatu sarvvadā ॥ 2.45.59 ॥

pativratāvacaḥ śrutvā devāḥ procuḥ pativratām।
tvayā yatprārthitaṃ sarvvaṃ tadbhaviṣyatyasaṃśayam ॥ 2.45.60 ॥

gayāsurasya śirasi bhaviṣyasi yadā sthirā।
tadā pādādirūpeṇa sthāsyāmastvayi susthirāḥ।
varaṃ śilāyai dattvaivaṃ tatraivāntarddadhuḥ surāḥ ॥ 2.45.61 ॥

iti śrīmahāpurāṇe vāyuprokte gayāmāhātmyaṃ nāma pañcacatvāriṃśo'dhyāyaḥ ।। 45 ।।

## 2.46

।।sanatkumāra uvāca।।
vakṣye śilāyā māhātmyaṃ śrṛṇu nārada muktidam।
yasyā gāyanti devāśca māhātmyaṃ munipuṅgavāḥ ॥ 2.46.1 ॥

śilā sthitā pṛthivyāṃ sā devarūpātipāvanī।
vicitrākhyaṃ śilātīrthaṃ triṣu lokeṣu viśrutam ॥ 2.46.2 ॥

tasyāḥ saṃsparśanāllokāḥ sarve haripuraṃ yayuḥ।
śūnye lokatraye jāte śūnyā yamapurī hyabhūt ॥ 2.46.3 ॥

yama indrādibhirgatvā ūce brahmāṇamadbhutam।
adhikāraṃ gṛhāṇātha yamadaṇḍaṃ pitāmaha ॥ 2.46.4 ॥

yamamūce tato brahmā svagṛhe dhārayasva tām।
brahmokto dharmarājastu gṛhe tāṃ samadhārayat ॥ 2.46.5 ॥

yamo'dhikāraṃ svaṃ cakre pāpināṃ śāsanādikam।
evaṃvidhā gurutarā śilā jagati viśrutā ॥ 2.46.6 ॥

yathā brahnā yathā viṣṇuryathā devo maheśvaraḥ।
brahmāṇḍe ca yathā meru statheyaṃ devarūpiṇī ॥ 2.46.7 ॥

gayāsurasya śirasi gurutvāddhāritā yataḥ ।
ataḥ pavitrayoryogaḥ pitṝṇāṃ mokṣadāyakaḥ ॥ 2.46.8 ॥

pavitrayordvayoryoge hayamedha majo'karot।
bhāgārthamāgatāndṛṣṭvā viṣṇvādīnabravīcchilā ॥ 2.46.9 ॥

śilāsthitipratijñāṃ tu kurvantu pitṛmuktaye।
tathetyuktvā śilāyānte devā viṣṇvādayaḥ sthitāḥ ॥ 2.46.10 ॥

śilārūpeṇa mūrttyā ca padarūpeṇa devatāḥ।
mūrttāmūrtasvarūpeṇa sthitāḥ pūrvapratijñayā ॥ 2.46.11 ॥

daityasya muṇḍa pṛṣṭe tu yasmātsā saṃsthitā śilā।
tasmātsa muṇḍapṛṣṭādriḥ pitṝṇāṃ brahmalokadaḥ ॥ 2.46.12 ॥

ācchāditaḥ śilāpādaḥ prabhāsenādriṇā yataḥ।
bhāsito bhāskareṇeti prabhāsaḥ parikalpitaḥ ॥ 2.46.13 ॥

prabhāsaṃ hi vinirbhidya śilāṅguṣṭo vinirgataḥ।
aṅguṣṭotthita īśo'pi prabhāseśaḥ prakīrttitaḥ ॥ 2.46.14 ॥

śilāṅguṣṭaikateśo yaḥ sā ca pretaśilā smṛtā।
piṇḍadānādyatastasyāṃ pretatvānmucyate naraḥ ॥ 2.46.15 ॥

mahānadīprabāsādyoḥ saṅgame snānakṛnnaraḥ।
rāmo devyā saha snāto rāmatīrthaṃ tataḥ smṛtam ॥ 2.46.16 ॥

prārthito'tra mahānadyā rāma snāto bhaveti ca।
rāmatīrthaṃ tato bhūtvā triṣu lokeṣu viśrutam ॥ 2.46.17 ॥

janmāntaraśataṃ sāgraṃ yatkṛtaṃ duṣkṛtaṃ mayā।
tatsarvaṃ vilayaṃ yātu rāmatīrthābhiṣecanāt ॥ 2.46.18 ॥

mantreṇānena yaḥ snātvā śrāddhaṃ kurvīta mānavaḥ।
rāmatīrthe piṇḍadastu viṣṇulokaṃ prayātyasau।
tathetyuktvā sthito rāmaḥ sītayā bharatāgrajaḥ ॥ 2.46.19 ॥

rāma rāma mahābāho devānāmabhayaṅkara।
tvāṃ namasye'tra deveśaṃ mama naśyatu pātakam ॥ 2.46.20 ॥

mantreṇānena yaḥ snātvā śrāddhaṃ kuryātsapiṇḍakam ।
pretatvāttasya pitaro vimuktāḥ pitṛtāṃ yayuḥ ॥ 2.46.21 ॥

āpastvamasi deveśa jyotiṣāṃ patireva ca।
pāpa nāśaya me deva manovākkāyakarmajam ॥ 2.46.22 ॥

namaskṛtya prabhāseśaṃ bhāsamānaṃ śivaṃ vrajet।
tañca śambhuṃ namaskṛtya kuryādyamabaliṃ tataḥ ॥ 2.46.23 ॥

rāme vanaṃ gate śailamāgatya bharataḥ sthitaḥ ।
pitṛpiṇḍādikaṃ kṛtvā rāmaṃ saṃsthāpya tatra ca ॥ 2.46.24 ॥

rāmaṃ sītāṃ lakṣmaṇañca munīnsthāpitavānprabhuḥ।
bharatasyāśrame puṇye nityaṃ puṇyatamairvṛtam।
mataṅgasya padaṃ tatra dṛśyate sarvamānuṣaiḥ ॥ 2.46.25 ॥

sthāpitaṃ dharmasarvasvaṃ lokasyāsya nidarśanāt।
mataṅgasya pade śrāddhī sarvāṃstārayate pitṝn ॥ 2.46.26 ॥

rāmatīrthe naraḥ snātvā rāmaṃ sītāṃ samarcya ca।
rāmeśvaraṃ praṇamyātha na dehī jāyate punaḥ ॥ 2.46.27 ॥

śilāyā jaghanaṃ bhūyaḥ samākrāntaṃ nagena tu।
dharmarājena saṃprokto na gaccheti nagaḥ smṛtaḥ ॥ 2.46.28 ॥

yamarājadharmarājau niścalārthaṃ vyavasthitau।
tābhyāṃ baliṃ prayacchāmi pitṝṇāṃ mukti hetave ॥ 2.46.29 ॥

dvau śvānau śyāmaśabalau vaivasvatakulodbhavau।
tābhyāṃ baliṃ prayacchāmi syātāmetāvahiṃsakau ॥ 2.46.30 ॥

aindravāruṇa vāyanyayāmyanaiṛtyasaṃsthitāḥ।
vāyasāḥ pratigṛhṇantu bhūyo piṇḍaṃ mayā sthitam ॥ 2.46.31 ॥

yamo'si yamadūto'si vāyaso'si mahābala।
saptajanmakṛtaṃ pāpaṃ baliṃ bhuktvā vināśaya ॥ 2.46.32 ॥

rāme vanaṃ gate śailamāgatya bharatena hi।
pituḥ piṇḍādikaṃ kṛtvā rāmeśaḥ sthāpito'tra vai ॥ 2.46.33 ॥

snātvā natvā ca rāmeśaṃ rāmasītā samanvitam।
tatra śrāddhaṃ sapiṇḍañca kṛtvā viṣṇupuraṃ vrajet।
pitṛbhiḥ saha dharmātmā kulānāñca śataiḥsaha ॥ 2.46.34 ॥

rāmaṃ sītāṃ lakṣmaṇañca munīnsthāpitavānprabhuḥ।
bharatasyāśrame puṇye nityaṃ puṇyatamairvṛtam।
mataṅgasya padaṃ tatra dṛśyate sarvamānuṣaiḥ ॥ 2.46.35 ॥

vahnirdvau varuṇau rudrāścatvāraḥ pitṛmokṣadāḥ।
bharatāśramamāsādya tānnametpūjayennaraḥ ॥ 2.46.36 ॥

pāpebhyaścopapāpebhyo mucyate pitṛbhiḥ saha।
yatra kutrāpi devarṣe bharatasyāśrame naraḥ ।
snātaḥ śrāddhādikaṃ kuryāttatkalpe'pi na hīyate ॥ 2.46.37 ॥

gayāyāṃ cākṣayaṃ śrāddhaṃ japahomatapāṃsi ca।
sarvamānantyamāhurvai yaddattaṃ bharatāśrame ॥ 2.46.38 ॥

caturyugasvarūpeṇa catasro ravimūrttayaḥ ।
dṛṣṭāḥ spṛṣṭāḥ pūjitāstāḥ pitṝṇāṃ muktidāyakāḥ ॥ 2.46.39 ॥

muktirvāṃmana ityeva tārakākhyo vidhiḥ paraḥ।
saṃsārārṇavataptānāṃ nāvāvetau sureśvarau।
tārakaṃ brahma viśveṣāṃ mṛtānāṃ jīvatāmidam ॥ 2.46.40 ॥

trivikramañca brahmāṇaṃ yaḥ paśyetpuruṣottamam।
pitṛbhiḥ saha dharmātmā sa yāti paramāṃ gatim ॥ 2.46.41 ॥

śilāyā vāmapāde'pi tathābhyudyantako giriḥ ।
sthāpitaḥ piṇḍadastatra pitṝnbrahmapuraṃ nayet ॥ 2.46.42 ॥

naimiṣāraṇyapārśve tu īce brahmā suraiḥ saha।
mukhyasaṃjñaṃ hi tattīrthaṃ devāstatra pade sthitāḥ ॥ 2.46.43 ॥

triṣu teṣu padeṣveva tīrtheṣu munisattama।
yatkiñcidaśubhaṃ karma tatpraṇaśyati nārada ॥ 2.46.44 ॥

tannaimiṣavanaṃ puṇyaṃ sevitaṃ puṇyapūruṣaiḥ।
tatra vyāsaḥ śukaḥ pailaḥ kaṇvo vedhāḥ śivo hariḥ ॥ 2.46.45 ॥

teṣāṃ darśanamātreṇa mucyate pātakairnaraḥ।
vāmahaste śilāyāstu tathā codyantako giriḥ ॥ 2.46.46 ॥

sa parvataḥ samānīto hyagastyena mahātmanā।
tatra brahmā haraścaiva tapaścograñca cakratuḥ ॥ 2.46.47 ॥

tatrāgastyasya hi varaṃ kuṇḍaṃ trailokyadurlabham।
yatra munyaṣṭakaṃ siddhaṃ tapastaptvā śivaṃ gatam।
kuṇḍe munyaṣṭakaṃ natvā pitṝnbrahmapuraṃ nayet ॥ 2.46.48 ॥

agastyenātha devarṣe hyudayādrermahātmanā।
śilāyā vāmahaste'pi sthāpito girirāṭ śubhaḥ।
vāditrādyairdivyagītairāḍhyo vāditrako giriḥ ॥ 2.46.49 ॥

tatra vidyādharo nāma gandharvāpsarasāṅgaṇaiḥ।
sameto'dyāpi kītāni divyāni saha gīyate ॥ 2.46.50 ॥

mohanaśca sunīthaśca śailūjo mohanottamaḥ।
parvato nāradadhyānī saṅgītī puṣpadantakaḥ।
hāhā hūhūprabhṛtayo gītadānaṃ prajakrire ॥ 2.46.51 ॥

tathā citraratho nāma sarvagandharvasaṃvṛtaḥ।
gāyati madhurāṇyeva gītānyadrau mahotsavam ॥ 2.46.52 ॥

ataḥ sa parvato devaiḥ sevyate'dyāpi nityaśaḥ।
dharmajāstatra deveśo haro bhasmāṅgarāgavān ॥ 2.46.53 ॥

pārvatyā sahito rudraḥ parvate gītanādite।
modate pūjitodyeyaḥ pitṝṇāṃ paramāṃ gatim ॥ 2.46.54 ॥

gayāyāṃ paramātmā hi gopatirvā gadādharaḥ।
hīyate vaiṣṇavī māyā tathā rudrārccayā mune ॥ 2.46.55 ॥

śilāyā dakṣiṇe haste bhasmakūṭo girirdhṛtaḥ।
dharmmarājena tatrāste hyagastyaḥ saha bhāryyayā ॥ 2.46.56 ॥

agastyasya pade snātaḥ piṇḍado brahmalokagaḥ।
brahmaṇastu varaṃ lebhe māhātmyaṃ bhuvi durlabham ॥ 2.46.57 ॥

lopāmudrāṃ tathā bhāryyāṃ pitṝṇāṃ paramāṃ gatim।
tatrāgastyeśvaraṃ dṛṣṭvā mucyate brahmahatyayā ॥ 2.46.58 ॥

agastyañca sabhāryyañca pitṝnbrahmapuraṃ nayet।
daṇḍinātha tapastepe sītādrerdakṣiṇe girau ॥ 2.46.59 ॥

vaṭo vaṭeśvarastatra sthitaśca prapitāmahaḥ।
tadagre rukmiṇīkuṇḍaṃ paścime kapilā nadī।
kapileśo nadītīre hyamāsomasamāgame ॥ 2.46.60 ॥

kapilāyāṃ naraḥ snātvā kapileśaṃ samarcya ca।
kṛte śrāddhe piṇḍadāne pitaro mokṣamāpnuyuḥ ॥ 2.46.61 ॥

tatrāgnidhārā girivarādāgatodyantakādanu।
tatra sārasvataṃ kuṇḍaṃ sarasvatyā prakalpitam ॥ 2.46.62 ॥

śukrastatra sutaiḥ sārddhaṃ ṣaṇḍāmarkkādibhiḥ prabhuḥ।
tatra tatra munīndrāṇāṃ padeṣu munisattama।
śrāddhapiṇḍādikṛtsnātaḥ pitṝṃstārayate naraḥ ॥ 2.46.63 ॥

śilāyā vāmahaste'pi gṛdrakūṭo girirdhṛtaḥ।
gṛdhrarūpeṇa saṃsiddhāstapastaptvā maharṣayaḥ ॥ 2.46.64 ॥

ato girirgṛdhrakūṭastatra gṛdhreśvaraḥ sthitaḥ।
dṛṣṭvā gṛdhreśvaraṃ natvā yāyācchambhoḥ padaṃ naraḥ ॥ 2.46.65 ॥

tatra gṛdhre guhāyāñca piṇḍadaḥ śivalokabhāk ।
tatra gṛdhre vaṭaṃ natvā prāptakāmo divaṃ vrajet ॥ 2.46.66 ॥

ṛṇamokṣaṃ pāpamokṣaṃ śivaṃ dṛṣṭvā śivaṃ vrajet।
śūrakṣetrañca tatrāste piṇḍadaḥ svarnayetpitṝn ॥ 2.46.67 ॥

ādipālena giriṇā samākrāntaṃ śilodaram।
tatrāste gajarūpeṇa vighreśo vignanāśanaḥ।
taṃ dṛṣṭvā mucyate vighnaiḥ pitṝn brahmapuraṃ nayet ॥ 2.46.68 ॥

nitambe muṇḍapṛṣṭhasya devadāruvanaṃ tvabhūt।
muṇḍapṛṣṭāravindrādrī dṛṣṭvā pāpaṃ vināśayet।
gayānābhau suṣumnāyāṃ piṇḍadaḥ svarnayetpitṝn ॥ 2.46.69 ॥

śilāyā vāmapāde tu sthāpitaḥ pretaparvataḥ।
dharmarājena pāpebhyo giriḥ pretaśilāhvayaḥ ॥ 2.46.70 ॥

pādena dūre nikṣiptaḥ śilāyāḥ pādabhārataḥ।
gataḥ śilāyāḥ saṃsargātpretakūṭaḥ pavitratām ॥ 2.46.71 ॥

pretakuṇḍañca tatrāste devāstatra pade sthitāḥ।
tatra kuṇḍādikaṃ kṛtvā pretatvānmocayetpitṝn ॥ 2.46.72 ॥

pṛthaksthitāśca bahavo vighnakāriṇa eva te।
śrāddhādikāriṇāṃ nṝṇāṃ tīrthe pitṛvimuktaye।
pretā dhānuṣkarūpeṇa karagrahaṇakārakāḥ ॥ 2.46.73 ॥

pādāṅkitāṃ muṇḍapṛṣṭāṃ mahādevanivāsinīm।
tāṃ dṛṣṭvā sarvalokaśca muktaḥ pāpopapātakaiḥ ॥ 2.46.74 ॥

gayāśirasi puṇye ca sarvapāpairvivarjite।
gretādivarjitaṃ yasmāttato'tipāvanaṃ varam ॥ 2.46.75 ॥

kīkaṭeṣu gayā puṇyā puṇyaṃ rājagṛhaṃ vanam।
cyavanasyāśramaṃ puṇyaṃ nadī puṇyā punaḥpunā ॥ 2.46.76 ॥

vaikuṇṭo lohadaṇḍaśca gṛdhrakūṭaśca śoṇakaḥ।
atra śrāddhādinā sarvānpitṝnbrahmapuraṃ nayet ॥ 2.46.77 ॥

krauñcarūpeṇa hi munirmuṇḍapṛṣṭe tapo'karot।
tasya pādāṅkito yasmātkrauñcapādastataḥ smṛtaḥ ॥ 2.46.78 ॥

snāto jalāśaye tatra nayetsvargaṃ svakaṃ kulam।
baliḥ kākaśilāyāñca kākebhya ṛṇamokṣadaḥ ॥ 2.46.79 ॥

muṇḍapṛṣṭhasya sānau hi lomaśo lomaharṣaṇaḥ।
dvāvetau paramaṃ taptvā tapaḥsiddhiṃ parāṃ gatau ॥ 2.46.80 ॥

āhūtāstu saricchreṣṭā lomaśena mahānadī।
śarāvatī vetravatī candrabhāgā sarasvatī ॥ 2.46.81 ॥

kāverī sindhurīrā ca candanā ca saridvarā।
vāsiṣṭī sarayūrgaṅgā yamunā gaṇḍakīndirā ॥ 2.46.82 ॥

mahāvaitaraṇī nāmnā nikṣarā ca divaukasaḥ ।
sāvavyalakanandā ca hyudīcī kankāhvayā ॥ 2.46.83 ॥

kauśikī brahmadā jyeṣṭā sarvasyāghavimocinī।
kṛṣṇavalvā carmmavatī dve nadyau muktidāyike ॥ 2.46.84 ॥

āhūte saritāṃ śreṣṭe lomahrarṣeṇa sāhasāt ।
tapasastu prabhāveṇa narmmadā munipuṅgava।
tāsu sarvāsu yaḥ snātvā piṇḍadaḥ svarnayetpitṝn ॥ 2.46.85 ॥

brahmayoniṃ praviśyātha nirgacchedyastu mānavaḥ।
paraṃ brahma sa yātīha vimukto yonisaṅkaṭāt ॥ 2.46.86 ॥

nikṣarāyāṃ puṣkariṇyāṃ snātaḥ śrāddhādikaṃ naraḥ।
kuryyātkrauñcapade divye niyamādvāsaratrayam।
sarvānpitṝnnayetsvargaṃ pañcapāpina eva ca ॥ 2.46.87 ॥

janārdano bhasmakūṭe tasya haste tu piṇḍadaḥ।
ātmano'pyathavānyeṣāṃ savyenāpi tilairvinā।
jīvatāṃ dadhisaṃmiśraṃ sarve te viṣṇulokagāḥ ॥ 2.46.88 ॥

yastu piṇḍo mayā dattastava haste janārdana।
yaduddiśya tvayā deyastasminpiṇḍo mṛte prabho ॥ 2.46.89 ॥

eṣa piṇḍo mayā dattastava haste janārdana।
antakāle gate mahyaṃ tvayā deyo gayāśire ॥ 2.46.90 ॥

janārdana namastubhyaṃ namaste pitṛmokṣada।
pitṛpate namaste'stu namaste pitṝūpiṇe ॥ 2.46.91 ॥

gayāyāṃ pitṝūpeṇa svayameva janārdanaḥ।
taṃ dṛṣṭvā puṇḍarīkākṣaṃ mucyate ca ṛṇatrayāt ॥ 2.46.92 ॥

namaste puṇḍarīkākṣa ṛṇatrayavimocaka।
lakṣmīkānta namaste'stu pitṝṇāṃ mokṣado bhava ॥ 2.46.93 ॥

vāmajānu susaṃpātya natvā bhīmo janārdanam।
śrāddhaṃ sapiṇḍakaṃ kṛtvā bhrātṛbhirbrahmalokabhāk।
pitṛbhiḥ saha dharmātmā kulānāñca śatena ca ॥ 2.46.94 ॥

śilāyāṃ vyaktarūpeṇa vyaktāvyaktātmanā sthitaḥ।
lakṣmīśo vibhudhaiḥ sārddhaṃ tasmāddevamayī śilā ॥ 2.46.95 ॥

iti śrīmahāpurāṇe vāyuprokte gayāmāhātmyaṃ nāma ṣaṭcatvāriṃśo'dhyāya- ।। 46 ।।

## 2.47

।ṇārada uvāca।।
kathaṃ vyaktasvarūpeṇa sthitaścādigadādharaḥ।
kathaṃ vyaktasvarūpeṇa vyaktāvyaktātmanā sthitaḥ ॥ 2.47.1 ॥

kathaṃ gadā samutpannā yathā hyādigadādharaḥ।
gadālolaṃ kathaṃ cāsīt sarvvapāpakṣayaṅkaram ॥ 2.47.2 ॥

           sanatkumāra uvāca।।
gado nāmāsuro hyāsīdvajrādvajrataro dṛḍhaḥ।
tapasā dāruṇenāsau brahmalabdhavaraḥ purā।
prārthito brahmaṇe prādātsvaśarīrāsthi dustyajam ॥ 2.47.3 ॥

brahmokto viśvakarmmāpi gadāṃ cakre'dbutāṃ tadā।
tadasthi vajraniṣpeṣaiḥ kundaiḥ svarge hyadhārayat ॥ 2.47.4 ॥

atha kālena mahātā manau svāyambhuve kvacita।
hetī rakṣo brahmaputraḥ tapastepe sudāruṇam ॥ 2.47.5 ॥

divyavarṣasahasrāṇāṃ śataṃ vāyumabhakṣayat।
unmukhaścorddhvabāhuśca pādāṅguṣṭhabhareṇa ha ॥ 2.47.6 ॥

ekenātiṣṭadavyagraḥ śīrṇaparṇānilāśanaḥ।
brahmādīṃstapasā tuṣṭānvaraṃ vavre varapradān ॥ 2.47.7 ॥

devairdaityaiśca śastrairvividhairmanujādibhiḥ।
kṛṣṇeśānādicakrādyairavadhyaḥ syāṃ mahābalaḥ ॥ 2.47.8 ॥

tathetyuktvāntarhitāste hetirdevānathājayat।
indratvamakaroddhetirbhītā brahmaharādayaḥ ॥ 2.47.9 ॥

hariṃ te śaraṇaṃ jagmurūcurhetiṃ jahīti tān ।
ūce hariravadhyo'yaṃ hetirdevāsuraiḥ surāḥ ॥ 2.47.10 ॥

mahāstraṃ me prayacchadhvaṃ hetiṃ hanmi hi yena tam।
ityuktāste tato devā gadāṃ tāṃ haraye daduḥ ॥ 2.47.11 ॥

dadhāra tāṃ gadāmādau devairukto gadādharaḥ ।
gadayā hetimāhatya devaiḥ sa tridivaṃ yayau ॥ 2.47.12 ॥

gadāmādāvavaṣṭabhya gayāsuraśiraḥśilām।
niścalārthaṃ sthito yasmāttasmādādigadādharaḥ ॥ 2.47.13 ॥

śilāparvatarūpeṇa vyakta ādigadādharaḥ ।
śilāsau muṇḍapṛṣṭādriḥ prabhāso nāmaparvvataḥ ॥ 2.47.14 ॥

udyanto gītanādaśca bhasmakūṭo girirmmahān।
gṛdhra kūṭaḥ pretakūṭaścādipālo'ravindakaḥ ॥ 2.47.15 ॥

pañcalokaḥ saptaloko vaikuṇṭo lohadaṇḍakaḥ ।
krauñcapādo'kṣayavaṭaḥ phalgutīrthaṃ madhuśravāḥ ॥ 2.47.16 ॥

dadhikulyā madhukulyā devikā ca mahānadī।
vaitaraṇyādirūpeṇa vyakta ādigadādharaḥ ॥ 2.47.17 ॥

viṣṇoḥ padaṃ rudrapadaṃ brahmaṇaḥ padamuttamam।
kāśyapasya padaṃ divyaṃ dvau hastau yatra nirgatau ॥ 2.47.18 ॥

pañcāgnīnāṃ padānyatra indrāgastyapade pare।
raveśca kārttikeyasya krauñcamātaṅgayorapi ॥ 2.47.19 ॥

mukhyaliṅgāni sarvvāṇi vyaktāvyaktātmanā sthitaḥ।
ādyo gadādharaścaiva vyaktaḥ śrīmān gadādharaḥ ॥ 2.47.20 ॥

gāyatrī caiva sāvitrī sandhyā caiva sarasvatī ।
gayādityaścottarārko dakṣiṇārko'pi naimiṣaḥ ॥ 2.47.21 ॥

śvetārko gaṇanāthaśca vasavo'ṣṭau munīśvarāḥ।
rudrāścaikādaśaivātha tathā saptarṣayo'pare ॥ 2.47.22 ॥

somanāthaśca siddheśaḥ kaparddīśo vināyakaḥ।
nārāyaṇo mahālakṣmīrbrahmā śrīpuruṣottamaḥ ॥ 2.47.23 ॥

mārkaṇḍeyeśaḥ kauṭīśo hyaṅgireśaḥ pitāmahaḥ।
janārdano maṅgalā ca puṇḍarīkākṣa uttamaḥ ॥ 2.47.24 ॥

ityādivyaktarūpeṇa sthitaścādigadādharaḥ।
hetiryo rākṣasastasminhate viṣṇuḥ puraṃ gataḥ ॥ 2.47.25 ॥

brahmaṇā saha rudrādyaiḥ kārite niścale'sure ।
tuṣṭāvādyagadāpāṇiṃ vedhā harṣeṇa nirvṛtaḥ ॥ 2.47.26 ॥

           brahmovāca।।
gadādharaṃ vyapagatakālakalmaṣaṃ gayāgataṃ viditaguṇaṃ guṇātigam।
guhāgataṃ girivaragauragehagaṃ gaṇārccitaṃ varadamahaṃ namāmi ॥ 2.47.27 ॥

ahaḥśriyaṃ tridaśagaṇādisuśriyaṃ bhavaśriyaṃ ditibhavadāraṇaśriyam।
kaliśriyaṃ kalimalamardanaśriyaṃ gadādharaṃ naumi tamāśritaśriyam । 47.28 ।।

dṛḍhādṝḍhaṃ parivṛḍhagāḍhasaṃstutaṃ kāmādbhutaṃ sudṛḍhamarūḍhirūḍhigam।
tamāḍhyagaṃ dṛḍhaduritādyaḍhaukitaṃ svaḍhaukṛtaṃ dṛḍhataragotrasūktibham ॥ 2.47.28 ॥

videhakaṃ karaṇakalāvivarjitaṃ vijanmakaṃ divakaravedibhūṣitam।
gadādharaṃ dhvanimukhavarjitaṃ paraṃ namāmyahaṃ satata manādimīśvaraṃ harim ॥ 2.47.29 ॥

mano'tigaṃ matigativarjitaṃ paraṃ sadādvayaṃ stutiśirasi saṃstutaṃ budhaiḥ।
cidātmakaṃ kaligatakāraṇātigaṃ gadādharaṃ hṛdayagataṃ namāmi tam ॥ 2.47.30 ॥

            sanatkumāra uvāca।।
devaiḥ sārddhaṃ brahmaṇaivaṃ stutaścādigadādharaḥ ।
ūce varaṃ vṛṇīṣva tvaṃ varaṃ brahmā tamabravīt ॥ 2.47.31 ॥

śilāyāṃ devarūpiṇyāṃ na tiṣṭāmastvayā vinā।
sthāsyāmo'tra tvayā sārddhaṃ nityaṃ vyaktādirūpiṇā ॥ 2.47.32 ॥

evamastu śriyā sārddhaṃ sthitaścādigadādharaḥ।
lokānāṃ rakṣaṇārthāya jagatāṃ muktihetave।
suvyaktaḥ puṇḍarīkākṣo janārdana iti śrutaḥ ॥ 2.47.33 ॥

vedairagamyā yā mūrttirādibhūtā sanātanī।
suvyaktā śvetakalpe sā bhaviṣyati tathā punaḥ।
vārāhakalpe hyavyaktā vyaktimapyagamatpurā ॥ 2.47.34 ॥

santāraṇāya lokānāṃ devānāṃ rakṣaṇāya ca।
gayāśirasi suvyakto bhaviṣyati na saṃśayaḥ ॥ 2.47.35 ॥

ye drakṣyanti sadā bhaktyā devamādigadādharam।
kuṣṭharogādinirmmuktā yāsyanti harimandiram ॥ 2.47.36 ॥

ye drakṣyanti sadā bhaktyā devamādigadādharam।
te prāpsyanti dhanaṃ dhānyamāyurārogyameva ca ॥ 2.47.37 ॥

kalatraputrapautrādiguṇakīrttisukhāni ca।
śraddhayā ye namasyanti rājyaṃ brahmapuraṃ tathā।
bhuktvā vrajeyuḥ satataṃ puṇyapuñjaphalaṃ narāḥ ॥ 2.47.38 ॥

gandhadānena gandhāḍhyaḥ saubhāgyaṃ puṣpadānataḥ।
dhūpadānena rājyāptirdīpāddīptirbhaviṣyati ॥ 2.47.39 ॥

dhvajadānātpāpahāniryātrākṛdbrahmalokabhāk।
śrāddhapiṇḍaprado yastu viṣṇuṃ neṣyati vai pitṝn ॥ 2.47.40 ॥

śraddhayā ye namasyanti satotreṇādigadādharam।
stoṣyanti ca samabhyarcya pitṝnneṣyanti mādhavam।
śivo'pi parayā prītyā tuṣṭāvādigadādharam ॥ 2.47.41 ॥

         ।।śiva uvāca।।
avyaktarūpo yo devo muṇḍapṛṣṭādirūpataḥ ।
phalgutīrthādirūpeṇa namāmyādigadādharam ॥ 2.47.42 ॥

vyaktāvyaktasvarūpeṇa padarūpeṇa saṃsthitaḥ।
mukhaliṅgādirūpeṇa namāmyādigadādharam ॥ 2.47.43 ॥

avyaktarūpo yo devo janārdanasvarūpataḥ।
muṇḍapṛṣṭe svayaṃ jāto nāmāmyādigadā dharam ॥ 2.47.44 ॥

śilāyāṃ devarūpiṇyāṃ sthitaṃ brahmādibhiḥ suraiḥ।
pūjitaṃ satkṛtaṃ devaistaṃ namāmi gadādharam ॥ 2.47.45 ॥

yaṃ ca dṛṣṭvā tataḥ spṛṣṭvā pūjayitvā praṇamya ca ।
śrāddhādau brahmalokāptirnamāmyādigadādharam ॥ 2.47.46 ॥

mahadādeśca jagato vyaktasyaikaṃ hi kāraṇam।
avyaktajñānarūpaṃ taṃ namāmyādigadādharam ॥ 2.47.47 ॥

dehendriyamanobuddhiprāṇāhaṅkāravarjitam।
jāgratsvapnavinirmuktaṃ namāmyādigadādharam ॥ 2.47.48 ॥

nityānityavinirmuktaṃ satyamānandamavyayam।
turīyaṃ jyotirātmānaṃ namāmyādigadādharam ॥ 2.47.49 ॥

           ।।sanatkumāra uvāca।।
evaṃ stuto maheśena prīto hyādigadādharaḥ।
sthito devaḥ śilāyāṃ sa brahmādyairdaivataiḥ saha ॥ 2.47.50 ॥

saṃsthitaṃ muṇḍapṛṣṭādrau devamādigadādharam।
stuvanti pūjayantīha brahmalokaṃ prayāntu te ॥ 2.47.51 ॥

dharmārthī prāpnuyāddharmamarthārthī cārthamāpnuyāt ।
kāmānavāpnuyātkāmī mokṣārthī mokṣamāpnuyāt ॥ 2.47.52 ॥

vandhyā ca labhate putraṃ vedavedāṅgapāragam।
rājā vijayamāpnoti śūdraśca sukhamāpnuyāt ॥ 2.47.53 ॥

putrārthī labhate putrānabhyarcyādigadādharam।
manasā prārthitaṃ sarvaṃ pūjādyaiḥ prāpnuyāddhareḥ ॥ 2.47.54 ॥

iti śrīvāyupurāṇe vāyuprokte gayāmāhātmyaṃ nāma saptacatvāriṃśo'dhyāyaḥ ।। 47 ।।

## 2.48

।।sanatkumāra uvāca।।
gayāyātrāṃ pravakṣyāmi śrṛṇu nārada muktidām।
niṣkṛtiḥ śrāddhakartṝṇāṃ brahmaṇā gīyate purā ॥ 2.48.1 ॥

udyataścedgayāṃ gantuṃ śrāddhaṃ kṛtvā vidhānataḥ।
vidhāya kārpaṭīveśaṃ kṛtvā grāmaṃ pradakṣiṇam ॥ 2.48.2 ॥

tato grāmāntaraṃ gatvā śrāddhaśeṣasya bhojanam।
tataḥ pratidinaṃ gacchetpratigrahavivarjitaḥ ॥ 2.48.3 ॥

pratigrahādupāvṛttaḥ santuṣṭo niyataḥ śuciḥ।
ahaṅkāravimukto yaḥ sa tīrthaphalamaśnute ॥ 2.48.4 ॥

yasya hastau ca pādau ca manaścāpi susaṃyatam।
vidyā tapaśca kīrtiśca sa tīrthaphalamaśnute ॥ 2.48.5 ॥

tato gayāpraveśe ca pūrvato'sti mahānadī ।
tatra toyaṃ samutpāṭya snātavyaṃ nirmale jale ॥ 2.48.6 ॥

devādīṃstarpayitvātha śrāddhaṃ kṛtvā yathāvidhiḥ ।
svavedaśākhāgaditamarghyāvāhanavarjitam ॥ 2.48.7 ॥

apare'hni śucirbhūtvā gacchedvai pretaparvate ।
brahmakuṇḍe tataḥ snātvā devādīṃstarpayetsudhīḥ ॥ 2.48.8 ॥

kuryyācchrāddhaṃ sapiṇḍānāṃ prayataḥ pretaparvate।
prācīnāvītinā bhāvyaṃ dakṣiṇābhimukhaḥ sudhīḥ ॥ 2.48.9 ॥

kavyabālo'nalaḥ somo yamaścaivāryyamā tathā।
agniṣvāttā barhiṣadaḥ somapāḥ pitṛdevatāḥ ॥ 2.48.10 ॥

āgacchantu mahābhāgā yuṣmābhī rakṣitāstviha।
madīyāḥ pitaro ye ca kule jātāḥ sanābhayaḥ ॥ 2.48.11 ॥

teṣāṃ piṇḍapradānārthamāgato'smi gayāmimām।
te sarve tṛptimāyāntu śrāddenānena śāśvatīm ॥ 2.48.12 ॥

ācamyoktāva ca pañcāṅgaṃ prāṇāyāmaṃ prayatnataḥ।
punarāvṛttirahitabrahmalokāptihetave ॥ 2.48.13 ॥

evañca vidhivacchrāddhaṃ kṛtvā pūrvaṃ yatākramam।
pitṝnāvāhya cābhyarcya mantraiḥ piṇḍaprado bhavet ॥ 2.48.14 ॥

tīrthe pretaśilādau ca caruṇā saghṛtena vā ।
prakṣālya pūrvaṃ tatsthānaṃ pañcagavyaiḥ pṛthakpṛthak।
tairmantrairatha saṃpūjya pañcagavyaiśca devatām ॥ 2.48.15 ॥

yāvattilā manuṣyaiśca gṛhītā pitṛkarmasu।
gacchanti tāvadasurāḥ siṃhatrastā yathā mṛgāḥ ॥ 2.48.16 ॥

aṣṭakāsu ca vṛddhau ca gayāyāṃ ca mṛte'hani ।
mātuḥ śrāddhaṃ pṛthakkuryādanyatra patinā saha ॥ 2.48.17 ॥

vṛddhiśrāddhe tu mātrādi gayāyāṃ pitṛpūrvakam।
pādyapūrvaṃ samārabhya dakṣiṇāgrakuśaiḥ kramāt।
pitrādīnāṃ samāstīrya śeṣaṃ gṛhyoktamācaret ॥ 2.48.18 ॥

dadyuḥ śrāddhaṃ sapiṇḍānāṃ teṣāṃ dakṣiṇabhāgataḥ।
kuśānāstīryaṃ vidhinā sakṛddatvā tilodakam ॥ 2.48.19 ॥

gṛhītvāñjalinā tebhyaḥ pitṛtīrthena yatnataḥ।
saktunā muṣṭimātreṇa dadyādakṣayyapiṇḍakam।
sambandhinastilādbhiśca kuśeṣvāvāhayettataḥ ॥ 2.48.20 ॥

ābrahmastambaparyantaṃ devarṣipitṛmānavāḥ।
tṛpyantu pitaraḥ sarve mātṛmātāmahādayaḥ ॥ 2.48.21 ॥

atītakulakoṭīnāṃ saptadvīpanivāsinām।
ābrahmabhuvanāllokādidamastu tilodakam ॥ 2.48.22 ॥

pitā pitāmaha ścaiva tathaiva prapitāmahaḥ।
mātā pitāmahī caiva tathaiva prapitāmahī ॥ 2.48.23 ॥

mātāmahastatpitā ca pramātāmahakādayaḥ।
teṣāṃ piṇḍo mayā datto hyakṣayyamupatiṣṭhatām ॥ 2.48.24 ॥

muṣṭimātrapramāṇañca hyārdrāmalakamātrakam।
śamīphatrapramāṇaṃ vā piṇḍaṃ dadyādgayāśire।
uddharetsaptagotrāṇi kulāni śatamuddharet ॥ 2.48.25 ॥

piturmātuḥ svabhāryāyā bhaginyā duhitustathā।
pitṛṣvasurmātṛṣvasuḥ sapta gotrāḥ prakīrttitāḥ ॥ 2.48.26 ॥

caturviṃśativiṃśaśca ṣoḍaśa dvādaśaiva hi।
rudrādivasavaścaiva kulānyekottaraṃ śatam ॥ 2.48.27 ॥

nāvāhanaṃ na digbandho na doṣo dṛṣṭisambhavaḥ।
na kāruṇyena karttavyaṃ tīrthaśrāddhaṃ vicakṣaṇaiḥ ॥ 2.48.28 ॥

piṇḍāsanaṃ piṇḍadānaṃ punaḥ pratyavanejanam।
dakṣiṇā cānnasaṅkalpaṃ tīrthaśrāddheṣvayaṃvidhiḥ ॥ 2.48.29 ॥

asmatkule mṛtā ye ca gatiryeṣāṃ na vidyate।
āvāhayiṣye tānsarvāndarbhapṛṣṭe tilodakaiḥ ॥ 2.48.30 ॥

bandhuvargakule ye ca gatiryeṣāṃ na vidyate।
āvāhayiṣye tāntsarvān darbhapṛṣṭe tilodakaiḥ ॥ 2.48.31 ॥

ityetairmantraiḥ sajalaistilairdarbheṣu dhyānavān।
āvāhyābhyarcya tebhyaśca piṇḍāndadyādyathākramam ॥ 2.48.32 ॥

asmatkule mṛtā ye ca gatiryeṣāṃ na vidyate।
teṣāmuddharaṇārthāya imaṃ piṇḍaṃ dadāmyaham ॥ 2.48.33 ॥

mātāmahakule ye ca gatiryeṣāṃ na vidyate।
teṣāmuddharaṇārthāya imaṃ piṇḍaṃ dadāmyaham ॥ 2.48.34 ॥

bandhuvargakule ye ca gatiryeṣāṃ na vidyate।
teṣāmuddharaṇārthāya imaṃ piṇḍaṃ dadāmyaham ॥ 2.48.35 ॥

ajātadantā ye kecidye ca garbhe prapīḍitāḥ ।
teṣāmuddharaṇārthāya imaṃ piṇḍaṃ dadāmyaham ॥ 2.48.36 ॥

agnidagdhāśca ye kecinnāgnidagdhāstathā pare।
vidyuccorahatā ye ca tebhyaḥ piṇḍaṃ dadāmyaham ॥ 2.48.37 ॥

dāvadāhe mṛtā ye ca siṃhavyāgrahatāśca ye।
daṃṣṭribhiḥ śrṛṅgibhirvāpi tebhyaḥ piṇḍaṃ dadāmyaham ॥ 2.48.38 ॥

udbandhanamṛtā ye ca viṣaśastrahatāśca ye।
ātmāpaghātino ye ca tebhyaḥ piṇḍaṃ dadāmyaham ॥ 2.48.39 ॥

araṇye vartmani vane kṣudhayā tṛṣayā hatāḥ।
bhūtapretapiśācādyaistebhyaḥ piṇḍaṃ dadāmyaham ॥ 2.48.40 ॥

raurave cāndhatāmisre kālasūtre ca ye gatāḥ।
teṣāmuddharaṇārtāya imaṃ piṇḍaṃ dadāmyaham ॥ 2.48.41 ॥

asipatravane ghore kumbhīpākeṣu ye gatāḥ।
teṣāmuddharaṇārthāya imaṃ piṇḍaṃ dadāmyaham ॥ 2.48.42 ॥

anekayātanāsaṃsthāḥ pretalokañca ye gatāḥ।
teṣāmuddharaṇārthāya imaṃ piṇḍaṃ dadāmyaham ॥ 2.48.43 ॥

anekayātanāsaṃsthā ye nītā yamakiṅkaraiḥ।
teṣāmuddharaṇārthāya imaṃ piṇḍaṃ dadāmyaham ॥ 2.48.44 ॥

narakeṣu samasteṣu yātanāsu ca ye sthitāḥ ।
teṣāmuddharaṇārthāya imaṃ piṇḍaṃ dadāmyaham ॥ 2.48.45 ॥

paśuyoni gatā yeca pakṣikīṭasarīsṛpāḥ।
athavā vṛkṣayonisthāstebhyaḥ piṇḍaṃ dadāmyaham ॥ 2.48.46 ॥

jātyantarasahasreṣu bhramantaḥ svena karmmaṇā।
mānuṣyaṃ durllabhaṃ yeṣāṃ tebhyaḥ piṇḍaṃ dadāmyaham ॥ 2.48.47 ॥

divyantarikṣabhūmiṣṭāḥ pitaro bāndhavādayaḥ।
mṛtā asaṃskṛtā ye ca tebyaḥ piṇḍaṃ dadāmyaham ॥ 2.48.48 ॥

ye kecitpretarūpeṇa varttante pitaro mama।
te sarvve tṛptimāyāntu piṇḍenānena sarvvadā ॥ 2.48.49 ॥

ye'bāndhavā bāndhavā vā ye'nyajanmani bāndhavāḥ।
teṣāṃ piṇḍo mayā datto hyakṣayyamupatiṣṭhatām ॥ 2.48.50 ॥

pitṛvaṃśe mṛtā ye ca mātṛvaṃśe ca ye mṛtāḥ।
guruśvaśurabandhūnāṃ ye cānye bāndhavā mṛtāḥ ॥ 2.48.51 ॥

ye me kule luptapiṇḍāḥ putradāravivarjitāḥ।
kriyālopagatā ye ca jātyandhāḥ paṅgavastathā ॥ 2.48.52 ॥

virūpā āmagarbhāśca jñātājñātāḥ kule mama।
teṣāṃ piṇḍo mayā datto hyakṣayyamupatiṣṭhatām ॥ 2.48.53 ॥

ā brahmaṇo ye pitṛvaṃśajātā mātustathā vaṃśabhavā madīyāḥ।
kuladvaye ye mama dāsabhūtā bhṛtyā stathaivāśritasevakāśca ॥ 2.48.54 ॥

mitrāṇi śiṣyāḥ paśavaśca vṛkṣā dṛṣṭā hyadṛṣṭāśca kṛtopakārāḥ।
janmāntare ye mama saṅgatāśca tebhyaḥ svadhā piṇḍamahaṃ dadāmi ॥ 2.48.55 ॥

etaiśca sarvvamantraistu strīliṅgāntaṃ samūhya ca।
piṇḍāndadyādyathāpūrvvaṃ strīṇāṃ mātrādikakramāt ॥ 2.48.56 ॥

svagotre paragotre vā dampatyoḥ piṇḍapātanam।
apṛthaṅ niṣphalaṃ śrāddhaṃ piṇḍañcodakatarpaṇam ॥ 2.48.57 ॥

piṇḍapātre tilānkṣiptvā pūrayitvā śubhodakaiḥ।
pariṣicya tridhā sarvān praṇipatya samāpayet ॥ 2.48.58 ॥

pitṝnvisṛjya cācamya sākṣiṇaḥ śrāvayetsurān ।
sākṣiṇaḥ santu me devā brahmeśānādayastathā।
mayā gayāṃ samāsādya pitṝṇāṃ niṣkṛtiḥ kṛtā ॥ 2.48.59 ॥

āgato'smi gayāṃ deva pitṛkāryye gadādhara।
tvameva sākṣī bhagavannanṛṇo'hamṛṇatrayāt ॥ 2.48.60 ॥

sarvvasthāneṣu caivaṃ syāt piṇḍadānantu nārada।
pretaparvvatamārabhya kuryyāttīrtheṣu ca kramāt ॥ 2.48.61 ॥

tilamiśrāṃstataḥ saktūnniḥkṣipetpretaparvvate।
apasavyena devarṣe dakṣiṇābhimukhena ca ॥ 2.48.62 ॥

ye kecitpretarūpeṇa varttante pitaro mama।
te sarvve tṛptimāyāntu saktubhistilamiśritaiḥ ॥ 2.48.63 ॥

ābrahmastambaparyyantaṃ yatkiñcitsacarācaram।
mayā dattena toyena tṛptimāyāntu sarvvaśaḥ ॥ 2.48.64 ॥

pretatvācca vimuktāḥ syuḥ pitarastasya nārada।
pretatvaṃ tasya māhātmyātkule cāpi na jāyate ॥ 2.48.65 ॥

nāmnā pretaśilā khyātā gayāśirasi muktaye।
tīrthamantrādirūpeṇa sthita ścādigadādharaḥ ॥ 2.48.66 ॥

iti śrīvāyupurāṇe vāyuprokte gayāmāhātmyaṃ nāmāṣṭacatvāriṃśo'dhyāyaḥ ।। 48 ।।

## 2.49

।।sanatkumāra uvāca।।
ādau tu pañcatīrtheṣu cottare mānase vidhiḥ।
ācamya kuśahastena śiraścābhyukṣya vāriṇā ॥ 2.49.1 ॥
uttaraṃ mānasaṃ gacchenmantreṇa snānamācaret।
uttare mānase snānaṃ karomyātmaviśuddhaye ॥ 2.49.2 ॥
sūryyalokādisaṃsiddhisiddhaye pitṛmuktaye।
devādīṃstarpayitvātha śrāddhaṃ kuryāt sapiṇḍakam ॥ 2.49.3 ॥
mānasaṃ hi saro hyatra tasmāduttaramānasam।
sūryyaṃ natvārccayitvātha sūryyalokaṃ nayetpitṝn ॥ 2.49.4 ॥
namo bhagavate bhartre somabhaumajñarūpiṇe।
jīvabhārgavasaureyarāhuketusvarūpiṇe ॥ 2.49.5 ॥
uttarānmānasānmaunī vrajeddakṣiṇamānasam।
udīcītīrthamityuktaṃ tatraudīcyaṃ vimuktidam ।
atra snāto divaṃ yāti svaśarīreṇa mānavaḥ ॥ 2.49.6 ॥
madhye kanakhalaṃ tīrthaṃ triṣulokeṣu viśrutam।
snātaḥ kanakavadbhāti naro yāti pavitratām ॥ 2.49.7 ॥
tasya dakṣiṇabhāge ca tīrthaṃ dakṣiṇamānasam।
ataḥ kanakhalaṃ loke khyātaṃ tīrthamanuttamam ॥ 2.49.8 ॥
dakṣiṇe mānase caiva tīrthatrayamudāhṛtam।
snātvā teṣu vidhānena kuyyācchrāddhaṃ pṛthakpṛthak ॥ 2.49.9 ॥
dakṣiṇe mānase snānaṃ karomyātmaviśuddhaye।
sūryyalokādisaṃsiddhisiddhaye pitṛmuktaye ॥ 2.49.10 ॥
brahmahatyādipāpaugha yātanāyā vimuktaye।
divākara karomīha snānaṃ dakṣiṇamānase ॥ 2.49.11 ॥
namāmi sūryyaṃ tṛptyarthaṃ pitṝṇāṃ tāraṇāya ca।
putrapautradhanaiśvaryyāyāyurārogya vṛddhaye ॥ 2.49.12 ॥
anena snānapūjādi kṛtvā śrāddhaṃ sapiṇḍakam।
kṛtvā natvā ca maunyarkamimaṃ mantramudīrayet ॥ 2.49.13 ॥
phalgutīrthaṃ vrajettasmāt sarvvatīrthottamottamam।
muktirbhavati karttṝṇāṃ pitṝṇāṃ śrāddhataḥ sadā ॥ 2.49.14 ॥
brahmaṇā prārthito viṣṇuḥ phalguko hyabhavatpurā।
dakṣiṇāgnau hutaṃ tatra tadrajaḥ phalgutīrthakam ॥ 2.49.15 ॥
tasminphalati phalgvā gauḥ kāmadhenurjalaṃ mahī।
dṛṣṭerantargataṃ yasmātphalgutīrthaṃ na niṣphalam ॥ 2.49.16 ॥
tīrthāni yāni sarvvāṇi bhuvaneṣvakhileṣvapi।
tāni snātuṃ samāyānti phalgutīrthaṃ suraiḥ saha ॥ 2.49.17 ॥
gaṅgā pādodakaṃ viṣṇoḥ phalgurhyādigadādharaḥ।
svayaṃ hi dravarūpeṇa tasmādgaṅgādhikaṃ viduḥ ॥ 2.49.18 ॥
aśvamedhasahasrāṇāṃ sahasraṃ yaḥ samācaret।
nāsau tatphalamāpnoti phalgutīrthe yadāpnuyāt ॥ 2.49.19 ॥
phalgutīrthe viṣṇujale karomi snānamādṛtaḥ।
pitṝṇāṃ viṣṇulokāya bhuktimuktiprasiddhaye ॥ 2.49.20 ॥
phalgutīrthe naraḥ snātvā tarpaṇaṃ śrāddhamācaret।
sapiṇḍakaṃ svasūtroktaṃ namedatha pitāmaham ॥ 2.49.21 ॥
namaḥ śivāya devāya īśāya puruṣāya vai।
aghoravāmadevāya sadyojātāya śambhave ॥ 2.49.22 ॥
phalgutīrthe naraḥ snātvā dṛṣṭvā devaṃ gadādharam।
ātmānaṃ tārayetsadyo daśa pūrvāndaśāparān ॥ 2.49.23 ॥
natvā gadādharaṃ devaṃ mantreṇānena pūjayet ।
oṃ namo vāsudevāya namaḥ saṅkarṣaṇāya ca ॥ 2.49.24 ॥
pradyumnāyāniruddhāya śrīdharāya ca viṣṇave ।
pañcatīrthe naraḥ snātvā brahmalokaṃ nayetpitṝn ॥ 2.49.25 ॥
amṛtaiḥ pañcabhiḥ snānaṃ puṣpavastrādyalaṃkṛtam।
na kuryyādyo gadāpāṇestasya śrāddhamasārthakam ॥ 2.49.26 ॥
nāgakūṭādgṛdhrakūṭādyupāduttaramānasāt।
etadgayāśiraḥ proktaṃ phalgutīrthantaducyate ॥ 2.49.27 ॥
muṇḍapṛṣṭhanagādhastātphalgutīrthamanuttamam।
atra śrāddhādinā sarvve pitaro mokṣamāpnuyuḥ ॥ 2.49.28 ॥
prathame'hni vidhiḥ prokto dvitīye divase vrajet।
dharmmāraṇyaṃ tatra dharmmo yasmādyajñamakārayat ॥ 2.49.29 ॥
gamanādbrahmalokāptirbhavatyeva hi nārada।
mataṅga vāpyāṃ yaḥ snātvā tarpaṇaṃ śrāddhamācaret ॥ 2.49.30 ॥
gatvā natvā mataṅgeśamimaṃ mantramudīrayet।
pramāṇaṃ devatāḥ santu lokapālāśca sākṣiṇaḥ ॥ 2.49.31 ॥
mayāgatyamataṅge'sminpitṝṇāṃ niṣkṛtiḥ kṛtā।
pūrvvaṃ hi brahmatīrthaṃ ca kūpe śrāddhādi kārayet ॥ 2.49.32 ॥
tatkūpayūpayormmadhye sarvvāṃstārayate pitṝn।
dharmmaṃ dharmmeśvaraṃ natvā mahābodhitaruṃ namet ॥ 2.49.33 ॥
namaste'śvattharājāya brahmaviṣṇuśivātmane।
bodhidramāya kartṝṇāṃ pitṝṇāṃ tāraṇāya ca ॥ 2.49.34 ॥
ye'smatkule mātṛvaṃśe bāndhavā durgatiṃ gatāḥ।
tvaddarśanātsparśanācca svargatiṃ yāntu śāśvatīm ॥ 2.49.35 ॥
ṛṇatrayaṃ mayā dattaṃ gayāmāgatya vṛkṣarāṭ।
tvatprasādānmahāpāpādvimukto'haṃ bhavārṇavāt ॥ 2.49.36 ॥
tṛtīye brahmasarasi snātvā śrāddhaṃ sapiṇḍakam।
kṛtvā sarvvapramāṇena mantreṇa vidhivatsutaḥ ॥ 2.49.37 ॥
snānaṃ karomi tīrthe'smin ṛṇatrayavimuktaye।
tatkūpayūpayormadhye brahmalokaṃ nayetpitṝn ॥ 2.49.38 ॥
yāgaṃ kṛtvotthiyo yūpo brahmaṇā yūpa ityasau।
kṛtvā brahmasaraḥśrāddhaṃ sarvvāṃstārayate pitṝn ॥ 2.49.39 ॥
yūpaṃ pradakṣiṇīkṛtya vājapeyaphalaṃ labhet।
brahmāṇaṃ ca namaskṛtya brahmalokaṃ nayetpitṝn ॥ 2.49.40 ॥
namo'stu brahmaṇe'jāya jagajjanmādirūpiṇe ।
bhaktānāñca pitṝṇāñca tārakāya namo namaḥ ॥ 2.49.41 ॥
gopracārasamīpasthā āmrā brahmaprakalpitāḥ।
teṣāṃ secanamātreṇa pitaro mokṣagāminaḥ ॥ 2.49.42 ॥
āmraṃ brahmasarodbhūtaṃ brahmadevamayaṃ tarum।
viṣṇurūpaṃ prasiñcāmi pitṝṇāṃ muktihetave ॥ 2.49.43 ॥
eko muniḥ kumbhakuśāgrahasta āmrasya mūle salilaṃ dadāmi।
āmraśca tṛptā ekā kriyādvyarthakarī prasiddhā ॥ 2.49.44 ॥
tato yama baliṃ dadyānmantreṇānena saṃyataḥ।
yamarājadharmmarājau niścalārthaṃ vyavasthitau ॥ 2.49.45 ॥
tābhyāṃ baliṃ prayacchāmi putṝṇāṃ muktihetave।
tataḥ śvānabaliṃ dadyānmantreṇānena nārada ॥ 2.49.46 ॥
dvau śvānau śyāmaśabalau vaivasvatakulodbhavau।
tābhyāṃ baliṃ prayacchāmi rakṣetāṃ pathi sarvvādā ॥ 2.49.47 ॥
tataḥ kākabaliṃ dadyānmantreṇānena nārada।
aindravāruṇavāyavyayāmyā vai naiṛtāstathā ॥ 2.49.48 ॥
vāyasāḥ pratigṛhṇantu bhūmau piṇḍaṃ samarpitam।
phalgutīrthe caturthe'hni snānādikamathācaret ॥ 2.49.49 ॥
gayāśirasyatha śrāddhaṃ pāde kuryyātsapiṇḍakam।
sākṣādgayāśirastatra phalgutīrthāśritaṃ kṛtam ॥ 2.49.50 ॥
nāgājjanārddanādbrahmayūpāccottaramānasāt।
etadgayāśiraḥ proktaṃ phalgutīrthaṃ taducyate ॥ 2.49.51 ॥
pitāmahaṃ samāsādya yāvaduttaramānasam।
phalgutīrthantu vijñeyaṃ devānāmapi durlabham ॥ 2.49.52 ॥
krauñcapādātphalgutīrthaṃ yāvatsākṣādgayāśiraḥ।
mukhaṃ gayāsurasyaitattasmācchrāddhamihākṣayam ॥ 2.49.53 ॥
muṇḍapṛṣṭānnagādhastātsākṣāttatphalgutīrtha kam।
ādyo gadādharo devo vyaktāvyaktātmanā sthitaḥ ॥ 2.49.54 ॥
viṣṇvādipadarūpeṇa pitṝṇāṃ muktihetave।
etadviṣṇupadaṃ divyaṃ darśanātpāpanāśanam ॥ 2.49.55 ॥
sparśanātpūjanādvāpi pitṝṇāṃ dattamakṣayam।
śrāddhaṃ sapiṇḍakaṃ kṛtvā kulasāhasramātmanā ॥ 2.49.56 ॥
nayedvipṇupadaṃ divyamanantaṃ śivamavyayam।
śrāddhaṃ kṛtvā rudrapade nayetkulaśataṃ naraḥ ॥ 2.49.57 ॥
sahātmanā śivapuraṃ tathā brahmapade naraḥ।
brahmalokaṃ kulaśataṃ samuddhṛtya nayetpitṝn ॥ 2.49.58 ॥
kaśyapasya pade śrāddhī brahmalokaṃ nayetpitṝn।
dakṣiṇāgnipade śrāddhī pitṝnbrahmapuraṃ nayet ॥ 2.49.59 ॥
gārhapatyapade śrāddhī vājapeyaphalaṃ labhet।
śrāddhaṃ kṛtvāhavanīye aśvamedhaphalaṃ labhet ॥ 2.49.60 ॥
śrāddhaṃ kṛtvā sabhyapade jyotiṣṭomaphalaṃ labhet ।
āvasathyapade śrāddhī pitṝnbrahmapuraṃ nayet ॥ 2.49.61 ॥
śrāddhaṃ kṛtvā śakrapade indralokaṃ nayetpitṝn।
agastyasya pade śrāddhī pitṝnbrahmapuraṃ nayet ॥ 2.49.62 ॥
krauñcamātaṅgayoḥ śrāddhī brahmalokaṃ nayetpitṝn।
śrāddhī sūryyapade pañca pāpino'rkkapuraṃ nayet ॥ 2.49.63 ॥
kārtikeyapade śrāddhī śivalokaṃ nayetpitṝn।
gaṇeśasya pade śrāddhī rudralokaṃ nayetpitṝn ॥ 2.49.64 ॥
gajakarṇatarpaṇakṛnnirmalaṃ svarnayetpitṝn।
anyeṣāñca pade śrāddhī pitṝnbrahmapuraṃ nayet ॥ 2.49.65 ॥
sarvveṣāṃ kāśyapaṃ śreṣṭhaṃ viṣṇo rudrasya vai padam।
brahmaṇaśca padaṃ cāpi śreṣṭhaṃ tatra prakīrttitam ॥ 2.49.66 ॥
prārambhe ca samāptau ca teṣāmanyatamaṃ smṛtam।
śreyaskaraṃ bhavettatra śrāddhakarttuśca nārada ॥ 2.49.67 ॥
kaśyapasya pade divye bhāradvājo muniḥ purā।
śrāddhaṃ kṛtvodyato dātuṃ pitrādibhyaśca piṇḍakam ॥ 2.49.68 ॥
śuklakṛṣṇau tato hastau padamudbhidya nirgatau।
dṛṣṭvā hastadvayaṃ tatra muniḥ saṃśayamāgataḥ ॥ 2.49.69 ॥
tataḥ svamātaraṃ śāntāṃ papraccha sa mahāmuniḥ।
kaśyapasya pade divye śukle kṛṣṇe'tha vā kare ॥ 2.49.70 ॥
piṇḍo deyo mayā mātarjānāsi pitaraṃ vada।।
        ।।śāntovāca।।
bhāradvāja mahāprājña dehi kṛṣṇāya piṇḍakam ॥ 2.49.71 ॥
bhāradvājastataḥ piṇḍaṃ dātuṃ kṛṣṇāya codyataḥ।
śveto'dṛśyo'bravīttatra putrastvaṃ hi mamaurasaḥ ॥ 2.49.72 ॥
kṛṣṇo'bravīnmama kṣetraṃ tato me dehi piṇḍakam।
svairiṇyathābravīddātuṃ kṣetriṇe bījine tataḥ ॥ 2.49.73 ॥
bhāradvājastataḥ piṇḍaṃ kaśyapasya pade dadau ।
haṃsayuktavimānena brahmalokamubhau gatau ॥ 2.49.74 ॥
rāmo rudrapade śrāddhe piṇḍadānāya codyataḥ।
pitā daśarathaḥ svargātprasāryya karamāgataḥ ॥ 2.49.75 ॥
nādātpiṇḍaṃ kare rāmo dadau rudrapade tataḥ।
śāstrārthātikramādbhītaṃ rāmaṃ daśaratho'bravīt ॥ 2.49.76 ॥
tārito'haṃ tvayā putra rudralokamavāpnuyām।
haste piṇḍapradānena svargatirna hi me bhavet ॥ 2.49.77 ॥
tvañca rājyaṃ ciraṃ kṛtvā pālayitvā dvijānprajāḥ।
yajñānsadakṣiṇānkṛtvā viṣṇulokaṃ vrajiṣyasi ॥ 2.49.78 ॥
puryyayodhyājanaiḥ sārddhaṃ kṛmikīṭādibhiḥ saha।
ityuktvāsau daśaratho rudralokaṃ paraṃ yayau ॥ 2.49.79 ॥
bhīṣmo viṣṇupade śreṣṭe āhūya pitaraṃ svakam।
śrāddhaṃ kṛtvodyato dātuṃ pitrādibhyaśca piṇḍakam ॥ 2.49.80 ॥
piturvinirgatau hastau gayāśirasi śantanoḥ।
nādātpiṇḍaṃ karo bhīṣmo dadau viṣṇupade tataḥ ॥ 2.49.81 ॥
śantanuḥ prāha santuṣṭaḥ śāstrārthe niścalo bhavān।
trikāladṛṣṭirbhavat cānte viṣṇuśca te gatiḥ ॥ 2.49.82 ॥
svecchayā maraṇaṃ cāstu ityuktvā muktimāgataḥ।
kanakeśañca kedāraṃ nārasiṃhaṃ ca vāmanam ॥ 2.49.83 ॥
udaṅmārge samabhyarccya pitṝnsarvvāṃśca tārayet।
gayāśirasi yaḥ piṇḍānyeṣāṃ nāmnā tu nirvapet ॥ 2.49.84 ॥
narakasthā divaṃ yānti svargasthā mokṣamāpnuyuḥ।
gayāśirasi yaḥ piṇḍaṃ śamīpatrapramāṇataḥ ॥ 2.49.85 ॥
kandamūlaphalādyairvā dadyātsvargaṃ nayetpitṝn।
padāni yatra dṛśyante viṣṇvādīnāṃ tadagrataḥ ॥ 2.49.86 ॥
śrāddhaṃ kṛtvā sapiṇḍañca teṣāṃ lokānnayetpitṝn।
sarvvatra muṇḍapṛṣṭādriḥ padairebhiḥ sulakṣitaḥ ॥ 2.49.87 ॥
prayānti pitaraḥ sarvve brahmalokamanāmayam।
hetyasurasya yacchīrṣaṃ gadayā taddvidhākṛtam ॥ 2.49.88 ॥
tataḥ prakṣālitā yasmāttīrthaṃ tacca vimuktaye।
gadālolamiti khyātaṃ sarvveṣāmuttamottamam ॥ 2.49.89 ॥
gadālole mahātīrthe gadāprakṣālanāddhareḥ।
snānaṃ karomi siddhyarthamakṣayaṃ padamāpnuyām ॥ 2.49.90 ॥
pañcame'hni gadālole snātvā kuryyātsapiṇḍakam।
śrāddhaṃ pitṝnbrahmalokaṃ nayedātmānameva ca ॥ 2.49.91 ॥
brahmaprakalpitānviprān havyakavyādinārccayet।
taistuṣṭaistoṣitāḥ sarvvāḥ pitṛbhiḥ saha devatāḥ ॥ 2.49.92 ॥
kṛte śrāddhe'kṣayavaṭe annenaiva prayatnataḥ।
pitṝnnayedbrahmalokamakṣayantu sanātanam ॥ 2.49.93 ॥
vaṭavṛkṣasamīpe tu śākenāpyudakena vā।
ekasminbhojite vipre koṭirbhavati bhojitā ॥ 2.49.94 ॥
deyaṃ dānaṃ ṣoḍaśakaṃ gayātīrthapurodhase।
vastraṃ gandhādibhiḥ putraiḥ samyaksaṃpūjya yatnataḥ ॥ 2.49.95 ॥
gayātīrthavaṭe caiva pitṝṇāṃ dattamakṣayam ।
dṛṣṭvā natvā ca saṃpūjya vaṭeśaṃ susamāhitaḥ ॥ 2.49.96 ॥
pitṝnnayedbrahmalokamakṣayantu sanātanam।
gayāyāṃ dharmmapṛṣṭe ca sarasi brahmaṇasta thā ॥ 2.49.97 ॥
gayāśīrṣe vaṭe caiva pitṝṇāṃ dattamakṣayam।
ekārṇave vaṭasyāgre yaḥ śete yoganidrayā ॥ 2.49.98 ॥
bālarūpadharastasmai namaste yogaśāyine।
saṃsāravṛkṣaśastrāyāśeṣapāpaharāya ca ॥ 2.49.99 ॥
akṣayabrahmadātre ca namo'kṣayavaṭāya vai।
kalau māheśvarā lokā yena tasmādgadādharaḥ।
liṅgarūpo'bhavattañca vande śrīprapitāmaham ॥ 2.49.100 ॥

iti śrīvāyupurāṇe vāyuprokte gayāmāhātmyaṃ nāmonapañcāśattamo'dhyāyaḥ ।। 49 ।

## 2.50

।।sanatkumāra uvāca।।
yajñañcakre gayo rājā bahvannaṃ bahudakṣiṇam।
yatra dravyasamūhānāṃ saṃkhyā karttuṃ na śakyate ॥ 2.50.1 ॥

sthitā gayāyāmannādiparvvatāḥ pañcaviṃśatiḥ।
praśaṃsanti dvijāstatra deśe deśe supūjitāḥ ॥ 2.50.2 ॥

naiva pūrvvaṃ kepyakurvvanna kariṣyanti cāpare।
sikatā vā yathā loke yathā ca divi tārakāḥ ॥ 2.50.3 ॥

tathā bahusuvarṇādyairasaṅkhyātāstu dakṣiṇāḥ ।
naiveha pūrve ye kecinna kariṣyanti cāpare ॥ 2.50.4 ॥

praśaṃsanti dvijāstṛptā deśe deśe supūjitāḥ।
gayaṃ viṣṇvādayastuṣṭā varaṃ brūhīti cābruvan ॥ 2.50.5 ॥

gayastānprārthayāmāsa hyabhiśaptāśca ce purā।
brahmaṇā te dvijāḥ pūtā bhavantu kratupūjitāḥ ॥ 2.50.6 ॥

gayāśrāddhavidhānāya dvijā mūrttāścadurddaśa।
teṣāṃ vākyaṃ prakurvvīta yadi brahmā svayaṃ bhavet ॥ 2.50.7 ॥

gautamaṃ kāśyapaṃ kautsaṃ kauśikaṃ kaṇvameva ca।
bhāradvājaṃ hyauśanasaṃ vātsyaṃ pārāśaraṃ tathā ॥ 2.50.8 ॥

haritkumāramāṇḍavyaṃ lokākṣiṃ lokasaṃmahat।
vāsiṣṭhañca tathātreyaṃ gotrāṇyeṣāṃ caturddaśa ॥ 2.50.9 ॥

gayāpurīti mannāmnā khyātā brahma purī yathā।
evamastu varaṃ dattvā tathā cāntardadhuḥ surāḥ ॥ 2.50.10 ॥

gayaśca bhogānsambhujya viṣṇulokaṃ paraṃ yayau।
viśālāyāṃ viśālo'bhūdrājā'putro 'bravīddvijān ॥ 2.50.11 ॥

kathaṃ putrādayo me syurviśālaṃ cābruvandvijāḥ।
gayāyāṃ piṇḍadānena tava sarvvaṃ bhaviṣyati ॥ 2.50.12 ॥

viśālo'pi gayāśīrṣa piṇḍadaḥ putravānabhūt।
dṛṣṭvākāśe sitaṃ raktaṃ kṛṣṇaṃ puruṣamabravīt ॥ 2.50.13 ॥

ke yūyaṃ teṣu caivaikaḥ sitaḥ proce viśālakam।
ahaṃ sitaste janaka indralokādihāgataḥ ॥ 2.50.14 ॥

mama putra pitā rakto brahmahā pāpakṛttamaḥ ।
ayaṃ pitāmahaḥ kṛṣṇa ṛṣayo yena ghātitāḥ ॥ 2.50.15 ॥

avīcinarakaṃ prāptau muktau tvatpiṇḍadānataḥ।
pitṝnpitāmahāṃścaiva tathaiva prapitāmahān ॥ 2.50.16 ॥

prīṇayāmīti yattoyaṃ tvayā dattamarindama।
tenāsmadyugapadyogo jāto vākyena sattama ॥ 2.50.17 ॥

muktiḥ kṛtā tvayā putra vrajāmaḥ svargamuttamam।
evaṃ putraiḥ pitṝṇāṃ ca kartavyā muktiruttamā ॥ 2.50.18 ॥

tvañca rājyaṃ ciraṃ kṛtvā bhuktvā bhogāṃśca durllabhān।
yajñānsadakṣiṇānkṛtvā yāyādviṣṇupuraṃ tataḥ ॥ 2.50.19 ॥

evaṃ labdhavaro rājā rājyaṃ kṛtvā divaṃgataḥ।
pretarājaḥ saha pretairgayāśrāddhāddivaṃ gataḥ ॥ 2.50.20 ॥

pretaḥ kaścidvimuktyarthaṃ vaṇijaṃ kañcidabravīt।
mama nāmnā gayāśīrṣe piṇḍanirvvāpaṇaṃ kuru ॥ 2.50.21 ॥

pretabhāvavimuktyarthaṃ tvaṃ gṛhāṇa dhanaṃ mama।
tadvanaṃ sarvvamādāya gayāśrāddhavyayaṃ kuru ॥ 2.50.22 ॥

ṣoḍaśapañcabhāgāṃśca tubhyaṃ vai dattavānaham।
svanāmāni yathānyāyaṃ samyagākhyātavānaham ॥ 2.50.23 ॥

gatvā gayāṃ gayāśīrṣa pretarājāya piṇḍakam।
samadādbandhubhiḥ sārddhaṃ svapitṛbhyastato dadau ॥ 2.50.24 ॥

pretaḥ pretatvanirmmukto vaṇik svagṛhamāgataḥ ।
evaṃ gayasya śambhośca kṣetraṃ viṣṇo ravestathā ॥ 2.50.25 ॥

upoṣito'tha gāyatrītīrthe mahānadīsthite।
gāyatryāḥ purataḥ snātvā prātaḥsandhyāmupāsayet ॥ 2.50.26 ॥

śrāddhaṃ sapiṇḍakaṃ kṛtvānayedbrahmaṇyatāṃ kulam।
tīrthe samudite snātvā sāvitryāḥ purato naraḥ ॥ 2.50.27 ॥

sandhyāmupāsya madhyāhne nayetkulaśatandivam।
piṇḍadānaṃ tataḥ kuryyātpitṝṇāṃ muktikāmyayā ॥ 2.50.28 ॥

prācīsarasvatītīrthe snātvā cāpi yathāvidhi।
sandhyāmupāsya sāyāhne viṣṇulokaṃ nayetpitṝn ॥ 2.50.29 ॥

bahujanmakṛtātsandhyālopānmuktastrisandhya kṛt।
viśālāyāṃ lelihāne tīrthe ca bharatāśrame ॥ 2.50.30 ॥

pādāṅkite muṇḍapṛṣṭe gadādharasamīpataḥ।
tīrthe cākāśagaṅgāyāṃ girikarṇamukheṣu ca ॥ 2.50.31 ॥

snāto'tha piṇḍado brahmalokaṃ kulaśataṃ nayet।
devanadyāṃ vaitaraṇyāṃ snātaḥ svargaṃ nayetpitṝn ॥ 2.50.32 ॥

snāto godo vaitaraṇyāṃ triḥsaptakulamuddharet।
satyaṃ satyaṃ punaḥ satyaṃ vaitaraṇyāṃ tu nārada ॥ 2.50.33 ॥

ekaviṃśatikulānyāhustārayennātra saṃśayaḥ।
yā sā vaitaraṇī nāma nadī trailokyaviśrutā ॥ 2.50.34 ॥

sāvatīrṇā gayākṣetre pitṝṇāṃ taraṇāya vai।
godāvaryyāṃ vaitaraṇyāṃ yamunāyāṃ tathaiva ca ॥ 2.50.35 ॥

devanadyāṃ gopracāre śrāddhadaḥ svarnayetpitṝn।
puṣkariṇyāṃ ghṛtakulyāṃ madhukulyāṃ tathaiva ca ॥ 2.50.36 ॥

koṭitīrthe rukmiṇīye piṇḍadaḥ svarnayetpitṝn।
trirātropoṣaṇenaiva tīrthābhigamanena ca ॥ 2.50.37 ॥

adattvā kāñcanaṅgāśca daridro jāyate naraḥ।
ghṛtakulyā madhukulyā devikā ca mahānadī ॥ 2.50.38 ॥

śilāyāḥ saṅgamo yatra madhusravā prakīrtitā।
ayutaṃ cāśvamedhānāṃ snānakṛllabhate naraḥ ॥ 2.50.39 ॥

śrāddhaṃ sapiṇḍakaṃ kṛtvā piṇḍadānaṃ tathaiva ca।
kulānāṃ śatamuddhṛtya viṣṇulokaṃ nayennaraḥ ॥ 2.50.40 ॥

daśāśca medhike haṃsatīrthe cāmarakaṅkaṭe।
koṭitīrthe rukmakuṇḍe piṇḍadaḥ svarnayetpitṝn ॥ 2.50.41 ॥

vaitaraṇyāṃ ghṛtakulyāṃ madhukulyāṃ tathaiva ca।
koṭitīrthe naraḥ snātvā dṛṣṭvā koṭīśvarañca yaḥ ॥ 2.50.42 ॥

koṭijanma bhavedvipro dhanāḍhyo vedapāragaḥ ।
mārkaṇḍeyeśakocīśau natvā syātpitṛtārakaḥ ॥ 2.50.43 ॥

rukma pārijātavane pārvvatyā saha śaṅkaraḥ।
rahasye saṃsthito reme yugānāmayutaṃ purā ॥ 2.50.44 ॥

marīciḥ phalapuṣpārthaṃ pārijātavanaṃ gataḥ।
dṛṣṭvā śapto maheśena yasmātsukhavighātakaḥ ॥ 2.50.45 ॥

duḥkhī bhaveti tadbhīto maricistuṣṭuve śivam।
tuṣṭaḥ provāca taṃ śambhurvṛṇīṣva varamuttamam ॥ 2.50.46 ॥

śāpād bhavatu muktirmme marīciḥ prāha śaṅkaram।
bhavedgayāyāṃ muktiste śivoktaḥ prayayau gayām ॥ 2.50.47 ॥

śilāsthitastapastepe sarvveṣāṃ duṣkarañca yat।
marīcirīśvarācchaptaḥ kṛṣṇatvamagamatpurā ॥ 2.50.48 ॥

tapasā dāruṇeneha sa vipraḥ śuklatāṃ gataḥ ।
harirūce marīciñca varaṃ vṛṇuhi putraka ॥ 2.50.49 ॥

kimalabhyaṃ tvayi tuṣṭe marīciḥ prāha mādhavam।
haraśāpādvimukto'haṃ śilā bhavatu pāvanī ॥ 2.50.50 ॥

pitṛmuktikarī ca syāttathetyuktvā divaṃ gataḥ।
divaukasāṃ puṣkariṇīṃ samāsādya naraḥ śuciḥ ॥ 2.50.51 ॥

yatra dattaṃ pitṛbhyastu bhavatyakṣayamityuta।
tatra snāto divaṃ yāti svaśarīreṇa mānavaḥ ॥ 2.50.52 ॥

pāpmānaṃ prajahātyeṣa jīrṇatvacamivoragaḥ।
tatpaṅgajavanaṃ puṇyaṃ puṇyakṛdbhirniṣevitam ॥ 2.50.53 ॥

pāṇḍuśilā vai tatrāste śrāddhaṃ yatrākṣayaṃ bhavet।
yudhiṣṭirastu tasyāṃ hi śrāddhaṃ karttuṃ yayau mune ॥ 2.50.54 ॥

tatra kāle pāṇḍunoktaṃ maddhaste dehi piṇḍakam।
hastaṃ tyaktvā śilāyāñca piṇḍadānañcakāra saḥ ॥ 2.50.55 ॥

śilāyāṃ piṇḍadānena prahṛṣṭo vyāsanandanaḥ।
varaṃ dadau svaputrāya rājyaṃ kuru mahītale ॥ 2.50.56 ॥

akaṇṭakantu sampūrṇaṃ tvaṃ me trātā hi putraka।
svargaṃ vraja śarīreṇa bhrātṛbhiḥ parivāritaḥ ॥ 2.50.57 ॥

dṛṣṭimātreṇa sampūtānnarakasthāndivaṃ naya।
ityuktvā prayayau pāṇḍuḥ śāśvataṃ padamavyayam ॥ 2.50.58 ॥

udbhijjāḥ svedajā vāpi hyaṇḍajā ye jarāyujāḥ।
madhusravāṃ samāsādya mṛtāḥ svargapuraṃ yayuḥ ॥ 2.50.59 ॥

daśāśvamedhike haṃsatīrthe śrāddhāddivaṃ vrajet।
daśāśvamedhahaṃsau ca natvā śivapuraṃ vrajet ॥ 2.50.60 ॥

bharatasyāśrame śrāddhānnayedbrahmālayaṃ pitṝn।
mataṅgasya pade śrāddhī brahmalokaṃ nayetpitṝn ॥ 2.50.61 ॥

nirmmathyāgniṃ śamīgarbhe vidhirviṣṇvādibhiḥ saha।
lebhe tīrthantu yajñārthaṃ triṣu lokeṣu viśrutam ॥ 2.50.62 ॥

makhasaṃjñantu tattīrthaṃ pitṝṇāṃ mukti dāyakam।
snātvā ca tarpaṇaṃ kṛtvā piṇḍado muktimāpnuyāt ॥ 2.50.63 ॥

pitṝnsvargaṃ nayennatvā saṅgame'ṅgārakeśvarau।
gayākūṭe piṇḍadānādaśvamedhaphalaṃ labhet ॥ 2.50.64 ॥

bhasmakūṭe bhasmanāthaṃ natvā ca tārayetpitṝn ।
tyaktapāpo bhavenmuktaḥ saṅgame snānamācaret ॥ 2.50.65 ॥

iṣṭiṃ cakre'śvamedhākhyaṃ vasiṣṭo munisattamaḥ।
iṣṭito nirgataḥ śambhurvaraṃ vṛṇu vasiṣṭhakam ॥ 2.50.66 ॥

prāheti taṃ vasiṣṭo'pi śiva tuṣṭo'si me yadi।
vastavyaṃ cātra deveśa tathetyuktvā śivaḥ sthitaḥ ॥ 2.50.67 ॥

piṇḍado dhenukāraṇye kāmadhenupadeṣu ca।
snātvā natvātha sampūjya brahmalokaṃ nayetpitṝn ॥ 2.50.68 ॥

karddamāle gayānābhau muṇḍapṛṣṭhasamīpataḥ।
snātvā śrāddhādikaṃ kṛtvā pitṝṇāmanṛṇo bhavet ॥ 2.50.69 ॥

phalgucaṇḍīśmaśānākṣīmaṅgalādyāḥ samarccayet।
gayāyāñca vṛṣotsargātriḥ saptakulamuddharet ॥ 2.50.70 ॥

yatra tatra sthitā devā ṛṣayo'pi jitendriyāḥ ।
ādyaṃ gadādharaṃ dhyāyañchrāddhapiṇḍādidānataḥ ॥ 2.50.71 ॥

kulānāṃ śatamuddhṛtya brahmalokaṃ nayet pitṝn।
gayā gayo gayā dityo gāyatrī ca gadādharaḥ ॥ 2.50.72 ॥

gayā gayāsuraścaiva ṣaṅgayā muktidāyakāḥ।
gayākhyānamidaṃ puṇyaṃ yaḥ paṭetsatataṃ naraḥ ॥ 2.50.73 ॥

śrṛṇuyācchraddhayā yastu sa yāti paramāṃ gatim।
pāṭhayedvā gayākhyānaṃ viprebhyaḥ puṇyakṛnnaraḥ ॥ 2.50.74 ॥

gayāśrāddhaṃ kṛtaṃ tena kṛtaṃ tena suniścitam।
gayāyā mahimānañca hyabhyasedyaḥ samāhitaḥ ॥ 2.50.75 ॥

teneṣṭaṃ rājasūyena aśvamedhena nārada।
likhedvā lekhayedvāpi pūjayedvāpi pustakam ॥ 2.50.76 ॥

tasya gehe sthirā lakṣmīḥ suprasannā bhaviṣyati।
upākhyānamidaṃ puṇyaṃ gṛhe tiṣṭhati pustakam ॥ 2.50.77 ॥

sarpāgnicaurajanitaṃ bhayaṃ tatra na vidyate।
śrāddhakāle paṭedyastu gayāmāhātmyamuttamam ॥ 2.50.78 ॥

vidhihīnantu tatsarvaṃ pitṝṇāntu gayāsamam।
yāni tīrthāni trailokye tāni dṛṣṭāni tatra vai।
yena jñātaṃ gayākhyānaṃ śrutaṃ vā paṭitaṃ mune ॥ 2.50.79 ॥

           ।।sūta uvāca।।
sanatkumāro munipuṅgavāya puṇyāṃ kathāñcātha nivedya bhaktyā।
svamāśramaṃ puṇyavanairupetaṃ visṛjya saṃgītaguruṃ jagāma ॥ 2.50.80 ॥

iti śrīmahāpurāṇe vāyuprokte gayāmahātmyaṃ nāma pañcāśattamo'dhyāyaḥ ।। 50 ।। samāptamidaṃ vāyupurāṇam ।। * ।
